Peter,

Last year, the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) and Leader Kevin McCarthy submitted me for the prestigious “Young Guns Program” and they declared me “On the Radar”! This program is designed to help Republican candidates running in the top competitive districts around the country to provide strategic support.

**But here’s the catch:** candidates in the program must prove they can raise enough money to sustain their campaigns and pave a clear path to victory, in order to be given support by the NRCC. **Since this membership is so exclusive, I have a hefty goal that I have to meet before the quarter is up at the end of March - $100,000, and I’m more than $40,000 short.**

[**Will you help me prove to top Republican’s in Washington, that it’s worth investing in this race by chipping into my campaign today?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=40b1319966d14ffa8437746d5e94bb74&_e=ZwMDv5R6Fon5sBBZpWP_GYTzWv5VpXqP3PzegqSPn_qM3Vt4Ql3sm4T7IHYKiseUo7KK-rrVcWnrdzjD9KGeyHnZzJC_STPbdfLwPPxjQptP1XrIVU4RhT09_sp6UB6dhyvTDQkSSXmRGvDyGgo9aEfYGCUziKfwl1h1399RTtJc8AtCkVZow5R7_d84Npn7Cb7S_FTPPEUuaw6co5S6lQ5GpIDF4etrF2mFIhGQo2xYVWCW_F-Hdiy8VRiKQWb4PtuxYYPHIOMLC2OYDY_TxphFOsVfZWWrxLUd7Cd0Awr_J4d-xlkGAAdIjpOZu5823Q3ALNLKUSTTXcMRDlYYPQylkeemSCc8tkZd9fCGpy1z6h4VGmgOsl21MomKIPbb)

I’m running in one of the most competitive races in the country - _in 2020 I lost by less than 10,000 votes._ I need the support of the NRCC to WIN and kick my ultra-liberal opponent out of office.

Republican’s only need to pick up five seats to ensure the majority - and it all comes down to Minnesota. I can’t afford to fall short _**again**_. With all eyes on this race, I sincerely need all the help I can get, and that means crushing this goal before March 31st. * * *
Tyler Kistner is a native Minnesotan who served 10 years on active duty, mostly in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces unit known as the Marine Raiders. Like so many Minnesotans, Tyler is concerned about the direction of America and its future, not only for our generation but for our children and future generations of America. Peter — Last month, Imani reached out to tell you about New Jersey’s corrupt ballot design — the most corrupt ballot design in the country. Now that Imani is well on her way to qualifying to be on the ballot (and, therefore, in Ballot Siberia), we’re asking for your help. There’s a reason the machine designed New Jersey ballots to shunt progressives off to the side: because they think it’ll help them silence our progressive movement. **We need to show them that their petty political games, anti-democratic tactics, and blatant corruption don’t scare us — that we have a grassroots army on our side who are sick of their corruption and sick of the ballot line. ** [**So, we’re asking you to stand with us in our fight against New Jersey’s corrupt ballot design. clean_body: | | | We need to take a stand Peter — Last month, Imani reached out to tell you about New Jersey’s corrupt ballot design — the most corrupt ballot design in the country. Now that Imani is well on her way to qualifying to be on the ballot (and, therefore, in Ballot Siberia), we’re asking for your help. There’s a reason the machine designed New Jersey ballots to shunt progressives off to the side: because they think it’ll help them silence our progressive movement. We need to show them that their petty political games, anti-democratic tactics, and blatant corruption don’t scare us — that we have a grassroots army on our side who are sick of their corruption and sick of the ballot line. Imani’s campaign for Congress is all about giving marginalized communities a voice in Congress. Meanwhile, the New Jersey machine (with help from the Democratic establishment) is doing everything they can to silence us. Thank you for being a part of our movement. — Team Oakley | | = | | Paid for by Oakley for Congress Oakley for Congress PO Box 1181 Montclair, NJ 07042 United States | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Tim
subject: got a minute?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2674%2E3611125%2EVdxcn7 ][IMG]

Hey folks,

After a long day, I’m finally sitting down with an ice cold beer (Miller
Lite, of course) and looking over some numbers. Before we draw up plans
and figure out our campaign strategy for the next phase of this race, I
wanted to get your take on things.

My Republican opponents are too busy making backroom deals with special
interest groups to care about Ohio’s working families. But when I get to
the Senate, I’ll be answering to you, folks.

I’d love to sit down over a beer and talk about the issues that matter
most to you and your family, but unfortunately there isn’t enough time for
me to hear directly from everyone.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/EM_BS_RYA_220310_EN_BeerSurvey_A0_na_U1_X1_M2?t=1007&akid=2674%2E3611125%2EVdxcn7 ]Instead, can you spare a couple minutes (two, tops!) for a quick issues
survey to let me know what you think are the most important issues in this
race?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/EM_BS_RYA_220310_EN_BeerSurvey_A0_na_U1_X1_M2?t=1008&akid=2674%2E3611125%2EVdxcn7 ]Take the survey

The road to defending and expanding our Democratic Senate majority runs
right through Ohio, and the odds are stacked against us—we need to build a
strong grassroots coalition to stand a chance of flipping this seat blue.

That’s why I’d love to hear your thoughts on the race. So please take a
minute to complete our survey if you can.

Looking forward to grabbing a cold one and mulling over the results.

Thanks,

Tim

[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/EM_BS_RYA_220310_EN_BeerSurvey_A0_na_U1_X1_M2?t=1009&akid=2674%2E3611125%2EVdxcn7 ]Tim with Beer

touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,

There is nothing more **fundamental** and **sacred** in our Constitution than the Right to Life. And that right is **under attack** by the Biden Democrats.

| [**STAND UP FOR LIFE ** ](http://links.feenstraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=70b938be44d84e1197556ad813170f3c&_m=3b112eec7c884214b05bdc175d2812e3&_e=65qYfXG1q3p9RxqU6YcEgnIFO6i0DvAuNWLL0fX-NDluVMbcbWPpNPLzi1uFk0l4t67JJn3iHFO64OWAM7MIry2bwDjWiKwRsso91bmjEWzZ5qX5uiA29NRWsPEVKT626uci5p1sQrbn7_kJIupGf281szHW7jCeJ3KtCfYC5m-kmyRr0Rmb7E1Rb_qzm3RBpE-kUhfDV_9K7Rad8cDWPsEOoRDB9knpTskvEXEa_VmncJfkuqKr-YxCsBEPldZhYfwkUzrZFhjDenqW6F6cT35TpH6M-dWHzmNyjXvoHfwEIRjIusUB5nyCshbxGjGLWugCNMHd4f3yMEKzrxMGCuzhwcxzqkklWCH84yWMKqtefkjdBfw8lm0yUgX6RTo6uTnPa2VQZLhsbKVCVdON0-lxWuuqstNJxHzQtfNSX5wGn_FGs5oXXq1bw67XonNKOCLk3Iee8n4fxYK8qTYx5VkmaD1lyKKc8FHOEDOHbuRIIXLWtpBq5v0XIL8osaNFTC4VPrT80Piw70orgxoOQBmPb2JWi1-jrhHuBJnOpTSnYwTc51XNWULst2XH281T)

name: Team NRSC
subject: Update on gas prices
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We want to hear your opinion
Peter

Biden announced on Tuesday that we will officially halt any investment into the Russian energy sector. This move comes on the day that gas prices around the country hit a record high.

Does President Biden have a plan for reducing gas prices here in the United States? Nobody seems to have an answer to this but . . .

**Here’s what we do know:**
* Gas Prices in the U.S. are at a record high.
* Last year, Biden cancelled the Keystone pipeline which would have helped America become more energy independent with an additional 500-800 barrels of oil per day.
* As of right now, President Biden has no plans of resuming construction on the Keystone Pipeline project.
* This has led to American’s suffering at the pump.

**Here’s what we want to know:**

clean_body: We want to hear your opinion Peter Biden announced on Tuesday that we will officially halt any investment into the Russian energy sector. This move comes on the day that gas prices around the country hit a record high. Does President Biden have a plan for reducing gas prices here in the United States? Nobody seems to have an answer to this but . . . Here’s what we do know: Gas Prices in the U.S. are at a record high. Last year, Biden cancelled the Keystone pipeline which would have helped America become more energy independent with an additional 500-800 barrels of oil per day. As of right now, President Biden has no plans of resuming construction on the Keystone Pipeline project. This has led to American’s suffering at the pump. name: Rebekah Jones for Congress
subject: NEW POLL: Rebekah Jones LEADING Gaetz by 3.5 points!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebekah Jones Campaign
body:
Rebekah Jones leading Matt Gaetz in the race for Florida's First District | A recent poll by The Listener Group, a conservative-leaning poll
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/a7NznkPtK/c?w=cbUcrDUNCxpCfEp229MgQzmfX4nA6fLlPPf1-S1u3fo.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmViZWthaGpvbmVzY2FtcGFpZ24uY29tL3NvL2E3Tnpua1B0Sz9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdlN2E4N2UxLTcwNDMtNDE3OS1iODM4LTVjYTg5MjBmYWFkNyJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| | BREAKING NEWS:
---
| | Rebekah Jones leading Matt Gaetz in the race for Florida's First District
---
| | A recent poll by The Listener Group, a conservative-leaning polling firm in Northwest Florida, shows that Rebekah Jones is NOW AHEAD of Matt Gaetz by 3.5 points. Up 11.5 points from last October, when Rebekah was still starting up her campaign after her August 2021 launch, the numbers from this March 2022 poll of likely voters are proof of how her campaign style, messaging, and commitment to represent the people is paying off. The over-crowded race (now with seven total candidates) came down to Rebekah and Gaetz, with every other primary candidate in both parties polling below 1%. With all candidates polled, Rebekah is ahead 6 points. And in a head-to-head race against Gaetz, voters in Florida's first district supported Rebekah Jones over incumbent Gaetz across the board. "When I came here, everyone was so skeptical. I had people actually emailing me angry that I decided to run here, and not a more liberal district," said Rebekah. "I said, look, I grew up in this area. I think people will surprise you. Stop counting this as a loss before we've even gotten started. Though I never thought we'd be ahead this far ahead of the election!" With the backing of workers, teachers, doctors, scientists, professors, parents, veterans, and a campaign team comprised of a republican, a democrat, and an NPA, Rebekah's coalition continues to grow into an unstoppable force for good in the typically conservative area. "Whatever hesitancy people had about helping or donating because they didn't like our chances, I hope this serves as the proof they need to get off the sidelines and help us keep this momentum going," Rebekah said. "We've managed to do all of this with just a couple hundred thousand dollars, and we're up against one of the most prolific fundraisers in all of Congress. We need dollars to defeat that dastard!"
---
| | | [**Rebekah Takes the Lead - Click here to help her solidify her victory!**](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/a7NznkPtK/c?w=1yznntWXfZwza5PvQTiZdC0vgDYAtJJXi7u7WOamPaU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3JlYmVrYWhqb25lc3ExIiwiciI6IjlmMjdmZjY0LTMyOWMtNDFmNC04OGQyLTEyYTEyMTk3YTVkZSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdlN2E4N2UxLTcwNDMtNDE3OS1iODM4LTVjYTg5MjBmYWFkNyJ9)

clean_body: Rebekah Jones leading Matt Gaetz in the race for Florida's First District | A recent poll by The Listener Group, a conservative-leaning poll | | Can't see this message? | | | | | BREAKING NEWS: | | Rebekah Jones leading Matt Gaetz in the race for Florida's First District | | A recent poll by The Listener Group, a conservative-leaning polling firm in Northwest Florida, shows that Rebekah Jones is NOW AHEAD of Matt Gaetz by 3.5 points. Up 11.5 points from last October, when Rebekah was still starting up her campaign after her August 2021 launch, the numbers from this March 2022 poll of likely voters are proof of how her campaign style, messaging, and commitment to represent the people is paying off. The over-crowded race (now with seven total candidates) came down to Rebekah and Gaetz, with every other primary candidate in both parties polling below 1%. With all candidates polled, Rebekah is ahead 6 points. And in a head-to-head race against Gaetz, voters in Florida's first district supported Rebekah Jones over incumbent Gaetz across the board. "When I came here, everyone was so skeptical. I had people actually emailing me angry that I decided to run here, and not a more liberal district," said Rebekah. "I said, look, I grew up in this area. I think people will surprise you. Stop counting this as a loss before we've even gotten started. Though I never thought we'd be ahead this far ahead of the election!" With the backing of workers, teachers, doctors, scientists, professors, parents, veterans, and a campaign team comprised of a republican, a democrat, and an NPA, Rebekah's coalition continues to grow into an unstoppable force for good in the typically conservative area. "Whatever hesitancy people had about helping or donating because they didn't like our chances, I hope this serves as the proof they need to get off the sidelines and help us keep this momentum going," Rebekah said. "We've managed to do all of this with just a couple hundred thousand dollars, and we're up against one of the most prolific fundraisers in all of Congress. We need dollars to defeat that dastard!" | | | | | The data is clear: Rebekah Jones is winning this race because of your help and support. , , or to help Rebekah widen her lead! Stop sitting on the sidelines, I need you to act NOW. | My father has endorsed this great Conservative Patriot to be the next Senator of North Carolina and with your support, we can make it become a reality. >> I know that you won't let Ted down. Thank you for supporting a great Conservative leader and helping us put a stop to the Radical Socialist agenda that is destroying America. Sincerely, Donald Trump Jr. TED BUDD IS THE TRUMP-ENDORSED REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR U.S. SENATE IN NORTH CAROLINA Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

Our race is one of only _two_ Senate seats most likely to flip red to blue. We’re ahead in the most recent poll against Ron Johnson because of your support, and a brand-new survey out of Wisconsin shows his approval rating at 33%.

**Ron Johnson is seriously vulnerable, and _The Washington Post_ is reporting that I "could be the best chance to rid the Senate” of this guy.**

Look, we're at a real turning point in our campaign, which is why when I found out Mitch McConnell’s Super PAC is going “all-in” to protect Ron Johnson, I wasn’t surprised. The GOP’s path to taking back the Senate runs right through Wisconsin, and they’ll do whatever it takes to sink us.

So, I’ll be frank — it’ll take a surge of grassroots donations to take on the more than $200 million Republicans have in the bank. But I’m not accepting any corporate PAC money, which means defeating Ron Johnson and his allies depends on your support.

**[Would you consider adding a donation of $10 or more ahead of our first FEC deadline of 2022? Republicans only need to flip ONE seat to take back the Senate, and Wisconsin will be the tipping point. Click here to pitch in.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42836665/334535434/-1088791470?refcode=em22_220310_tippin_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220310_tippin_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGNmNDYxMy1lMWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8i54eh0yLf8VakE1lL5c6z7ok4qxzHCmVAXJ0Tq6lO4=)**

Every contribution you can give, no matter how large or small, keeps me out on the road talking with Wisconsin voters and sharing our campaign message. If we want to defeat Ron Johnson and get this Senate seat working for the people, not the special interests, then we need all hands on deck now more than ever.

Thanks for all you have done, and will continue to do, to help us win this race.

— Sarah Godlewski

P.S. I’m so proud of how we’re choosing to run this campaign. No corporate PACs. name: =?utf-8?Q?Heidi=20St.=20John?=
subject: Elections Have Consequences.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Heidi St
body:
Check out our newsletter! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/heidistjohnforcongress/elections-have-consequences?e=b0bcc6b4f9)
---
| | |
---
| | | March 10, 2022 Hi Friends,

If the recent past has taught us nothing else, it has certainly confirmed Barack Obama’s offhand quip that “elections have consequences.” In just 14 months, a nation with energy independence and the best economy in American history has become a debtor nation, begging our enemies for oil while crippling our middle class with crushing inflation and runaway food and energy costs. The 2020 election of Joe Biden has had consequences far beyond even the most pessimistic projections of pols and economists alike. On his first day in office, Joe Biden signed an executive order which revoked the Keystone XL pipeline permit. In paying off his Green New Deal donors, Biden set in motion a deliberate undermining of American independence and a relentless rise in energy prices. Those rising energy costs continue to trickle down into every sector of the American economy, from rising food costs to record-high gasoline and increasing home heating costs. This inflationary tax on America’s vulnerable working class continues to crush those who are least able to afford this burden. And what does Joe Biden blame for rising energy costs? The war in Ukraine. We ALL know that while the recent war has exacerbated already rising energy costs, it was Biden’s policy decisions that have created the current energy crisis. We have reached the point where Americans can no longer unquestioningly believe ANYTHING elected leaders tell us. From RINOs like Jaime Herrera Beutler who voted to impeach a Republican President, to “America First” candidates like formerly registered Democrat Joe Kent who claims to be a lifelong conservative, to dishonest career politicians like Joe Biden, American voters MUST look beyond campaign slogans and press releases. Elections have consequences. Facts matter. Truth matters. Our nation’s future matters. Please help me get to Congress by **[_donating today_](https://heidistjohnforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=46e715d1574a19c15defda548&id=e9023744c9&e=b0bcc6b4f9)**.

For Freedom,
---
|
---
| _**Heidi St. John**_
_Candidate for Congress, SW Washington_
Standing Up For What We Believe

subject: Ron Johnson said WHAT?!

body:
| | | **BREAKING:
GOP Senator says Obamacare should be REPLACED if Republicans take back power**

**[We need to move NOW. GOP Senator Ron Johnson just called for Obamacare to be repealed and REPLACED if Republicans defeat our Congressional Majorities. The last time the GOP held power, they tried to take away affordable health care from Americans more than 70 times- and it's clear they would try again should they ever get the chance. We CAN stop them before it's too late, but ONLY if grassroots Democrats like you rise up to defend our historic House Majority. Will you rush in $3 to elect strong Democrats and defeat every last anti-Obamacare Republican?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/j~)**

body:
Hi Peter, Did you see the recent news? Governor Evers gerrymandered the congressional district lines, making our re-election more challenging.
Hi Peter,Did you see the recent news? Governor Evers gerrymandered the congressional district lines, making our re-election more challenging. **Gov. Evers and liberals in Madison redrew the map behind closed doors in hopes of taking me out.**[**I 'm their top target. Can you pitch in to help?**](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zhyjlkk-idtjvlhlh-r/) [Help Us Fight Back](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zhyjlkk-idtjvlhlh-y/) Our redrawn First Congressional District contains new cities, new towns, and tens of thousands of new voters. The political complexion changed from one with many long-time Republican voters to one with many people who have voted for Democrats in the past and have not had the opportunity to hear our conservative message.**For the past three years, I have been honored to be the voice in Washington for the First Congressional District. Regardless of what the final congressional district map looks like, I'm in this race to win. subject: A HUGE win for Freedom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAWTHORN FOR NC
body:
Details inside! Check out this exciting update:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zr89bo169dpvrg4m5792smqgdrffncbmqhkh0m6o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkeq32t5nmeq33cjl61qn4cdkmoq37c3nm6or9ctn6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf4thlmeq62p3keupjac9nm9j7aslgeqpj3cdmm1ojbdb7c2p77crm6dj3acj2c1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8r6cclkmkpmfchjcoqe1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdgm6p74sdgmcoj24no)

| | | | | | | | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z8r7mt9aal9s8nauncldifq2ckki0616379i8a00_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjie6ob6c9h2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
**BREAKING: I just WON my lawsuit**...which means the **far-Left will NOT be able to keep me off the ballot** in 2022.
**But this frivolous lawsuit cost us _tremendously_**...wasting both time and money that we needed to spend making our case to North Carolina voters.
**Right now, we’ve nearly exhausted our campaign’s financial resources** and I need your help to make sure **we raise enough money in March to keep our momentum rising**.
**[Will you pitch in $25 or more to keep us fighting?](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ztd79lr9lpjomsogcl081dv57fa02odmbln10oeg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjie6ob6c9h2bs)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH MADISON!](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z92pon6742k073usc0ohddubh2miepirmbcemk38_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjie6ob6c9h2bs)
---
I can’t thank you enough for your support during this lawsuit...and believe me: this lawsuit is bigger than just us.

Now we’ve won, we’ve set the precedent that the Left can **NEVER** weaponize the 14th Amendment to silence a conservative candidate ever again.

Now, we can focus on what we need to do: WIN this election in November and FLIP Congress.

**[If you can, pitch in as little as $25 or more to help me regain the resources I need to defeat the Democrats running against me and their liberal mainstream media allies this year >>>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zdfqrnot5psg9kq3eluot04mkftp31l31n3auct0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjie6ob6c9h2bs)**

My team informed me that you’re a top America First Patriot and I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side. It’s not going to be easy...but this is a **MAJOR victory** and I know we can use this momentum to carry us through November if we rally together.
| | | [SAVE OUR COUNTRY!](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2za18hev8vehhdhbpohrfb5q9v2pd8mut1j6fngc0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjie6ob6c9h2bs)
---
Thank you in advance for your generous support!

Yours in the fight for liberty,

Madison Cawthorn
Congressman, NC-14

PAID FOR BY CAWTHORN FOR NC

name: Shawn Collins (R-CA)
subject: I’m running for Governor of California
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shawn Collins for California
body:
My name is Shawn Collins. I am a black, conservative veteran. Today, I’m announcing that I’m running for Governor of Califor
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfl5n074bag9k4mj32ruvluitdqgue9d5t4cn728_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf0oj26pjbapdietgj2t34shgj6cdl65hm8s74shhn0thgcsprbd1j6jj35d1hmurt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8r6cclkmkpmfchicopb1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdgm6p74sdgm4p724no)
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze1qejpfvqs81sh2hm8p8cbsrdnfkd3fg6tkq40o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjie6ob2cjh2bs)
---
| | Friend, My name is Shawn Collins. I am a black, conservative veteran. Today, I’m announcing that I’m running for Governor of California to take back our state from the destructive, far-left policies of Gavin Newsom.

Take a look:
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhjm1jcdprkusbl6mi2hbkkihrmr2b44k3994h28_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjie6ob2cjh2bs)
---
| **I have lived the American Dream.** I grew up in a broken home in a rough neighborhood. I had to fend for myself as a child. My experience living in eight different homes, including sleeping on my uncle’s living room floor, is an important reminder that anything is possible when you embrace American values.

**Now I want to help others live that dream as well.** That’s why, as your governor, I will cut taxes, end the divisive curriculum taught under critical race theory, make our communities a safer place to live, and lower the cost of living.

Gavin Newsom, on the other hand, has embraced policies that hurt low-income kids like me. Inflation is through the roof, crime is out of control and our supply chain is crippled.

**We can do better. We must do better. Please, will you join me as I fight to restore freedom to our state?**

---
| [DONATE $250](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb1br854fb5kmv7kqm5kj2omuvavq2d4g1kdkcko_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjie6ob2cjh2bs "DONATE $250")

---
| Sincerely,

name: Dave Kubal
subject: Ron DeSantis needs your prayers
body:
Will you join the Prayer Team for Governor Ron DeSantis? Together we will lift up Governor DeSantis in prayer, especially no
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq0cpl1uakl5h8n787in7l26uvftufsdf2tvogn0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u5im9p3im2q36s5gclp32d776arj0tr6chhj1pbgeji61chhm9o70tj26oq75dtnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchmcopb9d9jcup3aphh62p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1cdie9or1clhm49fg)
Dear Prayerful Friend, [**Will you join the Prayer Team for Governor Ron DeSantis?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq77e8u5ckg45ea4kvb6iqnvupscmmgovft3eloo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjie6ob5cdh2bs) ** ** Together we will lift up Governor DeSantis in prayer, especially now that he is in the national spotlight. ** ** I was with Governor DeSantis recently where I was able to tell him about all the people who pray for him. He said, “THANK YOU and tell them to NOT stop.” I know he will cherish a personal note of prayer from you. [**Which is why it is so important that you sign your PRAYER NOTE FOR GOVERNOR RON DESANTIS today and use the extra space provided to send him a special message of thanks and encouragement.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdojg4pi1h75di29vmlk28brdvnj5rrv7cogeq4o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjie6ob5cdh2bs) Now that he’s in the national spotlight, standing firmly in faith, and fighting for our shared Christian conservative values – Governor DeSantis is a top target for the radical left. ** ** As you well know, Governor DeSantis has had to endure relentless personal and spiritual attacks on a daily basis. We’ve seen these attacks appear in many different ways... Attacks from liberal “Big Tech” billionaires who want to silence Governor DeSantis and other outspoken champions of our Christian faith. Attacks from “fake news” media spinning biased stories against him, his family, and his political allies. And attacks from liberal politicians who desperately want to defeat his pro-faith, pro-family, and pro-freedom agenda at the ballot box. Today I need **your** help as a prayer leader within your community to combat all these attacks on Governor DeSantis by blanketing his home in the Florida Governor’s residence with around the clock prayer protection. [**So please, join my prayer team for Governor DeSantis and uplift him with a personal note to sustain and encourage him.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgagnec00gqd2d2barn7l06628thf49isc818jn0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjie6ob5cdh2bs) As you may know, Governor DeSantis has taken on the full force of the progressive socialist left: He said NO to a government-mandated vaccine passport. He said NO to amnesty for illegal immigrants. He said NO to Big Tech censorship. He said NO to defunding the police, and He said NO to teaching destructive Critical Race Theory in schools. Won’t you please join us as we pray for Governor DeSantis and let him know just how much you appreciate all that he is doing right now? Let me step back and introduce myself. My name is Dave Kubal and I’m blessed to be the President and CEO of an army of prayer warriors called Intercessors for America (IFA).

Our mission at IFA is to inform, connect, and mobilize intercessors to pray for our nation and our leaders.

[**That’s exactly why I’ve written to you today asking you to sign this personal PRAYER CARD for GOVERNOR DESANTIS so we can show him Christian Conservative Americans have his back.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfokrk7vrdh10ot3p9fsnlrqnurlin6fi1d5v0so_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjie6ob5cdh2bs)

Specifically, we desire to reach Christians nationwide with information and tools to unite them in effective prayer for our nation.

We must remember that God’s word instructs us to pray regularly for our leaders. **_(1 Timothy 2:1-2)_**. Together we will honor God, lift up Governor DeSantis in prayer, and give thanks for all that he continues to do as a champion of our shared Christian faith and values. Thank you for being a prayer warrior I can rely upon. God Bless, Sincerely, David Kubal President & CEO Intercessors for America (IFA) P.S. Governor DeSantis needs our prayer protection now more than ever. Please join the hundreds of thousands thanking God for using Governor DeSantis and protecting him and his beautiful young family by signing your [**PRAYER NOTE FOR GOVERNOR RON DESANTIS.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5ufi7u1sa975r3vt6ctnkof6aul63hpkkaf6qmo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjie6ob5cdh2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhm1veg1bi8dhfe655lkkq42o0ftkkjmvvejcef0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjie6ob5cdh2bs) Intercessors for America (IFA) is a 501(c)(3) ministry organization and was founded in 1973 when God impressed upon the hearts of a group of godly, respected men the necessity of prayer and fasting. | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7eg8jfgthj38e7ur72v4qqr0k8u09i6i7akv79o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjie6ob5cdh2bs) | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zea4cajar7lbsrolmbjkq0cjvi0ed71s20a5ef4o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjie6ob5cdh2bs) | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zihe8imobu1d331qn4kdn2orv6d6rf9snk3b8k90_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjie6ob5cdh2bs)

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: The radical Left is in our schools
body:
School boards hold massive sway over the education of our children and the future of our country, but no conservative organizati
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4unjugeqbhmv1mtp7e21rbdktskrs5mptn078c0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpj8orhmtge3cbmchibddbhcqpnas356lgeeotkedpm1dlhcop65dpie6qe2spnmv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6pj35d5l6hjr5cj666ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5hm9p70s9h6aoh5u)
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuj3mji1bi9n5soi5vdp7p4j50qlcleea4fviuhg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjie1oj2clh2bs) [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3d1vvbkh5tro7vunkda4dsdj65t6j2d9dfnad18_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjie1oj2clh2bs) Fellow American, School boards hold massive sway over the education of our children and the future of our country, but no conservative organization has been holding them accountable. **_Until now_.** I’m proud to announce the newest initiative of Turning Point USA (TPUSA) — our **_School Board Watchlist_**. **To help us stand up against Marxist teachers, radical superintendents, and anti-American curricula on behalf of the 50,600,000 students shaped by their school boards’ decisions, I need your immediate support. ** [**My goal is to raise $24,000 by the end of this month. Will you help me protect students from left-wing indoctrination — and put control of their futures back in the hands of parents — with your gift of $12, $25, $50, $100, or more?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi72b096ddfafmvt2le4c3h9ts711hebkv215b9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjie1oj2clh2bs) [**Support the School Board Watchlist**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1jpj22q4gtba5knd1ovmi1s9r4pjln4efd6s1d8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjie1oj2clh2bs) Leftists have taken over the vast majority of school districts in every state — likely even your district! The 13,500+ school boards across the United States ultimately determine how our children’s minds will be shaped ... and whether they learn the truth about America’s powerful history, Founding Fathers, and role in the world or whether they embrace the toxic, socialist, America-hating lies of the radical Left. Turn on the nightly news and you’ll see the horrors of what K-12 “learning” has become in modern America. As socialism and “woke” culture infiltrate our society, leftist school boards across the country are:
* **adopting Critical Race Theory (CRT) curriculum** , ensuring students are indoctrinated with this dangerous Marxist vision of race;
* requiring teachers participate in **discriminatory professional development disguised as “diversity training”** and putting Leftist ideology before education;
* **renaming schools because of their “racist” namesakes** , which include national heroes like Abraham Lincoln and George Washington; and
* continuing to **use COVID as an excuse to maintain online learning** , despite extensive evidence that in-person learning poses little to no risk to students — and knowing that online learning leaves many students underserved.

[**That’s why TPUSA’s School Board Watchlist will expose the corrupt and radical decisions school boards are making, and then equip parents and community members with the information they need to demand a better education for their students! But I need your support to do it.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5e1igc9umekv1iq8f1n96o267tclri723ndd050_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjie1oj2clh2bs) Right now, TPUSA is assembling the nation’s **FIRST EVER** school district ranking system of any kind, focusing exclusively on school districts’ acceptance or rejection of radical Leftist and anti-American curricula, textbooks, and policies. TPUSA’s School Board Watchlist will expose: >>> Radical agendas being pushed by the nation’s largest school districts >>> Leftist, anti-American, Marxist, and CRT curricula and textbooks >>> Corrupt boards and individuals who pursue anti-American policies >>> And more! We’ve published all of our findings at **[SchoolBoardWatchlist.com](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkm5vhqojn25brmvvv598k3vdkkvjaoi3epcqqvg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjie1oj2clh2bs)** ... and we’re using our TPUSA megaphones — online, on campus, and over the airwaves — to bring national attention to the secretive, disturbing agendas being pushed by Leftist school boards so they can no longer hide in the shadows. [**But to have the biggest possible impact, I’m asking for your support of $12 or more. Please help us reach our goal of raising $24,000 by the end of this month.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1fbc1i61933m3a6fnigr6cdrpahfe0j3katpu7g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjie1oj2clh2bs) [**Support the School Board Watchlist**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvd3879brrdap9nj5cr960rl4dho4iv8r7tjr2r0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjie1oj2clh2bs) The time to fight back is right **NOW** — before it’s too late. Thank you for your support to put public education back in the hands of parents and the community, **NOT** politicized school boards. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: Pro Life Update
subject: A bright light during dark hours
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, cons
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8bdk7bh7848blm25ftmn2chiun6rmukdpl9db8g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u5oe1c3jcjgbadj0saojcotnmlrb2crgmhie4cjgmkq3dcpmmap7cptj62pr6s77q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchncoq6ecr0surm4phgm2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1ctg60p30s9i649fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zukfb7thr1phlktab8c2u4871dli7et3uenivpuo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1g68o72chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2fh9v0ufe70vchh3773acdipp2sn8j5et6b9lf8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1g68o72chh2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z48euqimtkf6lp067cu07ohca52avebv7lhag8j0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1g68o72chh2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zffmm8an81s9snb0td0n958ngr5end6er1f1s5sg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1g68o72chh2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhiijc1eem4ref379kvg6sk7ca9inm84vcvcchng_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1g68o72chh2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0i9jnku0dtvk9q3sq7rdlr7et4k706nbhcbhn08_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1g68o72chh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: The radical Left is in our schools
body:
School boards hold massive sway over the education of our children and the future of our country, but no conservative organization has been holding them accountable. Until now. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9690%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=k%2bKjxpPRe4MlfEEXtYwWeA&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25256%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OOJAQGqadqLtsX%2fc%2fg%2faZg&sysid=1) [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25256%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OOJAQGqadqLtsX%2fc%2fg%2faZg&sysid=1) Fellow American, School boards hold massive sway over the education of our children and the future of our country, but no conservative organization has been holding them accountable. **_Until now_.** I’m proud to announce the newest initiative of Turning Point USA (TPUSA) -- our **_School Board Watchlist_**. **To help us stand up against Marxist teachers, radical superintendents, and anti-American curricula on behalf of the 50,600,000 students shaped by their school boards’ decisions, I need your immediate support. ** [**My goal is to raise $24,000 by the end of this month. Will you help me protect students from left-wing indoctrination -- and put control of their futures back in the hands of parents -- with your gift of $12, $25, $50, $100, or more?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25257%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rfcUkMX0GY%2fWp1%2fiBvqr9w&sysid=1) [**Support the School Board Watchlist**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25258%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I2dRrz%2bKpXWhz0JZMN0LcA&sysid=1) Leftists have taken over the vast majority of school districts in every state -- likely even your district! The 13,500+ school boards across the United States ultimately determine how our children’s minds will be shaped ... and whether they learn the truth about America’s powerful history, Founding Fathers, and role in the world or whether they embrace the toxic, socialist, America-hating lies of the radical Left. Turn on the nightly news and you’ll see the horrors of what K-12 “learning” has become in modern America. As socialism and “woke” culture infiltrate our society, leftist school boards across the country are:
* **adopting Critical Race Theory (CRT) curriculum** , ensuring students are indoctrinated with this dangerous Marxist vision of race;
* requiring teachers participate in **discriminatory professional development disguised as “diversity training”** and putting Leftist ideology before education;
* **renaming schools because of their “racist” namesakes** , which include national heroes like Abraham Lincoln and George Washington; and
* continuing to **use COVID as an excuse to maintain online learning** , despite extensive evidence that in-person learning poses little to no risk to students -- and knowing that online learning leaves many students underserved.

[**That’s why TPUSA’s School Board Watchlist will expose the corrupt and radical decisions school boards are making, and then equip parents and community members with the information they need to demand a better education for their students! But I need your support to do it.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25259%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IqBik9bzMzMG7a8bhpgA1g&sysid=1) Right now, TPUSA is assembling the nation’s **FIRST EVER** school district ranking system of any kind, focusing exclusively on school districts’ acceptance or rejection of radical Leftist and anti-American curricula, textbooks, and policies. TPUSA’s School Board Watchlist will expose: >>> Radical agendas being pushed by the nation’s largest school districts >>> Leftist, anti-American, Marxist, and CRT curricula and textbooks >>> Corrupt boards and individuals who pursue anti-American policies >>> And more! We’ve published all of our findings at **[SchoolBoardWatchlist.com](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25250%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2b%2bfUUKgg1DKNMxZevaqx7Q&sysid=1)** ... and we’re using our TPUSA megaphones -- online, on campus, and over the airwaves -- to bring national attention to the secretive, disturbing agendas being pushed by Leftist school boards so they can no longer hide in the shadows. [**But to have the biggest possible impact, I’m asking for your support of $12 or more. Please help us reach our goal of raising $24,000 by the end of this month.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25251%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ROhyXHdySKnossFdsm5Nvg&sysid=1) [**Support the School Board Watchlist**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25258%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I2dRrz%2bKpXWhz0JZMN0LcA&sysid=1) The time to fight back is right **NOW** -- before it’s too late. Thank you for your support to put public education back in the hands of parents and the community, **NOT** politicized school boards. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9690%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=k%2bKjxpPRe4MlfEEXtYwWeA&sysid=1)

name: Charlie Crist
subject: I need to ask you something
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:

Hello,
Right now, Ukrainians are bravely defending their country with Iowa-made weapons. Russian armored columns are getting stopped in their tracks with American Javelin missiles – crucial parts of which are made right here in Iowa.
**But if it were up to Donald Trump, Ukraine would be on its own against his pal Putin – still waiting for American military aid until President Zelensky agreed to open a sham investigation into Joe Biden.**
And my opponent Chuck Grassley was one of 52 Republican senators who chose blind loyalty to Trump over helping Ukraine defend itself against Russia.
When I defeat Chuck Grassely this November, I will be the most senior military person ever-elected to the Senate. I understand the real threat Russia poses and the importance of NATO, and I’ll ensure Iowa continues to help Ukraine against Putin’s war-crime invasion.
If our campaign is successful in turning Iowa blue, Democrats are guaranteed to hold onto our majority in the Senate. But the polls are showing a very close race, and McConnell’s Super PACs are about to spend millions against me.
**We need to raise $250,000 before our most important mid-month deadline of the entire campaign, and right now we’re still falling short. The only way we’ll defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Senate majority is if grassroots donors like you give right now:**
[**I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important. Please, will you give $5 or more right now – no amount is too small – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42843375/334554461/-42398318?refcode=em20220311am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGRmZDdhMC00M2ExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fL6w9KJd_6CS9GGxMlrYjHrfyZytUpWDiaxowCFKQak=)

_Michigan RINO Fred Upton turns his back on a photographer the same way he has turned his back on the American people_ Spineless RINO Fred Upton joined 38 House Republicans in voting to approve a 2,741-page federal spending bill that attempts to strip law-abiding Americans of their Second Amendment rights... The _NICS Denial Notification Act _will make the current background check system even WORSE by permitting ATF to work with local law enforcement to launch criminal investigations into each NICS denial — despite a majority of those being false-positive denials. Upton's gun control doesn't stop there.... the bill also empowers the ATF to deputize local law enforcement officers to enforce federal gun control laws. The ATF will be granted the authority to appoint local government attorneys to prosecute the enforcement of this unconstitutional gun control... Congress had LESS THAN 24 HOURS to read the entire bill... but Fred Upton couldn't resist giving it his stamp of approval once he found the gun control provisions. Click the button below to help me FIRE Fred Upton today.

body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfsuopgpu64le4g43p6ohlam2mvso6itc7tcajn0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp69o3mm9oj0pbkm4q70pdlehq39ohke2pncsjjeti61or2mtg77c7165jj2sjnmv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lhbbc37mpjmcc3kmdhmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5jm0o37cpi66oh5u)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zufnodh9mkvjk0m66qq7kkqa9gqgtn77o03025ho_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1g6epj4cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z88ci4ute357e0hr7al7tvdvbj29ivlnj1100cfo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1g6epj4cdh2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfrebiq317qj0jjphk8ucvimj0m7363jrrftp15g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1g6epj4cdh2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdaom2pnj7frh88erupnisvkmmeq7v8p952g6sn8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1g6epj4cdh2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdm4u8v4r2qnb4dc9e2grlh0818bn4rlafiqicj0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1g6epj4cdh2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7m9v1ohh9h1l0gnvpcgoqtb3s4kghoh0kc1ova8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1g6epj4cdh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

For years, both sides of the aisle have had their concerns with the election process. Whether you agree personally or not, both sides perpetuated the idea that the other cheated in some election. **Instead of adding to the noise, I have worked to correct this.** I have introduced legislation with bipartisan support that would clean our voter rolls in Virginia. In Congress, I will fight for a photo ID requirement in every state. Every eligible voter will be able to vote – and only have one vote. In such a divisive time, we need leaders to bring us together. I have always sought to unify and will continue that mission in Washington.

body:
I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservativ
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsj3ddhgomsk27m1o71nd8hkrpptdph95elre5eo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u9j62dr3cpj32thhm2r73d3ncpon4s5l6spbadpj68q7acb36por8c5l6aojfc37q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchncoq6ecr561pb4phge2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1ctg60pr6c9j649fg)
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj0fv9ld5gqb4ne0pkojnnk4o7hfj7a9ftih4nsg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1g6epj2cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z19hl87mjt2iquul0brtmtf9at9bji6m0uqq7ob0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1g6epj2cph2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp3n6dcnklsukk3i34pk2alaqg05h8ee3ll8lgio_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1g6epj2cph2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zji39617rq9dcinfq3a1l67ichg0av2baagdma8g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1g6epj2cph2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbni4cqj9ek7fb8o3s9up1va3ln1qe6i1f1p4i80_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1g6epj2cph2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvd29p4u1okt9pc6chbvf470kq9a8skehpsss6g8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1g6epj2cph2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

subject: A HUGE win for Freedom

body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59800342:607mdRENa:m:1:3253819041:C2F9C295FAA565104152EFE50A1050C2:r)
---
| Peter,
**BREAKING: I just WON my lawsuit**...which means the **far-Left will NOT be able to keep me off the ballot** in 2022.
**But this frivolous lawsuit cost us _tremendously_**...wasting both time and money that we needed to spend making our case to North Carolina voters.
**Right now, we've nearly exhausted our campaign's financial resources** and I need your help to make sure **we raise enough money in March to keep our momentum rising**.
**[Will you pitch in $25 or more to keep us fighting?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59800343:607mdRENa:m:1:3253819041:C2F9C295FAA565104152EFE50A1050C2:r)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH MADISON!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59800342:607mdRENa:m:1:3253819041:C2F9C295FAA565104152EFE50A1050C2:r)
---
I can't thank you enough for your support during this lawsuit...and believe me: this lawsuit is bigger than just us.

Now we've won, we've set the precedent that the Left can **NEVER** weaponize the 14th Amendment to silence a conservative candidate ever again.

Now, we can focus on what we need to do: WIN this election in November and FLIP Congress.

**[If you can, pitch in as little as $25 or more to help me regain the resources I need to defeat the Democrats running against me and their liberal mainstream media allies this year>>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59800343:607mdRENa:m:1:3253819041:C2F9C295FAA565104152EFE50A1050C2:r)**

My team informed me that you're a top America First Patriot and I can't thank you enough for standing by my side. It's not going to be easy...but this is a **MAJOR victory** and I know we can use this momentum to carry us through November if we rally together.
| | | [SAVE OUR COUNTRY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59800342:607mdRENa:m:1:3253819041:C2F9C295FAA565104152EFE50A1050C2:r)
---
Thank you in advance for your generous support!

Yours in the fight for liberty,

Madison Cawthorn
Congressman, NC-14

PAID FOR BY CAWTHORN FOR NC

name: Team Nikki
subject: It’s time to elect Florida’s first woman Governor
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter —

Women’s History Month isn’t just a celebration of everything women have contributed to our society — it’s also a reminder of the fact that, to this day, women are being left out and left behind.

And that’s doubly true here in Florida:

Nikki said it best, Peter. For years, Republican men have had full control over our state government. And they’ve taken us in the wrong direction.

It’s past time that we elected a strong, capable, and compassionate woman to bring something new to our state.

And what better way to celebrate Women’s History Month than to help elect Florida’s FIRST woman Governor? Help us make it happen with a $20 donation today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?refcode=311whm2]

Thank you for standing with us.

— Team Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Fwd: I noticed your input is missing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Friend, I'm following up to make sure you saw the survey I sent around on Wednesday. Now that we're officially in the full swing of the election year, our campaign is scaling up our operation, which is why I need all hands on deck. **However, I 'm still looking for another 34 members of this grassroots team to share their input before my upcoming meeting this evening - and your response is missing. ** Hearing what's on YOUR mind is essential to building a laser-focused campaign strategy that will protect Senate control and deliver progress for the American people. [**So please, with my next strategy meeting coming up, can you please make sure you 've submitted your feedback? Click here to take our election-year focus group (only takes about 45 seconds!) right now.**](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-march-prio-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1153-su-nd) Thanks so much for taking the time to share your input. It's a great help. Dick
---
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Richard Blumenthal**
Date: Wed, March 9, 2022
Subject: need your thoughts on this

[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=YZyQ7W%2FD8fHvdgrwlxwocsWri427tMLQ&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
At his first State of the Union address, President Biden spoke with sincerity, decency, and honesty. It was a welcome change of pace from what we'd become accustomed to hearing when Donald Trump was the one addressing Congress.
But I'll be blunt: The threat of Donald Trump is still alive and well in this country. The Republican Party is clinging to Trump and his dangerous agenda - amplifying his lies and obstructing any efforts to investigate his potential criminal actions. With the crisis in Ukraine expanding globally and leadership needed at home to uphold the integrity of our democracy, we cannot hand Senate control back to the GOP.
**Yet with the Senate split 50-50, we have zero margin for error. That 's why my campaign is scaling up its efforts to protect this crucial seat and keep the Senate in Democratic hands. With two new resourced and established Republican opponents, my race is heating up, and attacks have begun. I need your input right away to help shape my response.**
**I need to know what 's on your mind - because feedback from supporters like you is the key to winning this race and keeping Trumpism at bay.**
[**That 's why I'm personally asking: Will you take just a moment to let me know what issues matter most to you this election year? Your input helps ensure that your priorities are at the center of my work. **](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-march-prio-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1153-su-nd)
I know that you hear from me a lot about the stakes of defending our Senate majority. It's because I've seen the harm and obstruction of a Mitch McConnell-led Senate firsthand - the dire consequences for people's livelihoods and most basic rights.
**I am here to serve you - to make sure your voices are heard and your priorities are fought for. But my willingness to stand up against the Republican Party has made me a target. I know I can only ensure the balance of power in the Senate is about you if I have the best possible campaign strategy - powered by people like you. **
[**So please, will you share your input in our official campaign survey? I 'm looking for 350 more members of this team to submit their feedback before my team's next strategy meeting on Friday morning. **](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-march-prio-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1153-su-nd)
With gratitude,
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=pNPv2ZzK%2BohI9FEkpIHFccWri427tMLQ&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Steven Olikara
subject: Join me in the fight for workers in Wisconsin & nationwide
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Olikara for Senate
body:
Image of Olikara campaign logo with photo of Steven Olikara and link to campaign website:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/OfS%20logo%20w%20headshot.png]
[https://www.stevenolikara.com]

Dear Peter,

The cold couldn’t keep the energy down at a recent rally I attended with workers of UAW Local 578 outside Oshkosh Corporation headquarters. The company won a contract to manufacture the next generation of USPS vehicles, but in a betrayal to its workers, Oshkosh Corporation stated it will run the project in South Carolina, taking over 1,000 jobs away from union workers in Wisconsin.

Photo of Steven Olikara addressing the crowd at UAW Rally: [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/UAW_Rally_Steven_Crowd6.jpeg]

While Ron Johnson doesn’t think we need these jobs, I believe we should protect workers and ensure good jobs in Wisconsin. I know the dignity afforded by a unionized job – it goes beyond the worker. Growing up in a union household, we had strong healthcare benefits that the American Federation of State, County and Municipal Employees (AFSCME) fought for on behalf of members like my mom. I was only able to found my nonprofit, the Millennial Action Project, because I could stay on the great health insurance they earned.

Photo of Steven Olikara addressing the crowd at UAW Rally: [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/UAW_Rally_Steven3.jpeg]

This is what our campaign is all about. We are building an unprecedented movement in Wisconsin to take on the current system of politics that undermines workers’ rights and representation. It’s wrong to have a Congress of millionaires, controlled by billionaires. We’re fighting to change this system. We in the working class need to be able to run for office to represent ourselves and working class interests. I’m asking you to join our movement now by getting involved [https://www.stevenolikara.com/volunteer?refcode=0311email]
or making a contribution to support our efforts [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0311email] .

Photo of Steven Olikara with Stephanie Bloomingdale, President WI AFL-CIO: [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/UAW_Rally_Steven_AFLCIO.jpg]

Together we can build a more dignified economy for Wisconsin centered on the best interests of Wisconsin workers and our families - people like you and me. Please support our efforts by contributing to our campaign [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0311email] and help us build an economy that ensures Dignity for All.

In Solidarity,
Steven

Thumbnail image with link to video of Steven Olikara speaking at UAW Rally: [https://youtu.be/0Nfoo-yb-DQ [https://youtu.be/0Nfoo-yb-DQ]

This is a movement to build a more inclusive, honest, and kind form of politics, and we need your help to continue reaching more voters in Wisconsin.
Button that says, "DONATE NOW" with link to campaign donation page: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0311email]

[Paid for by Olikara for Senate.]

Facebook logo with link to Steven Olikara's Facebook profile: [https://www.facebook.com/olikaraforsenate]
Twitter logo with link to Steven Olikara's Twitter profile: [https://twitter.com/stevenolikara]
Instagram logo with link to Steven Olikara's Instagram profile: [https://www.instagram.com/stevenolikara/]
TikTok logo with link to Steven Olikara's TikTok profile: [https://www.tiktok.com/@stevenolikara]

Olikara for Senate
P.O. Box 510216
Milwaukee, WI 53203
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/67fee4b3-10a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/562f7012-4fa1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDgwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjJmNzAxMi00ZmExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZvTk5A8_PS1HylZscOBgayV6lcSe0B6m0XfJChNcHJc=&id=130029555 .

name: Patrick Clark,  Keystone Progress
subject: Finally, some good news!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

The Supreme Court actually came through for PA voters this week!

The court rejected efforts by Republicans in Pennsylvania and North Carolina to block state court-ordered congressional districting plans – basically it said NO to gerrymandering attempts by lawmakers hell-bent on stealing elections.

Instead, the maps laid out by our state’s Supreme Court will be in effect for the midterm elections.

It’s atrocious that these elected officials are working so hard to divert the will of the people. We need to be able to elect leaders who will serve our actual communities and for our communities to receive the resources they need to thrive.

So, this week, we say thank you to SCOTUS for protecting democracy. We’ll see what happens next time this issue heads to the courts. Four conservative justices have already expressed a desire for SCOTUS to dramatically limit state courts’ power over federal elections in the future.

That’s why we have to keep up the fight by organizing, informing voters of their rights, and mobilizing here in PA. Stand with us by donating today!

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=031122&amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=031122&amount=10]

Anything you can afford... [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=031122]

Thank you!

Pat Clark
Keystone Progress

name: James Carville
subject: it’s game over if we lose Ohio
body:
Derek,
Conventional wisdom suggests that Dems are cruisin’ for a bruisin’ this fall, and a loss in the Ohio Senate race will all but guarantee that.
The only person standing between Mitch McConnell and a Senate majority is you, Derek.
If we’re going to have a chance in hell of defending the Senate, then we need you to step up right now. I’m personally asking: Will you chip in toward Tim Ryan’s $80,000 end-of-quarter goal so we can buck the trend and expand our majority?
Can you PLEASE split a contribution of $25 or more between Tim Ryan's campaign and CommonGood today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_tr?refcode=20220311_CGVA_Ryan_JC]
Fundraising deadlines are a matter of life or death for campaigns—whether or not Tim has the resources could be the difference between meaningful progress or a negligent, hostile Senate under Mitch McConnell.
With a 50-50 split in the Senate, we have zero room for error, and that’s why I’m asking for your help right now.
Hitting this end-of-quarter goal means better field organizing, more ads and social media exposure, and a better shot to win an uphill battle. Can I count on you to donate to Tim’s campaign so we can hit this goal and make our stand in the Senate? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_tr?refcode=20220311_CGVA_Ryan_JC]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_tr?refcode=20220311_CGVA_Ryan_JC&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_tr?refcode=20220311_CGVA_Ryan_JC&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_tr?refcode=20220311_CGVA_Ryan_JC&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_tr?refcode=20220311_CGVA_Ryan_JC&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_tr?refcode=20220311_CGVA_Ryan_JC&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_tr?refcode=20220311_CGVA_Ryan_JC]
Let’s do this,
James Carville
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_tr?refcode=20220311_CGVA_Ryan_JC [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_tr?refcode=20220311_CGVA_Ryan_JC]

Team,

In just the month of March, notorious Treason Caucus member, Paul Gosar, has done even more to damage our democracy than most of the Republican party.

So for our March Treason Caucus spotlight, we wanted to highlight just some of the ways that Gosar has betrayed the ideals of the United States:
* He spoke at a **white **nationalist rally along with fellow Treason Caucus buddy, Marjorie Taylor Greene and **threw a tantrum about the "deep state", a border wall, and - of course - the evils of cancel culture.**
* He was one of only three Republican House members who voted against a resolution to help Ukraine in the midst of their fight against an authoritarian regime. When most Republicans, who have been hell bent on derailing common sense legislation, align with the Democratic party for something, and you end up being the lone wolf, **that might just be a red flag.**
* Before he was a politician, Gosar was a small-town dentist who passionately led a campaign to add fluoride in drinking water. **Earlier this month, this very same person launched a video on twitter touting a conspiracy theory that fluoride lowers the IQ by six points.**

Paul Gosar has come a long, treasonous way since his time as a concerned dentist fighting for a public health initiative. Now, he spends his days promoting dangerous lies and attacking our democracy. With less than 8 months until election day, we're hard at work to make sure that we can defeat and unseat Paul Gosar in the midterm elections.

We need a leader who will defend our democracy, not peddle conspiracy theories to destabilize it.

**[Are you with us? clean_body: In just the month of March, notorious Treason Caucus member, Paul Gosar, has done more to damage our democracy than most of the Republican party. | = = = Team, In just the month of March, notorious Treason Caucus member, Paul Gosar, has done even more to damage our democracy than most of the Republican party. So for our March Treason Caucus spotlight, we wanted to highlight just some of the ways that Gosar has betrayed the ideals of the United States: He spoke at a white nationalist rally along with fellow Treason Caucus buddy, Marjorie Taylor Greene and threw a tantrum about the "deep state", a border wall, and - of course - the evils of cancel culture. He was one of only three Republican House members who voted against a resolution to help Ukraine in the midst of their fight against an authoritarian regime. When most Republicans, who have been hell bent on derailing common sense legislation, align with the Democratic party for something, and you end up being the lone wolf, that might just be a red flag. Before he was a politician, Gosar was a small-town dentist who passionately led a campaign to add fluoride in drinking water. Earlier this month, this very same person launched a video on twitter touting a conspiracy theory that fluoride lowers the IQ by six points. Paul Gosar has come a long, treasonous way since his time as a concerned dentist fighting for a public health initiative. Now, he spends his days promoting dangerous lies and attacking our democracy. With less than 8 months until election day, we're hard at work to make sure that we can defeat and unseat Paul Gosar in the midterm elections. We need a leader who will defend our democracy, not peddle conspiracy theories to destabilize it. =** Thanks, Team Never Again Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, Madison Cawthorn, Louie Gohmert, Mo Brooks, Andy Biggs. Those are just a few of the Republicans in Congress that Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from. Help us hold them accountable by chipping in $5 or more today. = Thank you for supporting Never Again PAC as we continue our fight against American fascism and corruption. We are building a war chest to vote out the nation's most dangerous elected officials and hold them accountable for their acts of treason. = Never Again PAC will hold these most dangerous and radical elected officials accountable by building a war chest to support ongoing rapid response efforts in 2022 and beyond. Through advertising, grassroots & digital organizing in targeted members’ districts, at a time in the cycle when other political organizations have historically not spent resources, will ensure our resources will in fact go further, our message will be heard more clearly, and our targets will feel the pressure immediately. = For generations people have risked everything seeking refuge on American shores to escape the very same sorts of political violence that took place at the U.S. Capitol on January 6th –– and every generation has an opportunity to make investments to protect this democracy –– it is time to do our part. = PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC Never Again PAC PO Box 2153 Purcellville, VA 20134 United States

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: What's next for us?
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | Good morning patriots,

It’s been both encouraging and humbling to read your email responses, comments, and messages lately saying, "don’t give up" and "we’re with you," while many of you are also asking, "what’s next?"

What’s been even more incredible is how much support has grown for our movement AFTER the primary results were in.

When I made the decision to run for Congress last year, it was in response to a calling I believe God placed on my life...

And it scared me to death.

Yes, I put myself out there.

Yes, I’ve made some mistakes.

Yes, my name and reputation have been drug through the mud.

And yes, there have been people who made up lies about me.

(kinda comes with the territory, right?)

But what really stung was seeing people who once supported our campaign choose to believe those lies instead of coming and talking to me directly.

After all, Matthew 18:15, right?

But instead, Proverbs 16:28 happened.

Nonetheless, I chose 1 Corinthians 9:24...

And I will continue to do so.

Why?

Because Texas doesn’t need another rambler. Too many people come and go... they run for office, lose, and then go on about their merry way.

Now, I’m certainly no better or less fallible than anyone else, but perhaps the difference is in my unwavering conviction to see liberty restored, even if it costs me everything.

EVERYTHING.

And so that is why I’m going to say what many others will not say...

The greatest threat to our Republic is not democrats or even RINOs. No, it’s much darker and much more sinister than that...

The greatest threat to the sovereignty of these United States is the globalist elite and their agenda to dismantle our American way of life through The Great Reset.

"You will own nothing and be happy." -Klaus Schwab, Founder & Chairman of the World Economic Forum (WEF)

Our elections, borders, finances, children, and liberties are under attack. And if 2020 and 2022 have taught us anything, it’s that status quo politics are dead and we can no longer afford to conduct business as usual.

To keep doing the same things over and over again and expect a different result is insanity.

And so I’m inviting you to join us... I’m inviting you to ask others to join us.

It won’t be easy and it might cost some of us everything... but wouldn’t you prefer dangerous liberty over peaceful slavery?

Our fight is not over... far from it.

It’s time to get to work.

Stay tuned because we will be making some big announcements VERY soon.

Are you on Telegram? Tap here: [https://t.me/thejamesonellis](https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0Lm1lJTJGdGhlamFtZXNvbmVsbGlz&sig=AFBdCshemMNQ3FDT95zmoNeVthiSW9FbFihCx83QF37y&iat=1647018219&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=63A77A1A394)

Friends, Exciting News! It has been **a GREAT month already!**
* Team members helped make my trip to **CPAC a huge success with great connections and important media appearances.**

* Next,**I was appointed to the State GOP Central Committee as Deputy for the 14th Congressional District.** It's a great honor and opportunity to better serve our community.

* I filed with t**hree times the required number of signatures to get on the ballot** and...

## **Now, our outstanding Congresswoman from Illinois, Mary Miller has endorsed my run for Congress!**
My endorsements at the national and local level are unrivaled in this primary. My grassroots support is growing at an exponential rate and the whole team can feel the momentum! **RIGHT NOW is a CRUCIAL moment in this race. What we need next is to have a GREAT showing for fundraising by the end of the quarter.**
## **Can you chip in?**
Lauren Underwood has let us down with her lock-step votes advancing the Biden Agenda. It's harming America and Illinois on many fronts. That needs to change and with your help, we're going to change it. My endorsements, experience, name recognition and grassroots support, combined with my roles at the district, county and local level, put me in the best position to replace her and flip this seat! **Can you chip in right now and help bring this victory?**
