name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Reminder: Happy International Women's Day!
body:
We are happy to report that our Women for Diehl coalition kick-off event this weekend was a success!
| | | |
---
|
---
| Thank you so much to everyone who came out to support Geoff Diehl at our Women for Diehl coalition kick-off event this weekend. We had a fantastic time!
Special thanks to our host, Geoff's wife KathyJo, and to our other featured speakers: Summer Schmaling, Heather Roberts, and Kari MacRae. You are true inspirations and proof that women can do it all. Thanks also to West on Centre for hosting our event.
Moms, wives, business owners, non-profit executives -- on Saturday we were reminded once again that the Commonwealth of Massachusetts would not be where it is today without women.
Today, on International Women's Day, we are proud to reaffirm that with Geoff as your Governor, you can be sure your voice will be heard even more loudly.
Please stay informed about upcoming events at [www.geoffdiehl.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_4ldn9l5lG5f3NS604W0AKdep5zG4jTANK2oK839Xx9c0zQT46AgFZPn5syug_CN0XN2bktYLcSn9S6f2vcG-A_ogRSwTbNDDdxO-IGm1iCkzn_mg-ytbjGARbcgP-Ubp1ySa1pCOOxoBIhzNrGyIw==&c=JegnUwE5LnODikLbCGpIW2FfGsPWmjA___HyT6-Xt8HBz7VDvhtzMQ==&ch=_NAQ_YfgXidfMdnERtaigCdsJPrKEtyLwxrK1bp6oUpxaZnNVsgzbQ==).
---
|
---

name: Team Victoria
subject: Free Meet & Greet with Victoria Virasingh
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Victoria for Congress
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/91626/images/Screen%20Shot%202021-12-02%20at%202.18.31%20PM.png] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Hello Friend,
The campaign is holding an in-person Meet & Greet with Victoria Virasingh on Saturday, March 19th from 5PM - 7PM EST. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mandg-march19]
This Meet and Greet will take place at a park in Alrington and is a great opportunity to get to know Victoria and ask her questions in a personal setting, and meet with other like-minded people who care about Virginia's 8th. There is no cost to attend the event so RSVP today.
The address will be provided upon RSVP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mandg-march19] .
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mandg-march19 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mandg-march19]
RSVP Here!!! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mandg-march19]
Thank you!
Team Victoria
Sign Up for the Event Here!!! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mandg-march19]
Victoria Virasingh is the daughter of immigrants. She grew up housing insecure and watched her working parents struggle to pull their family out of poverty. But today, even those opportunities to work hard and live the American dream are becoming less and less attainable.
That's why Victoria is running for Congress in Virginia's 8th District -- to create equitable opportunities for those who have been left behind, to expand access for the store owner to the refugee, to support our struggling elders and students, and to lift up working families.
Victoria is a fearless progressive champion who will fight for bold policies to improve the daily lives of Virginians, and she's bringing the fresh new leadership that we need to move our state forward.
Pitch in to help elect Victoria Virasingh as the next voice of VA-08 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_BIO]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_BIO]

Victoria for Congress
P.O. Box 7476
Arlington, VA 22207
United States

name: Cammack Research Team
subject: We need to know…
body:
You would be hard-pressed to find an American who genuinely believes we are in a better place, today, than a year ago.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RfEF70W7UhFaP6haXDp40TutfrQCa75Eqa2bbBTjITVuxC4IXQm9eTLVKAT9smB9fp-5otQF1LR7dcCqjrVo2NWT51uij60iP5_vcWK_LIXcDEISe93BE-OpvkdcnEz8VjQ_eF1shzzDleCGeHFjdCUjrf0gcYEQYfZTNIoJCTqii9GK8pjII2JfUrM5Sbc5&c=siCyi8mLsjQF9liZ0se0m_Zv47UjKk3vPuwjszaqHdE3H2WyUvbIEQ==&ch=iKoRTZ6ztvIhFFYoSB9z_HQShhT12mT7v4UbuLisKdWk7ffULpAJUA==)

| Friend,
We need to know, do you approve of Joe Biden? You would be hard-pressed to find an American who genuinely believes we are in a better place, today, than a year ago.
Yet, Biden and the Radical Left continue to drag our nation further down the path of socialism. We are living in unprecedented times, but we wanted to see what you think.
Do you approve of Biden's performance thus far? Let us know by taking the poll below!
---

| Biden and the Left's approval rating has been in free fall since they took power. Various polls across the nation show that Biden is crashing into the ground with absolutely no signs of coming back up.
However, we both know how biased and fickle the media can be. That's why Kat is having us reach out to you to see how the American people really feel about Biden's performance.
Make your voice heard by taking the poll below!

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I'm helping Abby – can I count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
Sen. Grassley is a gun-lobby loyalist, but I know Abby has what it takes to defeat him.
| | |
---
Peter, it's Gabby Giffords. Eleven years ago, in the blink of an eye, my life changed forever: I was shot in the head while holding an event with constituents in a grocery store parking lot. Six people were killed that day, and 12 others were injured.
**For me, moving forward from this tragedy meant going back to my roots: Public service and making life better for my community.** I found purpose and healing in dedicating my life to preventing shootings like the one that took the lives of my constituents – and nearly took mine – by founding Giffords PAC.
We've made real progress on gun violence prevention. I'll be the first to tell you, however, that there is so much more work we still must do. **To pass real, comprehensive gun safety legislation, we need new leaders in Congress who will fight _against_ the gun lobby and _for_ meaningful change – which is exactly why Giffords PAC is endorsing Abby Finkenauer in her race against Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) for Iowa's Senate seat.**
**Sen. Grassley is a gun-lobby loyalist, but I know Abby has what it takes to defeat him. She was the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue. Winning will take a grassroots movement, however. So today, I'm personally asking:[Will you donate $5 or more to help Abby win and elect a gun safety champion to the U.S. Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42860598/334611526/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk731-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGM3M2E0OC01OWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZBnJsJipfzdeOZKhD7fLrFA2wY83K7G-P_z2W2n2H0M=)**
Abby is a passionate advocate for commonsense gun safety. Meanwhile, Sen. Grassley has accepted hundreds of thousands from the NRA in exchange for voting against critical gun violence prevention bills – even lifesaving commonsense background checks. **He's been pushing his NRA-approved talking points in the Senate for far too long, but this year we finally have the chance to show him the door.**
Nearly two-thirds of Iowans don't want to reelect Sen. Grassley to an eighth term, and election experts are calling this a "tough race" for him. Taking advantage of this unprecedented momentum is essential to expanding our Senate majority and passing gun safety legislation.
**That's why today, I'm helping Abby raise another $15,000 before 11:59 p.m. so that she can compete with Sen. Grassley and the deep-pocketed gun lobby backing him.[So please, will you stand with me today by making a donation to elect Abby, expand our Democratic Senate majority and pass gun violence prevention legislation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42860599/334611527/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk731-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGM3M2E0OC01OWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZBnJsJipfzdeOZKhD7fLrFA2wY83K7G-P_z2W2n2H0M=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42860600/334611528/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk731-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGM3M2E0OC01OWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZBnJsJipfzdeOZKhD7fLrFA2wY83K7G-P_z2W2n2H0M=)
---
Thank you for standing with me. Your support means the world.

– Gabby

name: Madison Cawthorn
subject: This is a MAJOR victory
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAWTHORN FOR NC
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59805939:JwS1WREZN:m:1:3317145305:9CD97FED2CBE54BE73EFAB0DF8478BD8:r)
---
| Peter,
**BREAKING: I just WON my lawsuit**...which means the **far-Left will NOT be able to keep me off the ballot** in 2022.
**But this frivolous lawsuit cost us _tremendously_**...wasting both time and money that we needed to spend making our case to North Carolina voters.
**Right now, we've nearly exhausted our campaign's financial resources** and I need your help to make sure **we raise enough money in March to keep our momentum rising**.
**[Will you pitch in $25 or more to keep us fighting?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59805940:JwS1WREZN:m:1:3317145305:9CD97FED2CBE54BE73EFAB0DF8478BD8:r)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH MADISON!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59805939:JwS1WREZN:m:1:3317145305:9CD97FED2CBE54BE73EFAB0DF8478BD8:r)
---
I can't thank you enough for your support during this lawsuit...and believe me: this lawsuit is bigger than just us.

Now we've won, we've set the precedent that the Left can **NEVER** weaponize the 14th Amendment to silence a conservative candidate ever again.

Now, we can focus on what we need to do: WIN this election in November and FLIP Congress.

**[If you can, pitch in as little as $25 or more to help me regain the resources I need to defeat the Democrats running against me and their liberal mainstream media allies this year>>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59805940:JwS1WREZN:m:1:3317145305:9CD97FED2CBE54BE73EFAB0DF8478BD8:r)**

My team informed me that you're a top America First Patriot and I can't thank you enough for standing by my side. It's not going to be easy...but this is a **MAJOR victory** and I know we can use this momentum to carry us through November if we rally together.
| | | [SAVE OUR COUNTRY!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59805939:JwS1WREZN:m:1:3317145305:9CD97FED2CBE54BE73EFAB0DF8478BD8:r)
---
Thank you in advance for your generous support!

Yours in the fight for liberty,

Madison Cawthorn
Congressman, NC-14

name: SEALs for Congress
subject: These former Navy SEALs need to tell you something.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Crane For Congress
body:
Former Navy SEALs Eli Crane, Morgan Luttrell, Ryan Zinke & Derrick Van Orden are reaching out with a personal message. See below:

****** **Emergency Message********

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59804750:Jl-Y7REN9:m:1:3299561967:156B5BE0C69BD0FB480E3823DF0B46ED:r)

Former Navy SEALs Eli Crane, Morgan Luttrell, Ryan Zinke & Derrick Van Orden are reaching out with a personal message. **See below:**

"Each of our campaigns has received Devastating news today. This will be a disaster...

Nancy Pelosi, fearing she could lose her Majority and control over America in 2022, has personally intervened to back our opponents across the country with her $350 Million donor accounts. She wants to guarantee these elections become bought and paid-for Liberal Seats held by her puppet politicians.

Individually, Pelosi can Silence our campaigns, but together we are stronger than the Leftist Mob who want us Muzzled for supporting Trump in 2016 & in 2020.

The truth is, Patriot, we're a group of veterans running for Congress to protect the American Dream, but to D.C. Swamp Creatures, we're a threat to their corruption & they'll do anything to keep us silent.

We're no strangers to adversity. We're American warriors--we won't give up in the face of overwhelming odds and will answer the call to protect America from radicals once again. Can Pelosi say the same?

We know you get a lot of fundraising emails, but we promise you this is where your contribution will go the furthest.
[**Support Their Mission Now ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59804750:Jl-Y7REN9:m:1:3299561967:156B5BE0C69BD0FB480E3823DF0B46ED:r)
---

If you've been on the sidelines so far, today is the day to stand up & resist the socialist takeover with us.

We need an overflow of support from Pro-Trump Conservatives willing to go the extra mile. Please, please don't let them do this--stand with us right now".

[**Support Their Mission Now ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59804750:Jl-Y7REN9:m:1:3299561967:156B5BE0C69BD0FB480E3823DF0B46ED:r)

name: Cassie Jackson
subject: Abortion Bounty Hunters
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

Peter,

Abortion is health care, and Tennessee Republicans have made it their mission to criminalize not only those who get abortions, but ANYONE who helps an abortion patient. And, their newest bill allows anyone, even if they have no connection to the patient, to sue an abortion provider. This means that if someone at the store overhears you talking about your abortion, they can sue the clinic where you obtained the abortion — AND they can sue anyone who helped you.

They are trying to create abortion bounty hunters.

This is their boldest attempt at government control yet. Nearly 25% of women in America will have an abortion by age 45. Republicans are trying to criminalize 1 in every 4 women and anyone that helps them.

We need your help to elect Democrats who will defend Reproductive Justice. Can you chip in now to help us fight back against Republican abortion bounty hunters? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

Abortion is a Constitutional right. Tennessee Republicans have tried time and time again to strip away our rights, but we can’t let them. We have to fight back with everything we’ve got.

But we can’t do it alone — can you chip in now to defend Reproductive Justice in Tennessee and to elect Democrats who will fight to protect it? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

Solidarity,

Cassie Jackson
she/her
Digital Director, Tennessee Democratic Party

name: Clay Aiken
subject: The winner is…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Clay Aiken for North Carolina
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94965/images/Clay%20Logo%20Light.png]
We asked you all to weigh in on your priorities around some of the biggest, most complex, pressing issues facing our community... and you stepped right up and told us what’s what.
Thank you so much for sharing the policies you’d like to see prioritized. I want to use my platform to listen, learn, and implement big positive changes... I can’t do any of that without your feedback.
Every program needs a strong, unified chorus... and heck, we’ve got just about the loudest, proudest one I’ve ever seen (and I’ve been on Broadway so that’s sayin’ something! 😂)
Together, the Clay Chorus decided that our top three issues right now are:
1.
Voting
Rights
2.
Health
Care
3.
Climate
Action
I can’t wait to tackle these three (and the rest of the issues on the board!) once I’m elected, but I need your help to get there.
If you can, please consider pitching in $10 to help Team Clay bring home a win. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=03112022_MarchMadnessPrioritySurvey_3&amount=10]
Thank you,
Clay
Clay is running for Congress in the North Carolina 6th. He was born, raised, and is currently raising his son in the Triangle. He's running to use his voice to speak up and stop the loudest voices on the far ends of the political spectrum from sucking up all the oxygen in our political discourse.
Donate now to join the chorus and help send Clay to Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=footer&amount=25]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=footer&amount=25]

Durham, NC 27709
United States

This week, EMILY’s List — the nation’s largest resource for women in politics — announced that they will be endorsing Georgette Gómez for the California State Assembly!
Georgette has a rock-solid record of supporting women and working families. It's why EMILY's List has endorsed her, and why Georgette will win this race.
Voting has already started for this race. Will you help us secure victory by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_030922_Endorsement]

# Top Republican lawmakers call for New York to boost aid for Ukrainian people
---
| By Nick Reisman City of Albany | Mar. 11, 2022
---
| The top Republicans in the state Senate and Assembly on Thursday urged Gov. Kathy Hochul to send material aid to the people of Ukraine as the Russian invasion has led to a large-scale refugee crisis in Europe.
The lawmakers, Senate Minority Leader Robert Ortt and Assembly Minority Leader Will Barclay, said New York's state agencies should pool any surplus emergency resources while being able to respond to any possible emergencies at home and earmark the aid for the Ukrainian people.
"The nation has seen pictures and videos of the destruction coming out of the Ukraine and we are all heartbroken," the lawmakers wrote in the letter sent to Gov. Kathy Hochul. "As a result of this war, over two million Ukrainians have been forced to leave their country and become involuntary refugees and over one million Ukrainians, who remain in the country, have been displaced from their homes. Unfortunately, this is likely only the beginning of an even larger refugee crisis."
Hochul last month moved to place new limits on the state's business relationship with Russian-backed entities and interests. She signed an executive order meant to bar new state contracts with Russian interests as well as explore ways of ending existing contracts.
At the same time, Comptroller Tom DiNapoli has announced his office is exploring ways of divesting New York's pension fund from Russian businesses and entities. It's estimated about $110 million is tied to Russian assets.
The efforts by New York to limit Russian investment come amid broader international sanctions against the country in response to the invasion.
But the call from Ortt and Barclay represents a different track: aiding the millions of people who have been displaced or injured by the crisis. Ortt had previously supported efforts to aid Afghan refugees after that country's government fell to the Taliban last year.
"As New Yorkers, we must stand up for freedom and stand against tyranny," they wrote in the letter. "Ukraine is a democracy with a population of over 43 million people, and they desperately need humanitarian assistance."

[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za8v6adk66h2ckc2hsoahc331t6f86hek64g0nc8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqmasb4m9pnfchlmgpm2d36cdj60o5lm3hn8tb3epq7fdj46dorcsr3mpim7dr7mv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6tj38o5jc3jr4sr66jgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5jm0oj4cdj64oh5u)
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk7tb5iuh52s7jjup0hf1ma4di4ehb5h9d6odqm0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1h68or6c9h2bs)

Friend,

I am officially announcing my endorsement of Nathan Dahm for US Senate!

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z45t5kn3g43gqguhfv6e9r6onsame926nsp898kg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1h68or6c9h2bs)

[(Click here to watch the full endorsement video)](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1usnegjrhdajfshc2lunub8a5js9hm1nmm6c6e8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1h68or6c9h2bs)

Meet Nathan Dahm - The Proven Republican Fighter running for the United States Senate in Oklahoma's special election.

Why am I endorsing Nathan Dahm?

Nathan Dahm is a liberty warrior who isn't afraid to fight for our America-First movement, the Constitution, and our rights to live freely. Here are just a few of the reasons Nathan Dahm has my full and total endorsement:

* He stood with me and AGAINST Anthony Fauci's insanity since day one
* He is a Pro-Life warrior who has taken action to protect the lives of the unborn
* He is a #2A champion that implemented Constitutional Carry in Oklahoma
* He understands the importance of closing our border and making America First again
* He will stand with me in the US Senate to fight for an America-First foreign policy
* He believes in the Bill of Rights and is a strict Constitutionalist

Nathan is a great Senator in Oklahoma and a true patriot. He will serve as one of my greatest allies when he's elected to the United States Senate.

[**I told Nathan I would help him raise $25,000 when I announced my endorsement. I am asking you to chip in $20.22, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount by clicking here >>>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze0ceq8ngrh9hdfkjfr87ju3p7gitrariuorl558_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1h68or6c9h2bs)

Nathan's record PROVES he is a hardcore constitutional conservative who is not afraid to take on the corrupt Republican Establishment in Oklahoma and WIN.

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7oddrsn67la24r4egightqgrm9nnsvvkpu6pehg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1h68or6c9h2bs)

**I am selective with my endorsements.** I do not waste time with Establishment frauds, candidates with zero chance of success, or people who don't respect and uphold the Constitution.

Nathan Dahm is the Proven Republican FIGHTER we need in the United States Senate.

You and I don't need anymore do-nothing politicians who sit in Washington quietly, vote with the Establishment 100% of the time, and disrespect the Constitution and the vision of our Founding Fathers.

We need FIGHTERS! Leaders who will stand up for liberty and drain the swamp.

I believe Nathan is a hero of the America-First movement and will become one of your favorite Republican liberty fighters in Washington.

clean_body: I'm so close to reaching my critical goal | | | Sorry to reach out again, friend, but this is an important update. My extensive career working in cybersecurity only amplified my concerns regarding the use of disinformation to devastate our democracy. Yet, those wreaking havoc in our society rarely ever are held accountable. _We face a very real threat to our core American values from domestic actors spreading disinformation in order to undermine our democracy._

**Just like Russian disinformation about their attack on Ukraine** , these domestic distributors of disinformation are a thread to our values. Oklahoma families deserve the right to a prosperous future, and that starts with a Senator who tells the truth and is accountable to the public. I will continue to fight for a future without _government corruption_ in order to promote our democracy. But, I can’t do it alone, please help me hold these bad actors accountable.

**[Before it’s too late, make a contribution of $ASK today to help us reach our fundraising deadline and fight back against the disinformation harming our democracy>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42865144/334631616/2004106925?amount=10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_3MO_20220310_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGFjYzMxNC02N2ExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fL-yPXSkIAeZ-oS3jvQHsqyElvLfhL564_qnKwWFidg=)**

name: U.S. Senate Action Alert
subject: Take Action: Stop Pro-China Laws!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taxpayers Protection Alliance
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsBc3e9HkN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osBc3e9HkN

Friend,

Thank you for telling Congress NOT to move
forward with proposals that would kneecap American companies and
help CHINA pull ahead of American tech innovation.

These laws are dangerous. Members of Congress
need to hear from you and other concerned Americans who oppose
their reckless agenda.

We're reaching out today because this fight
is NOT over. In fact, it's just beginning. Congress is STILL
trying to pass these dangerous pro-China laws… We're
calling on our strongest advocates to send another letter ASAP!

That's why we set a goal of delivering 10,000
letters TODAY.

We need to act immediately to make sure our
voice is heard!

Send A Letter Now!
Tell Congress to Abandon Its Pro-China
Agenda!

Goal: 10,000 Letters to Congress
Deadline: 11:59pm TONIGHT!

Status: LETTER PENDING

SEND A LETTER NOW

Friend, as you well know, these laws will
hurt American companies, destroy Main Street jobs and threaten
our national security.

You need to ask yourself the question, are
you still willing to fight against this?

If that answer is yes, and we think it is,
then we need you to send that message to Congress NOW. Click to
send a letter!

Please, don't stand by idly while Congress
helps China pull ahead and places American prosperity and
security in jeopardy. Send Congress a message immediately!

-Taxpayers Protection Alliance

Paid for by Taxpayers Protection Alliance

| Consistent with federal law, House Majority PAC makes its federal contributions from one account (the “Contribution Account”) and engages in the rest of its political activity from the other account (the “Non-Contribution Account”). name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: A respected financial analyst...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
I"m happy to announce that former Berrien County Treasurer Bret Witkowski has joined my campaign as a Senior Tax & Policy Advisor. | | | |
---
| | |
### Our Team is Growing. Financial Expert Bret Witkowski Joins the Campaign.
---
|
---
|
---
| Peter - Just wanted to send a quick note to announce that former Berrien County Treasurer Bret Witkowski has joined the campaign as a Senior Tax & Policy Advisor. Bret served twenty-one years as Berrien Treasurer and is a respected financial analyst. He brings a wealth of knowledge and experience to the campaign.

This is what Bret had to say:
> “Michael Brown is the real deal. I’ve known him for many years, and can attest that he has the best interests of all Michigan citizens at heart. Michael’s common-sense approach is refreshing in a world of poll-tested politicians and out-of-touch millionaires. I’m happy to endorse him and help him in his campaign to become Governor.”
> – Bret Witkowski
---
|
---
| During Bret's tenure in Berrien County, he strived to make sure that people wouldn't lose their properties due to financial hardships. He developed the Hopeful Home Fund in conjunction with the United Way to help deserving homeowners with their back property taxes. In the final year in his position, Witkowski worked to help people suffering from the financial burden caused by Governor Whitmer’s mandates that forced business and school closures.
> “It’s time to right the ship in Michigan. Michael Brown is the candidate we need to take the helm as Governor.” – Bret Witkowski
---

clean_body: I"m happy to announce that former Berrien County Treasurer Bret Witkowski has joined my campaign as a Senior Tax & Policy Advisor. | | | | | | | Our Team is Growing. Financial Expert Bret Witkowski Joins the Campaign. | | | Peter - Just wanted to send a quick note to announce that former Berrien County Treasurer Bret Witkowski has joined the campaign as a Senior Tax & Policy Advisor. Bret served twenty-one years as Berrien Treasurer and is a respected financial analyst. He brings a wealth of knowledge and experience to the campaign. This is what Bret had to say: “Michael Brown is the real deal. I’ve known him for many years, and can attest that he has the best interests of all Michigan citizens at heart. Michael’s common-sense approach is refreshing in a world of poll-tested politicians and out-of-touch millionaires. I’m happy to endorse him and help him in his campaign to become Governor.” – Bret Witkowski | | During Bret's tenure in Berrien County, he strived to make sure that people wouldn't lose their properties due to financial hardships. He developed the Hopeful Home Fund in conjunction with the United Way to help deserving homeowners with their back property taxes. In the final year in his position, Witkowski worked to help people suffering from the financial burden caused by Governor Whitmer’s mandates that forced business and school closures. “It’s time to right the ship in Michigan. Michael Brown is the candidate we need to take the helm as Governor.” – Bret Witkowski | | | Contributions to Michael Brown for Governor are not deductible for Federal income tax purposes. No corporate contribution checks or cash please. State law requires political committees to use their best efforts to obtain and report the name, mailing address, employer and occupation for each individual whose contributions exceed $100 in an election cycle. name: Derek Marshall
subject: ANNOUNCING: New Endorsement!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
I think it’s fair to say that we have had quite an exciting start to our month. With the California Democratic Party’s endorsement, it’s clear that influential organizations believe not only in our mission, but in **our ability to win this district and flip a seat blue for Democrats in 2022. **
Now, I have even more exciting news to share with you. **The national Stonewall Democratic Club has officially endorsed our campaign, following the endorsement from our local chapter here in the High Desert.** Stonewall Dems have been building political power for the LGBTQ+ community since 1975, and I’m honored to have the support of such a prominent group.
**[Will you join the Stonewall Democratic Club and show your support for my campaign with a donation? Start a monthly recurring contribution today and maximize your impact RIGHT NOW>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42866367/334638114/1232707546?refcode=3-10&amount=30&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjJhNTc4YS02ZGExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c70n3XaoRw6J1tf_IuEtLdyBDnRZo7cZqfFaMYMUx34=)**

**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42866368/334638115/1476288211?refcode=3-10&amount=30&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjJhNTc4YS02ZGExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c70n3XaoRw6J1tf_IuEtLdyBDnRZo7cZqfFaMYMUx34=)**

Top Democratic organizations are lining up behind our campaign because they know that we have what it takes to win. While my Republican opponent Jay Obernolte has voted no on the Equality Act and showed a blatant disregard for the civil rights of LGBTQ+ people,**I will always proudly stand in my truth as an out gay man who will never stop fighting for our communities. **
I understand the importance of building political capital for LGBTQ+ politicians, when there are so few of us. **We are dramatically underrepresented in positions of power, and it’s time for that to change.** I am looking forward to taking this seat and legislating on behalf of the LGBTQ+ communities and advocating for the protections we desperately need.
**[Stand with me in my campaign to become one of the only openly gay Members of Congress, and start a donation today. Make it monthly right here and help sustain this campaign through our election!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42866369/334638117/1232707546?refcode=3-10&amount=30&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjJhNTc4YS02ZGExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c70n3XaoRw6J1tf_IuEtLdyBDnRZo7cZqfFaMYMUx34=)**

Team Doug

**_Forwarded Message from Doug White:_**

I wanted to touch base with a quick update on the state of our race for Congress here in Washington’s 4th District.

**The good news:** Our GOP opponents are in shambles. With the right fighting the far-right, Dan Newhouse and Loren Culp are too busy on their collision course to focus on the issues Washingtonians care about.

**The bad news:** National Republicans are already lining up to defend this seat, which means our opponents are well-funded by mega-donors and special interests.

[With the first Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline of the Election Year fast approaching, I need your help catching up. | | Peter, **I am alarmed by my latest primary opponent State Senator Alessandra Biaggi's comments that "we must defund the police," and that our officers are "soulless."** (State Sen. Biaggi goes from 'Defund the Police' to 'send me to Congress.' _New York Post, 2/7/22_.) See the tweet for yourself: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42843102/334553454/924952270?refcode=2022-03-11-biaggi2&recurring=0&amount=8&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=57dfd7a0-43a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2RmZDdhMC00M2ExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B25vDY8JacnhWnRcZK5BDzhmVk8dW3cF7ftWkeOxa-I=) I've got to be blunt, Peter: Senator Biaggi's comments are wrong, and they don't represent the values of our district. Police officers, like teachers, nurses, and other frontline workers, deserve our support not our scorn. They play vital roles in our community. And tearing them down shows a callous disregard for their dedication to public safety. **[Donate $8 if you agree.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42843107/334553464/924952270?refcode=2022-03-11-biaggi2&recurring=0&amount=8&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=57dfd7a0-43a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2RmZDdhMC00M2ExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B25vDY8JacnhWnRcZK5BDzhmVk8dW3cF7ftWkeOxa-I=)** I refuse to join the growing chorus of politicians offering nothing more than grievances instead of solutions. Politicians who attack public servants are doing more harm than good. I'm running for Congress to work on solutions and bring our communities together, Peter. **[Chip in $8 now if you think that we can accomplish more when we work together.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42843113/334553469/924952270?refcode=2022-03-11-biaggi2&recurring=0&amount=8&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=57dfd7a0-43a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2RmZDdhMC00M2ExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B25vDY8JacnhWnRcZK5BDzhmVk8dW3cF7ftWkeOxa-I=)** clean_body: | | | Peter, I am alarmed by my latest primary opponent State Senator Alessandra Biaggi's comments that "we must defund the police," and that our officers are "soulless." (State Sen. Biaggi goes from 'Defund the Police' to 'send me to Congress.' New York Post, 2/7/22.) See the tweet for yourself: = I've got to be blunt, Peter: Senator Biaggi's comments are wrong, and they don't represent the values of our district. Police officers, like teachers, nurses, and other frontline workers, deserve our support not our scorn. They play vital roles in our community. And tearing them down shows a callous disregard for their dedication to public safety. = I refuse to join the growing chorus of politicians offering nothing more than grievances instead of solutions. Politicians who attack public servants are doing more harm than good. I'm running for Congress to work on solutions and bring our communities together, Peter. = More to come, Josh Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Lafazan for Congress. ---|--- | This email was sent by Lafazan for Congress P.O. Box #751 Woodbury, NY 11797 United States Email is an important way for Josh Lafazan to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. subject: Reminder: Donald J. Trump Is Hosting Vernon Jones At Mar-a-Lago! Deadline Extended!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jones for Georgia JonesforGeorgia
body:
RSVP Today!
---
| | | | | | | |

VERNON JONES BRINGING CONGRESSIONAL CAMPAIGN TO MAR-A-LAGO
---
Trump-endorsed Congressional candidate (GA-10) and former State Rep. Vernon Jones (R) will visit Mar-a-Lago to attend a fundraiser hosted for him by Donald J. Trump.
---
| |
---
|
---
| Palm Beach \- President Trump has endorsed Vernon Jones as his America First candidate for Georgia's 10th Congressional District. President Trump is hosting and attending a fundraising event for Vernon Jones on the evening of March 17th, 2022 in Palm Beach Florida at Mar-a-Lago. We have extended the deadline to RSVP to March 15th. Don't miss this great event.
---
| |
---
---
| | [RSVP TODAY!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017uOKt6Wfsb3ScfMFi35o_uvI_35lHTdjbEE3fHsNefpq6_ihptyAbfapEO9PfFH_5VYecUt6A5RnWFGFQUP4sy55IbbdfZRgiJVWuRhvj1uFaOWuZQ0D8RCKUnp2QVArtqszyQa_l4OMWxSmx2bwstSAKmNtnZRT9AJCrDaaYwlX84cjCCtPYMuVIPndB8hFWWwYRpJrX7Q=&c=JC6jpDCP3ua9Ws9Kfk4qW4Ky7Lx5L9bFReiKPxZ1y-jgC48T96uT-w==&ch=GQToMm2ZiQD1Ow-lt7kRCsK5TDF_ywHboG-TVWxxSaTI78O87ktSpg==)
---
About Vernon Jones
---
| |
---
Vernon Jones is running for Georgia's 10th Congressional District. He is a former member of the GA House of Representatives (1993-2001, 2017-2021) and former Chief Executive Officer of DeKalb County, GA. A former Democrat, Jones officially switched parties in January 2021 after endorsing Donald J. Trump for President and speaking at the 2020 Republican National Convention. The proud Republican is now running in GA10, as a Pro-Trump candidate who will fight for free and fair elections, and always put Georgia and America First.

Hello,
Imagine the sense of relief our NATO allies must feel knowing President Biden is in office right now instead of his predecessor. I know the United States military issues a collective sigh of relief.
Donald Trump proposed withdrawing from NATO and attacked our very democracy. He openly stated that he believed Putin over our intelligence agencies. In Trump, Putin found a U.S. president who could stir up more anti-American sentiment than the Kremlin could ever hope to foment.
As Vladimir Putin began invading Ukraine, Donald Trump called him “genius,” “savvy,” and “smart.” **There is nothing “genius” about Putin; he is a dictator. And Trump doesn’t understand why America won’t let him be a Putin-wannabe.**
My opponent Chuck Grassley stood by Donald Trump through it all. Grassley continues to peddle the Big Lie even now – even adding fuel to the bizarre belief that the FBI was somehow involved in instigating the January 6th insurrection.
When I’m elected and Chuck Grassley is forcibly retired this November, I will serve with the dignity, demeanor, level-headedness, and progressive pragmatism of the most senior military person ever-elected to the United States Senate. For me, it is a continuation of long service to the nation. My number one job: Protect our democracy.
The early polling shows this could be one of the closest races in the country. And if we defeat Grassley and turn Iowa blue, Democrats are guaranteed to hold onto our fragile majority in the Senate.
McConnell and his Super PACs are readying millions of dollars in attacks. **The only way to fight back is if we raise another $250,000 before our mid-month deadline, but right now, we’re still $77,450 short.**
[**I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so I’m counting entirely on the support of grassroots donors like you. Please, will you give $5 or more right now – whatever you can afford to spare before midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42867348/334642202/-42398318?refcode=em20220311mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTA4ODAzYi02ZmExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I1eQ3wMOyDxx4uMGl-e-9lD9oMn0mKuWjMILP7KmnLU=)

name: Data and Communication Manager
subject: John Selker’s Foreign Policy Conversation is Tuesday, March 15th at 7pm!
body:
John Selker of Corvallis is running to represent the people of Oregon District 4 in the US Congress since Peter DeFazio announced his plans to retire. John is an entrepreneur, OSU Distinguished Professor, woodworker and problem solver. He is hosting a weekly series of Policy Conversations on Zoom to learn more about what is important to the people of our large and diverse district, and to help people understand John’s thinking on key issues.

**On Tuesday Mar. 15th at 7 pm** on Zoom, John Selker is hosting the sixth in a series of Policy Conversations, this time focused on **Foreign Policy.**

**Jackson Shawn-Hays** will lead the discussion. Jackson grew up in Eugene and attended the University of Oregon where he completed a degree in International Studies focused on Conflict Resolution. After graduation, he worked for 4J School District before going to Nepal to work on education access in rural areas.

Jackson attended George Washington University’s Elliott School of International Studies where he received his M.A. in Security Policy with a focus on Transnational Security Issues. His thesis was on the effectiveness of U.S.-led Police Professionalization Programs in Mexico. Jackson completed a policy fellowship with the U.S. Senate and now works in corporate security and intelligence in D.C.

Register here:
<https://zoom.us/meeting/register/tJ0rce2hrjIjHda4hDbdo47DxtuDqtxNZCo_>

After registering, you will receive a confirmation email containing information about joining the meeting.

Melanie Place
Data and Communications Manager
[communication@selker4congress.org](mailto:communication@selker4congress.org)
Cell: 541-286-0109
John Selker for Congress Campaign, Candidate 4th House Seat
[Twitter](https://twitter.com/JohnSelker)
[FB](https://www.facebook.com/groups/352472833546656)
[https://selker4congress.org](https://selker4congress.org/)
<https://www.facebook.com/john.selker/videos/253974480183077>

name: Mark Kelly for Senate
subject: 1,000,000th donation
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
This means the world to Mark, Gabby, and to our chances to win.
#

Friends —
As of this morning, 962,139 people have contributed to help elect Mark Kelly to the U.S. Senate.
Reaching 1,000,000 before our FEC deadline would not only help us reach a pretty important milestone, but it’ll ensure we reach the goals we need to hit to WIN.
All along, we’ve had something the corporate super PACs and National Republicans who want to defeat us don’t have... people like you.
So, please. Make a donation today. Do it before our mid-month fundraising drive ends. It’s not about how much money we raise, but how many people are chipping in to power this campaign.
[**Can you PLEASE make a contribution — $3 or whatever you can afford — to help re-elect Mark Kelly? name: =?utf-8?Q?Michelle=20Benson?=
subject: 🎓Parents have the right to know what their kids are being taught 🎓
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR MINNESOTA COMMITTEE
body:
It is imperative our schools have a well-planned and transparent curriculum. | | | | [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=4339cfc26d&e=9d6926af69)
---
| [VOLUNTEER FOR MICHELLE](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=6e3c175938&e=9d6926af69 "VOLUNTEER FOR MICHELLE")
---
| | | Today, the Senate passed my bill to require class syllabi be made available to parents within the first two weeks of school. **This legislation will increase transparency and accountability** to parents by [](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=11ed0c5668&e=9d6926af69)putting you back in the drivers seat for your child's education.

In many districts across the state, parents remain locked out of their kids schools to even volunteer as a classroom helper. This is unacceptable. **As Governor, I will fight to keep parents at the forefront of ALL discussions related to education.**

**It's time for us to work together and push back against the radical left** that is running the teachers union.

**[Watch my speech from the Senate floor.](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=8c91a4032e&e=9d6926af69)

[Join with me and fellow Minnesotans by volunteering with our team!](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=11ed113175&e=9d6926af69)**

Sincerely,
[](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=ecd0da3fe1&e=9d6926af69)
**Michelle Benson **
[Candidate for Minnesota Governor](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=3abba487d4&e=9d6926af69)

body:

| Greater Georgia is working to recruit and train volunteers to connect with Georgians and let them know that their voices deserve to be heard - and that their votes will count.
Last week, Greater Georgia [released](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015Gizz4tCOe8u5eb9KPRWlNhcwKbM4CFyZ2k0LcxhvW864IvfS2Xogp3-ezipZUpTBDbxmr5goDujBXjYRw5479Z0ngBPQ1cP540GPhXcvzUpE8H9n3-svbGb4eFOQsDBMaSX3Yj6kDjaXbXKDIm275hnqBLD27Pz0_06TeA6aRD-RVwRmken3tQvswfEqFiSNEIbZafaUThDDsAIX9RepZZAMPCCiJ6HWAkixgZCqCPKFJQE0YBBy0dS775MndGw&c=NT5G_VNdFpptNLxKm4XKWqnWIvpIop_3jds-vf4Hm_Bu4ZHYO1Ew6g==&ch=0bwEmbmILLQ5QHL6LAPNzBmi5Bs5ifOFNDBt0O3Xmbs-IbIP4UXtwg==) a new ad recruiting more volunteers to join our tremendous team - and highlighting our efforts to fight for conservative values, restore voter confidence, engage diverse communities, and register new voters ahead of the 2022 elections. The ad, which features 15- and 30-second versions, is part of a statewide buy.
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015Gizz4tCOe8u5eb9KPRWlNhcwKbM4CFyZ2k0LcxhvW864IvfS2Xogp3-ezipZUpT5uK72rceQH-VeMIzt5R8CfTcUfBRbjxxcYtWUoSZAJM0M99IEAPIK7_fYTY0daLepJ4-l_0ECiLjaUChZs7m3GJYlBbotmnf7J1YI-aM_GTBEMuUKJD2TA==&c=NT5G_VNdFpptNLxKm4XKWqnWIvpIop_3jds-vf4Hm_Bu4ZHYO1Ew6g==&ch=0bwEmbmILLQ5QHL6LAPNzBmi5Bs5ifOFNDBt0O3Xmbs-IbIP4UXtwg==) or the image below to watch the full ad:

| ACTION ALERT
For your radar, Georgia's State Election Board will meet over Zoom this upcoming Wednesday, March 16, at 10 a.m. for their regularly scheduled meeting. You can view the agenda [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015Gizz4tCOe8u5eb9KPRWlNhcwKbM4CFyZ2k0LcxhvW864IvfS2Xogp3-ezipZUpTLUGTogVh3bdX8jMhvDN1GGCSxUuxbAApkojhMlsDABzcTWP0Q5gAPumzPo6gl06_Uc7BV-7hnGiIA2nHlUC59ngzV6CBVd-zMsPwq6uKA8DOqLSsR1yrgLo94uOgrNFAm4KzZAz1qmZ5tyjn4TFDJA==&c=NT5G_VNdFpptNLxKm4XKWqnWIvpIop_3jds-vf4Hm_Bu4ZHYO1Ew6g==&ch=0bwEmbmILLQ5QHL6LAPNzBmi5Bs5ifOFNDBt0O3Xmbs-IbIP4UXtwg==). During these meetings, Georgians have the opportunity during the "public comment" portion to make their voices heard and ask questions to hold our elections officials accountable. We encourage you to listen in and ask any questions you might have - our state is greater when every Georgians' voice is heard!
To participate, you have to register ahead of time, after which you will receive the Zoom link. | INTERNSHIP PROGRAM
Greater Georgia has officially launched an [internship program](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015Gizz4tCOe8u5eb9KPRWlNhcwKbM4CFyZ2k0LcxhvW864IvfS2XogirL1PGvzEGVOTG_rFIEddlAE7MpkGwXUDh3XlxfFJqjphktYHTL8m9q37lj9PNGztgNLZdein-gW8jWnlfMpzvDIL6lPCKqeIeP0O9aFIfqzmYJGcOAVL8=&c=NT5G_VNdFpptNLxKm4XKWqnWIvpIop_3jds-vf4Hm_Bu4ZHYO1Ew6g==&ch=0bwEmbmILLQ5QHL6LAPNzBmi5Bs5ifOFNDBt0O3Xmbs-IbIP4UXtwg==)! We are recruiting interns to assist with voter registration and engagement. This opportunity will be great to learn the ropes of political organizing, including how to get out the vote, how to engage with voters in a variety of communities, and more. Possible areas of compensation include class credit, milage reimbursement, and cash incentives based on goal-oriented progress.
If you or someone you know is interested, please contact Outreach Coordinator Terry Fye at [terry@greatergeorgia.com](mailto:terry@greatergeorgia.com) with questions or to submit a completed application.
The full internship application can be found [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015Gizz4tCOe8u5eb9KPRWlNhcwKbM4CFyZ2k0LcxhvW864IvfS2Xogvfu12hUthx5evB8uul8k9E5aOc5eyOYPehFvLQNczMd-IOlLrai7pCi6ktnSvHA-Yp_8gDGkX2M5RR4DmxqH0tlAPBSgmHVB8zdKSGpI1eTZW-hCPLxsfv2ih2LGpxM1DeL5FQ7ErkIYwQGN8mT5AohKHobUHzN7untNHTjYc4xSgG71rMfGCg=&c=NT5G_VNdFpptNLxKm4XKWqnWIvpIop_3jds-vf4Hm_Bu4ZHYO1Ew6g==&ch=0bwEmbmILLQ5QHL6LAPNzBmi5Bs5ifOFNDBt0O3Xmbs-IbIP4UXtwg==).

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Greater Georgia is working to recruit and train volunteers to connect with Georgians and let them know that their voices deserve to be heard - and that their votes will count. Last week, Greater Georgia == a new ad recruiting more volunteers to join our tremendous team - and highlighting our efforts to fight for conservative values, restore voter confidence, engage diverse communities, and register new voters ahead of the 2022 elections. The ad, which features 15- and 30-second versions, is part of a statewide buy. Click == or the image below to watch the full ad: | == | | | | ACTION ALERT For your radar, Georgia's State Election Board will meet over Zoom this upcoming Wednesday, March 16, at 10 a.m. for their regularly scheduled meeting. You can view the agenda ==. During these meetings, Georgians have the opportunity during the "public comment" portion to make their voices heard and ask questions to hold our elections officials accountable. We encourage you to listen in and ask any questions you might have - our state is greater when every Georgians' voice is heard! To participate, you have to register ahead of time, after which you will receive the Zoom link. Click == to register to participate. | | | | Greater Georgia's work is critical to defending conservative values, and it will only be possible through the hard work and support of strong, grassroots volunteers. We need your help! -- Click == or the button below to find out how you can join the fight for conservative values. | | | == | | | | | | UPDATES: | HISPANIC ROUNDTABLE Kelly joined leaders in the Hispanic community for a roundtable luncheon in Norcross to hear their ideas for building a stronger conservative movement in Georgia. March 9, 2022 | == | == | | | | INTERNSHIP PROGRAM Greater Georgia has officially launched an ==! We are recruiting interns to assist with voter registration and engagement. This opportunity will be great to learn the ropes of political organizing, including how to get out the vote, how to engage with voters in a variety of communities, and more. Possible areas of compensation include class credit, milage reimbursement, and cash incentives based on goal-oriented progress. If you or someone you know is interested, please contact Outreach Coordinator Terry Fye at mailto:terry@greatergeorgia.com with questions or to submit a completed application. name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Reminder: Geoff Diehl calls for temporary suspension of state gas tax and motor vehicle excise tax
body:
Please join Geoff's campaign to make Massachusetts more affordable!
| | | |
---
| PRESS RELEASE March 8, 2022
DIEHL CALLS UPON STATE LEGISLATORS TO USE SUPPLEMENTAL SPENDING BILL TO FUND SUSPENSION OF MOTOR VEHICLE GAS TAX AND EXCISE TAX BOSTON, Mass. - Geoff Diehl, Republican candidate for Governor of Massachusetts, issued a statement today calling for state lawmakers to use a pending supplemental spending bill as a vehicle to suspend the state's gas tax and motor vehicle excise tax through at least the end of June: "Today, I'm calling on members of the Massachusetts Legislature to support Massachusetts residents coping with price shocks at the gas pumps by using a supplemental spending bill as a vehicle to immediately suspend collection of our state gas tax. We should also suspend the motor vehicle excise tax. "The Committee on Ways and Means in the Massachusetts House of Representatives released a bill (H. 4532) today calling for $1.6 billion of supplemental spending. The proposed spending includes $433 million for expanded COVID testing, and $125 million for the 'vaccination workforce,' among other proposals. Even after federal reimbursement, the projected cost to the state for this spending eclipses $800 million. "Lawmakers are able to propose this spending because of surplus tax revenues now on-hand. But, are these the right spending priorities for the present day? What Massachusetts residents need most right now is protection from the shock of rapidly-rising costs, and in particular gas prices. Our state could immediately act to blunt the effects of these rising costs by suspending collection of the $0.24 per gallon state gas tax. "Therefore, I encourage members of the Legislature to reallocate a portion of available revenue to suspend the state gas tax for the remainder of this fiscal year (through June 30). The best use for surplus tax revenues is to restore it into the pockets of taxpayers who were overcharged in the first place, and this is one way to do it. "We should also suspend the motor vehicle excise tax, while making appropriate backfill provisions to make sure cities and towns are held harmless from any loss of revenue. High excise taxes discourage people from purchasing more energy-efficient vehicles, which could actually take pressure off demand for fuels in the present day. "I hope lawmakers will additionally consider further extending a gas tax suspension if needed, along with making other tax cuts and supporting enhanced Local Aid payments for cities and towns, into next fiscal year as part of their FY2023 budget debate next month. We need to make Massachusetts a more affordable place to live." Diehl has consistently fought for the rights of Massachusetts taxpayers. In 2014, he led a successful ballot campaign to reject legislative proposals for automatic increases in the state gas tax, which were set to be indexed to the rate of inflation. ###
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Putting Taxpayers First
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indgop/putting-taxpayers-first?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **_Putting Taxpayers First_**
---
|
---
_File Photo (12/26/21):**Chairman Kyle Hupfer** speaks on All INdiana Politics about the automatic taxpayer refund._
| The 2022 legislative session has officially come to a close, and thanks to Gov. Holcomb and our Republican legislators, Hoosier taxpayers have won once again.

As I noted last December, due to hardworking Hoosiers and an unprecedented amount of reserves, 4.3 million Hoosiers will be receiving a $125 refund after filing their 2021 taxes, putting an estimated $545 million back into their pockets. And with the passage of SEA 1, a 2022 Next Level Agenda bill of Gov. Holcomb's, even more Hoosiers will be eligible for the refund, which represents a one-time 12-13% tax cut.

Additionally, Republican legislators passed HEA 1002, a _historic_**$1 billion** tax cut, and another one of Gov. Holcomb's 2022 Next Level Agenda bills. This bill will drop the state's individual income tax rate from 3.23% to 2.90% over a timeframe of seven years. And once the tax cut is fully phased in, our state will tie North Dakota for the _lowest_ individual income tax rate in the nation! HEA 1002 will also help Hoosiers save money by eliminating the 1.46% utility receipt tax, requiring electric utilities to calculate rate reductions or decrease Hoosiers' bills.

These are the type of results that our state has come to expect from Republicans' solutions-centered leadership.

Be on the lookout over the next couple of weeks as we highlight other wins from the 2022 legislative session.

Enjoy this week's newsletter and share it with a friend.

Best,

Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| **_Signing Bills Into Law_**
---
|
---
_**Gov. Holcomb** signs HEA 1001, the bill that officially ended the public health emergency, into law on Thursday, March 3, 2022._
| With _Sine Die_ called shortly after midnight on Wednesday, March 9, the 2022 legislative session has officially come to a close. Over the next few days, bills passed will head to **Gov. Holcomb's** desk for final approval; he will have the option to sign or veto each bill or let it become law without his signature.

_“I’m pleased our agenda items have passed and more importantly that taxpayers will feel the benefits of tax cuts, elimination and refunds. We’ll get to work with the new tools we’ve obtained, and I’ll immediately turn my attention to the careful review of all remaining legislation soon to arrive on my desk," stated**Gov. Holcomb**._

As of Thursday afternoon, **Gov. Holcomb** had signed three of his _2022 Next Level Agenda_ bills into law, including:
* SEA 1 - Automatic Taxpayer Refund
* SEA 294 - Law Enforcement Training Board
* HEA 1313 - Screening Children for Lead Poisoning

You can keep track of which bills have made it to **Gov. Holcomb's** desk by clicking [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=348f571486&e=1acd9bb3d6).
---
|
---
| **_Speaking on the Bipartisan Innovation Act at the White House_**
---
| On Thursday, **Gov. Holcomb** was invited to the White House to speak on the need to pass the bipartisan Innovation and Competition Act, co-authored by **Sen. Todd Young** , which addresses U.S. technology and communications, foreign relations and national security, domestic manufacturing, education, trade, and other matters; the bill passed the Senate in June 2021 but hasn't been acted on in the House.

Included in the bill is the $52 billion Creating Helpful Incentives to Produce Semiconductors for America (CHIPS) Act, which would promote the research, development, and fabrication of semiconductors here in the U.S.

Following the meeting, **Gov. Holcomb** released the following statement:

_"It’s crucial that Congress come together and pass a bipartisan innovation package to address the supply shortage of semiconductors and invest in key technologies that will put our country in the pole position.

"This legislation will grow domestic manufacturing, support the development of cutting-edge technological innovation and create a high-tech workforce to continue our state’s economic competitive edge on a global scale.

"The meeting illustrated the need for government, industry and academia to join together and tell Congress to send a bipartisan innovation bill to the President’s desk faster than an Indy race car."_

You can read more **[here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dd883eac24&e=1acd9bb3d6).**
---
|
---
| **_Students for Todd Young Release Video_**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c372fce87a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
_**Liam Putz** , Chairman of the Indiana Federation of College Republicans, announces the organization's effort to reelect Todd Young to the U.S. Senate._
| **Students for Todd Young **released a video on Wednesday from the Chairman of the Indiana Federation of College Republicans, **Liam Putz,** announcing the organization's effort to reelect Todd Young and encourage other students to join in the fight to take our country back.

>From the **Todd Young** campaign:

_"I’m proud to announce that my campaign has Hoosier students organized at over 20 of our colleges and universities in support of my re-election campaign.

"Elections are about the future, that’s why it’s so encouraging to have so many young people working alongside me to tackle the surging cost of college, drive down 40-year high inflation, and create more good-paying jobs right here in Indiana.

"If you’re interested in joining me in getting our country back on track, join Students for Todd Young today."_
---
| [Visit Students for Todd Young](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b38fe660ec&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Visit Students for Todd Young")
---
|
---
| **_Chairman Kyle Hupfer on the Conclusion
of the 2022 Legislative Session_**
---
|
---
| For a text version of his statement, click [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=13a2f968a3&e=1acd9bb3d6).
---
|
---
| **_Sen. Mike Braun Tops List of Most Bills Passed_**
---
| Despite being in the minority party, **Sen. Mike Braun** sponsored three bills that were enacted into law so far in the 117th Congress, giving him the most bills signed into law this session of any Republican member of Congress.

**Sen. Braun** has led a number of bipartisan legislative efforts to address issues facing Hoosiers that were signed into law, from creating a program to actively hire veterans and transitioning servicemembers, to fixing a broken grant program burdening teachers with unfair loans, to helping ALS patients access their Social Security benefits.
_“I came to D.C. to use my real-world experience building a business to deliver results for Hoosier families, and I’m proud to top the list of most bills passed into law this session of Congress – the most of any Republican. Three of my bills have been signed into law already, and I’m working every day to add to that number with real solutions to put Hoosiers and Americans first,"_ stated _ _**Sen. Braun.**
Read more about the bills [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d1a29a5583&e=1acd9bb3d6).
---
|
---
| _**2022 Indiana Republican Party State Convention**_
---
|
---
| The 2022 Indiana Republican Party State Convention will take place on **Saturday, June 18, 2022** , at**** Indiana Farmer's Coliseum in Indianapolis, Ind. for the purpose of nominating a candidate for secretary of state, auditor of state, and treasurer of state.

For hotel accommodation information, delegate counts by county, and to pay your individual delegate fee, click the button below.
---
| [More Information](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7eb714244e&e=1acd9bb3d6 "More Information")
---
|
---
| | **Chairman Hupfer's Social Media Highlights**
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Stay up-to-date on the latest from Chairman Kyle Hupfer by following him on Facebook and Twitter.

**This week:** Calling out Joe Biden's hypocrisy on buying American and highlighting how out of touch the Administration is.
---

clean_body: The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter | | | | | | | Putting Taxpayers First | File Photo (12/26/21):Chairman Kyle Hupfer speaks on All INdiana Politics about the automatic taxpayer refund. | The 2022 legislative session has officially come to a close, and thanks to Gov. Holcomb and our Republican legislators, Hoosier taxpayers have won once again. As I noted last December, due to hardworking Hoosiers and an unprecedented amount of reserves, 4.3 million Hoosiers will be receiving a $125 refund after filing their 2021 taxes, putting an estimated $545 million back into their pockets. And with the passage of SEA 1, a 2022 Next Level Agenda bill of Gov. Holcomb's, even more Hoosiers will be eligible for the refund, which represents a one-time 12-13% tax cut. Additionally, Republican legislators passed HEA 1002, a historic$1 billion tax cut, and another one of Gov. Holcomb's 2022 Next Level Agenda bills. This bill will drop the state's individual income tax rate from 3.23% to 2.90% over a timeframe of seven years. And once the tax cut is fully phased in, our state will tie North Dakota for the lowest individual income tax rate in the nation! HEA 1002 will also help Hoosiers save money by eliminating the 1.46% utility receipt tax, requiring electric utilities to calculate rate reductions or decrease Hoosiers' bills. These are the type of results that our state has come to expect from Republicans' solutions-centered leadership. Be on the lookout over the next couple of weeks as we highlight other wins from the 2022 legislative session. Enjoy this week's newsletter and share it with a friend. Best, Chairman Kyle Hupfer | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | Signing Bills Into Law | Gov. Holcomb signs HEA 1001, the bill that officially ended the public health emergency, into law on Thursday, March 3, 2022. | With Sine Die called shortly after midnight on Wednesday, March 9, the 2022 legislative session has officially come to a close. Over the next few days, bills passed will head to Gov. Holcomb's desk for final approval; he will have the option to sign or veto each bill or let it become law without his signature. “I’m pleased our agenda items have passed and more importantly that taxpayers will feel the benefits of tax cuts, elimination and refunds. We’ll get to work with the new tools we’ve obtained, and I’ll immediately turn my attention to the careful review of all remaining legislation soon to arrive on my desk," statedGov. Holcomb. As of Thursday afternoon, Gov. Holcomb had signed three of his 2022 Next Level Agenda bills into law, including: SEA 1 - Automatic Taxpayer Refund SEA 294 - Law Enforcement Training Board HEA 1313 - Screening Children for Lead Poisoning You can keep track of which bills have made it to Gov. Holcomb's desk by clicking . | | Speaking on the Bipartisan Innovation Act at the White House | On Thursday, Gov. Holcomb was invited to the White House to speak on the need to pass the bipartisan Innovation and Competition Act, co-authored by Sen. Todd Young , which addresses U.S. technology and communications, foreign relations and national security, domestic manufacturing, education, trade, and other matters; the bill passed the Senate in June 2021 but hasn't been acted on in the House. Included in the bill is the $52 billion Creating Helpful Incentives to Produce Semiconductors for America (CHIPS) Act, which would promote the research, development, and fabrication of semiconductors here in the U.S. Following the meeting, Gov. Holcomb released the following statement: "It’s crucial that Congress come together and pass a bipartisan innovation package to address the supply shortage of semiconductors and invest in key technologies that will put our country in the pole position. "This legislation will grow domestic manufacturing, support the development of cutting-edge technological innovation and create a high-tech workforce to continue our state’s economic competitive edge on a global scale. "The meeting illustrated the need for government, industry and academia to join together and tell Congress to send a bipartisan innovation bill to the President’s desk faster than an Indy race car." You can read more . | | Students for Todd Young Release Video | Liam Putz , Chairman of the Indiana Federation of College Republicans, announces the organization's effort to reelect Todd Young to the U.S. Senate. | Students for Todd Young released a video on Wednesday from the Chairman of the Indiana Federation of College Republicans, Liam Putz, announcing the organization's effort to reelect Todd Young and encourage other students to join in the fight to take our country back. From the Todd Young campaign: "I’m proud to announce that my campaign has Hoosier students organized at over 20 of our colleges and universities in support of my re-election campaign. "Elections are about the future, that’s why it’s so encouraging to have so many young people working alongside me to tackle the surging cost of college, drive down 40-year high inflation, and create more good-paying jobs right here in Indiana. "If you’re interested in joining me in getting our country back on track, join Students for Todd Young today." | "Visit Students for Todd Young" | | Chairman Kyle Hupfer on the Conclusion of the 2022 Legislative Session | | For a text version of his statement, click . | | Sen. Mike Braun Tops List of Most Bills Passed | Despite being in the minority party, Sen. Mike Braun sponsored three bills that were enacted into law so far in the 117th Congress, giving him the most bills signed into law this session of any Republican member of Congress. Sen. Braun has led a number of bipartisan legislative efforts to address issues facing Hoosiers that were signed into law, from creating a program to actively hire veterans and transitioning servicemembers, to fixing a broken grant program burdening teachers with unfair loans, to helping ALS patients access their Social Security benefits. “I came to D.C. to use my real-world experience building a business to deliver results for Hoosier families, and I’m proud to top the list of most bills passed into law this session of Congress – the most of any Republican. Three of my bills have been signed into law already, and I’m working every day to add to that number with real solutions to put Hoosiers and Americans first," stated Sen. Braun. Read more about the bills . | | 2022 Indiana Republican Party State Convention | | The 2022 Indiana Republican Party State Convention will take place on Saturday, June 18, 2022 , at Indiana Farmer's Coliseum in Indianapolis, Ind. for the purpose of nominating a candidate for secretary of state, auditor of state, and treasurer of state. For hotel accommodation information, delegate counts by county, and to pay your individual delegate fee, click the button below. | "More Information" | | | Chairman Hupfer's Social Media Highlights | | | | Stay up-to-date on the latest from Chairman Kyle Hupfer by following him on Facebook and Twitter. This week: Calling out Joe Biden's hypocrisy on buying American and highlighting how out of touch the Administration is. | | | | | | | | | | Upcoming Republican Events Friday, March 11: Friday, March 11: Saturday, March 12: Saturday, March 26: Tuesday, April 5: Wednesday, April 6: Thursday, April 7: Friday, April 8: Friday, April 8: Saturday, April 9: Saturday, April 9: Saturday, April 9: | | mailto:lthomas@indiana.gop?subject=Information%20for%20Upcoming%20Local%20Republican%20Event&body=Name%20of%20Event%3A%0ADate%3A%0ALocation%3A%0ATime%3A%0APrice%3A%0AGuest\(s\%20of%20Honor%3A%0AContact%3A%20%0A%0AOther%20Information%3A%20 "Submit Your Event") | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. Peter,

I have been blessed to have the support of so many people – below are just a few:
* South Carolina Attorney General Alan Wilson
* SCGOP Chairman Drew McKissick
* Congressman Joe Wilson (SC-02)
* Congressman Jeff Duncan (SC-03)
* Congressman Ralph Norman (SC-05)

But, as I was looking through my list of supporters, I noticed that your name was missing, and I figured it must be a mistake – because I know how badly you want to take back the House and restore common-sense conservative values in our country.

**Which leads me to why I am reaching out to you today:** [**as one of my strongest conservative supporters, will you personally endorse my re-election campaign for Congress?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c342ecf4ba9f4eeabe159789e5249e97&_e=VPrCdiYCX_scoBPDj0gGG3Y2i5Kv3LfJA1kba4dHI3w--Xr-Q9VOKATmU3OZYUm2K9SE11BRjgPJCju7hubqtcVvRygA-eoz6h5U9s4U833IEKfUq98K6JqXRsyF5TQVfbRv6PBJ5uQ-nTzL0Kl3vAz7mTqg41CqpKn_2w7022iHctMXucE-IDT4fWjhS6Xlpb--g5rfHntaAHRFpSum86jTupVIqH_BKLMITV00DVHWwu1bYAOZXBmhpDmrYAgCZQ0-oWYLZmt50KtCMeohNaClBC72yNdHxRpGsCIdClyDLUXY1azEis-4A3rO4Cg4CNZkCq1DupsENwgVnfi2wE6pG4kYxECEu9onZmLc0NWdFh9eMpQKUpIaDfh905lAp9Ytn4yEPkMiwSv0u7UvL30DYG1zFfNvSXcVxjIA0-7BjqueGPhvr5OvAyeVH2u8aDgE1BNfU4ar35k4TI64NkE270UfIPE0RW-_VoBsGEk3etAKjQU4w1UhaUo8SkvGi72cY7ERlEeA1VK2VADNm8mDOWYqDDQeGPdtr8kQXzt5HBFtGbrm3KLqxZByGgoZ)

[** ENDORSE WILLIAM TIMMONS ➞ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c342ecf4ba9f4eeabe159789e5249e97&_e=VPrCdiYCX_scoBPDj0gGG3Y2i5Kv3LfJA1kba4dHI3w--Xr-Q9VOKATmU3OZYUm2K9SE11BRjgPJCju7hubqtcVvRygA-eoz6h5U9s4U833IEKfUq98K6JqXRsyF5TQVfbRv6PBJ5uQ-nTzL0Kl3vAz7mTqg41CqpKn_2w7022iHctMXucE-IDT4fWjhS6Xlpb--g5rfHntaAHRFpSum86jTupVIqH_BKLMITV00DVHWwu1bYAOZXBmhpDmrYAgCZQ0-oWYLZmt50KtCMeohNaClBC72yNdHxRpGsCIdClyDLUXY1azEis-4A3rO4Cg4CNZkCq1DupsENwgVnfi2wE6pG4kYxECEu9onZmLc0NXFdHpYAl4AyoA9cMfH6JR4YUJmTYHTPYXkScuszIHaG4jCqH20KshBWv5V80ItfU_i4anil23V-aGg6rVknjKjfDo5L6C9kTu0xEpSNUM6_r9qLmRZomjApILPRDsVFJ5ztCiEWJN6gJXUMF-m7k6y5y-uHYe_rIT5zjM-u23VFTPr4clJTeFnsHPLypN2aGUm0MJvN_D2fDJMgQ8vh_ZN)
During my time in office, I have been a steadfast Republican and have continued to put the American people first – ahead of personal political interests – which cannot be said about my opponents. **We must keep this seat in the hands of a proven Conservative that is working hard for you and your family!**

This race is more important than just South Carolina—it is a chance to actually create change in the halls of Congress and flip the House majority this November.

I have been fortunate to gain the endorsement of dozens of elected officials and conservative leaders here in South Carolina, but what I really need today is the rock-solid backing of conservative warriors like you. [**Can I count on your crucial endorsement today?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c342ecf4ba9f4eeabe159789e5249e97&_e=VPrCdiYCX_scoBPDj0gGG3Y2i5Kv3LfJA1kba4dHI3w--Xr-Q9VOKATmU3OZYUm2K9SE11BRjgPJCju7hubqtcVvRygA-eoz6h5U9s4U833IEKfUq98K6JqXRsyF5TQVfbRv6PBJ5uQ-nTzL0Kl3vAz7mTqg41CqpKn_2w7022iHctMXucE-IDT4fWjhS6Xlpb--g5rfHntaAHRFpSum86jTupVIqH_BKLMITV00DVHWwu1bYAOZXBmhpDmrYAgCZQ0-oWYLZmt50KtCMeohNaClBC72yNdHxRpGsCIdClyDLUXY1azEis-4A3rO4Cg4CNZkCq1DupsENwgVnfi2wE6pG4kYxECEu9onZmLc0NU7hCdBa8xFUtx8nsF0tSzRY6XrJIh0S_HRiFAn8dAOXiCt1Bde6PGsW4VzWVpX_AU8sMj-D6rakiNFoedp3uQSiPhInVNCl9C3EK8kSsuoUydJkHTo0eqcSvAPNWx-llgRiln38F6Mq-6Tx5e33sTeEF2JpXyJJ86bmLAbSzbPecz_YNAlFLW76Kt-OAy-1iiEY_ooZd66rsncUR4F7UvY)

[** ENDORSE WILLIAM TIMMONS ➞ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c342ecf4ba9f4eeabe159789e5249e97&_e=VPrCdiYCX_scoBPDj0gGG3Y2i5Kv3LfJA1kba4dHI3w--Xr-Q9VOKATmU3OZYUm2K9SE11BRjgPJCju7hubqtcVvRygA-eoz6h5U9s4U833IEKfUq98K6JqXRsyF5TQVfbRv6PBJ5uQ-nTzL0Kl3vAz7mTqg41CqpKn_2w7022iHctMXucE-IDT4fWjhS6Xlpb--g5rfHntaAHRFpSum86jTupVIqH_BKLMITV00DVHWwu1bYAOZXBmhpDmrYAgCZQ0-oWYLZmt50KtCMeohNaClBC72yNdHxRpGsCIdClyDLUXY1azEis-4A3rO4Cg4CNZkCq1DupsENwgVnfi2wE6pG4kYxECEu9onZmLc0NUIckhFVMW9eK0TOIHGFQAhQP_beciFBdsIxHvWrbkIrXGl9N97bq6WC4BI29-y1x-yThWEQMWS3SH_ecTk2l3AZw-q7kiS5AjmIxRg5RTRTd1w15ypYMrOCYoju1MLgQQXy5WrnmynAf0bdzKeNaWNrTxBmTXQS0RbnLNVCtzVE-BvwPQWIkYS-ewuKdVVD2QWKpHbNQi8o6a7m72JuYaN)
[**Please stand with me and other grassroots conservatives**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c342ecf4ba9f4eeabe159789e5249e97&_e=VPrCdiYCX_scoBPDj0gGG3Y2i5Kv3LfJA1kba4dHI3w--Xr-Q9VOKATmU3OZYUm2K9SE11BRjgPJCju7hubqtcVvRygA-eoz6h5U9s4U833IEKfUq98K6JqXRsyF5TQVfbRv6PBJ5uQ-nTzL0Kl3vAz7mTqg41CqpKn_2w7022iHctMXucE-IDT4fWjhS6Xlpb--g5rfHntaAHRFpSum86jTupVIqH_BKLMITV00DVHWwu1bYAOZXBmhpDmrYAgCZQ0-oWYLZmt50KtCMeohNaClBC72yNdHxRpGsCIdClyDLUXY1azEis-4A3rO4Cg4CNZkCq1DupsENwgVnfi2wE6pG4kYxECEu9onZmLc0NWXkLOHfjnAQ4V8sooyMMIjc_BO8wThi7fX06l2PEKOc9I3EKVM8S3NapkwI-7e9wALB2S4hKoSOPDfVi0ENcAFevsBztknX5MESfRpcUUyfUMVsuKU8g4JiQ82QtaD54cV9hK31pg1vmgkxfEpurVi3xg_HCG-djC3G4p-H1jSTq9ujo4GD5VigM5wT58z7uVDCi2-vKW7wL1PevS-Xx04) who are laying the groundwork for a tremendous Republican re-election victory here in the 4th Congressional District that will help us retake the U.S. House and put an end to the Democrats’ disastrous agenda.

I am asking that you be 1 of 324 additional dedicated conservatives who are committed to joining my team with a personal endorsement before midnight tonight.

[**I appreciate your support and look forward to retaking the U.S. House of Representatives together this November.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c342ecf4ba9f4eeabe159789e5249e97&_e=VPrCdiYCX_scoBPDj0gGG3Y2i5Kv3LfJA1kba4dHI3w--Xr-Q9VOKATmU3OZYUm2K9SE11BRjgPJCju7hubqtcVvRygA-eoz6h5U9s4U833IEKfUq98K6JqXRsyF5TQVfbRv6PBJ5uQ-nTzL0Kl3vAz7mTqg41CqpKn_2w7022iHctMXucE-IDT4fWjhS6Xlpb--g5rfHntaAHRFpSum86jTupVIqH_BKLMITV00DVHWwu1bYAOZXBmhpDmrYAgCZQ0-oWYLZmt50KtCMeohNaClBC72yNdHxRpGsCIdClyDLUXY1azEis-4A3rO4Cg4CNZkCq1DupsENwgVnfi2wE6pG4kYxECEu9onZmLc0NXQzWEn1MiQG8C7Mdn4RJ-Fdx7JTtW95DOQ7cmPTUqidYRT9152gyMkZUrVu_X-HqOkEkfAW7cw3h0LhPP8leIc11WnkX0PWLS6xVobNu9MT2MLIDxvqdZIuogj3H2iQ6o0qI8iBVo6J5auiFJU4iCF_RLCSDzrnIBWFuCIna8a4pQ1GN_vKEDV6QKGAfb_jNWKX9M2Y_GCFVw5WVD-TNtJ)

Peter, I have been blessed to have the support of so many people – below are just a few: South Carolina Attorney General Alan Wilson SCGOP Chairman Drew McKissick Congressman Joe Wilson (SC-02) Congressman Jeff Duncan (SC-03) Congressman Ralph Norman (SC-05) But, as I was looking through my list of supporters, I noticed that your name was missing, and I figured it must be a mistake – because I know how badly you want to take back the House and restore common-sense conservative values in our country. Which leads me to why I am reaching out to you today: During my time in office, I have been a steadfast Republican and have continued to put the American people first – ahead of personal political interests – which cannot be said about my opponents. We must keep this seat in the hands of a proven Conservative that is working hard for you and your family! This race is more important than just South Carolina—it is a chance to actually create change in the halls of Congress and flip the House majority this November. I have been fortunate to gain the endorsement of dozens of elected officials and conservative leaders here in South Carolina, but what I really need today is the rock-solid backing of conservative warriors like you. who are laying the groundwork for a tremendous Republican re-election victory here in the 4th Congressional District that will help us retake the U.S. House and put an end to the Democrats’ disastrous agenda. I am asking that you be 1 of 324 additional dedicated conservatives who are committed to joining my team with a personal endorsement before midnight tonight.
