name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing twitter and we need your help
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59808406:JwJZMRENz:m:1:3317145305:AC1F3F3B02A129F8B0252610ED0F7EE5:r) Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. **In other words, we've caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents.** And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. That's why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties - _and we need your help to win._ **[Will you join us in our lawsuit against Twitter and Sen. Padilla and help defend the First Amendment?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59808406:JwJZMRENz:m:1:3317145305:AC1F3F3B02A129F8B0252610ED0F7EE5:r)** Let me explain... Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O'Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns about the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59808406:JwJZMRENz:m:1:3317145305:AC1F3F3B02A129F8B0252610ED0F7EE5:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59808406:JwJZMRENz:m:1:3317145305:AC1F3F3B02A129F8B0252610ED0F7EE5:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59808406:JwJZMRENz:m:1:3317145305:AC1F3F3B02A129F8B0252610ED0F7EE5:r) Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for "violating the government's rules about election integrity." _Hopefully, I don't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs or opinions is a gross violation of the First Amendment._ But it gets much worse... When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to silence him. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris' vacated seat in the U.S. Senate - and he was afraid that Rogan's tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. **So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed his press secretary to contact Twitter and shut Rogan up.** **From:** California Secretary of State Communications Department **To:** Twitter **Date:** Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59808406:JwJZMRENz:m:1:3317145305:AC1F3F3B02A129F8B0252610ED0F7EE5:r) From user @DC_Draino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later \-- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59808406:JwJZMRENz:m:1:3317145305:AC1F3F3B02A129F8B0252610ED0F7EE5:r) That's why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberals for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of just $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59808406:JwJZMRENz:m:1:3317145305:AC1F3F3B02A129F8B0252610ED0F7EE5:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. Two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed by today's left. We've taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, banned people from going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes-out of school-during the pandemic. We've taken on Antifa for viciously assaulting and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo who exposed Antifa's vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia. **And now, we're taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O'Handley's freedom of speech.** But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. _After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians._ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59808406:JwJZMRENz:m:1:3317145305:AC1F3F3B02A129F8B0252610ED0F7EE5:r) I'm not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives? [**Please join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59808406:JwJZMRENz:m:1:3317145305:AC1F3F3B02A129F8B0252610ED0F7EE5:r) Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior. [**That's why I'm urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59808406:JwJZMRENz:m:1:3317145305:AC1F3F3B02A129F8B0252610ED0F7EE5:r) [**DONATE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59808406:JwJZMRENz:m:1:3317145305:AC1F3F3B02A129F8B0252610ED0F7EE5:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59808406:JwJZMRENz:m:1:3317145305:AC1F3F3B02A129F8B0252610ED0F7EE5:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59808406:JwJZMRENz:m:1:3317145305:AC1F3F3B02A129F8B0252610ED0F7EE5:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
© The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59808408:JwJZMRENz:m:1:3317145305:AC1F3F3B02A129F8B0252610ED0F7EE5:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

body:

Something I Put Together

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfm6j2b6p0amt3lhughi8o6tgb1rqt54aofu1aq0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1h6eo32cjh2bs)
---

Folks,

I have been working on new poetry for some of my left-leaning friends recently and wanted to share it with you:

Roses are red, violets are blue
The Biden Administration is a joke and Pelosi and Schumer are, too.
I hate to be petty,
I try hard not to be.
But the left makes it simple,
Everyone can see.
With your goat milk lattes and woke-babbling galore
You make a fool of yourself
And I find it hard to ignore.

So to bring it all home,
At the risk of sounding crass:
When we take back the House and Senate
Don't let the door hit you in the a**

subject: Thanks for signing up!

body:
It started with knocking on some doors and asking unregistered voters what matters to them.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42847599/334572079/1975269225?refcode=EM_C_2022Welcome1_N_KK_W_7_NG_N_LOGO&amount=40&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcxMzM0OTllLTQ4YTEtZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qSH87fozHrmmXU9FB7YCrDQ6BOPB5GgTXh7Hr7LEuLw=)
Fellow activist, we need as many people as possible to help us engage and mobilize Black, brown, and young voters. If you would prefer not to receive emails in the future, please feel free to [click here for fewer emails](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42847600/334572081/-1986748762?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcxMzM0OTllLTQ4YTEtZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qSH87fozHrmmXU9FB7YCrDQ6BOPB5GgTXh7Hr7LEuLw=&emci=12772c8b-3522-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=7133499e-48a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=1522179) or [ unsubscribe here](https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/12772c8b-3522-ec11-981f-501ac510a405/7133499e-48a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcxMzM0OTllLTQ4YTEtZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qSH87fozHrmmXU9FB7YCrDQ6BOPB5GgTXh7Hr7LEuLw=&id=102631909).
I wanted to take a moment and introduce myself and share the great work of the New Pennsylvania Project, a voting rights organization with a primary focus on year-round voter registration that was founded in May 2021. We have an opportunity to bring more communities into the electorate, with a focus on Black, brown, and young voters.
So I got some folks together, and we started knocking on doors.
We knocked doors in places like Norristown, Montgomery County, Monroeville, Allegheny County, Carlisle, Cumberland County, and Lower Bucks County this summer. We weren’t pushing any candidates or political party. We simply asked unregistered or infrequent voters what was on their mind. Their response? _They were surprised that we weren’t pushing a political agenda on them_ but looking to understand why they weren’t engaging in a political process that is so clearly the path forward to making the Commonwealth a better place for everyone.
Since May of 2021, we’ve hit the ground running -- registering voters and laying grassroots infrastructure throughout Pennsylvania. This work is critical to ensuring that the people of Pennsylvania are represented by legislators who actually care about them and what they need.
Thanks to your support, we can knock on **more** doors, register **more** voters, and engage **more** people in _our constitutional right_ to the American democratic process.
**Thank you for standing in this fight with us.**
In solidarity,
Kadida Kenner
_Founding Executive Director
New Pennsylvania Project_
[ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42847601/334572082/1975269225?refcode=EM_C_2022Welcome1_N_KK_W_7_NG_N_L1&amount=40&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcxMzM0OTllLTQ4YTEtZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qSH87fozHrmmXU9FB7YCrDQ6BOPB5GgTXh7Hr7LEuLw=)
The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents, and those living in underrepresented communities of color and immigrant communities. We will register them to vote, provide education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize people to vote in every election. name: Deroy Murdock
subject: A bright light during dark hours
body:
I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ze95dst44v384fclgmfefm2jf3s4b5p0asrj44p8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onjcgpj2dtl62r7cddkckpm9pbhejhj6tj4m5pm1ohle5pn6o9gmhq3ec5h6orrfduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4dr66hgb6p9nmph6cclgm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi46h22sh2s8i66ob7c1h6eo32cjh2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0il6gltf542cgb754m87ip4qok0vt60oh83jh48_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1h6eo32cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zboaqjeie4k7hbhq9ah62hgrf6g5uavlcaaf39m0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1h6eo32cjh2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zk2h6iski9shbc0dddr5ipli9kdd27rvfl5897h8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1h6eo32cjh2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zs50a9o08alak8km3fhpd0f1ke5di1l2djrel4n8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1h6eo32cjh2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zm06cmqsthqj7hhnqn2sue32a2g8ioa55me7u5p8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1h6eo32cjh2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zasm80280ior7i9aiaodes310pg5s7j2oshed850_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1h6eo32cjh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5tj6lagg13la39l1dd02gf75jrhr3j3scgp1cc8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or1ctg64pr0c9ie49fg)

Lewis. In fact, our free online course, “” has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching “,” we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of “” on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Doug Gansler
subject: Environmental justice is racial justice
body:
Black and Brown communities are disproportionately impacted by pollution, just as they are disproportionately impacted by crime and by the criminal justice system. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnOVJWA2XP1Y2mMbW7NDPq96zgWrU2LNr-VmRgN4YfMY3yHK1ZfrqtX9yo04Z8Y-H-6_Y89d2oXo9Szc-aC_qt9NUnjqj8bC1vhsQNKsv0aFRt7Y_1ni6TxA4yq_estXfaLLxNjEMR9reUMcwhH4wA0rWvLQi48ZhtyoOd4cjSyCmcPAXQKPNjGu63mp9bIPrruVXTIusyCGYRDj05E-kCyfemKNfhQMfLNpLnO41k1z03r92mFFlizC8x4s1cNKQt5gKh1R0_OJZ_qu4M8-PA2kMRN1H_xhQg5mOvqV-nT8g/3k9/78XKG9FFTjOgHnFbXaXQxA/h0/LQU2UF1z8DpHujS-I9n0pkI3X7hr28YGFsaUPdwhTMk)
---
I've dedicated my entire career to safety and justice, friends. At its most fundamental level, safety means freedom from danger -- and protecting Marylanders from gun violence and other physical attacks will be my number one priority as governor. But safety also means that you can drink the water from your tap and breathe the air outside your house without getting sick. It means you don't have to fear that your children might develop asthma or cancer from the carcinogens in your neighborhood. That's why I support amending our constitution to establish that every person has the fundamental and inalienable right to a healthful and sustainable environment, because I believe a clean and healthful environment is essential to the safety of all Marylanders. **[If you agree, join me in calling on the Maryland General Assembly to amend our state Constitution and pass SB0783!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnOVJWA2XP1Y2mMbW7NDPq96zgWrU2LNr-VmRgN4YfMY3yHK1ZfrqtX9yo04Z8Y-H-6_Y89d2oXo9Szc-aC_qt9NUnjqj8bC1vhsQNKsv0aFRt7Y_1ni6TxA4yq_estXfbiikiUxmeCjkuiXiuTcOH6Eznnly69ivXAjwJy5yHxnQMEHwQEBmjBAVqchCYnbtWip0YEfvER6kYQN76s6XA5HKEWDQS-_XKKIzxsUZvXa5AGFpsv7YZkyGNOuy7D0BuoEqNk62gdA3VyttvisYkciXiG-ikxWKTFbzL-zIC7Mw/3k9/78XKG9FFTjOgHnFbXaXQxA/h1/WPUB74GCgH-koqSKgvfX1d9YUktCoiMUwHwa0vKESqk)**
---
[ **SIGN PETITION HERE ->**
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnOVJWA2XP1Y2mMbW7NDPq96zgWrU2LNr-VmRgN4YfMY3yHK1ZfrqtX9yo04Z8Y-H-6_Y89d2oXo9Szc-aC_qt9NUnjqj8bC1vhsQNKsv0aFRt7Y_1ni6TxA4yq_estXfakR66oIMEqCqjzz033YEMWL6JN9NwNn-w1aFZKITRR08Yn79YGxfE_7FxiNsFVstOxpXk-EYGMps6QKwEOi6JoxdWAk80nITXifJFa8_vhAlXjCduNLXUi0PSTfLxf7gnlKG1cdyBQi4H39hE8bADOAcigaXcw1vAx38tiwbg7Gw/3k9/78XKG9FFTjOgHnFbXaXQxA/h2/3zpNoGWCvtQji9MmTxH2k25ldIVW_GG3qabjL_baaAE)
---
Black and Brown communities are disproportionately impacted by pollution, just as they are disproportionately impacted by crime and by the criminal justice system. In Baltimore, a city that is 63% Black, asthma hospitalizations are twice as high than in Maryland as a whole and almost three times higher than the U.S. average. That's not right. Environmental justice is racial justice and we must fight injustice wherever it exists. That's why I'm urging the Maryland General Assembly to take bold action by advancing SB0783 and amending Maryland's Constitution. **[Are you with me, friends?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnOVJWA2XP1Y2mMbW7NDPq96zgWrU2LNr-VmRgN4YfMY3yHK1ZfrqtX9yo04Z8Y-H-6_Y89d2oXo9Szc-aC_qt9NUnjqj8bC1vhsQNKsv0aFRt7Y_1ni6TxA4yq_estXfYPmhKpfsl8g0cOOVOBc4tKf334zlIrXSLesaz9eJRC7fO520HBdP3UNNY2w15Fg7qxC6x-ckG3rXwr4iqN6e-DX0wS_jO4RjsOz65CuPdk1UI6XC_2UCEF_k2bTPd12qitXlB1QG8Xro_8gtLfG5o9qvG6ULIRi_Mm47LLZhazwQ/3k9/78XKG9FFTjOgHnFbXaXQxA/h3/KdoXwaPsAwFrZuKbXF4KaFhxYtW_6OvM7oa6mUf9quQ)** Thanks for taking action, Doug

body:

| | |

Team — it's Aaron, Campaign Manager for Team Maggie. Could I have just two minutes to ask you to make your first contribution to Maggie's campaign tonight?

There are many reasons that Senator Hassan's seat is worth defending, but let me share two in particular that are on my mind:
| | | | Since taking office, Senator Hassan has worked across the aisle to expand economic opportunity, support small businesses, and fight on behalf of families like yours.**But she can only keep making progress if we defend her seat this November.** |
---|---|---|---
| | | | Mitch McConnell and the GOP need to flip only one seat to take back the Senate, and they're laser-focused on Maggie's race in New Hampshire, which experts are calling **one of the most vulnerable in the country.** |
---|---|---|---
Unlike her GOP opponents, Maggie doesn't have the bottomless pockets of dark-money donors. We rely on grassroots supporters just like you giving what you can when it matters most.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ingrid=20Centurion?=
subject: Congress has failed us
body:
Centurion's Vision for the District | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/webvortex/its-official-shes-off-and-running-8854609?e=bb02dd73bf)
---
| | | [ ](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=e764d759c8&e=bb02dd73bf)

|
---
|
---
| | | [Please Donate](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=a7c338c44b&e=bb02dd73bf "Please Donate")
---
|
# The failures of Congress
The incompetence, immaturity and irresponsibility of Congress should concern every American citizen. Allow me to explain the duties of a Congressman, Congress is the legislative branch of the federal government that represents the American people and makes the nation's laws. It shares power with the executive branch, led by the president, and the judicial branch, whose highest body is the Supreme Court of the United States. Of the three branches of government, Congress is the only one elected directly by the people. Article I—the longest article of the Constitution—describes congressional powers. Congress has the power to:
* Make laws
* Declare war
* Raise and provide public money and oversee its proper expenditure
* Impeach and try federal officers
* Approve presidential appointments
* Approve treaties negotiated by the executive branch
* Oversight and investigations

Its time that we start putting real experience and leadership in Congress and that's Ingrid Centurion. We are all tired of the popularity contest, buying your way into office and lets just do it the old fashion way. A genuine warrior in Congress with a resume to protect this nation and improve the District.

God Bless America,
---
| | | |
---
---
---
| | | **Ingrid Centurion
Republican Candidate for Congress, SC-01

_America First conservative Republican.
Entrepreneur, Army veteran, wife & mother_

_P.S. -- We need Republicans who speak, act and vote in the House the same way they campaign!_**
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Neil=20Kumar=20for=20Congress?=
subject: My opponent just voted for Gun Control
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEIL FOR ARKANSAS
body:
He just gave the ATF a LOT more power. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/jan6-5066221?e=eda539b26b)
---
| | [ ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=9fa21e2f30&e=eda539b26b)
---
| | Fellow Patriot:

This week, my RINO opponent, Deep State Steve Womack, was one of only 39 Republicans who voted with the Democrats on their massive new spending bill.

He said that there were no poison pills in the bill _.**He LIED.**_

_This bill is one of the greatest assaults on the Second Amendment in years._

As anyone who's ever bought a gun knows, the NICS background check system is broken. It gives out false positives all the time.

_But now, thanks to my opponent, every single time someone is flagged, the ATF is required to open a criminal investigation into them._

**This means that innocent gun owners are going to go be persecuted and harassed by the full force of the tyrannical ATF. Some will even go to prison.**

_It gets worse. This bill also gives the ATF the power to deputize local law enforcement._

**So now, the ATF can go anywhere in America and totally hijack local police and sheriffs' departments.**

This is yet another step towards taking our guns away.

I wish I could say that this betrayal was unexpected. But it's not.

Just last year, my opponent voted in favor of a bill that gave the Pentagon the power to issue Red Flag Gun Confiscation orders to veterans -- the first step in national Red Flag Laws for civilians.

[Retire my RINO opponent so he can NEVER threaten our God-given right to Self-Defense ever again.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=37bbbca031&e=eda539b26b)

**[_Punish I oppose any and all attempts to restrict our Second Amendment; in fact, my platform puts states and __municipalities_ _ first. Sheriffs should ARREST any ATF agent who thinks he can come down here and take our guns._](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=5f6fd086ba&e=eda539b26b)**

[**_Help me defeat the Bipartisan Establishment_ _\-- Chip into my election campaign right away and show them the power of the America First movement_**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=8a26e7e9a2&e=eda539b26b) _._

_We need PATRIOTS who will**FIGHT** for the **AMERICAN** people, not limp-waisted frauds who never miss an opportunity to stab us in the back._

[_**Your contributions to my campaign will help me purchase TV and radio ads, yard signs, and other campaign materials so I can fight the worthless GOP, retire a weak RINO, and replace him with a fierce America First Warrior**_.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=9346ad6398&e=eda539b26b)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. ** [_**I know you're ready to replace these worthless RINOs with America First conservatives like me, and that's why I'm counting on your contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=d0ee32d5be&e=eda539b26b)** _._**
---

name: DASS Update
subject: [sign the card] Thank You, Secretary Benson!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
Team,
In a year full of headlines about stalled federal voting legislation and extreme voter-suppression schemes, it’s important to celebrate good news when it happens.
That’s why we were so excited to hear that Michigan Secretary of State Jocelyn Benson just blocked another effort to make it harder to vote by mail!
This shows why it’s so critical to elect pro-voter Secretaries of State across the country – in many cases, they’re the last line of defense against partisan legislatures pushing anti-democratic initiatives.
And while democracy is still in danger in states across the country, we need to celebrate and lift up victories like this when they happen. [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/thank-benson-1]
Will you add your name to our card thanking Secretary Benson for defending voting rights in Michigan? >> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/thank-benson-1]
https://action.demsofstate.org/a/thank-benson-1 [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/thank-benson-1] ADD MY NAME >>> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/thank-benson-1]
DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections.
Help us fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda by pitching in today!
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=footer-button&amount=25]

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: My Poem to The Left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpjp2cng7ncu7up2rpsbafr3jjqo2gbkanulia38_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ukpjfdb3mqr79cb1e2qn6oj661p60obkmir7cotn65pmec32mspbcc32mlqjdc37q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlcaqr0ptim1j7coljcorr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1ctg64o70spj649fg)
Something I Put Together

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn5og4sk2s3o5ouvscenjqonufo1ccomu8kb2goo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1h61o76cph2bs)
---

Folks,

I have been working on new poetry for some of my left-leaning friends recently and wanted to share it with you:

Roses are red, violets are blue
The Biden Administration is a joke and Pelosi and Schumer are, too.
I hate to be petty,
I try hard not to be.
But the left makes it simple,
Everyone can see.
With your goat milk lattes and woke-babbling galore
You make a fool of yourself
And I find it hard to ignore.

So to bring it all home,
At the risk of sounding crass:
When we take back the House and Senate
Don't let the door hit you in the a**

clean_body: Something I Put Together | Folks, I have been working on new poetry for some of my left-leaning friends recently and wanted to share it with you: Roses are red, violets are blue The Biden Administration is a joke and Pelosi and Schumer are, too. I hate to be petty, I try hard not to be. But the left makes it simple, Everyone can see. With your goat milk lattes and woke-babbling galore You make a fool of yourself And I find it hard to ignore. name: American Update
subject: Your course is ready
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9697%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=nL61misY9y8yyMT%2bsSaCHA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25284%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xe5jWnknfvRVCzHl3KujDQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25295%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J7afF5Y%2f41GS3RiwvEvBBA&sysid=1)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25296%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JrXCbUyPvOrab87OYL86XA&sysid=1),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25297%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rg2DXcFGwVqjcYYWbJqolw&sysid=1) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25296%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JrXCbUyPvOrab87OYL86XA&sysid=1)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25298%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=G3OGCnFtdoh%2btoKD7%2b0%2fOA&sysid=1) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9697%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=nL61misY9y8yyMT%2bsSaCHA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9697%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=nL61misY9y8yyMT%2bsSaCHA&sysid=1)

name: Team Seth
subject: Tell the Senate: Confirm Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson

body:
Did you get a chance to read Seth's message, Peter?

After rushing through Amy Coney Barrett's nomination as quickly as possible before Election Day in 2020, Senate Republicans are now openly trying to stall Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson's confirmation. We need to send a message loud and clear that the American people want a fair and speedy confirmation process.

[**Add your name today to call on the Senate to confirm Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42851515/334589625/1280553051?ms=em22_220310_SCOTUS_adv_gq_act_kic__ts_ettx&refcode=em22_220310_SCOTUS_adv_gq_act_kic__ts_ettx&source=em22_220310_SCOTUS_adv_gq_act_kic__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220310_SCOTUS_adv_gq_act_kic__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=is2tpZHMqauWxJDSn8iDtCe5+BBVx2t27lGcxlfyqTCnq2A7A5SDJ4tkbMfzApM5O43+YA1nnbZOwtsOV1Jqko/2lwNkcujlLGpLBCvE+e+kc6Lt8nM45tPdcXXAKoALFEmx7CQHMDxEp17BZxQz1qbgk1ncaHuCmIDecz2IcjA=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTkyZjQxNS00ZWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KxupleNoATuuzofE3Ym_6soIC6YoXT_IlR_gNudCMKk=&emci=7261c9d5-bba0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=6a92f415-4ea1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15384964)

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From:**Seth Magaziner** <info@sethmagaziner.com>
Date: Fri, Mar 4, 2022
Subject: Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson
Team,

Last week, President Joe Biden made history by nominating the first Black woman to the United States Supreme Court. Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson is highly-qualified to succeed Justice Stephen Breyer and will carry on his legacy of fighting for equal rights and justice for all.

President Biden's nomination is a critical symbol of progress and hope for all Americans, and particularly for millions of young Black women who will see themselves represented in the highest court of the land. Our institutions should look like the people they serve, and I commend President Biden for this historic nomination.

Now that President Biden has named a qualified and experienced nominee, we need the Senate to do their job and commit to a fair confirmation process without delay.

[**If you agree the Senate should confirm Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson, add your name today >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42851516/334589632/1280553051?ms=em22_220310_SCOTUS_adv_gq_act_kic__ts_ettx&refcode=em22_220310_SCOTUS_adv_gq_act_kic__ts_ettx&source=em22_220310_SCOTUS_adv_gq_act_kic__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220310_SCOTUS_adv_gq_act_kic__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=is2tpZHMqauWxJDSn8iDtCe5+BBVx2t27lGcxlfyqTCnq2A7A5SDJ4tkbMfzApM5O43+YA1nnbZOwtsOV1Jqko/2lwNkcujlLGpLBCvE+e+kc6Lt8nM45tPdcXXAKoALFEmx7CQHMDxEp17BZxQz1qbgk1ncaHuCmIDecz2IcjA=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTkyZjQxNS00ZWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KxupleNoATuuzofE3Ym_6soIC6YoXT_IlR_gNudCMKk=&emci=7261c9d5-bba0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=6a92f415-4ea1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15384964)

clean_body: Did you get a chance to read Seth's message, Peter? After rushing through Amy Coney Barrett's nomination as quickly as possible before Election Day in 2020, Senate Republicans are now openly trying to stall Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson's confirmation. We need to send a message loud and clear that the American people want a fair and speedy confirmation process. \---------- Forwarded message --------- From:Seth Magaziner <info@sethmagaziner.com> Date: Fri, Mar 4, 2022 Subject: Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson Team, Last week, President Joe Biden made history by nominating the first Black woman to the United States Supreme Court. Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson is highly-qualified to succeed Justice Stephen Breyer and will carry on his legacy of fighting for equal rights and justice for all. President Biden's nomination is a critical symbol of progress and hope for all Americans, and particularly for millions of young Black women who will see themselves represented in the highest court of the land. Our institutions should look like the people they serve, and I commend President Biden for this historic nomination. Now that President Biden has named a qualified and experienced nominee, we need the Senate to do their job and commit to a fair confirmation process without delay. Thank you, Seth = | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MAGAZINER FOR CONGRESS VICTORIA ALMEIDA, TREASURER Magaziner for Congress Victoria Almeida, Treasurer PO Box 40993 Providence, RI 02940 United States

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I need to share this with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
I’m counting on your help!
| | | My team gave me some news that I need to share with you.

**Political experts just reported that the New Hampshire Senate race is a toss-up.** This is urgent: if I lose, Democrats will lose the Senate majority.

Far-right GOP groups have already spent over $7.5 million attacking me, and this news is going to invite _even more_ dark money into New Hampshire as Mitch McConnell tries to unseat me and flip the Senate red.

**This is a critical moment in the campaign.** New Hampshire could very well determine control of the Senate, so we need to act now to turn this around.

I know we can win this seat and keep the Senate blue -- I've won tough races before -- but it's going to take a grassroots effort.

**[So I have to ask: Will you split a $5 donation between my campaign and the DSCC today? The full force of the GOP's war chest is coming for New Hampshire, and I urgently need your support.](https://go.dscc.org/go/4728?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220311-Hassan-HassanTandemv1-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220311-Hassan-HassanTandemv1-ETG-sl1&akid=3312%2E9716520%2EegCS_R)** If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Maggie Hassan and the DSCC and will be processed immediately. | | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/4728?amount=5&t=5&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220311-Hassan-HassanTandemv1-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220311-Hassan-HassanTandemv1-ETG-sl1&akid=3312%2E9716520%2EegCS_R)
---
| [Donate $10](https://go.dscc.org/go/4728?amount=5&t=6&amount=10&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220311-Hassan-HassanTandemv1-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220311-Hassan-HassanTandemv1-ETG-sl1&akid=3312%2E9716520%2EegCS_R)
---
| [Donate $25](https://go.dscc.org/go/4728?amount=5&t=7&amount=25&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220311-Hassan-HassanTandemv1-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220311-Hassan-HassanTandemv1-ETG-sl1&akid=3312%2E9716520%2EegCS_R)
---
| [Other Amount](https://go.dscc.org/go/4728?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220311-Hassan-HassanTandemv1-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220311-Hassan-HassanTandemv1-ETG-sl1&akid=3312%2E9716520%2EegCS_R)
---

Thank you in advance.

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
U.S. Senator, New Hampshire

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/4728?amount=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220311-Hassan-HassanTandemv1-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220311-Hassan-HassanTandemv1-ETG-sl1&akid=3312%2E9716520%2EegCS_R)

Maggie Hassan is running for re-election in New Hampshire, where she won by just over 1,000 votes in 2016. She’s fighting to create jobs, improve health care, and protect our Democratic majority, but she needs your help.

**[Will you help Maggie Hassan and the DSCC fight back against Mitch McConnell and hold the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/4728?amount=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220311-Hassan-HassanTandemv1-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220311-Hassan-HassanTandemv1-ETG-sl1&akid=3312%2E9716520%2EegCS_R)**

**DESPITE** our Senate Majority hinging on Raphael Warnock’s re-election race...
**DESPITE** the entire Republican Party trying to destroy Senator Warnock...
**& DESPITE** asking for your support _EVERY. SINGLE. DAY...._ [**We’re STILL desperately behind on our goal to support Democrats like Sen. Warnock and need YOUR help to catch up! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6866?t=7&akid=1475%2E878179%2E-swsUx) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6866?t=8&akid=1475%2E878179%2E-swsUx) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [URGENT DEADLINE: Chip in $5 to help fund our campaign to save Democrats like Raphael Warnock »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6867?t=9&akid=1475%2E878179%2E-swsUx)
---
Look, you know what's at risk if Raphael Warnock loses re-election.

**If we don’t raise another $34,816 by midnight tomorrow to support Democrats like Sen. Warnock,_MAGA Republicans will STEAL our Senate Majority._**

Mitch McConnell, Ted Cruz, and Josh Hawley will have their dreams come TRUE with the opportunity to destroy health care, Social Security, and voting rights!

_And the state of this race has Republicans jumping for JOY:_

❌ Republicans are ahead in the polls.
❌ They have all the dark money they could ask for.
❌ They have a huge chip on their shoulder from 2020.
[**But they don’t have you. Please, DO NOT sit this one out! Chip in $5 to SAVE Democrats like Sen. Warnock and help us LOCK-IN our Senate majority »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6866?t=10&akid=1475%2E878179%2E-swsUx)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1475%2E878179%2E-swsUx). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1475%2E878179%2E-swsUx).**

name: Giffords
subject: Sign our petition - call on President Biden to name a new ATF Director NOW
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The truth is, the ATF has not effectively fulfilled its enforcement and regulatory responsibilities.
#

Friends -
The Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF) is the only federal agency charged with enforcing our nation’s gun laws and regulating the gun industry.
Yet, it continues to be in lockstep with the industry it is tasked with regulating, just what the NRA and NSSF wants.
The truth is, we haven’t had a Senate-confirmed ATF Director since 2015. And last year, the gun lobby blocked President Biden’s nominee to lead the agency—but he can’t back down and let them win.
We would like Joe Biden to IMMEDIATELY nominate a new ATF Director, and we want him to know that you agree.
Add your name:
[**We’re looking for 10,000 people to sign our petition calling on Joe Biden to IMMEDIATELY name a new ATF Director. We need strong leadership to make our communities safer from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/biden_atf_director?source=em220311-1-15&t=1&akid=1678%2E3935704%2E7cL9FN)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/biden_atf_director?source=em220311-1-15&t=2&akid=1678%2E3935704%2E7cL9FN)**
The ATF has not effectively fulfilled its enforcement and regulatory responsibilities. Getting a strong and capable leader at its helm will go a long way toward saving lives and holding the gun industry accountable.
Thank you,
The team at Giffords
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/biden_atf_director?source=em220311-1-15&t=3&akid=1678%2E3935704%2E7cL9FN)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1678%2E3935704%2E7cL9FN) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:
After this deadline, we’ll be legally required to share our fundraising numbers
#

Hello Somebody!
Two quick things before the weekend:
1. As you know, this movement is powered by tens of thousands of individual donations from people chipping in small amounts when they can because they know how important it is to win this election and send Nina Turner to Congress.

2. The very first FEC deadline of our campaign is coming up at the end of this month. Afterwards, we’re legally required to share our fundraising numbers — how much money we raised, _and_ the number of donations.

This is the first time in this race that our numbers — and our opponents’ — will be public. And you can bet that people will be looking _very closely_ to see if our campaign has what it takes to win.

name: Great America Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6731%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=iQplvI3PGPC6NTMaVeAHbQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69370%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Q6jH1u7P9esExbqFyJ9Cug&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69371%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=L2oFGeBMXNfD1YaSD360EQ&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69372%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0%2b23OK1ZAenFS56VoMO%2fWw&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars ” on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

body:

| | | Peter,

Are you really turning down the chance of a lifetime to have dinner with President Trump? We're SHOCKED!

We thought you were a top supporter of President Trump and House Conservatives, but our records show you _**DECLINED your chance to have dinner in Dallas with President Trump. **_

You MUST correct the record now, or we will offer your spot to the next Patriot on our list!

and dinner with the President himself!")**_

Thank you,

Trump Dinner Reservations

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: From 2020 to 2021 to 2022 to 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
What we’ve accomplished, and what we’re still fighting for. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42870061/334657136/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ3V_ARP_E_20220311_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGI5ZGU1MS03ZGExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nrxFh9_OzdmRvQ9frz0ATK-ILHpSq4REumoigL5TTEA=&emci=a68abb4b-7da1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=08b9de51-7da1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=9027908)
---
I’m thinking about two anniversaries. Two years ago today, COVID-19 was officially declared a pandemic. And one year ago today, President Biden signed the American Rescue Plan into law. Today, thanks in very large part to that relief package, vaccines and boosters are available in corner drug stores across the country. We’ve added millions of jobs in a historically speedy recovery. Students have been able to safely return to school. Struggling families got help to keep food on the table and a roof over their heads. So many small businesses got aid that kept them afloat. Now, make no mistake: Washington must do more to make sure everyone gets to be a part of this recovery. I’m still pushing for more relief to restaurants and gyms, and raising the minimum wage, and ensuring universal child care so we don’t squeeze even more working moms out of the workforce, and getting vaccines around the world, and more. And we have to continue keeping our communities safe in this phase of the pandemic. But we’ve got a whole lot more tools now than we had a year ago — and a whole lot more hope than we had two years ago. **Why? Because you stayed in the fight, even — especially — when it was hard.** You helped flip the Senate, take back the White House, and elect Warren Democrats up and down the ballot who will put power in the hands of the people. And I’m deeply grateful. **We’re going to keep up the fight, side by side, so that one year from today, we’ll have accomplished even more, and we’ll have bigger Democratic majorities in the House and Senate.** [_**If you can, please make a donation today to help support our re-election campaign, expand our razor-thin Democratic majorities so we can get more done, and elect champions for working people across the country.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42870062/334657137/-65007495?refcode=EMZ3V_ARP_E_20220311_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGI5ZGU1MS03ZGExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nrxFh9_OzdmRvQ9frz0ATK-ILHpSq4REumoigL5TTEA=) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

clean_body: What we’ve accomplished, and what we’re still fighting for. | | | I’m thinking about two anniversaries. Two years ago today, COVID-19 was officially declared a pandemic. And one year ago today, President Biden signed the American Rescue Plan into law. Today, thanks in very large part to that relief package, vaccines and boosters are available in corner drug stores across the country. We’ve added millions of jobs in a historically speedy recovery. Students have been able to safely return to school. Struggling families got help to keep food on the table and a roof over their heads. So many small businesses got aid that kept them afloat. Now, make no mistake: Washington must do more to make sure everyone gets to be a part of this recovery. I’m still pushing for more relief to restaurants and gyms, and raising the minimum wage, and ensuring universal child care so we don’t squeeze even more working moms out of the workforce, and getting vaccines around the world, and more. And we have to continue keeping our communities safe in this phase of the pandemic. But we’ve got a whole lot more tools now than we had a year ago — and a whole lot more hope than we had two years ago. Why? Because you stayed in the fight, even — especially — when it was hard. You helped flip the Senate, take back the White House, and elect Warren Democrats up and down the ballot who will put power in the hands of the people. And I’m deeply grateful. We’re going to keep up the fight, side by side, so that one year from today, we’ll have accomplished even more, and we’ll have bigger Democratic majorities in the House and Senate. = Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content © 2022 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
subject: It's been one year since the House passed the Bipartisan Background Checks Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Our country is continuing to face a devastating gun violence epidemic. In recent years, we've seen gun violence skyrocket with a record-breaking number of Americans losing their lives or being seriously injured. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42857695/334600748/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzRiYTE1Zi01NGExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CmRTjvvor3vP-5VRxgqt2UFu_sFgpeiOCiCrA9VZTQU=&emci=a79ea690-81a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=674ba15f-54a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Our country is continuing to face a devastating gun violence epidemic. In recent years, we've seen gun violence skyrocket with a record-breaking number of Americans losing their lives or being seriously injured.

Make no mistake: gun violence is a public health crisis and we need to take action to combat it. That's why Kim was proud to help pass H.R. 8 – the Bipartisan Background Checks Act – in the House one year ago today. This legislation would close loopholes that allow firearms to be purchased without background checks and help keep our communities safe.

**But one year since its passage in the House, and the Senate still hasn't taken it up for a vote.**

This shouldn't be a partisan issue – it's common sense, Peter. With over 90% of Americans – including a majority of Republicans – supporting background checks on gun sales, it's time we take action to ensure no more lives are lost to gun violence.

**[If you agree it's past time for common sense gun reform legislation, sign the petition to show your support for the Bipartisan Background Checks Act>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42857697/334600749/646858418?ms=em22_220311_hr8_adv_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&refcode=em22_220311_hr8_adv_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&source=em22_220311_hr8_adv_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220311_hr8_adv_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=ga/XA7d6erzzRE0ccb9lgiMr0tGPCBD1o/KjLmg/1pv2ZIR6pyzluQOgnNEb3vOod+34tTytzLgZMxjjiHhySgAvEo61XPlD//xaWo0P+0Du4Rv2Z/Volm2/rH0UQDOFUuMFksL9aZzEpKQGb4CTXzUiOaiC7roE1OfyRwvYEfA=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzRiYTE1Zi01NGExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CmRTjvvor3vP-5VRxgqt2UFu_sFgpeiOCiCrA9VZTQU=&emci=a79ea690-81a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=674ba15f-54a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15820338)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42857698/334600750/646858418?ms=em22_220311_hr8_adv_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&refcode=em22_220311_hr8_adv_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&source=em22_220311_hr8_adv_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220311_hr8_adv_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=ga/XA7d6erzzRE0ccb9lgiMr0tGPCBD1o/KjLmg/1pv2ZIR6pyzluQOgnNEb3vOod+34tTytzLgZMxjjiHhySgAvEo61XPlD//xaWo0P+0Du4Rv2Z/Volm2/rH0UQDOFUuMFksL9aZzEpKQGb4CTXzUiOaiC7roE1OfyRwvYEfA=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzRiYTE1Zi01NGExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CmRTjvvor3vP-5VRxgqt2UFu_sFgpeiOCiCrA9VZTQU=&emci=a79ea690-81a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=674ba15f-54a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15820338)

clean_body: Our country is continuing to face a devastating gun violence epidemic. In recent years, we've seen gun violence skyrocket with a record-breaking number of Americans losing their lives or being seriously injured. Peter, Our country is continuing to face a devastating gun violence epidemic. In recent years, we've seen gun violence skyrocket with a record-breaking number of Americans losing their lives or being seriously injured. Make no mistake: gun violence is a public health crisis and we need to take action to combat it. That's why Kim was proud to help pass H.R. 8 – the Bipartisan Background Checks Act – in the House one year ago today. This legislation would close loopholes that allow firearms to be purchased without background checks and help keep our communities safe. But one year since its passage in the House, and the Senate still hasn't taken it up for a vote. This shouldn't be a partisan issue – it's common sense, Peter. With over 90% of Americans – including a majority of Republicans – supporting background checks on gun sales, it's time we take action to ensure no more lives are lost to gun violence. | Thanks, Team Schrier To hold the House majority, we must re-elect Rep. Kim Schrier in WA-08. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022? = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. | Peter-
This is the real Russian collusion story.
Radical environmental groups like the Sierra Club and Natural Resources Defense Council exist solely to demonize the oil and gas industry.
These groups spread lies about American energy and pressure Democrat politicians to repeat these lies and pass laws designed to kneecap the oil and gas industry. It's a simple and effective formula that puts American energy dominance at risk.
So where do these groups get the money from for their efforts? Who could possibly be interested in a propaganda campaign that aims to destroy American energy?
You guessed it: Vladimir Putin.
That's right. We know for a fact that these radical environmental groups receive millions of dollars from Russia to fund their efforts. Why? Because Russia is stronger when American energy is weaker.
And with Joe Biden in the White House and Nancy Pelosi and her radical Green New Deal squad in Congress, Putin has never had better puppets to help him undermine American energy dominance.
That's why I'm launching a congressional investigation into this collusion between Russia and these environmental groups. But I need your help.
These groups are armed with millions of dollars from Russia in a war against American energy. It's time we fight back.
Will you contribute money to help me push back on these lies from Russia and far-left politicians in Congress?[ Any amount...$100...$50...$25...$5...will help me defend American energy and defeat Democrats in Congress who act as Putin's puppets in the war on American oil and gas.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fya9n-CPvIfelt1d-jsI9HxJawuZjcMv9iZsrqx3vMvTMZnub-LsnAuwiVJXyLnp9YZNM17VkKOJxeHBS3b4jcehrN4YI4guFqmIDthko-qJIpxQZh6EgeDU2ihaEGRscHma6uIcrhj87bb0Z7FygSy3rG_sPDD3CkFhNSATz7WSw7QSMctYvktMPwHIaHTrdSD1zyO9F7SJUM8Vvk64UvIfNV9ajCSO55WwZCI-pFjQLtfVSvKHe0jgKnqeaqnudAQqbNXWi17ROjSPd6eIrG8kR_S7_hhzS95YKz0k2PXQnj-Grgw8uIwZejOvMklYZyhsSN3xwWnWV8BRBqH46XNYNSYLd8nr&c=_xCsX48dEE2LfInPLXrltg4U6Mzu-pXvpgJLYwMVQ-neslxjWgBO_w==&ch=G9kk6U0cysgEk3WdLA2XcOKFWy_s_WzZfxhwYFQxPsNkU9xb6DlGuA==)

name: Vernon Jones for Congress
subject: President Trump to host a rally in Georgia’s 10th Congressional District
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jones for Georgia JonesforGeorgia
body:
Trump-endorsed candidate Vernon Jones to deliver remarks
---
| | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---
President Trump to host a rally in Georgia's 10th Congressional District. Trump-endorsed Congressional candidate (GA-10), Vernon Jones to deliver remarks.
---
| |
---
|
---
| Commerce, Georgia (March 11, 2022) \- Today, President Trump announced his plans to host a rally in Georgia's 10th Congressional District where he will tout his support for Georgia's slate of Trump-endorsed candidates, including former State Representative Vernon Jones. Vernon Jones is currently running to be the next Congressman for Georgia's 10th Congressional District.
"I couldn't be more honored to have President Trump's endorsement to be Georgia's next Congressman. I look forward to welcoming him to the district later this month and joining him on stage. While Liberal plants and RINO Republicans will be nowhere to be found, I look forward to being in the company of thousands of Patriots as we prepare to rally towards victory," said Rep. Vernon Jones
Last month, President Trump unequivocally endorsed Rep. Vernon Jones calling him his "one choice" in the crowded race to represent the people of Georgia's 10th District

The press may email vernonjonespress@jonesforgeorgia.com to confirm press time for an interview on the event.
---
| |
---
About Vernon Jones
---
| |
---
Vernon Jones is running for Georgia's 10th Congressional District. He is a former member of the GA House of Representatives (1993-2001, 2017-2021) and former Chief Executive Officer of DeKalb County, GA. A former Democrat, Jones officially switched parties in January 2021 after endorsing Donald J. Trump for President and speaking at the 2020 Republican National Convention. The proud Republican is now running in GA10, as a Pro-Trump candidate who will fight for free and fair elections, and always put Georgia and America First.
---

clean_body: Trump-endorsed candidate Vernon Jones to deliver remarks | | | | | | | | | | | | | | President Trump to host a rally in Georgia's 10th Congressional District. Trump-endorsed Congressional candidate (GA-10), Vernon Jones to deliver remarks. | | | | Commerce, Georgia (March 11, 2022) \- Today, President Trump announced his plans to host a rally in Georgia's 10th Congressional District where he will tout his support for Georgia's slate of Trump-endorsed candidates, including former State Representative Vernon Jones. Vernon Jones is currently running to be the next Congressman for Georgia's 10th Congressional District. "I couldn't be more honored to have President Trump's endorsement to be Georgia's next Congressman. I look forward to welcoming him to the district later this month and joining him on stage. While Liberal plants and RINO Republicans will be nowhere to be found, I look forward to being in the company of thousands of Patriots as we prepare to rally towards victory," said Rep. Vernon Jones Last month, President Trump unequivocally endorsed Rep. Vernon Jones calling him his "one choice" in the crowded race to represent the people of Georgia's 10th District The press may email vernonjonespress@jonesforgeorgia.com to confirm press time for an interview on the event. | | About Vernon Jones | | Vernon Jones is running for Georgia's 10th Congressional District. He is a former member of the GA House of Representatives (1993-2001, 2017-2021) and former Chief Executive Officer of DeKalb County, GA. A former Democrat, Jones officially switched parties in January 2021 after endorsing Donald J. Trump for President and speaking at the 2020 Republican National Convention. The proud Republican is now running in GA10, as a Pro-Trump candidate who will fight for free and fair elections, and always put Georgia and America First. | | | | | == == | Paid for by Jones for Georgia JonesforGeorgia.com | | Vernon Jones for Congress | PO Box 581, Watkinsville, GA 30677 | | Sent by mailto:vernonjonespress@jonesforgeorgia.com powered by

Fellow American,

_Gas is approaching $5 per gallon._

War is raging in Ukraine, threatening Western civilization; a mad man has access to nuclear weapons and has said that he is not afraid to use them.

So, what does the Pentagon do? They’re asking the Supreme Court to stop the deployment of Navy SEALs who aren’t vaccinated against COVID-19.

**THIS RIGHT HERE IS WHY VLADIMIR PUTIN DOESN’T TAKE THE UNITED STATES SERIOUSLY.**

**WHAT WORLD ARE WE LIVING IN??**

[**Fellow American, this is a prime example of why we MUST take back the House.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=40bb1c2004d1447abddb04f8134daad9&_e=YN_Vd0E_wlnmic4CzuHcEdWDJfsnHXj9D2NWu1vbsl2fp_hWY2vn8_7c8PbkKxdTTCsZ8-rFi4rOkGR6ncaldbudtyNYUaycWDgd88RPV10VatNn2efzowtSCMhk1ePGufpXUsKUIc23VfK1-uRqVv1mhFlx_vGCnKZEdeIyHeBsrUocICtMLrLLsRsKs6EH58LJZgznTXI39nlUyOXDm3bAM_UgDYg55P6UXXzxfTCfB19GU8iu4h84Dz3TSr1VGg4LWHIddj28XecSPMxnNh6aDG8UcmESDQqCpGwB6waMzx53MOTWo_qr2_cXdWH-f0qC8J2m3bXRGRtl0GbYttJC5ZRRz70BdZcGmZxyqsQEw2sT6j9LtiiYYWVPmjuq) Democrats are not only making our country look WEAK – they’re making life for every single one of us less safe.

If you think it’s appalling that the Defense Department would block some of our most FIERCE warriors from deploying in defense of our nation because they’re unvaccinated, [**then make a gift of $3 or more to help me take back the House.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=40bb1c2004d1447abddb04f8134daad9&_e=YN_Vd0E_wlnmic4CzuHcEdWDJfsnHXj9D2NWu1vbsl2fp_hWY2vn8_7c8PbkKxdTTCsZ8-rFi4rOkGR6ncaldbudtyNYUaycWDgd88RPV10VatNn2efzowtSCMhk1ePGufpXUsKUIc23VfK1-uRqVv1mhFlx_vGCnKZEdeIyHeDDAdIY_fTXiRjc4dpnAtMg9nXuilxh-7WHu2ClCrZWk-Y7XBZESZuDbKEtUxzT8DpBI3O05IlkDX1GE7TCW2mvyY4C--Zb9-bB9YPf13PrnK9W71b2Wg9SwXU0BUGN24RTjTiMtjBMXovRcFMiwmoUtJeK-W78ZOdt5-uxaS6xLVClOtWqeTFRb1LQ-w2NjiOQ-gr0DDPWREvcnuAGYGHu)

name: Theresa Coates Ellis for Congress
subject: [New post] Fighting high energy prices + taxes + spending on the trail. VOTE May 21st!
body:
theresacoatesellis posted: " Our #DiningWithTheresa has a new twist. We added VIRTUAL lunch meetings "Talk with Theresa," for people who are busy, saving on fuel or energy, and who are busy or too tired in the evening to go to travel to one more meeting! Our next IN-PERSON:He" | | |
---
## New post on **Theresa Coates Ellis for Congress**
|
---|---
| | [](https://theresacoatesellis.com/?author=1) |
## [Fighting high energy prices + taxes + spending on the trail. VOTE May 21st!](https://theresacoatesellis.com/2022/03/11/fighting-high-energy-prices-taxes-spending-on-the-trail-vote-may-21st/)
by [theresacoatesellis](https://theresacoatesellis.com/?author=1)
---|---
Our #DiningWithTheresa has a new twist. We added VIRTUAL lunch meetings "Talk with Theresa," for people who are busy, saving on fuel or energy, and who are busy or too tired in the evening to go to travel to one more meeting!
Our next IN-PERSON:
Hector's Authentic Mexican Restaurant
Thursday, March 22nd arrive 5:30pm
12846 Fitzwater Dr. Nokesville!
**See what happened with Theresa on the Trail for this week:**
Business owners in Sterling are struggling to find people who will work and stay on the job. Family members are coming in to help keep it together!
Cold weather and high energy bills in Middleburg.
Friends from church are jumping in to volunteer at full force with a brunch and visits planned all over District 10 back to back.
As a Rotary Area Governor, I had the chance to travel and connect with volunteers all over the world to help with service projects and meet our next international leaders.
Our essential workers are exhausted covering multiple shifts hoping people will get back to work.
Praise to my Rotary international women friends in service who volunteer to make Tanzania -- one of the poorest countries in the World -- a better place to live with clean water, food, education, and health.
Thank you to our businesses who are supporting Theresa for Congress. I am a fellow small business owner who understands the challenges that they have faced during COVID-19. I will fight unfunded and unconstitutional mandates and government over-reach.
Antique show packed with people selling their treasures with unique stories in history.
Fresh sushi in Nokesville. I love it all. #SupportLocal
Our front line volunteer firefighters were so appreciative of the gourmet chocolate chip cookies. They are following the new stadium locations possible for District 10 and one of their residents opposed it in Sterling because of traffic.
Meet Connor who adores Disney and is going to visit for his 30th. He is excited to visit Animal Kingdom. He is kind and loves photography and Ciro pizza served at our meet and greet in Aldie. He might visit the Manassas Bee Festival that I initiated with the Beautification Committee on Sat. June 25th at Liberia House and Grounds, Manassas. Stay tuned!
Ciro Pizza is amazing. I tried to work in more veggies for the day.
As a Rotary leader, this week our Northern Virginia District presented their annual training to our upcoming Presidents to lead their club members and increase membership to serve our community.
Visited with Rappahannock voters who said connectivity is still an issue for some residents. Spring is coming and the traffic will increase to see the beautiful blooms in this gorgeous wide-open landscape in District 10.
Popped into our Manassas LA Fitness to play racquetball on a cold day with my daughter. It’s great to see folks exercising for physical, mental, and emotional health.
Budget work sessions all week as we begin meetings and public comments. As an elected Council member, property assessments increased and now the fight begins against raising the tax bill.
A Prince Wiliam breakfast with my husband George and daughter visiting from Manhattan. She escaped NY during the beginning of the pandemic to live at a farm in Virginia and comes back and forth to work as a creative director. We both are alumni of George Mason University.
Maple bacon donuts are their special treats at Aldie Country store and cafe. This is why I play racquetball.
Ciro and his family restaurant have excellent Italian food in Loudoun. A favorite in Stone Ridge after a long day of work. During our "Pizza with Theresa" planning for this week, the manager shared that he is looking for more staff and supplies received are not consistent. A lot of stress on our businesses and families right now!
Best time at Comic Con people watching participants dressed in costumes to shop for collectibles, comics, art, and pose for pictures. A fun family event.
Please DONATE to Theresa for Congress as she continues on the trail to Washington DC to fight for you! <https://www.TheresaEllisforCongress.com/Contribute>.
VOTE Theresa May 21st at the new locations listed on our website home page! One early day of voting on May 12th!
