clean_body: theresacoatesellis posted: " Our #DiningWithTheresa has a new twist. We added VIRTUAL lunch meetings "Talk with Theresa," for people who are busy, saving on fuel or energy, and who are busy or too tired in the evening to go to travel to one more meeting! Our next IN-PERSON:He" | | | New post on Theresa Coates Ellis for Congress | ---|--- | | | by ---|--- Our #DiningWithTheresa has a new twist. We added VIRTUAL lunch meetings "Talk with Theresa," for people who are busy, saving on fuel or energy, and who are busy or too tired in the evening to go to travel to one more meeting! Our next IN-PERSON: Hector's Authentic Mexican Restaurant Thursday, March 22nd arrive 5:30pm 12846 Fitzwater Dr. Nokesville! See what happened with Theresa on the Trail for this week: Business owners in Sterling are struggling to find people who will work and stay on the job. Family members are coming in to help keep it together! Cold weather and high energy bills in Middleburg. Friends from church are jumping in to volunteer at full force with a brunch and visits planned all over District 10 back to back. As a Rotary Area Governor, I had the chance to travel and connect with volunteers all over the world to help with service projects and meet our next international leaders. Our essential workers are exhausted covering multiple shifts hoping people will get back to work. Praise to my Rotary international women friends in service who volunteer to make Tanzania -- one of the poorest countries in the World -- a better place to live with clean water, food, education, and health. Thank you to our businesses who are supporting Theresa for Congress. I am a fellow small business owner who understands the challenges that they have faced during COVID-19. I will fight unfunded and unconstitutional mandates and government over-reach. Antique show packed with people selling their treasures with unique stories in history. Fresh sushi in Nokesville. I love it all. #SupportLocal Our front line volunteer firefighters were so appreciative of the gourmet chocolate chip cookies. They are following the new stadium locations possible for District 10 and one of their residents opposed it in Sterling because of traffic. Meet Connor who adores Disney and is going to visit for his 30th. He is excited to visit Animal Kingdom. He is kind and loves photography and Ciro pizza served at our meet and greet in Aldie. He might visit the Manassas Bee Festival that I initiated with the Beautification Committee on Sat. June 25th at Liberia House and Grounds, Manassas. Stay tuned! Ciro Pizza is amazing. I tried to work in more veggies for the day. As a Rotary leader, this week our Northern Virginia District presented their annual training to our upcoming Presidents to lead their club members and increase membership to serve our community. Visited with Rappahannock voters who said connectivity is still an issue for some residents. Spring is coming and the traffic will increase to see the beautiful blooms in this gorgeous wide-open landscape in District 10. Popped into our Manassas LA Fitness to play racquetball on a cold day with my daughter. It’s great to see folks exercising for physical, mental, and emotional health. Budget work sessions all week as we begin meetings and public comments. As an elected Council member, property assessments increased and now the fight begins against raising the tax bill. A Prince Wiliam breakfast with my husband George and daughter visiting from Manhattan. She escaped NY during the beginning of the pandemic to live at a farm in Virginia and comes back and forth to work as a creative director. We both are alumni of George Mason University. Maple bacon donuts are their special treats at Aldie Country store and cafe. This is why I play racquetball. Ciro and his family restaurant have excellent Italian food in Loudoun. A favorite in Stone Ridge after a long day of work. During our "Pizza with Theresa" planning for this week, the manager shared that he is looking for more staff and supplies received are not consistent. A lot of stress on our businesses and families right now! Best time at Comic Con people watching participants dressed in costumes to shop for collectibles, comics, art, and pose for pictures. A fun family event. Please DONATE to Theresa for Congress as she continues on the trail to Washington DC to fight for you! <>. VOTE Theresa May 21st at the new locations listed on our website home page! One early day of voting on May 12th! | March 11, 2022 at 4:51 am | Categories: | URL: <> to no longer receive posts from Theresa Coates Ellis for Congress. Change your email settings at . name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: How To FIX The Corrupt Election System Of 2020
body:
The MOST Important Issue It is important that we KEEP THE MAIN THING, THE MAIN THING. Election Integrity is the number one issue that our nation fa
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4998269.4336.1.1a792482e1a10f8adb57d9ad33245ff3) |
---
## The MOST Important Issue
---
It is important that we **KEEP THE MAIN THING, THE MAIN THING**. **Election Integrity** is the number one issue that our nation faces and there is not a close second. Recently, I was intervened by **Karyn Turk** on **Real America's Voice News** about how to fix our corrupt election system. Click [here](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4998269.4337.1.bb552cb6f75879dbf171d7296df4c50a) to watch. When it comes to **Election Integrity** in Oklahoma, I have been and will continue to be the **LOUDEST** and **STRONGEST** voice. I was the **ONLY** person from Oklahoma who visited the **Maricopa Forensic Audit** in Phoenix, Arizona.
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4998269.4338.1.68b9f8549ee2113c54d3ae1f89dd503c)
---
When I was in Phoenix at the Forensic Audit, I learned an incredible amount of information about the _extent_ of fraud, not just in Arizona, but all fifty states **including Oklahoma**.
Upon returning to Oklahoma from the audit, I was the **FIRST** one to publicly call for a **Forensic Audit in Oklahoma** specifically _Tulsa_ , _Oklahoma_ and _Cleveland_ counties.
It was also at the Audit that I met **Senator Wendy Rogers** who has endorsed me due to my stance on **Election Integrity**.
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4998269.4339.1.c827439c009a916af8efdb7c45ba9ef1)
---
I believe we need more warriors like **Senator Wendy Rogers** who will _keep the main thing, the main thing_.
I promise to continue to **FIGHT** for fair and legal elections.
I want to encourage you to reach out to your state representatives and ask them to fight for Election Integrity in your state, as well.
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4998269.4340.1.323e39bb90efe5f5394fbdfe843866cb), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4998269.4341.1.da23bf281c1078539d974696d189c987), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4998269.4342.1.71928aa35f3ba7a8a557e8459a08d191), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4998269.4343.1.fa4eb27389cd63692137b81d1ffa97e8), TruthSocial, GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4998269.4344.1.8e66145754d34cd3de363c15e3c7952f)).
| | [ Click Here To Fight For Election Integrity ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4998269.4345.1.41fb99734e523795f8d373290c602e46)
---

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5aeffa9b5b774022887351b10aab42b7&_e=JHjpVzXfgEhL9yJyTSPij4ByZN0kLM9BTkDFIAmN3WJ0y_E1sX-g2w73EEz7cS6z2YqjOnsdiTm9faTVcJ_HMOWvF3KMXaAzxsHmJhDQ1eHBYivBTtWR2OnDe5f1WzpOUhW4A0sTEaT9kJnTEn_jYa8-bNXnc2le6pHHMl9Fb0JvzAdgLKCBH8txU1AJBKAw60wi6El9BRP-nX3a8TfHodbHWxMehR9NyEZXwzJJKT7yxzEfji9k8d0uBuHYBMnAtlcyvvoS43daHeDUxTp4uJTRtVkI253GwchYly6sFtvK4OjSZvEAzAf3OAa8UgJJF9poE5tdciYsM7ahSNxSX04gkitOo8eLs-K0cmUoMrKkN1Gfkj7F-keaI6tZF3bXsaKyd5CY1EPboI94B95fX1dD-mSjyQHQ9ZHCqxRdbmTc5_JhumQ8T4NJSJoW1_hKk7QP7WDzN-ttlq1lAswSsw%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

I’ll get straight to the point.

I am emailing you today because I am endorsing Herschel Walker for the United States Senate. He’ll be a fantastic senator, and I hope you’ll take 30 seconds to watch why I am endorsing Herschel.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5aeffa9b5b774022887351b10aab42b7&_e=JHjpVzXfgEhL9yJyTSPij4ByZN0kLM9BTkDFIAmN3WJ0y_E1sX-g2w73EEz7cS6z2YqjOnsdiTm9faTVcJ_HMOWvF3KMXaAzxsHmJhDQ1eHBYivBTtWR2OnDe5f1WzpOUhW4A0sTEaT9kJnTEn_jYa8-bNXnc2le6pHHMl9Fb0JvzAdgLKCBH8txU1AJBKAw60wi6El9BRP-nX3a8TfHodbHWxMehR9NyEZXwzJJKT7yxzEfji9k8d0uBuHYBMnAIkyJOwpccW9MCd5lSHRAdZh_vLhZgIi7XgoqfBN7pGoiCNTzlYYvZNPcQquEREkO_fPR6qdxxd6RbTmGw5Ba0tv_nUAsGpd8zAVjF5cbkW8OFAxEt33bq5tlEE82UQ9tzkpS5R6mszdQ-qBwAyDow0ZdQcYAdjTbxUwYgOvzhr3omvFlz6aofzj1TzOZKoHOWBw3wOH4EZmUIAn827OxAw%3D%3D)
While serving as the Secretary of State and Director of the CIA in the Trump Administration, I saw how important it is for our nation to have strong leaders in Washington who love America and will fight for our citizens.

_**Herschel Walker is the leader for the job.**_

Herschel has lived the American Dream, and he will fight with all that he has to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. Herschel has my full support, and I will do everything I can to help him win Georgia and put our nation back on the right track.

**[Fellow American, will you step forward to help Herschel win? $3 or even $5 will help him build momentum and flip this critical seat.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5aeffa9b5b774022887351b10aab42b7&_e=JHjpVzXfgEhL9yJyTSPij4ByZN0kLM9BTkDFIAmN3WJ0y_E1sX-g2w73EEz7cS6z2YqjOnsdiTm9faTVcJ_HMOWvF3KMXaAzxsHmJhDQ1eHBYivBTtWR2OnDe5f1WzpOUhW4A0sTEaT9kJnTEn_jYa8-bNXnc2le6pHHMl9Fb0JvzAdgLKCBH8txU1AJBKAw60wi6El9BRP-nX3a8TfHodbHWxMehR9NyEZXwzJJKT7yxzEfji9k8d0uBuHYBMnAGAi1vpOGRjWobDe38U5SaV6AM5YHNNVctLiw-Y_yGAaE1hR2gxSpBmjF_gbdMd7pMo-OAcSgLOyDguT0gPbiRwlyS0paeDWvPj0tKqpBV0T1ON6C2qzMWNK2MRd8dlMacBAkil3o9USSVHHtLk9UgxNE4VbSPGxAwl8tFvMaBVZHp8Vp_nhl-J7zz_9AdE_nCbn3uFax2dTNyCNS0HchTw%3D%3D)**

**Herschel’s opponent, Raphael Warnock, is wrong for Georgia. Unfortunately, Democrat megadonors know how vulnerable he is, so they’ve rushed to provide him more money than any Senate candidate in the country.**

**Even though Senator Warnock is flooding Georgia with millions of dollars in ads, the race is in a statistical tie.**

Fellow American, taking back the Senate and stopping President Biden's reckless agenda depends on us sending a conservative fighter to the Senate. Herschel Walker will fight with all that he has to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I'm proud to endorse him because he will always champion American values.

**[Please join me in supporting Herschel today!](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5aeffa9b5b774022887351b10aab42b7&_e=JHjpVzXfgEhL9yJyTSPij4ByZN0kLM9BTkDFIAmN3WJ0y_E1sX-g2w73EEz7cS6z2YqjOnsdiTm9faTVcJ_HMOWvF3KMXaAzxsHmJhDQ1eHBYivBTtWR2OnDe5f1WzpOUhW4A0sTEaT9kJnTEn_jYa8-bNXnc2le6pHHMl9Fb0JvzAdgLKCBH8txU1AJBKAw60wi6El9BRP-nX3a8TfHodbHWxMehR9NyEZXwzJJKT7yxzEfji9k8d0uBuHYBMnAUXCwuHmY1K2HaHUzYyGPco5iIkkESow2JUxEjVgaoSceGc7qeoj9uprulOEHHnCyxNv9UcWDpJrqhrXfdv1kI4neKe9Fa-jf7HlV0iVHFGcIn22VFREUOsLQFtEtbHcAGZH8lXSS2rI9Grn3pQ7rosphKpQ4g8_neOMbR3lU_SFZv4MFANEyzVBwwSJBO05cLMZG2KvEFNt1joJo7o9ZPA%3D%3D)**

Thanks,

Mike Pompeo

name: Rick Scott
subject: Teach our kids to LOVE America!
body:
Peter,
In too many schools, teachers are taking political stances and indoctrinating kids with critical race theory and far Left political ideologies.

**It’s time to start teaching children patriotism, the wisdom of the US Constitution, the Bill of Rights, and the Founding Fathers.**

**I put together an 11-point plan to _Rescue America_ , and saving our education system is one of the main points of our plan.**

Public schools should teach our children to love America.

We’re not a perfect country, but we are exceptional, we are inherently good, and we are a beacon of freedom in an often-dark world.

_And no child should EVER be taught that they are inherently racist or bad because of the color of their skin._

[**If you’re ready to RESCUE AMERICA and save our children from socialism, read our plan for education TODAY.**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=50e895017089490ba0525242dbaa6611&_e=VbxrCLR8IweX_gt_n358xwfhkXqSA-WeW8Ot4vLiS7nxDjqR5akcseXaNvM0i3Mf4r5jcxZ9VPZko0xGEeAjFvf0UD24vYtByRMT3NQU1piEcdWGXkeMtcQMnjaZ8RZtY3_9SUEkJwjNCVmbF6hQWqvJuQXhQMAAqhGK6n4cbLQ4Wafr43wG3VaFJ2CbcwTHDQMrLCT3W60zx4veWr_ZyK9zpzV8vwL4xHrJdN85Jw58G_KGle0Jp74cfgSjFz3b5YgAI9yjyre5pToThf7PH-kPlorSaQRtbgCSKCYzK5BcgxjWYbbG_xS3g2-dCLO9U2ZJaruEnpwRvu_I7g1GumipWrmI-myOftVCZJ7jxMbDuAGSWIzxx73-sZcXcRxXz8-1PR0EMeD4ijeOIdfaLdM0kZlqctvWYI05CVBKxpg%3D) [**READ OUR EDUCATION PLAN**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=50e895017089490ba0525242dbaa6611&_e=VbxrCLR8IweX_gt_n358xwfhkXqSA-WeW8Ot4vLiS7nxDjqR5akcseXaNvM0i3Mf4r5jcxZ9VPZko0xGEeAjFvf0UD24vYtByRMT3NQU1piEcdWGXkeMtcQMnjaZ8RZtY3_9SUEkJwjNCVmbF6hQWqvJuQXhQMAAqhGK6n4cbLQ4Wafr43wG3VaFJ2CbcwTHDQMrLCT3W60zx4veWr_ZyEzJb3HXPHQNcKcPoNL-_LFus9iR80qRlhZt1rE8nRT16t-cRD_fHAvIIwmp5w54EN24dMRBevLY1HSW2VikmhRlUpNWarupcz9R9Iut7BHMoap7YyG3lO2talht0SQe5MfZqmOEUqGxnNosPW1LUDtvjDpSXpD1RJyRcHcyw_4nggCbPrA4LGwCNkcRD6J5Og3n24iXOC6UKKXDw6SOrNc%3D) Thank You, Rick Scott Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Rick Scott for Florida. If you no longer wish to receive emails, please click here: [unsubscribe](http://links.voterickscott.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_s=50e895017089490ba0525242dbaa6611&_t=7qTxDKZMESB1WpjrIbGeS2aU6061jlOcOgXjY814luant40-0mS408k-6VO-B0UPjKEL906ewJtdzaQ3Ank1IV9BRedkFRYzADXn436Ih3pP-xpLiaFBUN4l4BX48NfMJZxtOl385ftAaHtQHpm7-psQOK5TUlU-XCCfdyCyj4k%3D). Taking back the U.S. Senate is no small task. 5 Republicans are retiring, and we must win all those races and one more. We need patriots from across the country to join the fight and do their part to help win back the Senate majority. This is a team effort! Please make a [contribution](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=50e895017089490ba0525242dbaa6611&_e=VbxrCLR8IweX_gt_n358xwfhkXqSA-WeW8Ot4vLiS7nxDjqR5akcseXaNvM0i3MfDEr8SxvelRWKZwS3KyDQOXwns_nWFf2tiFW07clPvPh-PC9sPwXP23Sgehe_p7sw4PpGAweD5qbrvBvuf6THsCGMVDBRQ2TX3IoATlLNNvHdRvqKSl2FjvXdAzZd81beGW79A3pMsVkJBlp4ZWgyFbrsqSqz8erg3xAyWE9-Gvi616qpTFRDFWgwTtJwleE2XI4sfffWe-kRaid7sDH0oBuaZOwUa4UtotjJTnqZKD84SseN37LW6Zxgxy4VmvUwz-Ng4ET6-BYwOmbpVuvpYhKb-cw5YdTdtwzNjMGVusm6rr35fJ2s0OBcnEy98YTJfA5xqmOUQoTXme0xy3elWQ%3D%3D) today to help our campaign do our part to take back America. name: Jayapal HQ
subject: FWD: Peter, can you sign on in support of the Equality Act at this critical moment?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The attacks on trans rights in Texas are just the beginning — we know that other GOP-led states are already following their lead.
#
Peter, did you see Pramila’s email from a few days ago? The attacks on trans rights in Texas are just the beginning — we know that other GOP-led states are already following their lead. Trans rights are human rights. Lives are at stake. And we need to fight to end these bigoted attacks with everything we've got. [**Can you add your name to Pramila’s petition calling on Congress to finally end the filibuster and pass the Equality Act to codify nationwide protections for LGBTQIA+ people?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/end-filibuster-pass-equality-act/?source=em20220311-1097&t=1&akid=1097%2E420207%2E4HPDqg) **[Add Your Name »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/end-filibuster-pass-equality-act/?source=em20220311-1097&t=2&akid=1097%2E420207%2E4HPDqg)** Thank you for taking action on this. —Team Jayapal
---
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Pramila Jayapal**
Date: Sun, Mar 6, 2022
Subject: Peter, can you sign on in support of the Equality Act at this critical moment?
Peter,
I'm writing to you today in response to Texas Governor Greg Abbott's reprehensible, discriminatory decision to investigate parents of transgender children for "child abuse."
The fear and psychological impact that Governor Abbott's attack will cause on transgender children and their parents is incalculable. No person should have their fundamental right to be who they are questioned, and no parent should ever face criminal action for simply supporting their child. This is destructive discrimination and it must be stopped.
I speak from personal experience as the proud mother of a transgender child. I have seen my child come to understand who she is and take the risk to come out as her authentic self. I've seen the weight that lifts when she's able to live freely — the joy, beauty, and creativity she brings to the world. As a parent, supporting my child in living as her true self is my obligation and the farthest possible thing from abuse.
**We must protect transgender youth in Texas and across the country.**[**That's why I'm doubling down on my call for Congress to pass the Equality Act, which would codify nationwide, explicit, consistent protections against discrimination for LGBTQ people. Will you join me today and sign on in support of the Equality Act?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/end-filibuster-pass-equality-act/?source=em20220311-1097&t=3&akid=1097%2E420207%2E4HPDqg)
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/end-filibuster-pass-equality-act/?source=em20220311-1097&t=4&akid=1097%2E420207%2E4HPDqg)**
As the mom of a transgender kid, I was touched, I was moved, and I was proud that President Biden spoke directly to my trans child and transgender youth across the country when he reiterated his support of our transgender kids in his State of the Union address.
When people's rights are assailed like this, the federal government has an obligation to step in. This crisis is just one of the many urgent reasons for abolishing the filibuster and passing the Equality Act to finally enact legislation to protect LGBTQ people.
[**Add your name right now in support of Congress ending the filibuster and passing the long-overdue Equality Act. It's even more urgent today with the attacks on transgender youth and their families in Texas.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/end-filibuster-pass-equality-act/?source=em20220311-1097&t=5&akid=1097%2E420207%2E4HPDqg)
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/end-filibuster-pass-equality-act/?source=em20220311-1097&t=6&akid=1097%2E420207%2E4HPDqg)**
Thank you so much for your support and for taking the time to read my message about an issue so close to my heart.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220311-1097-footer&t=7&refcode2=1097_420207_4HPDqg&akid=1097%2E420207%2E4HPDqg)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Citizens for Conservative Wins
subject: Is this correct?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate
body:
We Wanted to Make Sure Before 4/01

|
* * *

Fellow Conservatives,

subject: FRAUD at the Morris County Republican Committee Convention
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PHIL RIZZO FOR CONGRESS
body:
The Party Boss System Doesn’t Serve the People of NJ | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jerseyrizzo/fraud-at-mcrcc?e=f7e301a8ae)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

It’s no secret that New Jersey politics have been out of touch with the people of our state for decades. Between party bosses, cronyism, and **crooked politicians who run as conservatives but vote as liberals** , we have been consistently let down and have had to watch and suffer while our state deteriorates from within.

The system for choosing Republican candidates is broken. We simply can’t trust any Republican-In-Name-Only, establishment politician who touts “election integrity.” The core of our party is corrupt and we need to throw them out.
---
| [DONATE AND SEND THE ROTTEN RINOS PACKING](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=1ef0998086&e=f7e301a8ae "DONATE AND SEND THE ROTTEN RINOS PACKING")
---
| Last Friday’s GOP convention in Morris County was a case-in-point. Just like every county official and election officer in 2020 that denied us transparency and confidence in our elections, the crooked officials who ran the Morris County convention once again undermined the election process for both us in CD7 and the candidates of CD11.
* They didn’t allow any campaign staff to observe vote tabulation
* When there was a CLEAR ~20% discrepancy between the approved voter roll and the number of ballots cast and a CONFIRMED mistake in the city rolls, they didn’t allow campaign lawyers to review the roll
* Intimidation tactics from Kean staff and allies
* Delays and holdups throughout the entire process, sending people home at 1am with no results

---
| [WE NEED TO REBUILD THE NJ-GOP FROM THE BOTTOM UP, VOLUNTEER TODAY](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=dc30eb8c0a&e=f7e301a8ae "WE NEED TO REBUILD THE NJ-GOP FROM THE BOTTOM UP, VOLUNTEER TODAY")
---
| At the end of the day, it won’t break our morale, but we need to break the RINOs regime over our Grand Ole’ Party—and together, we will. From day one, New Jerseyeans built the momentum that shook the establishment. RizzoMania is the people’s campaign to take back New Jersey from the Left, from the crooked party-bosses, from the same-old-”Republicans” who would rather keep their mouth shut and bow to special interests than fight for our state. No more.

The people of New Jersey are rising up to challenge the elitists that have run our state for decades. And we will win by running a clean campaign and finally break the ruling-class regime that has taken us for granted. We will take Washington back, not for the party bosses or the elites, but for the people of New Jersey.
---
| For New Jersey,
---
|
---
| Phil Rizzo
---
| [DONATE](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=760d26e299&e=f7e301a8ae "DONATE")

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42860503/334611313/1642521363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzFhYzYwNC01OWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_GXl58mGNth0oo64WtscqLBVNXMx1i8z8Ayzp0ja_7o=&emci=bb888dc2-bea0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=7c1ac604-59a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=26261389)
---

| | **I've confronted dark money for my entire career in Congress. So it's no surprise that dark money groups are determined to flip NJ-03 and are willing to spend any amount to do it.** Unfortunately, the disastrous _Citizens United_ Supreme Court decision enables companies to give massive amounts of money to political candidates while hiding behind shady shell corporations. **I don't take money from corporate PACs, and I am determined to get dark money out of politics.** **That is why I'm so honored that End Citizens United __ has endorsed me for a third time**.**** End Citizens United __ is a national organization dedicated to getting dark money out of politics. They focus on electing champions of campaign finance reform. And they work to pass legislation that will put an end to dark money in politics. [**Will you join****End Citizens United****in supporting our movement by chipping in $9? Your grassroots support sends a strong message about how politics ought to be shaped: by people, not corporations.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42860504/334611314/-821065315?refcode=2022-03-11-ecu&recurring=0&amount=9&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=7c1ac604-59a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzFhYzYwNC01OWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_GXl58mGNth0oo64WtscqLBVNXMx1i8z8Ayzp0ja_7o=) Americans deserve good government and elected officials that are willing to hold themselves to the highest ethical standards. For me, that includes not taking corporate PAC money or owning individual stocks. That's why I recently introduced legislation to ban individual stock ownership across all three branches of government. Right now, government leaders are allowed to own and freely trade stocks, even though they may have access to sensitive information and inside knowledge on specific issues. **I'm fighting every day in Congress to hold government officials to high ethical standards. And I'm committed to ending dark money in politics.**

Unfortunately, the disastrous Citizens United Supreme Court decision enables companies to give massive amounts of money to political candidates while hiding behind shady shell corporations. I don't take money from corporate PACs, and I am determined to get dark money out of politics. That is why I'm so honored that End Citizens United has endorsed me for a third time.** End Citizens United is a national organization dedicated to getting dark money out of politics. They focus on electing champions of campaign finance reform. And they work to pass legislation that will put an end to dark money in politics. = Americans deserve good government and elected officials that are willing to hold themselves to the highest ethical standards. For me, that includes not taking corporate PAC money or owning individual stocks. That's why I recently introduced legislation to ban individual stock ownership across all three branches of government. Right now, government leaders are allowed to own and freely trade stocks, even though they may have access to sensitive information and inside knowledge on specific issues. I'm fighting every day in Congress to hold government officials to high ethical standards. And I'm committed to ending dark money in politics. Peter, years ago I stood at the very first Fight for $15 rally in New York City and advocated for better wages, benefits, and more for New York’s workers.

In the years that have passed, we’ve made tremendous progress on improving the lives of workers, but our fight is far from over: **While New York’s minimum wage has finally increased, the federal minimum wage hasn’t changed in almost 13 years. **
Since 2009, the cost of living in the United States has increased by more than 20% and now, reports indicate inflation has climbed to 7.9% — the highest rate we've seen since 1982. All this while the minimum wage has remained stagnant. **And let me be perfectly clear: $7.25 is _NOT_ a livable wage for _any_ person, _especially_ if they have a family to feed. **

President Biden called on lawmakers to raise the federal minimum wage to $15 during his State of the Union address, but still, many remain stubbornly set against increasing it and therefore helping people – especially women of color – make ends meet. But, with the COVID-19 pandemic continuing to leave families fumbling for help, we _cannot_ delay this change any longer.
**I will never stop fighting for our workers, but I need to know if I have your support, Peter. I need to hear from 63 more people before midnight, so please, let me know: **
| | **Should we raise the minimum wage?**

name: Josh Harder
subject: we need to talk about our kids’ mental health
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ai6E-obK0cLBZW2A6HY5loyQKGeAD7jdRPhRKsg4nrc=/-1Ld_2dcPMjO35MPLB-Eyf0prZ7gcqW41XcGB9ad8v0=) | Peter, Today I want to shine light on a critical issue that's not being talked about enough - our kids' mental health. I can't tell you how many times a parent has pulled me aside at an event recently to share a story about how their child is struggling. They do it privately because it's so personal and stressful. However, they aren't alone. The statistics here in California are incredibly scary - 43% of students had a panic or anxiety attack in 2021, 22% missed three or more school days due to mental health and 19% reported suicidal thoughts. We have to have an open discussion about what is happening with our kids. It's not difficult to see how we've gotten here - a pandemic that completely threw their worlds upside down and online bullying at an all-time high while social media companies like Facebook and Instagram do nothing about it. Add to that the growing pressures of getting into the most elite college plus a shortage of mental health care access and you see a perfect pressure cooker. **This is incredibly serious, and we have to treat it as such.** That's why I've introduced a new bill - the Improving Mental Health in Schools Act - which will allow more mental health practitioners, therapists, social workers and psychologists to work in our schools and help address the ongoing youth mental health crisis. Because of your support, I'm able to work on such important issues. I'm incredibly grateful. If you have a story you'd like to share with me privately, my inbox is always open. \- Josh

name: Jake Evans for Congress
subject: FreedomWorks for America Endorses Constitutional Warrior Jake Evans
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | |
---|---
|
For immediate release
March 11, 2022
FreedomWorks for America backs Jake for 6th
Building on the unwavering momentum for the campaign that will deliver the Great American Comeback, FreedomWorks for America today announced its support for Jake Evans in Georgia's 6th Congressional District.
"It is our privilege to endorse Jake Evans, a promising young leader whose voice is emblematic of the growing contingent of young people demanding more accountability and transparency from their elected officials," said Noah Wall, FreedomWorks for America executive director. "Evans' impressive grassroots background, coupled with his experience as a lawyer and chairman of the Georgia State Ethics Commission, equip him with the experience necessary to lead with conviction and integrity, even in a place as corrosive as the D.C. Swamp.

"Georgia deserves a leader who isn't afraid to buck the status quo, and this is exactly what they'll get with Evans. Our grassroots activists in the Peach State are feeling refreshed by his candidacy and look forward to helping secure his victory. The only way to put an end to Democrats' America-last schemes is to elect a principled, conservative majority to Congress that will defend the rule of law and answer to the American people alone."
Jake called FreedomWorks one of the most influential conservative voices in the country.
"I'm thrilled to have the support of one of America's most important and respected voices for liberty," said Jake. "I appreciate that FreedomWorks took note of my service as State Ethics Commission chair because I share the group's goals of draining the swamp and bringing transparency to government. Together, when I'm in Congress, we'll work together for lower taxes, less government and free markets that bring prosperity. This endorsement is further evidence that true conservatives are rallying to the America First candidate in this race and we can feel the momentum building."

body:
| | |

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42871535/334663969/1254848285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWU5Y2FhNC04M2ExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U1ohGbeqAPSs0GISWCmke9Ws49xOmYaxQnyg-mHdpok=&emci=c076600a-74a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=dae9caa4-83a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=23594672)

| | |
---
Peter, in a tweet last night, Marjorie Taylor Greene said that the U.S. is in a recession, due to high gas prices, and that **too much government control is the problem.** First of all, the U.S. is not in a recession. Second, Marge continuously calls on President Biden and Democrats to do something about the increase in gas prices. So which one is it Marge? Do you want less government control or more? The hypocrisy is just getting started. While continuously crying about too much government control, Marge wants to:
* Control women's bodies.
* Control religious freedoms.
* Control what kids are taught in schools.
* Control who can play sports.
* Control trans rights.
* Control voting restrictions.
* Control gerrymandering
* Control doctors who perform abortions or support trans individuals.
* Control (the lack of) funding for childcare and education.

Marjorie Taylor Greene seems to support government control when it directly impacts minority communities and plays well to her base and high donors. **Yet she whines when government control is not actively disenfranchising members of our country.** We are sick of the hypocrisy, lies, and hateful rhetoric. Our country deserves more, Northwest Georgia deserves more, and **we will show her that at the ballot box in November**.
---

body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5ca70e78c0100c23041ad8cde91a9694/38863/f740e1391f09d5e4/e44ae89ad5690fd9c3d6b838967d376c/38863)

Peter, I write to you today to share my excitement for the next phase of our campaign and to thank you for the support and enthusiasm you have shown this effort to date. After our strong showing at last weekend’s Morris County Convention, today our campaign begins to look forward to the primary and to the general election where WE WILL RETIRE MIKIE SHERRILL. I’m not a political insider or a career politician – I’m a three tour Iraq Veteran, small business owner, and father of three young children that is disgusted with what I see happening in Congress and concerned for our future. Under Joe Biden and congressional liberals we have seen record inflation, global unrest, open borders and endless mandates. Today, New Jersey families are less wealthy, less safe, and less free. And Mute Mikie Sherrill has done NOTHING. Make no mistake, we’re not going to defeat Mikie Sherrill with another political insider or entrenched politician. To beat Mikie Sherrill we need an outsider, a conservative fighter who will stand up to the broken machine to get this country back on track. I’ve fought for my country before, and with your support, I’m ready to continue that service. Thank you, Toby P.S. I need your help to push back against the failed policies of Joe Biden and Mikie Sherrill – please [consider chipping in to support our campaign.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5ca70e78c0100c23041ad8cde91a9694/38863/f740e1391f09d5e4/5f5444410fea5d3cc3d6b838967d376c/38863)

body:
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42861407/334615574/-600355290?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220311_FR_CawthornUkraine_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGEwODNjMS01Y2ExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A_R67QLdJmgyd0tSlYb1SIG66XIxjyZ_TkjiK0CKH3o=) During a time when our country stands in solidarity with the Ukrainian people, Madison Cawthorn has decided to use his platform to parrot Putin’s lies, calling the Ukrainian President a “thug” and his country “incredibly evil.” This is just another example of Cawthorn doing something that begs the question: **Whose side is Madison Cawthorn on?** Instead of joining Americans of all backgrounds and across the political spectrum in supporting the people of Ukraine, he’s more focused on promoting a dangerous brand of political extremism in order to build his profile as a celebrity on the fringes of the far-right. WNC deserves a representative who will reflect the values of this community – a representative who puts their constituents first, and who will stand up to violent extremism and authoritarianism. **Unlike Madison Cawthorn, it’s crystal clear which side Jasmine is on. She’s on the side of WNC and the democratic, compassionate values that unite us.** [**If you support her leadership rooted in hope, empathy, and moving forward together, help us meet our $11,000 mid-month goal so that we can build the campaign that will defeat Madison Cawthorn and his toxic brand of politics.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42861408/334615582/-600355290?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220311_FR_CawthornUkraine_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGEwODNjMS01Y2ExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A_R67QLdJmgyd0tSlYb1SIG66XIxjyZ_TkjiK0CKH3o=) | | | [Donate $25 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42861409/334615592/-600355290?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220311_FR_CawthornUkraine_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGEwODNjMS01Y2ExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A_R67QLdJmgyd0tSlYb1SIG66XIxjyZ_TkjiK0CKH3o=)

clean_body: | | = During a time when our country stands in solidarity with the Ukrainian people, Madison Cawthorn has decided to use his platform to parrot Putin’s lies, calling the Ukrainian President a “thug” and his country “incredibly evil.” This is just another example of Cawthorn doing something that begs the question: Whose side is Madison Cawthorn on? Instead of joining Americans of all backgrounds and across the political spectrum in supporting the people of Ukraine, he’s more focused on promoting a dangerous brand of political extremism in order to build his profile as a celebrity on the fringes of the far-right. WNC deserves a representative who will reflect the values of this community – a representative who puts their constituents first, and who will stand up to violent extremism and authoritarianism. Unlike Madison Cawthorn, it’s crystal clear which side Jasmine is on. She’s on the side of WNC and the democratic, compassionate values that unite us. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = It will take all of us to win this race, Team Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Emily Mellits
subject: What we’re up against
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friend,

Last month, I asked Team Benson supporters to donate to our campaign with the average grassroots contribution we’re receiving: $23.97.
The response was overwhelming. In fact, we had one of our best fundraising months of this year thanks to an average contribution of $23.97.
This outstanding fundraising support got us thinking! We know that we can support our campaign by calling on you, our grassroots donor network. But what is the other side doing to raise money?

We did some digging, and we found that the DeVos family and their network of special interest groups have been supporting partisan conspiracy theorists in Michigan for years. We know they have personally spent millions bankrolling dark money political action groups and couldn’t care less about preserving democracy in Michigan.

So that’s what we’re up against, friend. A network of ultra-rich special interests that spread election lies for their own partisan gain.

Our campaign is not united by wealth or partisanship. We are a movement of concerned citizens who want to ensure that democracy remains alive in Michigan. Now that also means for our campaign to exist, we need you all to occasionally support Jocelyn with a grassroots donation.
WIll you donate $23.97 today to support Jocelyn’s re-election campaign and defeat the dark money interests that are lined up against her? [secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=031122]

Emily

name: Team Battino
subject: Doing it for Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Gillian Battino for State Treasurer
body:
Wisconsin families are struggling: help us help them.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42872459/334667861/237656307?refcode=EM_FR_220311Treasurer2_TB_90DO_6_NG_N_logo_TESTA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGE1NzRhYy04NmExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6JSLNnXHRs7vhhIxEvqJ2HjeYaEhHhJkIXn8ggVpsfU=) Team,

Wisconsin needs someone to ease our financial burden; someone who will advocate for each and every Wisconsin family. **That is why Gillian is running for Wisconsin State Treasurer.**

**[Gillian needs to know that you are on her team. In order to reach our first grassroots fundraising goal, we need $1,000 this week. We can’t let Republicans win Wisconsin this year. Will you join us with a $10 donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42872463/334667864/237656307?refcode=EM_FR_220311Treasurer2_TB_90DO_6_NG_N_L1_TESTA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGE1NzRhYy04NmExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6JSLNnXHRs7vhhIxEvqJ2HjeYaEhHhJkIXn8ggVpsfU=)** [Donate $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42872466/334667868/237656307?refcode=EM_FR_220311Treasurer2_TB_90DO_6_NG_N_BUTTON&&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGE1NzRhYy04NmExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6JSLNnXHRs7vhhIxEvqJ2HjeYaEhHhJkIXn8ggVpsfU=) The Office of the State Treasurer was first imagined by the state’s founders as a **check** on the government’s financial decisions and a **steward** of its public lands. Over the years, this office has evolved _significantly_.

Over the last 25 years, the duties of the office have changed with the times, _but the mission remains the same_. Gillian will be the fiscal watchdog, protecting state investments and pensions for all Wisconsin residents.

**Gillian is running for Wisconsin State Treasurer to return the office to its original intent, being both a check on state government and a guardian of the people’s interests.** Gillian will always look out for the people of Wisconsin.

**[Hardworking Wisconsinites deserve a Treasurer who will put their best interests at the forefront. But we need your help in order to contend in this race. Will you contribute $10 today to ensure that we have what it takes to make it to the Capitol?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42872470/334667871/237656307?refcode=EM_FR_220311Treasurer2_TB_90DO_6_NG_N_L1_TESTA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGE1NzRhYy04NmExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6JSLNnXHRs7vhhIxEvqJ2HjeYaEhHhJkIXn8ggVpsfU=)** Hey Peter Willis — March is a critical month for our campaign.
My team crunched the numbers, and to keep our field operations running at the level we need to win, **we’ve got to raise $20,000 in online grassroots donations by midnight on March 31.[Can you make a donation of any amount to help us chip away at our goal?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNuq8x1EXmyBYC5yCKBHGpATRCIH4VbQO3XWAWBaog3XNS_Wq070E1Fs_MsyUFSt5L5L9_pNXz3W7ATx5cXchoy40Nr1-QVQ-sh-2Z7kyRb0B5RHXiHioV35zuRnrfPvNeq6fBn9CiPRN75ljigM00eSfe6wheYqeQYCA0n7XznaUfDxwcWrZGkiaOFlnjNnw_TmwW6Va1DriR_ObvmUr2evA8JjHJdOS7HcpLUn-EwMxZHwd31wcNhGNyOWM7YWpsM64J8_6HNwp2DDt6CWFH1DsXtgaNCYiEAc9jiNBQSGOiP3dy8b2pyBy4e213dfzFTQ8BPsVfq7i2dXCuO7NaykMSuaMlO1v8p4DGw93EblO/3k9/KtvDZ3EZQtascJ3RqkfqwQ/h1/iR0Z3OaJ_Aw73knBoqv3r9vGm78KoogI8grcIy7Q4zs)**
[Donate](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNuq8x1EXmyBYC5yCKBHGpATRCIH4VbQO3XWAWBaog3XNu7Mwu1uL7OVHfnEQlBUN7kSMfRFV2es8hTiBqt1cA7h840mL3jK-mdaAX8e223TRkeGrJRYE7RIye8R7tqX4KQgNtKpIRmNa2ctdYQtsXic4P5as0E32yDtaqeZYeS7S7yJlTSVq0iQ0SR8JpOwWsISzScjUBK0CJeIhx-qZr8WVvRwJDedTwEYxALV9Yja2PUfrU2I0djCh-wrJyojTKGEjE1aNkgR11a8j-FXF3GdXxNukTQttcIOMx8Gg5MD0bOgMTr2_eLFowAOIFoQphjE_e-fo1si46FILV-ovSHsRvxSWgzlmmZaaJMVyYRpe/3k9/KtvDZ3EZQtascJ3RqkfqwQ/h2/nhQ9y7XqpIXtJ3bi7qWkZXbG2o6bsohZoeDmi5vj_gw)
---
You may know this already, but federal campaigns are required to report their fundraising totals every financial quarter. March 31 marks the end of this year’s first one, and it’s also the end of the last full quarter before the primaries. _This deadline is absolutely crucial to the success of our campaign._
These quarterly filings are how outside observers gauge the strength of our campaign, based on things like total dollars raised, number of grassroots donors, average donation amount, and other metrics. **We have to do everything we can to ensure that we capture the full strength of our grassroots support by the end of March —[no donation is too small, and even $5 makes a difference](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNuq8x1EXmyBYC5yCKBHGpATRCIH4VbQO3XWAWBaog3XNUO6Eeb8wovsx0vZdgQsSUoUEpiBd9ePnO_JHbFpuORLoovykVmM-6ihWnaaBpigIMH38QmVG5nmNdZEWTOvhYJ55vczR6chyDX06mXEclWCruqPgwWUbmC4WbmeHJAQH3Mfaspg9qyL_woPKkpI9twmYh07KzD5K29K2AuuRtQtQ5bTFPDnRy9Gj8VpDhQEMDOJk8hk9pjtZ2t_hcH70HPtuyhbvpMR7CgyoHguAcgN2-qKZwdoQmxuf5n3C8YQpT9emmIJh-6PmW7NPJ9ViAsqo9rE_CyMj77zM0zCbjnJno6ibAwCBes1MEUpqcf0p/3k9/KtvDZ3EZQtascJ3RqkfqwQ/h3/p_9zbbMYTPmymCIIrbeRm7PxhO9mPDzODTiBa-ew9mY). **
Your donations are going directly (and I do mean _directly_) to our most critical field operation yet: Gathering petition signatures to get our campaign on the ballot. We’re spending almost every spare moment getting out into the communities of NY-03. From Long Island to Queens to the Bronx to Westchester, we’re knocking on doors, making phone calls, and having real conversations with voters to make sure they know that they have the power to break the status quo and elect a true champion for working families in the June primary.
**If you’ve been waiting to make a donation until it’s most impactful: This is the time. If you’ve donated to our campaign before, we’re asking you to double down.**
**[Every dollar makes an impact in our grassroots, people-powered campaign — can you chip in today to help us hit our $20,000 end-of-quarter goal?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNuq8x1EXmyBYC5yCKBHGpATRCIH4VbQO3XWAWBaog3XN19V4VDi1r2ifPYwRmty50D6gZ148R7VXNZBcO0zGEobjeUe6CH3ZyuuvuqunpX5yTk3ft2m-h74qJYtAA9MCgLoGLersy13uxR5Qbpyhy2rTWmMQ4g14z2tcpPWpjFHzaBBL0Wvg_M36Pu_nTWGKOAYYd82FjUSKv3Pqpyl8bOe9krZ50jDuItrT4S5yhfdPZDN_hzmkidA-z__oEdBL-A-tI6SMHKEyeSR5ERFoihs_Mc9myYMzbmx3TskW6m-9y6KyNlfpKshcJuU3_3dPWDXuwe9HHDZhKhn9Fh9UUW-0i-kRx8n_DQQsRnDFZCis/3k9/KtvDZ3EZQtascJ3RqkfqwQ/h4/IC-EaFUjl1pmTxov0ydY7mW-u4VQa6eIijIl2RD7cbQ) **

body:
Experts included New Mexico on a list of states that could flip red
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42861907/334617876/-1540418300?refcode=jtk1171-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTE0ZmM3My01ZGExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RfuUXZ8Lp0Kx2WefuKCKq1KIVOy8ucTAQhgglzpIBM4=)

Peter, this is a make-or-break moment for Gov. Lujan Grisham's campaign.
FIRST:** ** Our team had to stop fundraising from December through March because of regulations around legislative sessions.
THEN:** ** Experts included New Mexico on a list of states that could flip red AND said that the Governor "could have trouble securing a second term."
NOW:** ** The fundraising blackout just ended, and **we need**** 10,000 supporters to become Election Year Members by the end of this week.**
Gov. Lujan Grisham has accomplished so much over the last three years – from legalizing cannabis to providing free higher education to all – but Republicans could erase all of this progress in an instant if they flip New Mexico red.
**[Gov. Lujan Grisham is counting on you, Peter: Will you donate $5 to become an Election Year Member before our deadline on Sunday at midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42861908/334617877/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1171-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTE0ZmM3My01ZGExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RfuUXZ8Lp0Kx2WefuKCKq1KIVOy8ucTAQhgglzpIBM4=)**

In the 24 hours that it was up it set every record for them, by many times. Interestingly on the show I told them this would happen because Big Tech and the Fake News Media fear the truth, they fear criticism about Biden, and above all, they don’t want to talk about the Rigged 2020 Presidential Election, all topics discussed. In Russia, the people are not allowed to know that they’re fighting a war with Ukraine, that’s where our media is going, and that’s where our Country is going because it quickly follows—just study history. Are we going to allow this to happen? Our Country is going to hell! clean_body: Thanks to YOU, I can travel the state and spread our conservative message. | Friend, I think it’s important you know exactly where your campaign contributions are going... Thanks to Joe Biden, far too many of them are having to go toward our gas expenses.In fact, it just cost me $42.79 to fill up the car! But it’s because of grassroots patriots like YOU that I can buy the gas to get around our great state to build the coalition we need to win this TOSS-UP governor’s race. Joe Biden and Tony Evers’ policies continue to devastate the working Americans they so adamantly claim to be fighting for. But when a core principle of your agenda is to eliminate our country’s energy independence achieved under President Trump, it’s working Americans who are hurt the most. Friend, I promise you that I will put an end to the disasters of the hypocritical Left by taking back the key battleground state of Wisconsin. But it’s YOUR continued support that allows me to reach voters all across our great state. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

| Fellow Patriot,
**BREAKING: I just WON my lawsuit**...which means the **far-Left will NOT be able to keep me off the ballot** in 2022.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress**
body:
Lower costs, more jobs, and better science are things we should all be able to get behind.
Here’s where we are.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42872898/334669957/-1392507730?refcode=em_pet_220311competes_n_pet_actives_9_ng_n_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWQyMTQ5Yy04OWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gdvdUwE9vUawcY6ZaJbkdN1JffwGvmffKLwvkDBXMsM=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42872899/334669958/-1392507730?refcode=em_pet_220311competes_n_pet_actives_9_ng_n_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWQyMTQ5Yy04OWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gdvdUwE9vUawcY6ZaJbkdN1JffwGvmffKLwvkDBXMsM=) Did you catch our message about the America COMPETES Act?

**LBR is working hard to ensure that this bill to enhance our manufacturing capabilities becomes law, and we need 1,563 more supporters to speak out in support.**

[**Can you take a few seconds to add your name to our petition? Every new voice is critical toward urging the Senate to act →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42872900/334669959/1009979870?refcode=em_pet_220311competes_n_pet_actives_9_ng_n_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWQyMTQ5Yy04OWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gdvdUwE9vUawcY6ZaJbkdN1JffwGvmffKLwvkDBXMsM=)

Thank you!

Team LBR

_**\--- Begin Forwarded Message ---**_
> LBR voted last month to pass a critical bill out of the House that will lower the costs that families face and lead to even further job growth: the America COMPETES Act.
>
> President Biden spoke at length about this legislation during his State of the Union address – it's a key part of the agenda we must pass to build a better America.
>
> **[Now it's time for the Senate to act. Will you sign on to urge the Senate to quickly take up the America COMPETES Act and pass it into law?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42872901/334669960/1009979870?refcode=em_pet_220311competes_n_pet_actives_9_ng_n_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWQyMTQ5Yy04OWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gdvdUwE9vUawcY6ZaJbkdN1JffwGvmffKLwvkDBXMsM=)** | | **[Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42872902/334669961/1009979870?refcode=em_pet_220311competes_n_pet_actives_9_ng_n_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWQyMTQ5Yy04OWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gdvdUwE9vUawcY6ZaJbkdN1JffwGvmffKLwvkDBXMsM=)**
> ---
> The America COMPETES Act does several key things:
> * It enhances our country's ability to manufacture more at home by investing in critically-needed semiconductors
> * It will strengthen our supply chain and help Americans better afford the goods they buy
> * By growing our manufacturing capacity, it will create more good-paying union jobs
> * It adds important funding to our STEM workforce programs – so America can continue to lead the way in innovation
>

> Lower costs, more jobs, and better sciences are things we should all be able to get behind. So let's make sure the Senate hears our voice and passes this bill as soon as possible!
>
> – Team LBR
** **
**Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.** ****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42872903/334669962/-1392507730?refcode=em_pet_220311competes_n_pet_actives_9_ng_n_bio&refcode2=biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWQyMTQ5Yy04OWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gdvdUwE9vUawcY6ZaJbkdN1JffwGvmffKLwvkDBXMsM=)****

body:
I hope you’ll join me in supporting Jessica’s campaign today. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LR-ub1Ks_Aqk9-Fd-ejyFQk56A38KwPLIJv7BQE-9SA1mnYXq2pkEVdtuPVFE39zlnVTa05W9DkmdVdjGGz3D4lAg75-oZYNGB8tNMTdXvd_lFuzr8-ShFr0ZjhKtWEaqY63E-iWHe-VXiJv6iKbXFpg9FplYCJgDVvp2ujrYfUDBt81ch46PTDwTs-LgoFo9_NpVNRAe0I2fpi3koVtMJ2ydn-_qS340YqTrXRoojyN9O0OQj1CcY2I9ItuLYT-z7Nmu14jUWwiT56eB8Aa6V8/3k9/_JQRCi2hTRGOVhA2DSAcfA/h0/6gRx9NTYN1lpu6bA7sUj4BwSQDn4j8JOaikvsFc8Gkg) Hi Peter, it’s Ed Markey – Senator from Massachusetts.

Elise Stefanik’s hypocrisy over the years has been astounding – and it’s only getting worse.
| Team,

name: Mississippi Freedom Caucus
subject: RegionSmart Compact Bill is DEAD
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTAzNzYxODgxNDYyNDc5NzkxJmM9ZDZlOSZlPTAmYj05NDE3OTE4NzQmZD1yOWQyaDhm.-DfZmJ0aFy1Q-WCMN1vCE3gyT-CvNW-lbFjhP27iFrA)
| | |
---
| Press Release
---
| |
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** **Contact** : Vice-Chairman Dana Criswell Mississippi Freedom Caucus [662-469-6242](tel:662-469-6242) [info@freedomcaucus.ms](mailto:info@freedomcaucus.ms)
---
---
| |
---
| March 11, 2022
---
RegionSmart Compact Bill and Its Blatant Leftist Agenda
******RegionSmart Compact Bill and Its Blatant Leftist Agenda** **Jackson, MS (March 11, 2022) —** The RegionSmart Compact Bill is DEAD! The attempt to subvert the people’s vote and establish a quasi-governmental agency controlling parts of Mississippi, Tennessee and Arkansas has been killed in all three states. In Mississippi the bill died on the calendar on Wednesday, March 9 never being considered for a vote. The Chairman in charge of the bill announced on the floor of the House that he was moving the bill to the bottom of the calendar with the resounding statement, “Where it will die!” This action brought "woos" from the members as they expressed their relief that the bill was dead. After receiving over 800 emails, hundreds of calls, and an untold amount of social media tags, Representatives were more than happy to get it off the calendar. House members were simply tired of being hounded by the people of Mississippi who are increasingly watching their elected officials and holding them accountable. The companion bill in Tennessee and the resolution in support of the compact in Arkansas both had similar fates, dying without considerations in their respective chambers. The more citizens learned about the RegionSmart Compact, that would strip states of their sovereignty, the angrier they became. The bill gave an unelected commission of bureaucrats, appointed by mayors in each of the three states, the ability to seize your property through eminent domain, assess fees (the Republican term for taxes), and issue bonds with no clear details of who would be on the hook for a bond in default (most likely the taxpayers in the state). The commission would be based in Memphis therefore not subject to Mississippi’s open records laws or open meetings laws, which means it would receive and spend tax dollars taken from Mississippians but could not be held accountable by the Mississippi State Auditor. In 2011 the people of Mississippi felt so strongly about preventing abuse of eminent domain they amended the state constitution. The amendment prevents private organizations from using eminent domain. But Senate Bill 2716 would have circumvented the state constitution and given RegionSmart, a “quasi-governmental” private organization located in Tennessee, the right to take property from the people of Mississippi. The bill itself was bad but as citizens dug deeper into the organization of RegionSmart their findings were alarming. RegionSmart is an affiliate of the Urban Land Institute (ULI). RegionSmart/ULI held a conference in Memphis, TN that included topics on transforming communities worldwide by prioritizing “Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion”, with a strategy that focuses on “Race and Ethnicity, Gender, LGBTQ Status, Gender Identity...” ULI supported BLM and the 1619 project that Glenn Beck says, “argues that America was rotten at its beginning, and that slavery and systemic racism are the roots of everything from capitalism to our lack of universal health care.” The Urban Land Institute is clearly a leftist organization with ties to the 1998 Clinton era “reinventing government” agenda. The project, established by President Bill Clinton and organized by Al Gore, sought to reinvent government by encouraging public/private partnerships and shifting power from elected officials to appointed individuals and agencies. The people of Mississippi spoke loudly and clearing against this leftist organization and through their actions the RegionSmart Compact is dead. The Mississippi Freedom Caucus congratulates the people of Mississippi for defeating this attempt to subvert the Mississippi constitution and destroy their voice at the ballot box.

---

|

| Learn more about the Mississippi Freedom Caucus
---
The Mississippi Freedom Caucus is founded by elected officials who believe in freedom and liberty for the people of Mississippi. We are the voice of citizens who want bold action to protect life, strengthen families, defend our constitutional rights, limit government, and revitalize personal and economic freedoms in the state of Mississippi.
| [Find out more](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTAzNzYxODgxNDYyNDc5NzkxJmM9ZDZlOSZlPTAmYj05NDE3OTE5NjEmZD1sOWo3djR3.DOQdnU36JqNNCEzvg2OaV9-jI7eRKaUAZPpVMSyXQ6w)

name: Team Latham
subject: My opponent is afraid to debate me
body:
I'm the true America First candidate in this race
| | | |
---
| |
---
| Fellow Patriot,

Things are heating up in the final months before the primary election on May 24th, and we are really motivated by the traction we're gaining every day. We've been tearing across this state and meeting with voters in every corner, talking to everyone who is ready for a new era of authentic leadership. What I'm hearing everywhere I go is that voters desperately want a Senator who will be a fighter for the great people of our state, unlike the typical politicians who sell us a bag of goods and don't deliver like Raphael Warnock.
I'm out there proving every single day that I'm the only America First fighter in this race and I'm the most authentic conservative who has the necessary experience to defeat Raphael Warnock.
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eNEW9zwWKQB1_9rsMzxK4ubu5Wm0cH6mMhPVuAxfamfj04udO9BPs7KTmHXBz4NMqhjH3b4urkpmJbgfhteq7pULFdH2IU_gdjjq7g-2NMCnKoxV0iUqBa1PxjZFM0asFJddgg-3swTcy4UzsCiqnxyeGvNSvifVJDZvaK8l4rh6ZE3QFC4U5Pvvp5YInr_T8SKabIIJgtyeCaZ3_iC_bxDG3u72gdkPn8C8t7Hu7LnlE36t91kGVw==&c=B08joSAEsfRpSWJOfjgWjZ30Sn3paWqsOlx-pi0rQzglPs-x10FWaw==&ch=4Owp-786sjYYD-OJWK4WdWS49y1dcUG50B1dZqQzWqVXkQqsQz3CyA==)[On Tuesday, our campaign hit a major milestone as I officially qualified to run for U.S. Senate in Georgia.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eNEW9zwWKQB1_9rsMzxK4ubu5Wm0cH6mMhPVuAxfamfj04udO9BPs7KTmHXBz4NMqhjH3b4urkpmJbgfhteq7pULFdH2IU_gdjjq7g-2NMCnKoxV0iUqBa1PxjZFM0asFJddgg-3swTcy4UzsCiqnxyeGvNSvifVJDZvaK8l4rh6ZE3QFC4U5Pvvp5YInr_T8SKabIIJgtyeCaZ3_iC_bxDG3u72gdkPn8C8t7Hu7LnlE36t91kGVw==&c=B08joSAEsfRpSWJOfjgWjZ30Sn3paWqsOlx-pi0rQzglPs-x10FWaw==&ch=4Owp-786sjYYD-OJWK4WdWS49y1dcUG50B1dZqQzWqVXkQqsQz3CyA==)

| When Herschel Walker went through the qualification process this week, he indicated to reporters that he was not going to participate in the Republican primary debates. Not only is this a sign of weakness, it is also disrespectful to the Republican primary voters of Georgia who deserve to hear from all of the candidates and be able to decide who is best equipped to take on Raphael Warnock.
It is apparent that Herschel Walker is afraid to debate me. He's being filled with generic talking points to get by at choreographed events without actually fighting the left on the issues. And if he can't even debate Republicans then he has no chance on the debate stage with Raphael Warnock. Serious people are recognizing that Herschel Walker's support is paper thin. I see it every time I speak to a group of his supporters because I flip every single one of them.
[Check out my recent appearance on Outside the Beltway with John Fredericks where I lay out the state of the race.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eNEW9zwWKQB1_9rsMzxK4ubu5Wm0cH6mMhPVuAxfamfj04udO9BPs7KTmHXBz4NMW5SXIdetuznGt4wJjV_2xyanL35XHjVHZQQ18DLX-q0BXzewJeSy25khFKOJtbM_C8DAkLPZHsJ8pxe0iQSLBm5G9KyIq2ccinzKExMVBRlCfJvX7ONvMpl90KIC4uwPzRp7ZS1Pz1zfDdz_YT0w2bWFkA6v7lzuOJT3Mvba8Iv0f8dGOPmcsA==&c=B08joSAEsfRpSWJOfjgWjZ30Sn3paWqsOlx-pi0rQzglPs-x10FWaw==&ch=4Owp-786sjYYD-OJWK4WdWS49y1dcUG50B1dZqQzWqVXkQqsQz3CyA==)

You can watch a clip below, and you can listen to the [entire interview here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eNEW9zwWKQB1_9rsMzxK4ubu5Wm0cH6mMhPVuAxfamfj04udO9BPs7KTmHXBz4NMxJvofzKqpfYXS6x4D4vBzWFELwttzFEeJJoLiFSpQJfPzAnw0Y1iRef_3Owe6zBKEN6nxHaZkn-6THbVA0AmutVsZDTbuPanuXkLLvtSf-fF7Trm3dpufmSO-a98RiktGdZqtzO2GM4=&c=B08joSAEsfRpSWJOfjgWjZ30Sn3paWqsOlx-pi0rQzglPs-x10FWaw==&ch=4Owp-786sjYYD-OJWK4WdWS49y1dcUG50B1dZqQzWqVXkQqsQz3CyA==)

clean_body: I'm the true America First candidate in this race | | | | | | | Fellow Patriot, Things are heating up in the final months before the primary election on May 24th, and we are really motivated by the traction we're gaining every day. We've been tearing across this state and meeting with voters in every corner, talking to everyone who is ready for a new era of authentic leadership. What I'm hearing everywhere I go is that voters desperately want a Senator who will be a fighter for the great people of our state, unlike the typical politicians who sell us a bag of goods and don't deliver like Raphael Warnock. I'm out there proving every single day that I'm the only America First fighter in this race and I'm the most authentic conservative who has the necessary experience to defeat Raphael Warnock. == | == | == | == | | When Herschel Walker went through the qualification process this week, he indicated to reporters that he was not going to participate in the Republican primary debates. Not only is this a sign of weakness, it is also disrespectful to the Republican primary voters of Georgia who deserve to hear from all of the candidates and be able to decide who is best equipped to take on Raphael Warnock. It is apparent that Herschel Walker is afraid to debate me. He's being filled with generic talking points to get by at choreographed events without actually fighting the left on the issues. And if he can't even debate Republicans then he has no chance on the debate stage with Raphael Warnock. Serious people are recognizing that Herschel Walker's support is paper thin. I see it every time I speak to a group of his supporters because I flip every single one of them. == | == | | I also sat down for a great interview with Beth Beskin to talk about our campaign for Senate, the current conflict in Eastern Europe, and how Joe Biden has handicapped our energy independence. You can watch a clip below, and you can listen to the == | == | Tune in tonight: I'll be joining Fox News @Night with Shannon Bream for two segments tonight at 11:05 PM and 12:05 AM. Make sure you tune in to watch! | == | | On the campaign trail: I'm traveling across Southeast Georgia this week, and if you're in the area I'll be at the 54th Annual Claxton Rattlesnake & Wildlife Festival this Saturday to take part in their parade, rattlesnake roundup, and other festivities. If you're attending, come say hello! I'd love to meet you and hear about the issues that matter most to you. | The time to vote is coming soon! Mark your calendar to vote and be sure to encourage your family and friends to do the same! Early Voting Begins May 2nd Final Primary Election Day is May 24th == | | As we approach the final stretch before the primary election on May 24th, I would be grateful for your financial support at any level to help us reach our goal of getting TV ads on air, sending mailers, reaching people in digital media, knocking on doors, making phone calls, and more! | == | | | Above all, thank you for all of the support that you've shown me as we work to take back our country. Make sure you stay up to date with our campaign by following us on ==, ==, and ==. Gratefully, Latham | == == == == | | | | | | | Team Latham | 4062 Peachtree Rd. * * *
Peter,
Two years ago today, the World Health Organization declared a global pandemic.
In the time since, our communities have lost loved ones and our lives have changed in countless ways.
Now that we have the tools necessary to fight this virus, we’re returning to a new kind of normal. But we can’t forget the debt we owe to the health care workers who risked their lives to care for others before vaccines were available. They continue to go above and beyond to keep us safe and healthy. And one of the best ways to help them in a real way is to make sure you and your family are vaccinated and boosted. You can be one less person they have to treat for COVID infection while at risk to themselves.
**Health care workers deserve our support — now and always.**
**[If you agree, please take a moment to sign our virtual thank you card today>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42863146/334623147/369500237?refcode=ea.aa3b3782-61a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.aa3b3782-61a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTNiMzc4Mi02MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SHym4kWkpPZVoiRPCeBFgSwy63bf3haUvmtEQV87UV0=&emci=1d23a273-50a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=aa3b3782-61a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=1049176)**

The 13,500+ school boards across the United States ultimately determine how our children’s minds will be shaped ... and whether they learn the truth about America’s powerful history, Founding Fathers, and role in the world or whether they embrace the toxic, socialist, America-hating lies of the radical Left. Turn on the nightly news and you’ll see the horrors of what K-12 “learning” has become in modern America. As socialism and “woke” culture infiltrate our society, leftist school boards across the country are:
* **adopting Critical Race Theory (CRT) curriculum** , ensuring students are indoctrinated with this dangerous Marxist vision of race;
* requiring teachers participate in **discriminatory professional development disguised as “diversity training”** and putting Leftist ideology before education;
* **renaming schools because of their “racist” namesakes** , which include national heroes like Abraham Lincoln and George Washington; and
* continuing to **use COVID as an excuse to maintain online learning** , despite extensive evidence that in-person learning poses little to no risk to students — and knowing that online learning leaves many students underserved.

[**That’s why TPUSA’s School Board Watchlist will expose the corrupt and radical decisions school boards are making, and then equip parents and community members with the information they need to demand a better education for their students! But I need your support to do it.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zb355goc02ipf6igskbn8fier59dssrclsslb7k0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1j6eo74cph2bs) Right now, TPUSA is assembling the nation’s **FIRST EVER** school district ranking system of any kind, focusing exclusively on school districts’ acceptance or rejection of radical Leftist and anti-American curricula, textbooks, and policies. TPUSA’s School Board Watchlist will expose: >>> Radical agendas being pushed by the nation’s largest school districts >>> Leftist, anti-American, Marxist, and CRT curricula and textbooks >>> Corrupt boards and individuals who pursue anti-American policies >>> And more! We’ve published all of our findings at **[SchoolBoardWatchlist.com](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z7bs1helhp5f3sm66n9v6eavi6dnppmg792kl9to_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1j6eo74cph2bs)** ... and we’re using our TPUSA megaphones — online, on campus, and over the airwaves — to bring national attention to the secretive, disturbing agendas being pushed by Leftist school boards so they can no longer hide in the shadows. [**But to have the biggest possible impact, I’m asking for your support of $12 or more. Please help us reach our goal of raising $24,000 by the end of this month.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z0ll24hv7i4qe4amp4t5mq0fcmr16pankvflqnso_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1j6eo74cph2bs) [**Support the School Board Watchlist**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z9t3b0a1m61vo7b9rcpi4eu70ok7ei25hm8a3k0o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1j6eo74cph2bs) The time to fight back is right **NOW** — before it’s too late. Thank you for your support to put public education back in the hands of parents and the community, **NOT** politicized school boards. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Welch for Vermont
subject: Why we passed the American Rescue Plan, and how we’ll pass more progressive policies:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
This time next year, Peter could be pushing for a progressive future as the next Vermont senator, but not without a powerful grassroots coalition.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=130%2E61531%2E6Wln41)
Hello,
Today marks one full year since President Biden signed the American Rescue Plan into law to provide relief during the worst public health crisis in living memory.
While that victory was desperately needed, it was done in spite of Republicans fighting it all along the way. Without a single Republican vote in the House or Senate, it certainly wouldn’t have been possible without Democratic control.
If we’re going to keep those majorities and pass more of the progressive policies our country needs—from a Green New Deal to Medicare for All—we’ve got to keep Vermont blue. That means electing Peter Welch as Vermont’s next Senator.
[**With the Senate hanging in the balance, will you pitch in $15 or anything you can to help elect Peter?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1505?t=3&akid=130%2E61531%2E6Wln41)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

---
| [$3](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1505?t=14&amount=3&akid=130%2E61531%2E6Wln41)
---
| [$15](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1505?t=16&amount=15&akid=130%2E61531%2E6Wln41)
---
| [$28](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1505?t=18&amount=28&akid=130%2E61531%2E6Wln41)
---
| [$50](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1505?t=20&amount=50&akid=130%2E61531%2E6Wln41)
---
| [$100](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1505?t=10&amount=100&akid=130%2E61531%2E6Wln41)
---
| [OTHER](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1505?t=12&akid=130%2E61531%2E6Wln41)
---

---
The American Rescue Plan provided much-needed relief to folks throughout Vermont and all across the country.
Peter fought for the bill to include grants to restaurants, direct payments to full-time students younger than 24, billions to help low-income families heat their homes, expanded broadband, and more. As a whole, the law helped add millions of jobs to the economy under Democrats’ watch, delivered vaccines across the country, and kept so many small businesses afloat.
Even though Mitch McConnell didn’t vote for it, he bragged to his constituents about how much money his state was getting from the package. Republicans are more than willing to vote against supporting working families—so we’ve got to elect more Democrats who will fight for working people and our democracy.
We’ve got one heck of a candidate in Peter Welch, and a key Senate race to win in Vermont.
[**This time next year, Peter could be pushing for a progressive future as Vermont’s next senator, but not without a powerful grassroots coalition at his side. Donate $15 or anything that makes sense to you and help elect Peter to the Senate.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1505?t=7&akid=130%2E61531%2E6Wln41)
Thanks again,
Team Welch

---
| [DONATE ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pwfv-em-22mar?refcode=em_20220311_f_t_arp&refcode2=130_61531_6Wln41&akid=130%2E61531%2E6Wln41)
---

---
| [ ](https://www.facebook.com/welchforvermont) | [ ](https://twitter.com/WelchForVT) | [ ](https://www.instagram.com/welchforvermont/)
---|---|---

PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT

Welch for Vermont
P.O Box 909
Richmond, VT 05477
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe you received this email in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, please [unsubscribe here](https://act.welchforvermont.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=130%2E61531%2E6Wln41).

name: Courtney Geels
subject: What Does $100 Do?
body:
| | | |
---
|
---
| [](mailto:courtgeels@gmail.com)
---
| Hey Peter,
I have a favor to ask. Our team is only $2,358 short of our social media fundraising goal.
Will you chip in $20, $50, or $100 right now to help us close this gap?
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z0zMgrHpiw7wSP-YAt469JjTV3QC2hiFmM9yNkn4O7Qd6cz9cZ6uCUyrVLKMYG_Xa3EX4Xxty6UMzsJO_rrY0XVwr2f2o4eJSmNvcMjsyriZLBEwbP_fXKpo4kuc1jYfSPnAtGG4bEzFfOIWjS0O3xWjPLlm4qUMecgdRvYQjQWtw2EWbXe0i1x_6BqtoCRMViqOtwPYsfoKRT4hMxPGDFSqpSQPmzlshkcPWYBm7BmjeDaiphz1g107YVf3amZFIlToWCu2n1M=&c=_mBneUODWdBernQaRe9oTd3H38zu56rRcmuidfJ4OTABXiLPeOJdFA==&ch=dHtL1p_rcRx0iowzfqjYq7pJJl_DoZ-4fOJQRErELjHtmzCwdDfJNA==)
---
| Campaigns are expensive. When I began this journey, I knew that it would be an uphill climb, but one that was possible through my faith, convictions, and with the support of my community. Because at the end of the day, this isn't about me. It's about us.
This is about putting people over politics and restoring power to the people.
For too long we have allowed establishment politicians tell us what is best and what do we have to show for it? Lockdowns, record inflation, supply shortages. Enough is enough.
But winning isn't going to be easy. The Democrats are lining up heavy hitters for this seat, including a celebrity, bringing in out-of-state endorsements and major campaign donations. Even the primary will be contentious and requires resources to outreach to voters.
So what does $100 do? So much.
Every $100 funds a day of digital ads. It pays for 100 physical letters mailed to voters. It buys hundreds of yard signs or palm cards and thousands of phone calls or texts.
But none of this is possible without your help.
Running for office is brutal, and we must have the resources we need to take my positive message to the voters.
So Peter, will you donate $25, $50, or $100 right now to help us meet our social media fundraising goal?
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z0zMgrHpiw7wSP-YAt469JjTV3QC2hiFmM9yNkn4O7Qd6cz9cZ6uCUyrVLKMYG_Xa3EX4Xxty6UMzsJO_rrY0XVwr2f2o4eJSmNvcMjsyriZLBEwbP_fXKpo4kuc1jYfSPnAtGG4bEzFfOIWjS0O3xWjPLlm4qUMecgdRvYQjQWtw2EWbXe0i1x_6BqtoCRMViqOtwPYsfoKRT4hMxPGDFSqpSQPmzlshkcPWYBm7BmjeDaiphz1g107YVf3amZFIlToWCu2n1M=&c=_mBneUODWdBernQaRe9oTd3H38zu56rRcmuidfJ4OTABXiLPeOJdFA==&ch=dHtL1p_rcRx0iowzfqjYq7pJJl_DoZ-4fOJQRErELjHtmzCwdDfJNA==)
---
|
---
| Your contribution is critical, and I appreciate your support.
Thanks again, Peter.
-Courtney

---
|

| Courtney Geels
