clean_body: | | | | | | mailto:courtgeels@gmail.com | Hey Peter, I have a favor to ask. Our team is only $2,358 short of our social media fundraising goal. Will you chip in $20, $50, or $100 right now to help us close this gap? | | == | Campaigns are expensive. When I began this journey, I knew that it would be an uphill climb, but one that was possible through my faith, convictions, and with the support of my community. Because at the end of the day, this isn't about me. It's about us. This is about putting people over politics and restoring power to the people. For too long we have allowed establishment politicians tell us what is best and what do we have to show for it? Lockdowns, record inflation, supply shortages. Enough is enough. But winning isn't going to be easy. The Democrats are lining up heavy hitters for this seat, including a celebrity, bringing in out-of-state endorsements and major campaign donations. Even the primary will be contentious and requires resources to outreach to voters. So what does $100 do? So much. Every $100 funds a day of digital ads. It pays for 100 physical letters mailed to voters. It buys hundreds of yard signs or palm cards and thousands of phone calls or texts. But none of this is possible without your help. Running for office is brutal, and we must have the resources we need to take my positive message to the voters. So Peter, will you donate $25, $50, or $100 right now to help us meet our social media fundraising goal? | | == | | Your contribution is critical, and I appreciate your support. name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: my opponent is trying to sabotage Judge Jackson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
I'm upset by Sen. Grassley's actions, but I'm hardly surprised.
| | |
---
Peter –

I am thrilled about the historic nomination of Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court. Judge Jackson brings outstanding credentials as a brilliant and independent jurist, and she is exceedingly qualified to serve on our highest court.
However, I just heard some really concerning news: **my opponent, Sen. Grassley (R-IA), is _already_ trying to delay Judge Jackson's nomination, in an attempt to further endanger our civil liberties.** It's time to show Sen. Grassley the door. **[If you're with me, can you donate $5 right now to help me defeat Sen. Grassley?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42873544/334672194/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk720-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmQyNThmOC04Y2ExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NccwBhG1hM4UcKxnjdXQzfdChLQibL3F1bBmsqxhYSQ=)**
I'm upset by Sen. Grassley's actions, but I'm hardly surprised. **For years, he has been using his seat on the Senate Judiciary Committee to stack the court with right-wing nominees, advance his dangerous far-right agenda and attack our right to choose. **
Throughout my entire career, I have always fought for our right to choose. Whether in the Iowa State House or the House of Representatives, I stood against every attack on our reproductive rights. I promise you that I will fiercely defend our right to choose in the Senate.
During his time as chair of the Senate Judiciary Committee, he conspired with Mitch McConnell to steal a Supreme Court seat from President Obama – refusing to consider his nominee for _293 days_. Then, once Trump was in office, Sen. Grassley rammed through the controversial nominations of far-right extremists like Gorsuch and Kavanaugh.
**Now, as the ranking member of the Senate Judiciary Committee, he's trying to delay Judge Jackson's confirmation.**
This is what we've come to expect from Sen. Grassley – but it's time for us to say _enough is enough_. **America deserves senators who respect the courts, and Iowans deserve a senator who will fight for them, not a far-right agenda.** That's why I'm running to defeat Sen. Grassley, and it's why I need you with me.
This is the first time in history that we can actually make Sen. Grassley pay for what he’s become. There is such a stark contrast between the two of us and the numbers are clearly showing that he’s more vulnerable than ever. We’re going to win this fight, but I need you with me.
**Iowans are turning against Sen. Grassley's agenda like never before, but the GOP already has over $41.6 MILLION in the bank to defeat challengers like me. We can win in Iowa, but only with a united grassroots movement.[So please, can you make a $5 donation right here and now to defend our reproductive rights, expand our Senate majority and flip this seat blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42873545/334672195/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk720-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmQyNThmOC04Y2ExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NccwBhG1hM4UcKxnjdXQzfdChLQibL3F1bBmsqxhYSQ=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42873546/334672196/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk720-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmQyNThmOC04Y2ExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NccwBhG1hM4UcKxnjdXQzfdChLQibL3F1bBmsqxhYSQ=)
---
Thank you for standing with me.

– Abby

name: Nan Whaley
subject: Ohioans are resilient
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
We can do tough work – but we need leadership willing to do it too.

Team,
In my time serving as mayor of Dayton, we faced a lot of challenges.
But folks in Dayton – and all across Ohio – are resilient. We know how to do the tough work. And that’s exactly what we did. We faced a tornado that devastated our communities. The opioid crisis, which has claimed the lives of too many Ohioans. A broken education system that left our kids behind.
We stepped up and tackled these crises, by working together and putting people first.
We can do that again, and bring change to Ohio families in every corner of the state. But we need leadership in Columbus willing to put us first. I’m running for governor because I know that Ohio deserves better.
**[But winning – and creating a better future for Ohio – starts right here. We’ve set a goal of $15,000 ahead of our mid-month deadline to stay on track: Can you pitch in $5 to help us reach our goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42873586/334672412/1605388601?refcode=nw_em_220311_1_t2_b&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDQxYjMzMy04ZGExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BMocZ6eV8VjhFxuZrQrHhl0UeltrFU_XA_QFuoTH_Ms=)**
I found that as mayor – and throughout my life – the saying “when the going gets tough, the tough get going” rings true. We have to be tough and get going to find solutions.
But when the going has gotten tough for Ohio – such as during the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic – Mike DeWine has simply caved, refusing to take commonsense actions to protect the lives of Ohioans.
**[It’s time for real leadership for Ohio. Please, chip in $5 before our mid-month deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42873587/334672413/1605388601?refcode=nw_em_220311_1_t2_b&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDQxYjMzMy04ZGExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BMocZ6eV8VjhFxuZrQrHhl0UeltrFU_XA_QFuoTH_Ms=)**
Onward,
Nan Whaley

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42873588/334672414/1605388601?refcode=nw_em_220311_1_t2_b&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDQxYjMzMy04ZGExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BMocZ6eV8VjhFxuZrQrHhl0UeltrFU_XA_QFuoTH_Ms=)****

| | There are 3 reasons why hitting my End of Week fundraising goal of $1,500 before midnight is so vital: [**1\. I’m running one of the most competitive races anywhere in the country.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42863365/334624394/1129282168?refcode=20220311_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGMzZWFlMy02M2ExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nngKtI3kja2cpHWN0kOyyMBBm1bWaufpfgX8yXm6E6M=) Joe Biden won my district by nearly 6 points in 2020. The Omaha World Herald named this race as “too close to call.” And my Republican opponent, Congressman Don Bacon, just TRIPLED his fundraising.
[**_I’m working day and night to finish what President Biden started, but I need your help to pull off this once-in-a-lifetime victory. Can I count on you to chip in $10 and help me hit my critical End of Week fundraising goal? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42863366/334624395/1129282168?refcode=20220311_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGMzZWFlMy02M2ExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nngKtI3kja2cpHWN0kOyyMBBm1bWaufpfgX8yXm6E6M=) [**2\. My opponent, Republican Don Bacon, has a nearly $1 MILLION lead from special interest donors trying to stop me.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42863367/334624396/1129282168?refcode=20220311_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGMzZWFlMy02M2ExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nngKtI3kja2cpHWN0kOyyMBBm1bWaufpfgX8yXm6E6M=) But I refuse to give up.

My opponent voted to cut taxes for billionaires and wealthy corporations. But when our families and small businesses needed critical support during the pandemic, he stood against us. Before you log off for the weekend, friend, can I quickly explain why your support is critical to my reelection campaign?
* Extreme GOP groups have spent more money attacking me than any other Senate Democrat up for reelection – **_over $7.5 million and counting._**
* If I lose here, Democrats have no chance of holding the Senate majority.
* Experts are calling me one of the most vulnerable Democrats up for reelection.

In a deeply purple state like New Hampshire, we can't leave any stone unturned. That's why my campaign just authorized a $13 million ad investment to cut through GOP misinformation and share my message across the Granite State. But the problem is, we don't have all of the money yet.
With our end-of-quarter deadline quickly approaching, we need to pick up the pace or we won't be on track to make this important ad buy. I know we can win this race, but it will take an army of grassroots support from people like you, friend.

But the problem is, we don't have all of the money yet. With our end-of-quarter deadline quickly approaching, we need to pick up the pace or we won't be on track to make this important ad buy. I know we can win this race, but it will take an army of grassroots support from people like you, friend. = | | = Thank you for your continued support. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =**. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can . Click here to . Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. Paid for by Maggie for NH |

name: Team Read HQ
subject: Ending gun violence
body:
Recently KGW interviewed both Tobias and Tina Kotek. The responses could not be more different.
---
| | Dear Peter, Recently KGW interviewed both Tobias and Tina Kotek. It was a violent weekend in Portland and viewers wanted to know what the Democrats running for Governor would do about violent crime and gun violence. **The responses could not be more different. Tobias offered a thoughtful and comprehensive plan while Tina Kotek’s only suggestion was to send counselors to see shooting victims in the hospital.** **[Watch for yourself and decide who has the better approach to reduce crime and gun violence](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42864194/334627651/-980638963?v=RdPvcRpgX10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTU1ZDdjZC02NWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mfBwSbWjHvaISVCpfJvBkXD48HfhXtBZHVUkVZ8UruY=&emci=5f55d7cd-65a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=6155d7cd-65a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=30662126)**. We need action now to ban untraceable "ghost guns," train more officers to go after illegal guns, and make our communities safer. Tobias has a comprehensive plan to combat gun violence and keep our families safe. **[You can read more about it here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42864196/334627653/-1362817893?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTU1ZDdjZC02NWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mfBwSbWjHvaISVCpfJvBkXD48HfhXtBZHVUkVZ8UruY=&emci=5f55d7cd-65a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=6155d7cd-65a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=30662126)** Thanks,

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: The Squad voted against the military industrial complex
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

The House just passed a government funding bill that increased military
spending and spent more money on mass deportation and immigrant detention.
7 Justice Democrats were included in just 15 Democrats who voted against
this funding bill.

Biden’s first military budget was even larger than Trump’s last pentagon
spending package. Now, Democrats just sent EVEN MORE money to the military
industrial complex. And Democrats continue to fund the inhumane detention
and deportation of immigrants.

Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, Rashida Tlaib, Ilhan
Omar, Ayanna Pressley, and Pramila Jayapal voted NO and stood with the
people in demanding we stop massive increases in defense spending.

Justice Democrats have been the leaders outspoken about how we need to
deliver Medicare for All to the people, bolster the social safety net, and
truly address the climate crisis. Instead, Democrats and Republicans voted
for more weapons, deportation, and detention.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97555?refcode=em20220311-22350&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=22350%2E1203867%2EUmRrb8 ]Peter,
will you stand with AOC, Cori, Jamaal,
Rashida, Ilhan, Ayanna, Pramila, and Justice Democrats today in our fight
to do what’s right for the people? Chip in $3 so we can
re-elect and expand our JD bloc in Congress. We must continue our advocacy
for our government to put people over war, violence, and profits for
defense corporations.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97555?refcode=em20220311-22350&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=22350%2E1203867%2EUmRrb8 ]Contribute $3

If America has money for war and deportation raids, it must have money for
Medicare for All and a Green New Deal. It’s a policy choice to fund
violence rather than programs that will serve the people and the planet.

Speaker Pelosi even cut a $15 billion dollar investment in preparing for
the next Covid variant and distributing the vaccine overseas.

When it comes down to it, corporate Democrats do not want to pass popular
progressive policies. It’s on the Justice Democrats in Congress — and the
grassroots movement behind them — to hold the line in the fight for
working people.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97555?refcode=em20220311-22350&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=22350%2E1203867%2EUmRrb8 ]We need to show that Justice Democrats and the Squad are the future of
politics, and the ones that will truly fight for economic, social, racial,
and environmental justice. Can you chip in a $3 donation
today to stand with the Squad?

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=22350%2E1203867%2EUmRrb8 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=22350%2E1203867%2EUmRrb8 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220311-22350-footer&t=1025&refcode2=22350_1203867_UmRrb8&akid=22350%2E1203867%2EUmRrb8

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=22350%2E1203867%2EUmRrb8

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:
Your weekly roundup of important stories both locally and nationally. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42874287/334675729/-366912648?sourceid=1025450&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTZmNmIwNi05MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OlKuRyQUW44B5Gu97aQNUXSBd7Hhgi2OyTZ3j-9peBU=)
#
# **Hello!**
Here's your weekly roundup of important stories both locally and nationally!
* * *
## [**Updates on Russia's Invasion Into Ukraine**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42874288/334675730/441624799?sourceid=1025450&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTZmNmIwNi05MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OlKuRyQUW44B5Gu97aQNUXSBd7Hhgi2OyTZ3j-9peBU=&emci=bca7039b-8ea1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=a96f6b06-91a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=9315441)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42874289/334675731/441624799?sourceid=1025450&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTZmNmIwNi05MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OlKuRyQUW44B5Gu97aQNUXSBd7Hhgi2OyTZ3j-9peBU=&emci=bca7039b-8ea1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=a96f6b06-91a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=9315441) Biden stated the US would join the European Union (EU) and other allies in removing normal trade relations between their countries and Russia as the international effort to lessen relations with Russia and punishment for President Putin increases as the war in Ukraine rages on. Biden also mentioned he would sign an executive order on 3/11 to ban exports of items including seafood, vodka, and nonindustrial diamonds in an effort to deny Russia more than $1 billion in revenues. Biden stated “Putin is an aggressor...(he) must pay the price.” This makes Russia one of only three countries with abnormal trade relations with the US, including Cuba and North Korea. This announcement comes just days after the US announced a ban on imports of Russian oil, gas, and other forms of energy. However, US allies in Europe were not part of this energy import announcement as they rely much more heavily on Russian energy imports, while the US counts on Russia for less than 10% of its imports. The war in Ukraine has caused the fastest growing refugee crisis since World War II according to the United Nations (UN). It was stated by the UN that 564 civilians have been killed and 982 injured by Russian forces thus far, but they also recognize that the full totals of deaths and injuries this far is likely much higher simply due to civilians being targeted with cluster bombs by Russia. Russian ambassador, Vasily Nevenzya, accused the US Department of Defense of funding and supervising biological weapons research programs in 30 labs in Ukraine. Nebenzya was also noted to state that Ukraine was planning to transport disease pathogens to Russia by migratory birds and bats. Linda Thomas-Greenfield, US ambassador to the UN, and the Ukrainian government have rejected these statements as Russian disinformation. Thomas-Greenfield refuted the allegations stating that the US “proudly and openly supported Ukraine's medical labs where disease pathogens were researched for public health.”
* * *
## [**Coronavirus Updates**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42874290/334675732/-35050171?sourceid=1025450&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTZmNmIwNi05MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OlKuRyQUW44B5Gu97aQNUXSBd7Hhgi2OyTZ3j-9peBU=&emci=bca7039b-8ea1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=a96f6b06-91a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=9315441)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42874291/334675733/-35050171?sourceid=1025450&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTZmNmIwNi05MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OlKuRyQUW44B5Gu97aQNUXSBd7Hhgi2OyTZ3j-9peBU=&emci=bca7039b-8ea1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=a96f6b06-91a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=9315441) According to the CDC’s update Thursday, only 2% of the US population (about 7 million people) currently live in a county where the CDC recommends universal indoor masking. This is 16 million fewer people from last week when 7% of the population lived in a county where there was considered a high community level for COVID-19. This has significantly dropped from the 28% originally noted two weeks ago when the CDC first released the new metrics. 73 % of the American population currently live in a county that is considered to have a low community level meaning there is no recommendation for masking. The remaining 21% of the population live in a medium community level where taking extra precautions against COVID-19 is recommended for those that are immunocompromised and at high risk for severe disease. These new community level metrics are based on these three things: new hospitalizations for COVID-19, hospital capacity, and new COVID-19 cases. One third of the population still living in high community levels are in Texas in Kentucky, with Hidalgo County of south Texas being the most populous county to still have a high community level. Hawaii Governor David Ige announced this past Tuesday that their state mask mandate will expire this month, making it the last state to drop a masking requirement.
* * *
## [**“Don’t Say Gay” Bill**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42874292/334675734/-233784533?id=83301889&sourceid=1025450&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTZmNmIwNi05MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OlKuRyQUW44B5Gu97aQNUXSBd7Hhgi2OyTZ3j-9peBU=&emci=bca7039b-8ea1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=a96f6b06-91a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=9315441)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42874293/334675735/-233784533?id=83301889&sourceid=1025450&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTZmNmIwNi05MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OlKuRyQUW44B5Gu97aQNUXSBd7Hhgi2OyTZ3j-9peBU=&emci=bca7039b-8ea1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=a96f6b06-91a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=9315441) The Parental Rights in Education Bill, more commonly known as the “Don’t Say Gay” bill was passed by both the Florida Senate and House. This bill would limit what classrooms can teach about sexual orientation and gender identity. The bill would restrict these lessons from occurring in kindergarten through 3rd grade classes as it has been deemed “not age-appropriate or developmentally appropriate for students in accordance with state standards.” It would also allow parents to sue schools or teachers that engage in conversation and teaching about these topics. Florida Governor Ron DeSantis has stated he supports the bill, but has not explicitly said if he will sign it if it crosses his desk. If the bill would be signed into law it would go into effect July 1. LGBTQ+ activists and advocates have spoken out in opposition to moving this legislation forward stating that it will harm queer youth by shunning representation and inclusion from classrooms. Equality Florida, local LGBTQ+ advocacy group was quoted as saying “Let us be clear: should its vague language be interpreted in any way that causes harm to a single child, teacher, or family, we will lead legal action against the State of Florida to challenge this bigoted legislation.” Equality Florida also stated that “erasing the presence of LGBTQ community from lessions implies that students should be a shamed or supress their gender identity or sexual orientation.” Amit Paley, CEO & Executive director of The Trevor Project said in a statement “Every LGBTQ young person deserves to attend a school that provides an inclusive, affirmative environment - not one that aims to erase their existence.” Paley also added “We know that LGBTQ youth already face higher risk for bullying, depression, and suicide - and this bill will only add to the stigma that fuels these disparities.”
* * *
Have a great rest of your week and keep up the good fight! Sincerely,
**Team Katzenmeyer**

**_Begin Original Message from Dr. Annie:_**

As a practicing pediatrician, I see firsthand how America’s healthcare system affects working families.

Each day in the hospital, I talk with families who are worried about how they are going to pay their hospital bills, worried about unaffordable prescriptions, and struggling because of a lack of access to care. It shouldn’t be this way — **nothing should come in the way of treating a sick child, or any American, in need of medical care.**

But this race isn’t about just what I think. I want to hear your thoughts on our nation’s current healthcare system. [Let me know your opinion today in a quick healthcare survey→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42865309/334632274/44271077?refcode=AA_EM_SV_3MO_220311_1_2&refcode2=&contactdata=gGC4RXZBhOlkE/+wW8GCeT1PZpomeWwNLdU9pGcHSqZyy+lzNVaDzRn0L+LOg64Y&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTEwYTY2OC02N2ExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7FBYONwoLLrZo-J49bgTWSSCCnM45z5wXa_PbmOrxTw=&emci=cdd3b605-67a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=2910a668-67a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=6125529)

---

We have so much work to do to improve our healthcare system, and with my experience and your input, I’m confident we could make an impact to change it for the better.

We need a healthcare system that works for patients, not drug companies and insurance companies. Our elected officials in Columbia and Washington haven’t prioritized improving our healthcare system, this is hurting too many children and families.

Before that happens though, I need to know your stance. [Participate in our healthcare survey today→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42865313/334632278/44271077?refcode=AA_EM_SV_3MO_220311_1_2&refcode2=&contactdata=gGC4RXZBhOlkE/+wW8GCeT1PZpomeWwNLdU9pGcHSqZyy+lzNVaDzRn0L+LOg64Y&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTEwYTY2OC02N2ExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7FBYONwoLLrZo-J49bgTWSSCCnM45z5wXa_PbmOrxTw=&emci=cdd3b605-67a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=2910a668-67a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=6125529)

Thank you for sharing your thoughts,

Dr. Annie

clean_body: Have you taken our healthcare survey yet? | Have you taken our healthcare survey yet? If not, please share your thoughts today on one of our nation’s most pressing topics: Thanks, Dr. Annie HQ Begin Original Message from Dr. Annie: As a practicing pediatrician, I see firsthand how America’s healthcare system affects working families. Each day in the hospital, I talk with families who are worried about how they are going to pay their hospital bills, worried about unaffordable prescriptions, and struggling because of a lack of access to care. It shouldn’t be this way — nothing should come in the way of treating a sick child, or any American, in need of medical care. But this race isn’t about just what I think. I want to hear your thoughts on our nation’s current healthcare system. | | We have so much work to do to improve our healthcare system, and with my experience and your input, I’m confident we could make an impact to change it for the better. We need a healthcare system that works for patients, not drug companies and insurance companies. Our elected officials in Columbia and Washington haven’t prioritized improving our healthcare system, this is hurting too many children and families. Before that happens though, I need to know your stance. Thank you for sharing your thoughts, Dr. Annie | = | = ** Paid for by Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress PO BOX 1431 Johns Island, SC 29457 United States **

| | **Joe Kent Endorses Doug Basler for Washington’s 9th Congressional District**
---
| **DATE: March 11, 2022
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**Contact: Ozzie Gonzalez
Cell: 951.442.0680
[ozzie@joekentforcongress.com](mailto:ozzie@joekentforcongress.com)**
---
| Battle Ground, WA -- Today, Joe Kent made the following statement:
---
| I’m happy to endorse a true warrior for America, Doug Basler, for his race in Washington’s 9th Congressional District.

Doug is a job creator and a leader in our party in King County. His commitment to public service helping the homeless and at-risk families makes clear that the people of this state and this country are his priority.

I’m also proud to call Doug my friend.

I urge the people of the 9th District to send Doug to Washington so we can be battle buddies in the halls of Congress fighting for the America First agenda.
---

body:
he doesn’t deserve to be our governor |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42874404/334676136/1828375930?refcode=20220311_f_2_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmI4Nzk5NC05MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5MyR72tD-xBAVqa_eapLAuAdhLKuRhedLQKFmt1kSDk=)
---
Folks,

All along, I’ve said Gov. DeSantis is more interested in scoring political points than saving Floridians. So I wasn’t surprised in the slightest to see this headline in _The Sun Sentinel_ :
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42874405/334676137/1828375930?refcode=20220311_f_2_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmI4Nzk5NC05MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5MyR72tD-xBAVqa_eapLAuAdhLKuRhedLQKFmt1kSDk=)
---
At every turn, when faced with the choice to put Floridians first or himself, DeSantis always chooses **_himself_**. Whether he’s restricting a woman’s right to choose, attacking LGBTQ+ rights, or suppressing our vote, every decision he makes is in service of his political future.

**_[It’s long past time for Florida’s governor to put FLORIDIANS first, so will you help me defeat Ron DeSantis? Any amount you can give today — $5, $10, or even $20 — will help my team and me counter the governor’s deep-pocketed donors and lay the groundwork for victory.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42874406/334676138/1828375930?refcode=20220311_f_2_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmI4Nzk5NC05MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5MyR72tD-xBAVqa_eapLAuAdhLKuRhedLQKFmt1kSDk=)_**

[OTHER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42874411/334676143/1828375930?refcode=20220311_f_2_ND&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmI4Nzk5NC05MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5MyR72tD-xBAVqa_eapLAuAdhLKuRhedLQKFmt1kSDk=)
Ron DeSantis clearly wants to run for president in 2024, so he’s constantly throwing red meat to his red base to gin up support.

But he’s not the President of the United States of America. He’s the governor of the great state of Florida — and he needs to remember that. Because the truth is:
**_A governor who puts his political ambitions over the people of his state doesn’t deserve to be governor._**
**_[If you agree, can you spare a few bucks today for my campaign? To be quite frank, we rely on grassroots support to fund our voter outreach, so anything you can contribute will go directly to helping me defeat DeSantis.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42874412/334676144/1828375930?refcode=20220311_f_2_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmI4Nzk5NC05MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5MyR72tD-xBAVqa_eapLAuAdhLKuRhedLQKFmt1kSDk=)_**

Thanks so much,
Charlie Crist

body:
Here’s why I’m asking:

| **Text UNITE to 25002 to receive special text message updates from our campaign!**
Message & data rates may apply.
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42874434/334676309/145944154?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGU0ZmRkYi05MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lxPfLSkDbs3PoG4z8k-3byXC8DymLNGEUY8xyRf8_hE=)
Peter, do you still check this email?

**Here’s why I’m asking:**
* My team and I have been contacting you daily about this ultra‐competitive open seat race.

name: Tiffany (personal)
subject: The Second Amendment isn’t about hunting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:
It’s a matter of national security Friend, Our Second Amendment rights are a matter of national security. If you don’t believe me, just take a look at the situation unfolding in Ukraine. Unlike the United States, **Ukraine does not have a constitutionally protected right to keep and bear arms and firearm ownership is limited which left the Ukrainian people unprepared to defend their homes when Russia launched their invasion.** Now, the Ukrainian government is scrambling to arm their citizens. An unarmed citizenry is a sitting duck for attack, whether it be an attack by domestic criminals or foreign invaders. **Responsible gun owners are necessary to the security of a nation, ours included. That’s why it is critical we fight back against attacks on our gun rights.** [**Protect our right to keep and bear arms!**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=6fdb11c822d848419a802c36f891e19b&_e=pDGXPPDAErUx-nlpQDJpEmmRLVLBqvbLrB5l1qt1KmpkZstOiuKG-1nbh-NPBubjH8bBuF-r9dCBtI7XUhjo6ii7ur7wk7xjx19JeyPeJcR2SJwTLOi6F-9YeZK0_e_69he5wc_b52K2kLiuYGU0Ft5XLMYGxPR0Tv3Bxjpo-igKvANL_YBttHoLGMJVeHlMqkT5Beqj-7aRvSY3R_1uzqrjfWUUu-AU51Ed3bk-c2--Fefx78-jTm0Zrfsmt0m8UBe_KlSqqopXvEeO2__AQzGZNYxYMpzWt2aqw_-b4kDIhkXGeVU4ufz5R3yblYmO2-4JxYbFVZJmcnRZxPBVpfF726hc8jqen3Z7-56zCDZ457b7DGKKTXznxk-0LhD3FCkOet34Uj63_owRSQf_ZDXPvbS_4mTjmjMQqpqyOkozEonNbj8JL0Yiw7s7DGOr77gAFlRO_AH8cJsvfqv7BdEBR1I_JiODHCeS994WB6Y%3D) We must resist any effort by a federal, state, or local government to infringe upon our right to keep and bear arms. That’s why our campaign has established a “Resistance Fund” to mobilize Second Amendment voters this fall. **As your next Attorney General, I am going to stop any efforts by the Biden administration to limit Arizonans’ Second Amendment rights. Biden’s not taking my guns, and he’s not going to take yours either. ** If you agree we must protect our 2A rights, [**will you please chip in $20 to our resistance fund today?**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=6fdb11c822d848419a802c36f891e19b&_e=pDGXPPDAErUx-nlpQDJpEmmRLVLBqvbLrB5l1qt1KmpkZstOiuKG-1nbh-NPBubjH8bBuF-r9dCBtI7XUhjo6ii7ur7wk7xjx19JeyPeJcR2SJwTLOi6F-9YeZK0_e_69he5wc_b52K2kLiuYGU0Ft5XLMYGxPR0Tv3Bxjpo-igKvANL_YBttHoLGMJVeHlMqkT5Beqj-7aRvSY3R_1uzqrjfWUUu-AU51Ed3bk-c2--Fefx78-jTm0Zrfsmt0m8prgb4lLAadzTADqREpKcramTHKDhwWt34NiFXyymSI7YWDmBOJhsVNhYaU0KVDvMgWPMe6WDFHAdUk2LzSL7MU6en7IU91ohYlzwtPw-hkRxtUQgZri6DlfdLDvwJQ75YRcMfkJ7OI3IvVQDzZ2VUDtfFhhZ5UwhGSf75MTyVATpxatA3yyd3SFw5yK_JEo83mDmi2sK4UEHRVQ2DuozynLKBH5wJlxIQ-c4NoxTMEg%3D) I know you won’t sit idly by as Biden and the Radical Left attempts to strip us of our Constitutional rights. clean_body: It’s a matter of national security Friend, Our Second Amendment rights are a matter of national security. If you don’t believe me, just take a look at the situation unfolding in Ukraine. Unlike the United States, Ukraine does not have a constitutionally protected right to keep and bear arms and firearm ownership is limited which left the Ukrainian people unprepared to defend their homes when Russia launched their invasion. Now, the Ukrainian government is scrambling to arm their citizens. An unarmed citizenry is a sitting duck for attack, whether it be an attack by domestic criminals or foreign invaders. Responsible gun owners are necessary to the security of a nation, ours included. That’s why it is critical we fight back against attacks on our gun rights. We must resist any effort by a federal, state, or local government to infringe upon our right to keep and bear arms. That’s why our campaign has established a “Resistance Fund” to mobilize Second Amendment voters this fall. As your next Attorney General, I am going to stop any efforts by the Biden administration to limit Arizonans’ Second Amendment rights. Biden’s not taking my guns, and he’s not going to take yours either. If you agree we must protect our 2A rights, I know you won’t sit idly by as Biden and the Radical Left attempts to strip us of our Constitutional rights. Sincerely, Tiffany Shedd Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General. Authorized by Shedd for Attorney General.

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US
body:
[1]Erica Smith

Hey— it’s Morris, Erica’s
Campaign Manager. I wanted to make sure you saw this Huffington Post
article that just came out:

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/44099?t=1001&akid=981%2E3698%2EPaXyax ][IMG]

It’s really important that we talk about this article. But before I dive
into that, I have to ask: [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/44099?t=1002&akid=981%2E3698%2EPaXyax ]Can you make your your first donation to our campaign
right now? We’re coming up on our FINAL FEC deadline before our primary
and it’s critical we show the strength of our campaign when our
fundraising numbers become public.

Now, let’s talk about our Democratic opponent.

This is Don Davis 👉 He claims that he’s pro-choice but he’s voted to
defund Planned Parenthood and worked with Republicans to pass
anti-abortion laws in North Carolina. And that’s just scratching the
surface.

Not exactly a glowing record right.

Now, this is Erica Smith 👉 She has ALWAYS been pro-choice and she has the
record to prove it. Erica is a champion for everyone across North
Carolina. She has devoted her entire life to serving her community and
fighting for our Democratic values.

With Roe v. Wade under attack and a razor-thin Democratic majority, we
can’t afford to elect any Democrat. We have to elect a representative who
will fight for working people, communities of color, and rural communities
— and that’s Erica.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/44099?t=1003&akid=981%2E3698%2EPaXyax ]Can you donate $5, or anything you can, to ensure that
we have proudly pro-choice representative representing NC-01 who will vote
to codify Roe v. Wade. We can’t afford to elect a Democrat in name-only.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/44105?refcode=em20220311-981&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=981%2E3698%2EPaXyax ]Donate $5

It’s hard to put into words how much myself, Erica, and everyone at Erica
Smith HQ appreciate your support.

Onwards,

Morris

Campaign Manager
Erica Smith for U.S. House

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220311-981-footer&t=1023&refcode2=981_3698_PaXyax&akid=981%2E3698%2EPaXyax

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=981%2E3698%2EPaXyax

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US

name: Liz Irish
subject: Selker4Congress.org
body:
Peter,

Thank you so much for reaching out to help with John's campaign! We can't do this alone, your participation is very important to us.

I want to connect with you to see just how you want to help? Don't know what you could help with? Good news! I have a list of activities that need a free pair of hands.

I am looking forward to connecting by email or phone so we can get started!

Liz Irish
Campaign Manager for **John Selker for Congress**
Pronouns: She/Her/Hers

503-867-7267
[liz@selker4congress.org](mailto:liz@selker4congress.org)
[**Selker4congress.org**](http://Selker4congress.org)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jerry=20Evans?=
subject: Fire Nancy Pelosi
body:
Our campaign has all the momentum. Help us capitalize and win back the house. | | | [ ](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=84e04e087d&e=b78e7c4d40)
---
| | Friend,
Our campaign to bring honest and servant leadership to Congress is gaining momentum, and Democrats are NERVOUS that we're going to be the ones to tip the scales and take back the House for Republicans.

Nancy Pelosi knows her days as speaker are coming to an end, and MILLIONS have been put into our race to try to hold this seat for the Democrats.

We have all the momentum in this campaign, but we need YOU to help us make sure we keep it going all the way to Election Day. America and our children's future are worth the fight.

[Contribute $10 or more TODAY to help us take back the House and FIRE Nancy Pelosi. >> ](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=c75cd474af&e=b78e7c4d40)
---
| [FIRE PELOSI](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=296eef14d8&e=b78e7c4d40 "FIRE PELOSI")
---
| Our race is already shaping up to be one of the most competitive in the country.

It’s going to take all hands on deck to bring this thing home and defeat the socialism and progressivism that is trying to undermine our great nation.

[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT you can to help us win big on Election Day. >>](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=8d0a60f1c6&e=b78e7c4d40)

Thank you,

Jerry Evans
Republican Candidate for Congress (IL-11)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE NOW >>](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=f86c5ca9a1&e=b78e7c4d40 "CONTRIBUTE NOW >>")

name: Rebecca Parson
subject: Hey, I just checked
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebecca for Washington
body:
| | | Hi there, [**I just checked ActBlue, and we’re exactly $677.14 short of today’s fundraising goal. It doesn’t take many $27 donations to reach that — can you help by donating now, so I reach my goal by midnight tonight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42875036/334678745/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzZmYjg5ZS05NWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KGeMymVzCVq9KrSe2d8Af-jeu1oRI1W1mRhBH5prpjM=) Corporate profits are soaring, but inflation-adjusted worker earnings are falling. Meanwhile, there are 4.8 million more job openings than there are available workers. The simple solution would be for corporations to pay their workers more — obviously, corporations have the money. But they don’t. Why? Greed. [**We need to raise the minimum wage and mandate worker representation on corporate boards. Those are only two of my pro-worker policies. Please chip in to help me win, so I can fight for workers in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42875037/334678746/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzZmYjg5ZS05NWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KGeMymVzCVq9KrSe2d8Af-jeu1oRI1W1mRhBH5prpjM=) With inflation at its highest in 40 years, gas prices at their highest since 2008, rent up 19% across the country, and real wages falling, the economy has NOT recovered for the working class of this country. It’s gotten worse. We need a federal jobs guarantee, a universal basic income, and a housing guarantee. I'm proud to be the only candidate in this race who supports those policies. clean_body: | | | Hi there, = Corporate profits are soaring, but inflation-adjusted worker earnings are falling. Meanwhile, there are 4.8 million more job openings than there are available workers. The simple solution would be for corporations to pay their workers more — obviously, corporations have the money. But they don’t. Why? Greed. = With inflation at its highest in 40 years, gas prices at their highest since 2008, rent up 19% across the country, and real wages falling, the economy has NOT recovered for the working class of this country. It’s gotten worse. We need a federal jobs guarantee, a universal basic income, and a housing guarantee. I'm proud to be the only candidate in this race who supports those policies. Thank you for your support. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = = Thank you, -Rebecca ParsonCandidate for Congress, WA-06 To contribute via check, please address to:Rebecca for WashingtonPO Box 111388Tacoma, WA 98411 | | Rebecca Parson for Congress PO Box 111388 Tacoma, WA 98411 United States | | Paid for by Rebecca for Washington | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

That’s why hitting our $35,000 mid-month goal is so critical. name: Tim Ryan
subject: March Madness
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2730%2E3611125%2EKv0P5w ][IMG]

Folks,

I never bet against Ohio.

That’s just as true for this year’s NCAA March Madness Tournament as it is
for my Senate race.

In fact, there are plenty of parallels between our campaign and my Ohio
State Buckeyes—we’re both scrappy, enthusiastic, and ready to take on
seemingly insurmountable odds without fear.

While the Buckeyes have 60+ teams standing between them and a national
title, I’ve got a handful of billionaire-backed extremists hellbent on
keeping us out of the winner’s circle.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8707?t=1015&amount=25&akid=2730%2E3611125%2EKv0P5w ]I’m all-in, folks—will you chip in toward our $45,000
mid-month goal so we can go shot for shot with my millionaire GOP
opponents and flip this seat blue?

name: Tom Winter
subject: We need to save our democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WINTER FOR MONTANA Winter for Montana
body:
Montana has become a playground for the rich. We can only beat them if we stand together. | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDCkkImha3TuX99b4AoYVrn8KUfVZBD1-aDQSqOx-RLGXTirZMR0EgNW99vnUfT4xSYKcaI9DoiKU4vbnGIjqxbGmrTsMDRc3IrpEbW6LmBRbT-nn8NJ981w8J27rC0cGk3S84VYgZrF2XkN7npPrM6IGbKEwZNsGRNygP_0a3k2ClX7iWF6pcVvel7_PVYOd_Iv85D99EpboOxyF57lO1VdQIV1Syn7noz6JumNRWF1v1UTsKyzjjjQUY7ARKn5DSz8uDs1A5hqdeLQBEydUCnqeN2-dC2ca7TwCZ5AMISbf4_-ocvYWi789bLSieJdJECbwif-Jds9PBo3vqhRJI30/3k9/MxGUXa_TQzGr4EOS1pUsGw/h0/viCioaLgm-3Cfpg7DyIFEP2xEUhgQPsDzqd1_eSqyGw) Friend,

Montana used to feel like home to working folks. Then the wealthy started corrupting our politics more and more. **Today, the middle class state we remember has become a playground for the rich.**

We can take our state back and return to the values that we share, but in order to do that we must clean up our politics and restore integrity in our government again. That’s why I’ve been advocating for new legislation to save democracy be passed in Congress as soon as possible — _and I need you with me._

**I’m adding my voice to a call for reform with several fellow House candidates and others, but we need everyday people like you to add your voice too.**

_[**Will you add your name now to join me and my fellow co-signers in calling on Congress to reduce big money in politics, defend voting rights and our elections, and root out corruption in Washington?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDCkkImha3TuX99b4AoYVrn8KUfVZBD1-aDQSqOx-RLGXTirZMR0EgNW99vnUfT4xSRBs3epAqL1XMyhJl9yh2OKOpdDwa7OQHxzMsNHVwis9jVr7OJ9kmVHq1CnI7L614pBwUXEKkd0RrCa1RpV_p3F3A38LcQtQz51NbPPYTaWaUc1ztMJvJzmonzlkOOkyxwIBBHDferfwaXc71g2zrtU5OPz5tf6JMCNArIFt4LD_w0F_635NIYYc3IcnNtUr_ajTbiSJAPkaLyc8PBOJZB4DKdtZ_xT6DoW14cm_1ZCJo7ijqD16eslCQqbAQq9Zqb21zF4E_LPvWQF8ugpD_YE/3k9/MxGUXa_TQzGr4EOS1pUsGw/h1/KaP9bAhgPQhNHHoomYHANaboEK7qxDT0kIPsYUGndD0)_

Our country used to stand up to big corporations corrupting our politics and our people. And here in Montana, our state used to lead the nation in getting money out of politics.

But right now, big corporations and the wealthy elites are poisoning our system, locally and nationally. We cannot let them win any longer — and we MUST hold them accountable for what they’ve done.

**Our democracy may be fragile, but I still believe that democracy cannot be bought and sold to the highest bidder. I will work every day to protect our legacy of free and fair elections, and democracy built by the people, for the people.**

_**[But I can’t do it alone. That’s why I’m adding my voice to this broader call to save our democracy. And that’s why I’m asking you to add your voice to tell Congress to SAVE our DEMOCRACY today!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDCkkImha3TuX99b4AoYVrn8KUfVZBD1-aDQSqOx-RLGXTirZMR0EgNW99vnUfT4xScUfUuIS8KUWekOWiZBZNDmNHVAoJUdw5Vsv_dWtPsfRY78Lg-YQjODm_qCSRE15PaSBbfY6s4a09H58bAfxB7om1RqM0FoFZXMDw9erseI8WfyyOsaqI8nRxdu9sWFZBxjngnQKJK5nDBcH5yPf5RkBoCENEM-0JZpbCQZl-1kRGQU26UYo3IPQZO51xbaNFJOEmukr37V8Ny-kNSoS5CvWF0AOWQcOG8mxv1WCefjE0SyxIvBuOgQEVXcR1dvd39JBoj-cIwYQmigf4_ZRj7o/3k9/MxGUXa_TQzGr4EOS1pUsGw/h2/VRGIHebjatwjThganOr2RjYyZ6KhSBFEiUkZLNCsvw8)**_

Together I know we can lead again, and put working Montanans — not special interests — first.

Thank you,
Tom PAID FOR BY WINTER FOR MONTANA Winter for Montana
PO Box 1592
Polson, MT
59860
---
| | Sent via [ActionNetwork.org](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/O93kI8o-kT9cRvZ9zJLPP860qXFcvweDHZkUEJZuK-c/3k9/MxGUXa_TQzGr4EOS1pUsGw/h3/r5Rnf62zOVdpqFot01wA4FZVSs7d-tbB53VPsqvgCOA). [**_2022 is here, and my election is just a few months away. I have an incredible opportunity to win this race for NC-06 and fight for our progressive values. But at the moment I’m $4,380 short of my goal. So I’m asking you to rush $15 to close the gap >>_**](http://clicksp.nidaallam.com/f/a/hkswwW6MuQghI3y0NNHROg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRkDiInP0ROaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2dhLWVtLW5pZGE_cmVmY29kZT13ZWJzaXRlLXNpZ251cHMmYW1vdW50PTE1VwNzcGNCCmIqJ50rYk4SYo9SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABw) I’m running because the GOP is willing to ignore hate in order to maintain power. People deserve better.

**People like my mother and father, who immigrated here.** They worked tirelessly and prioritized my sisters and I’s public education. Even in the face of racism and hate, they stayed firm in their values to serve and cherish those around us.

I could not have become the first Muslim woman ever elected to office in NC without their sacrifices. I refuse to let the GOP destroy the America that made my family’s story possible.

**People like my three friends, Deah, Yusor, and Razan.** In 2015, they were murdered in a hate crime for being Muslim, a faith that I share.

It was their parents’ strength and love that pushed me to look for ways to defeat the hate that took my friends, to make sure no other family or community would have to live through the pain we endured.

I began organizing. Elevating marginalized voices and connecting communities with progressive policy, and ultimately serving as a political director for the Bernie Sanders campaign. I came to realize that running for office myself is how I can best fight for justice and continue their legacy.

**People in my community who are struggling just to make ends meet.** Congress has the power to improve our lives. We can’t wait any longer for a living wage, Medicare for All, and a Green New Deal. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: A pledge to protect the unborn
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of h
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zf6qgoil071h8agurpvf7cohvvprdtgr13eq0bsg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkpqj3cpiekor9d1jmoqjcd9jm5p78cdjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqeac33eqr31d1ksgpr0pr4mdim4pr0msr6cs33mdj34tticpob4pbielgm2o70sv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lhbbc37m8pmcd70mdiefc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5jm0ob6c9h69oh5u)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zocsunvrcgfuusavpcqkflc3h8p3oevu1g76go8g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1gmcoj2cjh2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zu2dfth4saq4ecg13g5bsu0cvu4n3dehanda92o8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1gmcoj2cjh2bs) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? clean_body: I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of h | | | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive. Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens. | | Copyright © 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. Peter,

We've had a lot of big news this week. Between the California Democratic Party endorsement, record-breaking fundraising numbers, and a whole lot of Blue Wave energy,**we're optimistic as ever that Christy's got the momentum to win BIG in November in this toss-up seat.**

And one thing we know for sure is Mike Garcia must be shaking in his boots.

Because while Christy continues to build grassroots support by listening to the needs of folks in her district, Mike is wasting all his time courting wealthy donors and corporate campaign contributors, insurrectionists, and would-be dictators.

Mike continues to show the people of this district that he's out of touch and unfit to lead. He opposed the American Rescue Plan, the Infrastructure Bill, and every single investment aimed at getting Americans back on their feet.

And who can forget when he called the January 6th violent insurrection on the Capitol "legitimate political discourse?"

Mike Garcia isn't the moderate he claims to be. In an election where he only won by 333 votes, we'd be nervous if we were Mike too.

**[Chip in $5 or more today to send Mike Garcia packing once and for all. His far-right and corporate allegiances make him unfit to represent this district. He's gotta go.>>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42875572/334682903/946308265?refcode=em22_220311_MikeOppo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzUzN2Y3Mi05N2ExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j7yR2cy78W5179Dj1yHCh2dQRCPvxTn2jESI53j62YA=)**[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42875573/334682904/946308265?refcode=em22_220311_MikeOppo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzUzN2Y3Mi05N2ExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j7yR2cy78W5179Dj1yHCh2dQRCPvxTn2jESI53j62YA=) [CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42875574/334682905/946308265?refcode=em22_220311_MikeOppo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzUzN2Y3Mi05N2ExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j7yR2cy78W5179Dj1yHCh2dQRCPvxTn2jESI53j62YA=) But this campaign isn't about Mike Garcia because this election isn't about him – **it's about delivering for the working people of this district.**

It's about investing in our communities, schools, and people so everyone has a chance to succeed.

Unfortunately, the thing standing in the way of real change for working people of the district is Mike Garcia. The thing standing in the way of bold, transformational change in this country is the Republican Party.

[**We _can_ deliver for working people across this district and the country. Still, it will take a lot of organizing, mobilization, and a lot of grassroots support to get it done. Chip in $5 or more today, and let's deliver. >>> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42875575/334682906/946308265?refcode=em22_220311_MikeOppo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzUzN2Y3Mi05N2ExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j7yR2cy78W5179Dj1yHCh2dQRCPvxTn2jESI53j62YA=)

| | I watched Republicans try to overturn an election and incite a deadly riot when they failed. I watched them introduce HUNDREDS of bills to suppress our Democratic votes. I watched them put a target on the backs of women and LGBTQ Americans everywhere. **[It’s heinous. Peter, Recently, Senator Joe Manchin announced his conditions and priorities for a dramatically scaled-back version of President Biden’s Build Back Better legislation. Manchin made clear that even to do the little he’s willing to do, we need to pay for it by changing the tax code. Here’s the problem: **Kyrsten Sinema refuses to raise taxes on corporations and billionaires even after the sweetheart deal they got during the Trump administration.** She is standing by the Trump Tax Scam, which she voted for in the Senate even after voting against it in the House. Sound familiar? Check out this headline from the Arizona Republic: [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSEAqVfiZtQX4usm5yaVWUtlETSW1ZCFCV5bBoaXN5UBEZBDmBaPn_2dtRbCXPTt96VfBCWG9Pnhf0Q8Z3V6D9hJNzgt7e-w4QfyzObSh_6FSxh1MLVncLHg8nmxdoFPfNGyJyE0AB2yauC-0TTAFGdT9-wAvrHuB8sBjJjj3E0u3gFZ3kBQtRmjtuPnQf4uh0QSb7PguNn8v4rsjFhO4h7xIpn1eJEwV_sMGoN8JQqaAS_c2b0fo68NkeC_HTobkDUEcxeVHWhSdeVRNH_rU2xrL8fIvBXMXBuS712IWy7tPLnj0StkMatX4nGV81Zr-slBpQlv5YwtMjDfGOfFg_ndk_a66ZnvNaBq8_P4lEv3s/3k9/LqPkQuXdQoGUi6wm3ad5Gw/h1/LgKZxEZvTz7FrpLUp88TLbzsxMae4_03O2OObZDUAGA) And now her tax flip flop is standing in the way of even the bare minimum that Joe Manchin wants to get done. [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSEAqVfiZtQX4usm5yaVWUtlETSW1ZCFCV5bBoaXN5UBHySN4lbnlRyaYhFo-pxdprZtZTpiFPYTY2H9-Aw9R5YpiSmXxtSUBClcb0i-Y1TIDvp5hPSr_F8LQim6zu5b-v0lSvkxuAqqQY2rs6LjjD4mUxlLByv4Jk8e3NPdnoxgVrw9oIq7nGeNvRYierMhYZiDfthSBouUU9Jcg6cr1CYtLeBpat5ugYeV-JqXE1JfX39YVv1l_aSY0WGTn5naIYGfG5-8K7oaquHAmShwkyxiVnH3qJ_iCNKao5p-Vi2E5lUA2ZTdZIso05RLan7n5IMyIehvJD3NXeBgWQaVXOugpN35hKio0ww6xoVxP6n34/3k9/LqPkQuXdQoGUi6wm3ad5Gw/h2/zzXATkrp1ITu0Xiu43-1b-sFpqdnprdJRJQtkTBpuBw) Making corporations pay their fair share in taxes would pay for things Arizonans need — like healthcare, education, and a permanent child tax credit. Corporations currently pay next to nothing in taxes right now. But even still, Kyrsten Sinema remains strongly against raising taxes on corporations — unsurprisingly, the very same corporations that bankroll her campaign. **[We need to show Sinema that we’re more powerful than her corporate donors and we won’t tolerate her obstruction. name: =?utf-8?Q?David=20Curry?=
subject: GAS PRICES HIT RECORD HIGH
body:
We can’t afford Joe Biden |
---
| | [ ](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=66ab5a9fb8&e=598f6aa24c)
---
| |
---
| Friend,

Today national gas prices hit an ALL TIME HIGH. Joe Biden’s radical energy policies have destroyed American energy independence and crippled our once booming energy industry. This is causing massive pain at the pump not only here in Georgia, but across the country.

Just over one year ago under President Trump’s pro-energy policies, America was energy independent, and gas prices averaged at $2.38 per gallon. Because of Joe Biden's horrible leadership, the video I posted only three weeks ago aged like milk. Gas prices aren't up 72% since 2020, they're up 105%!

One thing is clear, America can NOT AFFORD Joe Biden. This is crushing hard working families in Georgia, where many in our district have long commutes to and from work to feed their families. [](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=f77c1612ab&e=598f6aa24c) When I am elected, I will hold Joe Biden accountable for inflicting pain on Georgia families and I pledge to fight to return to President Trump’s pro-energy policies.

Watch my ad [**HERE**](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=535283308c&e=598f6aa24c).

Drill, baby, drill!

Thank you,

David Curry

| | **[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=6c47540d62&e=598f6aa24c)[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=b255c47175&e=598f6aa24c)[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=be68b09825&e=598f6aa24c)**

Small businesses like this are the heartbeat of communities in every corner of Alabama. In the Senate, I’ll always fight for their ability to thrive! [**LIKE AND SHARE POST**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0057b6dcd62b4b63af88938264198abd&_e=rWuOFZ1tapp_MhqqdZN1gcvPV1oNy70zVN78zLLx6yOiwNt6OJrjtAUUOzsqyXHtSA8vLoQyu8hnfb0PVC2eqN1d6G3_vgPzsgR2ZRARo5y3rDTnVQg7Q6KG6bS_SAugwGTIY6vIPfNDFQumrjAn48hJPi3jdxtbYVx5nri_UXqlqrGbFULRpzfXdJxheSAO1HF7ZSzF23svVXfAHFN6ib_1Jwepa20_8duPsRAjcO2GU-5RvwqPi7z53CLE54ehkvrTxt2N-HE1dzyNlkCLcjLCK2jpuPcB8K73w82lKk4uRjd2wPrkZzwEWVJEiTDb) ****Katie Helps Kick Off the Young Farmers Conference**** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0057b6dcd62b4b63af88938264198abd&_e=rWuOFZ1tapp_MhqqdZN1gcvPV1oNy70zVN78zLLx6yOiwNt6OJrjtAUUOzsqyXHtCcdKeJST4_6v9pP8dC4SUmNmxJ_4tpjBnjy9LofbzqltO9iFHLggw22D-Tn2S6bk7Yv3KeyV4eUL9uLW8efGGZLONfud9JySOGD4oTLGkjz8fDQc7QND_iW_E5CCGKtvIB1aLl1tICWWfuIL7v7ouv1roc_m9U1OJZwir6IISoJXpbYT1l-U8jz-NTsfbFaasnHtErAZc4OodPmQTMnv4JmA_Y4q46iCf39EgRIhbUdbPwZlt4qM07tqAzSkpM_e) I was honored to help kickoff the Young Farmers conference in Baldwin County over the weekend! Alabama’s incredible farmers feed and clothe our nation, and we must ensure that the next generation is able to keep our family farms thriving long into the future. As we watch what’s unfolding in Ukraine, never forget that food and energy security = national security. _[Alabama Farmers Federation](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0057b6dcd62b4b63af88938264198abd&_e=rWuOFZ1tapp_MhqqdZN1gcvPV1oNy70zVN78zLLx6yOa2Ekkrbn5j6KUDZiaLm5kA_DLIJGRyI4PMycAxThPR4D-3OWUXlMFcmCrq-xgKTEnOHlxbx2GxjBFx6MLIv5YMbIvd3wmtHrSrQFRCcDVOgSQVt5Accq8ZYUDChJQYRUIGBcLrXOGz9Zmtmgo-ckX2qu5kHkYFcENirAS9xPAi6cYlVhxEIFyk5VHnvGDhRcXlNxeD6FxGeEgyUThlZ4jDiLPWvhh085KTQaVVme7CYeXMZZgfo-PqMRWVif9MMMpn39KYCmVSBFT7y1C2Uj5Na_r3xdKBYWbz2mFa00szv-vHrEt3jn1PQa-9WBAag_iGmfrNNxH23C2G2jNTwsGUeTxdwLOQcDZAjLhLdNe2T9oSAoKg0kcyRWRVfzVxSpb_wEdM40EOQs9oolx0qKxgy_Uz1OhJt5NsV50nWCSgIX0c0dJvLF5dpxUykozxKh51n_IBwK4xfZmW38WFiMj2-6HuKMEShtOzoiolvDR_g%3D%3D)_ [**LIKE AND SHARE POST**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0057b6dcd62b4b63af88938264198abd&_e=rWuOFZ1tapp_MhqqdZN1gcvPV1oNy70zVN78zLLx6yOiwNt6OJrjtAUUOzsqyXHtCcdKeJST4_6v9pP8dC4SUmNmxJ_4tpjBnjy9LofbzqmGKtO0hqwsPjiJyUpbBlrsgHVmMvxI73JqhIIdWTXEo0oRnNANZGOvjEk8xFRQ2bs943y_Jj-zCT-cMeTipejzh5kdsUuPjF7ETvgRqhmxaZ33rZpYaqIluOHHE6roufwtSLz1W8el5ndFHwxEvUnG9Kf3ro_EWemlqFV6_t6lDbrKXfQ3esrCnEBkibh2UaiFMgaGRa4MHsy5Z39lz46X) **Katie Responds to Biden Banning Russian Oil** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0057b6dcd62b4b63af88938264198abd&_e=rWuOFZ1tapp_MhqqdZN1gcvPV1oNy70zVN78zLLx6yOiwNt6OJrjtAUUOzsqyXHtu1dxfxk1FhNFhWcH6WpcPbjl6IDbP6-tXMpqHt9AewRBdI4-7ckQwek3orIHpl7ln5gdRow2xOGlbvzGgkbRpqUmME9yhcoHvhx4z6lvfS780mDmhjd159nldhb-FTsN7PiGUAw0h8SyLltOM6Mtqkt2wssuyyqoyFLFyctX3ACgmUW8KaesJXlbLLNSRQRj2yRAlJ-hwmlUSnE0ODRbkrHcYxBcgWfFt9n_9zDg7xp2vPJn4CQvz4ssMKN7bnwy) Banning Putin’s oil is the right move. But swapping it for Iranian or Venezuelan oil is not the answer. It’s past time for America to stop financing authoritarian and terrorist regimes. The Biden Administration should put America first and unleash our domestic energy production with the following steps: — Immediately reverse their ban on new oil and gas leases and permits — Restart the Keystone XL pipeline — End onerous regulations and slash red tape that’s holding the energy sector back This would signal to the market that American energy is back, driving prices at the pump down. American energy independence is critical for Alabama families and for our national security. [**LIKE AND SHARE POST**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0057b6dcd62b4b63af88938264198abd&_e=rWuOFZ1tapp_MhqqdZN1gcvPV1oNy70zVN78zLLx6yOiwNt6OJrjtAUUOzsqyXHtu1dxfxk1FhNFhWcH6WpcPbjl6IDbP6-tXMpqHt9AewR1E5gnT6BiDxxV-ixJ_thy3TCFxn49RizeZEvUHWdJc4sEdVg17-2kIBjbZVJmsYpm3Ezo3OjN8vpFvaUJcIgYOtSuVurQJaxMOFNOLDzJdQlapPqZlyPJZwoCVT1rfEOPaONhwhbN6dD-6wzTDfrszWAapB_0UsC-QyO_Tde4MEz0MfxnDKVbiFj1EaKfk5fiNNqeEK-8TissVKuqrWDb) ****Katie Responds to Bad News from Guantanamo**** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0057b6dcd62b4b63af88938264198abd&_e=rWuOFZ1tapp_MhqqdZN1gcvPV1oNy70zVN78zLLx6yOiwNt6OJrjtAUUOzsqyXHtIampFdnV_KE3F1zCzZ86rxBu2mf9gvmvSeNo8XnJ2xTpX_wvapIr1NwDn5L08226nhJCrJr-y5Rm5znwGcLoN-1UMkr3IgCFjuJmzMWq7g83dwMOOKQquV8s8UHm7n_7C8Ivzl1CeiB1aWO11cr0EmMQRYkdJUQ14LqC3JdpkQ1IBcrLyRT3VjUkhnEN-k70eEGuZplhV6pS-bWrYx62rRuCgZAWwm2BLJyVtZsM9LjmU0cK15ZON1eHMYoIGZKn) These terrorists should be treated like the war criminals that they are — not released into a Saudi “rehabilitation” program. This is just the latest example of why American energy independence is vital to our national security. Freeing a terrorist in apparent appeasement because the Biden Administration wants to buy more Saudi oil is desperate and dangerous. [**LIKE AND SHARE POST**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0057b6dcd62b4b63af88938264198abd&_e=rWuOFZ1tapp_MhqqdZN1gcvPV1oNy70zVN78zLLx6yOiwNt6OJrjtAUUOzsqyXHtIampFdnV_KE3F1zCzZ86rxBu2mf9gvmvSeNo8XnJ2xQFZNrJCXqVoB2NAA3HF5cRmVacsCIUmnIE8jk_011Kz7gEI3IzLdsEDbfPRZ9Feqy0CfKbmV8PMW3O4juRsqHqaXdEQJKsuWtPcve29ZLSOuVOF02ggMJShBp4DD3CHV7DB_-LRAZNdRdadKdxZVWdknsg3sixoHNah_9Uvz01dHl36FhjWliriJHs6fo1215oVR1bfwRVZzwuuO-G-32L) ****Katie and Wesley Celebrate Their Anniversary**** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0057b6dcd62b4b63af88938264198abd&_e=rWuOFZ1tapp_MhqqdZN1gcvPV1oNy70zVN78zLLx6yOiwNt6OJrjtAUUOzsqyXHtDWvhuFb6KOU6RmNKKRrGZy7KZrzbeqF95unrVJ2loepzJZz8aamGAio7OLqZqqAUMqDPf05mhaJCo8D5wocIIgxZKuA6HgdecKvNEzHRtprcvhQhmtuZJyfLAw6RGYMP2fAaKp1mvryuENeMpLTZTEfIZ1zGOkC-maOlGxBKmaN2k49g6IWdvDoRb2bTJVL_FDePEr-kDR4R6W10ftCdyg8Uo9QNspK4cGi6Qn4EizrVj9W8WSIDmETXtqumO0UG) I can’t believe Tuesday marked 14 years of being married to my best friend! Happy anniversary, _[Wesley](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0057b6dcd62b4b63af88938264198abd&_e=rWuOFZ1tapp_MhqqdZN1gcvPV1oNy70zVN78zLLx6yNlspTZ8Nhm2RqASAenZdcvjIH312604Z5HQ0-RkV0uhXB3iWjfed2wINbl32KeIW_PhCfjeFa7n3SamyGtaVclU_crqdDCB8a9fsy7vdis7OcZjP2tFTIZY4tevsEWOKIxiufntAM2MG7zPKBDVo6qD7pXIgiNCAJgHPnAqdKatUkyTZ8KURBRdaT7_2bsZiVj935og19PnDVtW2JfztpaOpf9o7ZbXwdzw80TRgP2iKEj_4pIYT0uhDmaU7cBN2DXcy3DAUTPty-4HqoPnDRFd_9enUkAKdZ4nOLGTkqEBM9Gy5suacfihhAegstVJ1pguMuqGpewyBJKqWRf4HSJmzPaec4q5_EjmaBwoOb936eXkLuk7upQYwfzSiJzWnfed0xRGjnwwttZqbJ42AMxF8EuOJxGvy4fyXJWrCTWrV3LDjgwuDLlM003n_Jtv0e4lIjM3du_SMU76I_A8drwaZQNIDyB8Wr3erlE94UciQ%3D%3D)_! clean_body: OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER **Katie Visits Small Businesses Enjoyed being in Auburn at for a great event hosted by the Lee County Republican Club and the Republican Women of East Alabama! Small businesses like this are the heartbeat of communities in every corner of Alabama. In the Senate, I’ll always fight for their ability to thrive! Katie Helps Kick Off the Young Farmers Conference I was honored to help kickoff the Young Farmers conference in Baldwin County over the weekend! Alabama’s incredible farmers feed and clothe our nation, and we must ensure that the next generation is able to keep our family farms thriving long into the future. As we watch what’s unfolding in Ukraine, never forget that food and energy security = national security. Katie Responds to Biden Banning Russian Oil Banning Putin’s oil is the right move. But swapping it for Iranian or Venezuelan oil is not the answer. It’s past time for America to stop financing authoritarian and terrorist regimes. The Biden Administration should put America first and unleash our domestic energy production with the following steps: — Immediately reverse their ban on new oil and gas leases and permits — Restart the Keystone XL pipeline — End onerous regulations and slash red tape that’s holding the energy sector back This would signal to the market that American energy is back, driving prices at the pump down. American energy independence is critical for Alabama families and for our national security. Katie Responds to Bad News from Guantanamo These terrorists should be treated like the war criminals that they are — not released into a Saudi “rehabilitation” program. This is just the latest example of why American energy independence is vital to our national security. Freeing a terrorist in apparent appeasement because the Biden Administration wants to buy more Saudi oil is desperate and dangerous. Katie and Wesley Celebrate Their Anniversary I can’t believe Tuesday marked 14 years of being married to my best friend! Happy anniversary, ! You are the best husband and dad — and campaign volunteer — that anyone could ever ask for! Katie Prepares for Red Snapper Season We’re looking forward to the start of red snapper season on May 27! In the Senate, I’ll fight to allow the State of Alabama to fully control our own reef fish management, including our snapper fishery. Have you gotten your limited-edition blue Katie Britt hat? ACT FAST to get your hands on the official hat and show your support for Katie in 2022! Snag yours today before they sell out: . Follow Katie On Social Media: | | | | ---|---|--- SIGN UP FOR SMS ALERTS: **TEXT "KATIE" TO 484848 Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

Wow, friend, that headline speaks for itself!
With more solar investments comes more solar and clean energy jobs, which means explosive growth for Ohio’s economy. **Imagine if the Ohio legislature prioritized making it easier for folks to access solar energy and easier for Ohio to attract major solar company investment.**
Let’s see how things are going:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42867515/334642953/-887222896?refcode=ea.90f590a3-6fa1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.90f590a3-6fa1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGY1OTBhMy02ZmExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9D5NNYoKxmxbIpyBFOE2kjz8zbdWaQh9jaLf1GvRMRY=&emci=faa05fe6-62a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=90f590a3-6fa1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=22604289)
Well, that was short-lived. But that’s exactly why **John and Teresa want to transition Ohio to a clean energy economy, because clean energy _is_ the future** — hopefully, Ohio’s future. From workers to manufacturing to distribution to installation, solar energy has the potential to seriously kickstart Ohio’s comeback.
John would know, since he created the _largest municipally-owned solar farm in the country._
It’s time for Ohio to stop sitting on its hands as solar booms around the country. **[Add your name to our petition and tell the Ohio legislature to promote solar energy investment and implementation in Ohio>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42867516/334642954/-887222896?refcode=ea.90f590a3-6fa1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.90f590a3-6fa1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGY1OTBhMy02ZmExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9D5NNYoKxmxbIpyBFOE2kjz8zbdWaQh9jaLf1GvRMRY=&emci=faa05fe6-62a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=90f590a3-6fa1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=22604289)**
