clean_body: | Ohio can’t afford to miss the boat on solar energy. | “2022 will be a record year for wind and solar” — CNBC It’s simple: More solar = more jobs = bigger Ohio economy. ** Wow, friend, that headline speaks for itself! With more solar investments comes more solar and clean energy jobs, which means explosive growth for Ohio’s economy. Imagine if the Ohio legislature prioritized making it easier for folks to access solar energy and easier for Ohio to attract major solar company investment. Let’s see how things are going: Well, that was short-lived. But that’s exactly why John and Teresa want to transition Ohio to a clean energy economy, because clean energy is the future — hopefully, Ohio’s future. From workers to manufacturing to distribution to installation, solar energy has the potential to seriously kickstart Ohio’s comeback. John would know, since he created the largest municipally-owned solar farm in the country. It’s time for Ohio to stop sitting on its hands as solar booms around the country. It's just common sense, friend — we’ll run out of fossil fuels, but the sun will never run out of energy. Thanks for adding your voice, Team Cranley-Fedor The sun will technically run out of hydrogen and explode in approximately 5 billion years. = = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.** = = = = Paid for by the Cranley Fedor for Ohio Committee JOHN CRANLEY COMMITTEE 30 GARFIELD PLACE SUITE 900 CINCINNATI, OH 45202 United States Click here to

clean_body: | | | We’ve got the GOP worried | | | FIRST: We showed you polling that has the Arizona governor’s race a dead heat. THEN: Experts rated AZ GOV a toss-up and the best chance for Democrats to flip a governor’s seat in 2022. NOW: National Republicans are freaking out and are rushing $10 MILLION in ads to defend their seat! We told you earlier this week that Doug Ducey would be embarrassed that Republicans could lose his seat while he was chair of the Republican Governors Association. Now, Ducey is rushing $10 million to his home state, committing more than 1/3 of the RGA’s announced ad buys to Arizona. They are spending more in Arizona than any other major state – including Michigan, Nevada, Wisconsin, and Georgia! [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2695264002a543fe8313f8aca786804c&_e=95FcRfasEG7yIMQl8FksCqG9EXz0EQGkpykrTb794QhLaqfZQq6hI1B3Jx5lX0WYqiZ7iDtOVlLUSskXdv23yEJMdM0R78HZh_IIaFfKCbWImZkgYelFRiU_JScbg2FnLht0QFUB__8LzJMhW5eX8lPZufE0ys8JdJnUKJJCsIYwY6ow0AH_ZWEzs2D6Fqu6AC8SzOaDF84QlGWvoKTlTY5jFq0g-Mv-t0BsIR3ROrb-MrDpgqs2Bwt9SRlX0i_y92cvpRHB5jcma-BNbMHHxitUQXvMIrqXNlanv2CkVCkKwNl6qnBvVcQS4iPUZTumQWBGDisrM-N1Gup56ABz08paDMwFXhG5EcTjOuAvMFpQO5UD-1Pn2Pe18lmpAiK4Fo7GIXq2Pgqovsb8NFlVwHLmCWH5fDExXWz-uRCPUzP6ati-ksix3yATE4wYsHdfRlOVCrMx2JGhF8i54viHvvpYp97jGsqcIMoWIeD2r2Q%3D)

Peter,

Our Democrat opponent has spent over $3 million airing TV ads across Georgia in the last 30 days.

That's a LOT OF MONEY. Folks in Georgia are seeing my opponent on their TVs every single day claiming to be a "champion for the people."

**But the $3 million ad blitz is just a drop in the bucket of his campaign account, which is flush with more than $23 million.**

**Here's the good news, Peter._The race remains neck and neck._**

We are planning our own Team Herschel advertising campaign. Will you help us spread our message about holding politicians accountable, reversing the soaring cost of gas and food, reviving our economy, and fighting crime in our neighborhoods?

**[Can we count on you for a gift of $3, $5, $25, $34, or even $100 right now?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2695264002a543fe8313f8aca786804c&_e=95FcRfasEG7yIMQl8FksCqG9EXz0EQGkpykrTb794QhLaqfZQq6hI1B3Jx5lX0WYqiZ7iDtOVlLUSskXdv23yEJMdM0R78HZh_IIaFfKCbWImZkgYelFRiU_JScbg2FnLht0QFUB__8LzJMhW5eX8lPZufE0ys8JdJnUKJJCsIYwY6ow0AH_ZWEzs2D6Fqu6AC8SzOaDF84QlGWvoKTlTY5jFq0g-Mv-t0BsIR3ROrb-MrDpgqs2Bwt9SRlX0i_ygAgl_xq8YgvvX27sswnvy5JjmRh9l7JkLwfNvGMYejsJutmoJ6Tqksj-5iS5b6JdEvD_mOi36aJK0VdLxW0XTs-MKl71kUkAn8DUE4WhbToz7NeOs5yRXQO-bBwTsbhXTPagS4-cknI84UHo1FDrYGBQC1ioFcuin1acOOGBJXRmmRXNhx5-m6eqoT-bOGS95oWEG1Yml_9tsScEp2unKMBWajeF8VCgsaxuiUcAlzM%3D)**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2695264002a543fe8313f8aca786804c&_e=95FcRfasEG7yIMQl8FksCqG9EXz0EQGkpykrTb794QhLaqfZQq6hI1B3Jx5lX0WYqiZ7iDtOVlLUSskXdv23yEJMdM0R78HZh_IIaFfKCbWImZkgYelFRiU_JScbg2FnLht0QFUB__8LzJMhW5eX8lPZufE0ys8JdJnUKJJCsIYwY6ow0AH_ZWEzs2D6Fqu6AC8SzOaDF84QlGWvoKTlTY5jFq0g-Mv-t0BsIR3ROrb-MrDpgqs2Bwt9SRlX0i_yLzfVUBGwFpu_14FLVr31Ilr8y2pnCHCMpn7YPq2ODqy1QotCzkcCePkpTVrwz3GPFtpBRgAJAKVzZLuIrBsJr_R5olokXdbb8OPW6wUPoC8GuNNnFduQSBg4oxUCe0O9vGAzXkC34RkTwxfNHsPa-Dd_fuNMQNimg5bcZsG7vWkDz91xU_ynAaQiPR7VeDz9quA3uWGcv9g4F8YKUcULJthoqWxAw9eVI0rHME_FuA4%3D)
**Since we didn't launch our campaign until late August, our opponent got an 8-month head start on his fundraising efforts. That's why we cannot afford to miss even a single financial goal during this campaign.**

As our opponent wrote in one of his recent emails, _**"our entire Democratic agenda - from health care to good-paying jobs to voting rights - is on the line in this race, so we can't afford a single misstep."**_

Our opponent is correct that the entire Democrat agenda is on the line in our race. When we win in Georgia, we will flip control of the Senate back to Republican hands so President Biden's partisan agenda will be stopped in its tracks.

clean_body: Our opponent has spent over $3 million in the last 30 days on a massive tv advertising blitz, and that number is quickly growing. Our opponent has spent over $3 million in the last 30 days on a massive tv advertising blitz, and that number is quickly growing. | Peter, Our Democrat opponent has spent over $3 million airing TV ads across Georgia in the last 30 days. That's a LOT OF MONEY. Folks in Georgia are seeing my opponent on their TVs every single day claiming to be a "champion for the people." But the $3 million ad blitz is just a drop in the bucket of his campaign account, which is flush with more than $23 million. Here's the good news, Peter.The race remains neck and neck. We are planning our own Team Herschel advertising campaign. Will you help us spread our message about holding politicians accountable, reversing the soaring cost of gas and food, reviving our economy, and fighting crime in our neighborhoods? Since we didn't launch our campaign until late August, our opponent got an 8-month head start on his fundraising efforts. That's why we cannot afford to miss even a single financial goal during this campaign. As our opponent wrote in one of his recent emails, "our entire Democratic agenda - from health care to good-paying jobs to voting rights - is on the line in this race, so we can't afford a single misstep." Our opponent is correct that the entire Democrat agenda is on the line in our race. When we win in Georgia, we will flip control of the Senate back to Republican hands so President Biden's partisan agenda will be stopped in its tracks. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

I could raise the money very quickly” With Shalala preparing to enter the race, we MUST make March our strongest fundraising month yet so we’re ready to go toe-to-toe with Shalala’s Pelosi-backed campaign. Nancy Pelosi and Donna Shalala clearly haven’t moved on from defeat in 2020. They were expecting an easy victory, and instead, you and your fellow grassroots conservatives helped me pull off the biggest upset in the country. Now, they’re looking for revenge this November so they can ERASE everything we’ve built in the last two years. We simply can’t let that happen. Let’s show Shalala that this congressional district is going to stay RED with a surge of grassroots contributions to support my re-election campaign. If our numbers are impressive enough, we might be able to scare her off for good... Thank you, María Elvira Salazar Florida’s 27th Congressional District Paid for by Salazar for Congress P.O. This month, President Biden shared his vision for the future of America in his historic State of the Union address.
President Biden's steady leadership is exactly what we need to get our country back on track, but not everyone's on board. GOP governors like Arizona's Doug Ducey are going ALL IN to undermine President Biden's agenda by signing racist voter-suppression bills and cutting funding to our schools.
The ONLY way we can truly build a better country for all of us is by building from the ground up – and that's exactly what Marco Lopez (D) is planning to do. **He's an Obama administration alum, voting rights champion and small business owner – and he's running for governor to create a state that works for all people. But he needs our help to win this race.**
**That's why Marco put together an exclusive digital focus group – and you’ve been specially selected to participate, friend. Your input today can change the future of Arizona, so please, review your record and share your thoughts before the midnight deadline:**

The ONLY way we can truly build a better country for all of us is by building from the ground up – and that's exactly what Marco Lopez (D) is planning to do. He's an Obama administration alum, voting rights champion and small business owner – and he's running for governor to create a state that works for all people. But he needs our help to win this race. That's why Marco put together an exclusive digital focus group – and you’ve been specially selected to participate, friend. Your input today can change the future of Arizona, so please, review your record and share your thoughts before the midnight deadline: 2022 DEMOCRATIC FOCUS GROUP SUPPORTER TIER: TOP SUPPORTER SURVEY STATUS: NOT STARTED REQUESTED ACTION: DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M. | | Thanks for your input – it matters a lot. – Team Lopez Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:** Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, = Thank you so much. – Marco Lopez | | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Mike Thompson
subject: Helping our brothers and sisters in Ukraine
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://email
body:
# [#]
Peter,

Over the past few weeks, the world has watched Putin wage an unjust war on Ukraine.

While we all hoped this wouldn’t happen and continued to hope for a quick end – Russia is continuing to advance their forces.

This week I voted to pass the Suspending Energy Imports from Russia Act. As Putin continues to wage an illegal war against Ukraine, we must do whatever we can to cut off Russia from the global economy.

This legislation will not only ban the import of Russian oil and other energy products, but it will sever a main source of revenue that Putin relies on. This will also give us the opportunity to review Russia’s access to the World Trade Organization and determine other ways in which we can shrink Russia’s involvement in our global economy.

This decision is not without its costs here at home, but please know that we continue to work tirelessly every day to ensure the safety for all Americans. Putin’s unjust war is not just a threat to Ukraine, but to the whole world – and we are taking bold measures to help our brothers and sisters in Ukraine.

I will continue to update you on these efforts as information becomes available.

Thank you,

Mike Thompson

body:

Peter Willis,

I'm humbly asking for your help today.

_As I write this, Nancy Pelosi has made me her #1 target._ She knows that the keys to a conservative House majority run right through Central Florida and has committed MILLIONS to crush me and every red seat on the map.

Pelosi is PETRIFIED of me because I am battle-tested and will stand in the way of her radical agenda in Washington. Unlike my Liberal opponent, I cannot be bought by the liberal coastal elite or Democrat superPACS.

My campaign is supported by freedom-loving patriots who are fed up with the liberal media's lies and socialist pipe dreams being propagated by the Liberals in power. I am inspired by everyone near and far who has stepped up to support my campaign. [**Can I count on your support once more so we can hold on to Election Day?**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.)
********[DONATE HERE!](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.)********
Look, with the Democrats having endless funds, we won't be able to compete unless everyone reading this pledges their support. I have not lost a battle yet, and I don't plan to lose this one either.

Just as I did on SEAL Team 1, I'm prepared and equipped for anything Pelosi, and her minions throw my way. I've said it before and will say it again: there is nothing in Washington that is greater than anything I've faced in combat. [**Can I count on you to help send this Navy Vet & MAGA conservative to D.C. so we can put America first once again?**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.)
********[DONATE HERE!](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.)********
This race is the **MOST** critical race in the country, and it will decide the future of America.

But, I need your help to stay in the fight, which is why I am personally reaching out to you. Please don't let the Democrats win. Please don't let them destroy our country.

**Will you help send a strong conservative, SEAL Team Sniper and a Christian minister to Congress to fight for YOU and our shared values? **

I promise, if you let me, I will make you proud.

Thank you in advance for your support.

In God We Trust,

Brady

name: Team WisGOP
subject: Calling all Patriots!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
We need to be ready for the April elections!

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nwot_0311&n=1)
---
Hi Friend -- Today kicks off our Wisconsin Week of Training! Grassroots activists across Wisconsin will take action to be stronger leaders in their communities. We are going to need as much help as possible to be successful for the upcoming April 5th elections. **With your help, we will take back our local government offices!** **Below are some important dates to keep in mind ahead of the April 5th elections:**
* **3/11-3/17:** **[Wisconsin Week of Training](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=byzRKmAVlU78JyeDZX7ineEgl5Krw8GuI88_xX-YSa83Osm4nBasJN8VN4nx5SU9&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nwot_0311&n=2)**
* **3/19:[ Election Observer Recruitment Day of Action](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=zuf7fWO9bJnQbitbD556p7-n02Ob0CBIrafP8swka9jnRj4lT5WfcN2s6HyM6gW2cuTZdkG0XJwIEdycWzGRPA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nwot_0311&n=3)**
* **3/22:** Early In Person Voting Begins
* **3/25-4/5:** **[GOTV March Metric Madness](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=byzRKmAVlU78JyeDZX7ineEgl5Krw8GuI88_xX-YSa83Osm4nBasJN8VN4nx5SU9&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nwot_0311&n=4)**
* For a full list of upcoming trainings and events, please visit **[GOPVictory.com](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=byzRKmAVlU78JyeDZX7inXL5H5qyjboO5mRUuQw49SI&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nwot_0311&n=5)**
* Can’t attend? Help us grow the volunteer network by promoting this link to your contacts and encouraging them to get involved! Sign up link to share: **[gopvictory.com/wi/volunteer](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=byzRKmAVlU78JyeDZX7ineEgl5Krw8GuI88_xX-YSa83Osm4nBasJN8VN4nx5SU9&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nwot_0311&n=6)**
* To schedule or host a Training or Team Meeting please contact Wisconsin Deputy State Director Collin Wojcik ([**cwojcik@wisgop.org**](mailto:cwojcik@wisgop.org))

We are going to need as much help as possible to be successful for the upcoming April 5th elections. With your help, we will take back our local government offices! Below are some important dates to keep in mind ahead of the April 5th elections: 3/11-3/17: 3/19: 3/22: Early In Person Voting Begins 3/25-4/5: For a full list of upcoming trainings and events, please visit Can’t attend? Help us grow the volunteer network by promoting this link to your contacts and encouraging them to get involved! Sign up link to share: * To schedule or host a Training or Team Meeting please contact Wisconsin Deputy State Director Collin Wojcik (mailto:cwojcik@wisgop.org) | "Click here to find a training near you!" Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin. Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate's Committee. 148 E Johnson St, Madison, WI 53703 | (608) 257 - 4765

body:
NEWS FROM THE CAMPAIGN Hello fellow Patriots, Thank you for taking a moment to find out “what's new” in my campaign to be the newest Congressman for
| | [](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/416378?id=14941.68.1.039c17a93f7113bcb7289973b0ebb26f)
---
[](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/416378?id=14941.69.1.69aa72cfae8199b49afce7f38aaf8a72) |
---
|
---
# **NEWS FROM THE CAMPAIGN**
Hello fellow Patriots,
Thank you for taking a moment to find out “what's new” in my campaign to be the newest Congressman for California’s 36th (formerly 33rd) District.
_**I'm excited to share with you that we have accomplished what most thought was impossible. We filed our final paperwork and will now officially be on the 2022 primary ballot!**
_**Two weeks ago, I was invited to meet-up with the trucker convoy in DC. I was able to share, on stage, about what is happening in California.**
_**We flew back and went directly to Basilico's for our wonderful “Meet the Candidate” dinner. It was also the perfect opportunity to celebrate my daughter’s birthday. We love Tony Roman. He is a hero.**
_**We had an amazing time serving the unhoused community on Skid Row with Set Free Church. Our team was joined by Lexit and Anthony Trimino’s team.**
_**We continue to rally in the streets of LA county and beyond. I will be at the “SOS Rally” at City Hall with Roll Call for Freedom and the Fire Fighters for Freedom on Saturday the 12th.**
_**Saturday the 19th, we will be at the Santa Monica Pier for a major rally with other speakers such as Anthony Trimino, Ronda Kennedy, Gia D'Amato, Jason Lefkowitz, Siaka Massaquoi, Lexit, and Blexit to name a few.**
_**I'm excited to be taking a trip to Florida for a meeting at Mar-a-Lago. I pray for that trip to be fruitful.**
_**One of the best things that happened recently was my son's 14th birthday. He was knighted at Medieval Times as “Sir Derrick Gates the II”. To be honest, Nena and I had a blast too.**
_Moving forward we all know that our city, nation, and state is a mess. We must take it back now or we may lose it forever. People are tired of politicians and I'm the answer for District 36. I need you now more than ever. We are a “grass roots” campaign and rely on your donations to keep moving it forward. Please contribute whatever you can today. We need yard signs, mail-outs, billboards, commercials and we need to start right now. I'm also looking for interns and patriots to join our growing movement. Perhaps you can get involved by hosting a fundraiser in your home or business. Please reach out today. We’d love to hear from you! Follow the link to give a donation._
**Together we can save our nation and it begins here, in California.**
Derrick R. Gates
An American Comeback Story
P.S. If you would like to discuss my campaign, give me a call at 424-216-6893. Learn more about Derrick and see his endorsements so far below.
[www.officialderrickgates.com](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/416378?id=14941.70.1.bb6b855669015774f586a95855fe90f3).

subject: Pennsylvania Pro-Life Federation PAC Awards Bill McSwain Highest Pro-Life Rating
body:
McSwain has promised to be a pro-life Governor and appoint pro-life voices to his administration. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us5.campaign-archive.com/?e=b1ec95759b&u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=8af08567e1)
---
| |
---
| **PRESS RELEASE
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**March 11, 2021
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
| |
# Pennsylvania Pro-Life Federation PAC awards Bill McSwain highest pro-life rating

**West Chester, Pa.** **\-- **Bill McSwain, Republican candidate for Governor, today announced that he has been awarded the highest ranking of "PRO-LIFE" by the Pennsylvania Pro-Life Federation Political Action Committee.

McSwain will be a pro-life Governor and has promised to give pro-life voices a prominent seat at the table in his administration:
---
|
> _**"I am proud and grateful to have received the Pennsylvania Pro-Life Federation PAC's highest rating. As ****a father of four, I understand the importance of defending the dignity and sanctity of human life. As Governor, I will promote pro-life policies and appoint pro-life and pro-family voices to my administration. ****I will ensure that Pennsylvania has a culture of life and will ****sign legislation that protects the unborn." **_
---
|
---
| More information on McSwain's pro-life position is [available here](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=6eecb947fa&e=b1ec95759b).
---
|
---
|
---
| **BACKGROUND: **
Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as US Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available [here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=fab43b856f&e=b1ec95759b)
###

---

---

---

---

You can [update your preferences](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=de4180c8e2&e=b1ec95759b&c=8af08567e1) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=de4180c8e2&e=b1ec95759b&c=8af08567e1).

body:
There’s no margin for error this November...
#

**1 seat.**
That is all Republicans need to flip to gain control of the United States Senate.
But Cheri can stop them and their agenda of obstruction if we win this open seat. Our race is one of the best opportunities for Democrats to beat the GOP and expand our majority.
Right now, the Senate is in partisan gridlock, which is preventing us from passing popular legislation that can better the lives of working people. Electing Cheri can be the difference for real meaningful action on voting rights, paid family leave, lower health care and prescription drug costs, and climate action.
One thing is clear: It’s time for change. With your help, North Carolina can deliver it.

name: Team Jane
subject: 🚨 TX State Rep Rafael Anchía Endorses Jane Hope Hamilton for U.S. Congress!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Jane Hope Hamilton for Congress
body:
Dear Friends,

Today, Texas State Representative, Chairman Rafael Anchía announced his endorsement of our campaign! We are honored to have his support and commitment to helping us reach voters in Congressional District 30.

Chairman Anchía was elected to the Texas House of Representatives in 2004 and since 2017 has served as Chairman of the Mexican American Legislative Caucus (MALC), the oldest and largest Latino caucus in the United States.

He released the following statement regarding his endorsement: https://twitter.com/RafaelAnchia/status/1502313403259441161

“Now that the race for Congressional District 30 has been reset, I am proud to endorse Jane Hope Hamilton. North Texas needs a Congresswoman who will be ready on day one. Jane’s professional experience and long history of fighting for our community makes her the right choice to be our voice in Congress.

Over the next several weeks, I am committed to working alongside Jane and her campaign to get her message directly to the voters. I know voters will choose Jane’s proven results over her opponent's rhetoric. We stand united and ready to send Jane Hope Hamilton to Congress.”

Thank you Chairman Anchía! We are looking forward to working together again in serving our community and amplifying their voices.

Donate Today [secure.actblue.com/donate/email_ask]
If you prefer to donate by check, please mail to:
Jane Hope Hamilton Campaign
P.O. Box 227046
Dallas, TX 75222

Follow us on Social Media:
https://www.facebook.com/janehopetx/
https://twitter.com/JaneHopeTx
https://www.instagram.com/JaneHopeTx/

Fellow American,

I have been blessed to have the support of so many people – below are just a few:
* South Carolina Attorney General Alan Wilson
* SCGOP Chairman Drew McKissick
* Congressman Joe Wilson (SC-02)
* Congressman Jeff Duncan (SC-03)
* Congressman Ralph Norman (SC-05)

But, as I was looking through my list of supporters, I noticed that your name was missing, and I figured it must be a mistake – because I know how badly you want to take back the House and restore common-sense conservative values in our country.

**Which leads me to why I am reaching out to you today:** [**as one of my strongest conservative supporters, will you personally endorse my re-election campaign for Congress?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=94df255faaf042dba2911e476970ddde&_e=gs9RnDfGBgIeKbkUMFl25ubMlbOInKK576-9JJzWSE9WqfSxso9POth132AmRg5No-5R7kr4piVKliNwEckusdN9E05lrgPegt3DQX4vRZ_8eKzWcFtx2YzbpBwfiI0aFWvk1Ex2h6UREAw0VJw28XoZGJkP-eDEu2kZuPiNEW96Ifv_zIWUwurdEH5ZJ0dwVEAH2IoLJwntFvVzXWqReuHb-Kt5ZZnEUA6ti5hEVfDSIduUoZyiyPYNC77hOzsMavRIfSsl0dVjO9dsRuVMJB9tSUo7Q2LrdPMNprIVgLHJFIxBtn5p-h9ly0zgWvegTXZL9AnZQ2g203pwk0hMGjalihbJvKX_VhYByCNMqSQaS3byvbY6RyXSa37KbqQIH-vzY_jI9Zzf96mQ6WjCvZnef64G8gw6lJFCeMMKC6xUJNLjb9osnVjmUYWzOKerAavU0zcW8eBb5dkBa4NBepa0xLZD0c3t51RV3kBamlq9sNZFqFj7QCOddwsc0tiy6WTLvk_jyBsN2EYegLBy6WkeyZq4O5a-xLbFQGqNals%3D)

During my time in office, I have been a steadfast Republican and have continued to put the American people first – ahead of personal political interests – which cannot be said about my opponents. **We must keep this seat in the hands of a proven Conservative that is working hard for you and your family!**

This race is more important than just South Carolina—it is a chance to actually create change in the halls of Congress and flip the House majority this November.

I have been fortunate to gain the endorsement of dozens of elected officials and conservative leaders here in South Carolina, but what I really need today is the rock-solid backing of conservative warriors like you. [**Can I count on your crucial endorsement today?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=94df255faaf042dba2911e476970ddde&_e=gs9RnDfGBgIeKbkUMFl25ubMlbOInKK576-9JJzWSE9WqfSxso9POth132AmRg5No-5R7kr4piVKliNwEckusdN9E05lrgPegt3DQX4vRZ_8eKzWcFtx2YzbpBwfiI0aFWvk1Ex2h6UREAw0VJw28XoZGJkP-eDEu2kZuPiNEW96Ifv_zIWUwurdEH5ZJ0dwVEAH2IoLJwntFvVzXWqReuHb-Kt5ZZnEUA6ti5hEVfDSIduUoZyiyPYNC77hOzsMavRIfSsl0dVjO9dsRuVMJB9tSUo7Q2LrdPMNprIVgLHJFIxBtn5p-h9ly0zgWvegTXZL9AnZQ2g203pwk0hMGjbTrLN--5gXwe-AaSDUrc45luj33aESp5pRk9btw_twblxR7gBO5NTbzvDzWGB8Lnz27NtTM20r_xFCd_Y8DbF3JSgdp0xfWKx_hbLjfNx_91XCCJcbs_pmZauFGi6OTu7aLyKqHavJlH2fT_bAa8QUu_oJHJ4Vz_zg0mRbK6FRtRu0hM-RbzZxu3ayqihLdkVwAY4JQWUJOfa1sEMdsvE%3D)

[**I appreciate your support and look forward to retaking the U.S. House of Representatives together this November.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=94df255faaf042dba2911e476970ddde&_e=gs9RnDfGBgIeKbkUMFl25ubMlbOInKK576-9JJzWSE9WqfSxso9POth132AmRg5No-5R7kr4piVKliNwEckusdN9E05lrgPegt3DQX4vRZ_8eKzWcFtx2YzbpBwfiI0aFWvk1Ex2h6UREAw0VJw28XoZGJkP-eDEu2kZuPiNEW96Ifv_zIWUwurdEH5ZJ0dwVEAH2IoLJwntFvVzXWqReuHb-Kt5ZZnEUA6ti5hEVfDSIduUoZyiyPYNC77hOzsMavRIfSsl0dVjO9dsRuVMJB9tSUo7Q2LrdPMNprIVgLHJFIxBtn5p-h9ly0zgWvegTXZL9AnZQ2g203pwk0hMGn0wb4Nf0xrrBJFN97I9_uy4Isxe6f5iYPT22u8k_Hoo8YlDOPwjgRZAoA7voYoh0Grjiytdw-1DFiW6Cb5GMgvLi3VRFhOEuv1imtjmulS_WWqdNdclsyjevUxXJKghu4BUUw0Rstu1-PKQPkor52s5z_bz9Tm7w2X0ZwndWjMJbdUUmhc97Tjk0DKdeWjevBlk4tCFgXNP8nYdnmUPaUs%3D)

Fellow American, I have been blessed to have the support of so many people – below are just a few: South Carolina Attorney General Alan Wilson SCGOP Chairman Drew McKissick Congressman Joe Wilson (SC-02) Congressman Jeff Duncan (SC-03) Congressman Ralph Norman (SC-05) But, as I was looking through my list of supporters, I noticed that your name was missing, and I figured it must be a mistake – because I know how badly you want to take back the House and restore common-sense conservative values in our country. Which leads me to why I am reaching out to you today: During my time in office, I have been a steadfast Republican and have continued to put the American people first – ahead of personal political interests – which cannot be said about my opponents. We must keep this seat in the hands of a proven Conservative that is working hard for you and your family! This race is more important than just South Carolina—it is a chance to actually create change in the halls of Congress and flip the House majority this November. I have been fortunate to gain the endorsement of dozens of elected officials and conservative leaders here in South Carolina, but what I really need today is the rock-solid backing of conservative warriors like you. who are laying the groundwork for a tremendous Republican re-election victory here in the 4th Congressional District that will help us retake the U.S. House and put an end to the Democrats’ disastrous agenda. I am asking that you be 1 of 324 additional dedicated conservatives who are committed to joining my team with a personal endorsement before midnight tonight. Respectfully, William Timmons | ABOUT WILLIAM TIMMONS William Timmons is a conservative reformer with a small business background committed to finding solutions to everyday problems. name: VoteVets
subject: Tucker Carlson and Glenn Greenwald
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Last night, Russia and China conspired to flood the internet with disinformation about Ukraine
#
Derek —
Last night, Russia and China conspired to flood the internet with disinformation about Ukraine (with American assistance) getting ready to use chemical weapons against Russian troops.
The false information was shared on the internet around the world, but amplified by – you guessed it – Tucker Carlson and Glenn Greenwald here in the states on Fox News.
Steven Bannon and Trump aide Peter Navarro took it a step further and claimed Anthony Fauci “had to know about it.”
All of this vile disinformation is used as a pretext for Russia using chemical and biological weapons of their own, as they have done before.
VoteVets is one of the leading progressive organizations highlighting and fighting Russian and right-wing disinformation like this — efforts often targeting veterans.
We do it because we know the risks of weapons like this being used in war.
But we cannot do it alone.
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to VoteVets today to help us fight back against Russian and right-wing disinformation here at home? We’ll put your donation to work talking to veterans on social media, text messages and more.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-pac-disinfo-ukr?refcode=em220311-1-tb2&t=1&refcode2=4557_3013755_dTBbnY&akid=4557%2E3013755%2EdTBbnY)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Andy=20Roth?=
subject: FW: State Freedom Caucuses
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
> Everyone,
>
> Earlier this morning, I sent the following email to state lawmakers around the country who are interested in starting a state freedom caucus. The purpose of the email was to show them an example of how one of our state freedom caucus’s is succeeding at killing bad policy.
>
> Please read it. And if you want to help us succeed as we launch more state freedom caucuses across the country, please consider making a donation.
>
---
| [CLICK HERE TO DONATE](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=fd4368bd6a&e=64ecec6d03 "CLICK HERE TO DONATE")
---
|
#
Thank you,

Andy

Andrew Roth
President
State Freedom Caucus Network

> Begin forwarded message:

---
| Everyone,

You’re receiving this email because you are a state lawmaker who’s in a state freedom caucus, in the process of being part of a newly-created state freedom caucus, or you’re interested in learning more about it.

The reason I’m writing today is to show you how effective a state freedom caucus can be in your state.

Recently, Kevin and Laura Baigert reached out to me from Tennessee. The Baigerts are great Americans who follow their state legislature and call out their representatives if they are supporting Leftist, big government policies. Laura alerted me to the fact that the Tennessee legislature was considering an insidious bill (HB 1989) that would create an interstate compact between their state, Arkansas, and Mississippi.

I immediately reached out to Steven Utroska, our stellar executive director in Mississippi to have him investigate it. Sure enough, a liberal Republican state senator named David Parker had offered the exact same bill that would bless the interstate compact from Mississippi’s perspective (SB 2716).

In effect, if this bill became law, this compact would create a quasi-governmental commission to hand out corporate welfare (i.e. cronyism) in the various counties along the borders of these three states – basically the greater Memphis area.

Part of the money would be funded by your tax dollars through Biden’s infrastructure bill. And the people behind this idea are associated with the Soros-funded Urban Land Institute. That’s bad enough, but the board would also have the authority to issue taxes, issue bonds, and even use eminent domain to take your home. All without any oversight or accountability.

There’s no chance that such a bill could possibly pass into law, right? Well, the Mississippi State Senate passed it unanimously, [51-0](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=5871059ba0&e=64ecec6d03).

Thankfully, the Mississippi Freedom Caucus Chairman, State Rep. Steve Hopkins, went to work to kill the bill on the House side. First, he informed his conservative Senate colleagues that Parker duped them into supporting it. Next, the Caucus notified the state Farm Bureau and alerted them to the abusive eminent domain provision, which promptly motivated them to oppose the bill.

Finally, and this is the best part, Hopkins went on the Glenn Beck radio show and [warned](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7ae36cc39e&e=64ecec6d03) the entire country about what was happening.

All of that hard work paid off.

On Tuesday, the Mississippi House declared that the bill was dead on arrival. And thanks largely to the Baigerts, the bill [died](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=2e62301a49&e=64ecec6d03) in Tennessee too.

**This is how we win. **

We now have the playbook. We form, mobilize, and activate freedom caucuses across the country and then encourage them to loudly fight against big government. And we know we're winning because it’s driving the GOP establishment nuts! A local mayor who supported SB 2716’s cronyism is whining about how the Mississippi Freedom Caucus is a "a radical right extremist organization”. And this mayor calls himself a “Republican". Feel free to [retweet this](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=f3ff9e145c&e=64ecec6d03) if you disagree. Because Biden’s infrastructure bill encourages these kinds of crony compacts, I encourage each one of you to scour the bills in your state to see if special interest groups have introduced a similar proposal. If so, let us know and we’ll help you fight it. So far we have freedom caucuses in Georgia and the aforementioned Mississippi. We anticipate another handful coming online shortly, with about 10-15 caucuses up and running this year. We hope you can be a part of that. You’ll be joining of an exciting revolution to take back our country. Please reach out to me if you haven’t already.

Best,

Andrew Roth
President
State Freedom Caucus Network
---
| | |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 State Freedom Caucus Network, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
State Freedom Caucus Network300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003-1021
[Add us to your address book](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7256df9da1)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7256df9da1&e=64ecec6d03&c=e3228d9cea) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7256df9da1&e=64ecec6d03&c=e3228d9cea).
---

subject: We Need the Keystone XL Pipeline Now! 🔴

body:
Energy independence is vital for sustaining America’s way of life | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/67fd56df9c54/dhs-could-label-grandma-a-terrorist-8989977?e=2429acb6f7)
---
| | [ ](https://marcforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=41459556cfecfd1402c31ae88&id=5d74fbc2bf&e=2429acb6f7)
---
| | Peter,

**Over 1.5 million Ukranians have already fled their country as a result of the crisis in the region.** Europe is experiencing an immigration crisis not seen since World War II. Failed leadership is threatening global stability.

_**The crisis in Ukraine shows just how important it is for us to remain energy independent.**_ Career politicians are playing politics with a nonsensical energy strategy which impacts our national sovereignty while also throttling our personal economy with soaring gas prices. The financial burden on all Americans could have been alleviated by approving the _Keystone XL pipeline_.
---
| [ ](https://marcforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=41459556cfecfd1402c31ae88&id=0d48e84ad1&e=2429acb6f7)
---
| **Biden’s recent decision to ban Russian oil imports will cause prices at the pump to skyrocket even further - at a time when so many in this country are living paycheck to paycheck.** The Keystone XL pipeline would have cushioned us from those price increases.

The post-Cold War order is unraveling before our eyes, which means that energy independence is vital for sustaining America’s way of life. Our president is failing us in every respect when it comes to safeguarding Americans from international conflicts.

Will you help me put an end to this madness? As your Congressman for Georgia’s 10th Congressional District, I will make energy independence a core tenet of my campaign.

---
| [DONATE $15 »](https://marcforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=41459556cfecfd1402c31ae88&id=dc44377298&e=2429acb6f7 "DONATE $15 »")

Friend,
---

body:
# [#]. https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2203?amount=20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2203?amount=20] In case you haven’t seen it, Josh was featured in a New York Times article about Democrats who are working with members of Congress across the aisle, fighting to overcome the legislative stalemate.

The article lays out a legislative agenda drafted by Josh and his colleagues on the key policy areas such as the climate crisis, inflation, cost of prescription medication and health care, and public health protocols.

Click here to read the article or scroll to see some key quotes! [https://www.nytimes.com/2022/02/24/us/politics/democrats-midterm-agenda.html]

— Team Gottheimer
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2203?amount=20]

“The draft agenda was written by Representatives Abigail Spanberger of Virginia, Steven Horsford of Nevada, Josh Gottheimer of New Jersey, Dean Phillips of Minnesota and Elissa Slotkin of Michigan. It includes almost 75 bipartisan bills already drafted and broader bullet points such as ‘Combat Rising Costs for Food, Gas, Housing and Utilities,’ ‘Reduce Prescription Drug Prices, Co-Pays and Deductibles’”
“The agenda includes legislation to ‘re-establish faith in America’s public health system and ensure preparedness for future pandemics, so that our economy and schools can remain open.’”
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. clean_body: | | | Republicans have become terrifyingly predictable: stonewall any progressive policies that move this country forward, then roll back all of that progress as soon as they take back power. This Monday, Senator Ron Johnson of Wisconsin announced that if Republicans take the majority in Congress, they'll repeal the Affordable Care Act, and take health care away from millionsof Americans. Democrats only have a slim majority in Congress, and Republicans are determined to take it back this November. We can't let them. The stakes are too high. = = A record 31 million people receive affordable health care through the Affordable Care Act – and it's only grown in popularity since President Biden took office. You know what that means? This law is working. More and more Americans are getting the health care they need at a price they can afford. Yet, Republicans can't waitto repeal this law and rip care away from millions who need it. This is just one more reason why it's so critical that we defend and expand our Democratic majority come November. Republicans rely on corporate interest groups to fund their campaigns. We rely on grassroots donors like you. name: Fetterman for PA
subject: overwhelmed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We need your help to keep our ads up in one of the most saturated TV markets in the country.
#
Derek, we have some bad news, but we think with your help, we can turn it into good news.
**Another one of our Democratic primary opponents just launched TV ads.**
Why does this matter?
Our Republican opponents and their Super PACs have already spent nearly $40 million on TV ads in PA, making this one of the most saturated and hard-to-break-into markets in the country. Dr. Oz himself has already spent more on TV ads than any other Senate candidate _in the entire country._
Between the GOPs’ super PAC powered ads, and this opponent launching their first ads this week, it's going to be even harder for our own ads to break through. And you may remember, **we just launched two new ads on Wednesday.**
**With the primary just two months away, it’s now or never, Derek.**
**[Can you help us keep our ads on the air so we can reach and mobilize more voters across PA? Each and every dollar you can give will make a difference in our fight for ad time.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45247?refcode=em20220311-4934&t=1&akid=4934%2E434096%2EWcRE_Y)**
**[Fight Back: Donate $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45247?amount=5&refcode=em20220311-4934&t=2&akid=4934%2E434096%2EWcRE_Y)**
If you flip through the channels anywhere in PA, you’ll see for yourself — Dr. Oz + the GOP are using seemingly endless amounts of money to drown our state in TV ads. And because of that, it may seem like they’re pulling ahead in this race.
But we know our message of progress, hope, and determination will speak to the people of PA — just like it has in every county John + Gisele have visited on this campaign. The polls prove it, our petitioning results prove it, and the size of our grassroots movement prove it: Our campaign is the one to beat.
**[That’s why it’s so important that you make a donation of $5 today so we can keep our ads on the air and ensure we’re reaching every single voter in PA. It’s now or never.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45247?refcode=em20220311-4934&t=3&akid=4934%2E434096%2EWcRE_Y)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45247?amount=5&refcode=em20220311-4934&t=22&akid=4934%2E434096%2EWcRE_Y)**
__
Thank you for your constant support and enthusiasm as we enter the last two months before the primary. Let’s win this, together.
—Fetterman for PA

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220311-4934-footer&t=23&refcode2=4934_434096_WcRE_Y&akid=4934%2E434096%2EWcRE_Y)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=4934%2E434096%2EWcRE_Y)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=4934%2E434096%2EWcRE_Y)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Val Demings
subject: Coming to you personally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
I'm dangerously short of my daily fundraising goal
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6884?t=6&akid=1481%2E878179%2Eu6bQzw) **This is urgent.

As of 1 p.m., I'm dangerously short of my daily fundraising goal - and I can't afford to fall behind now that Election Day is rapidly approaching. So I'm coming to you personally:** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6884?t=7&akid=1481%2E878179%2Eu6bQzw) Senate control hinges on what happens here in Florida, and we have a real chance to flip this seat blue. Florida's last Senate race was one of the closest in the country. That's why Mitch McConnell and GOP outside groups are spending millions to defeat me and prop up Marco Rubio. If I'm going to have the resources to win, I must reach my midnight goal.

**The next donation could be the one that closes my fundraising gap. So with polls showing Marco Rubio and me neck and neck, I've got to ask:[**Will you donate $5 or more to help me flip Florida blue and expand our Democratic majority?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6884?t=8&akid=1481%2E878179%2Eu6bQzw) Every single grassroots donation is absolutely crucial ahead of tonight's midnight deadline.** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6885?t=9&akid=1481%2E878179%2Eu6bQzw)

Thank you so much for your support,

Val Demings
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1481%2E878179%2Eu6bQzw). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1481%2E878179%2Eu6bQzw).**

name: Team AOC
subject: Homelessness
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
The housing crisis is exploding. Federal policy, private equity, and wealthy real estate lobbies are only fueling the surge of homelessness across the country. It’s time to organize against these powers driving the housing crisis.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220311-2858-header&t=1&akid=2858%2E2526796%2E_pzVEQ)
The housing crisis has become all the more evident.
In New York City, tenants are experiencing monthly rent increases anywhere from $500 to $1,000. There is a clear link between increasing rents, displacement, and homelessness. In New York City, a 5% rent increase has been associated with an additional 3,000 residents becoming homeless.1
Many politicians and the media work to equate crime with homelessness in order to make people’s knee-jerk reaction to homelessness more policing. Why? This keeps people from seeing and organizing against the larger powers driving the housing crisis, like private equity and real estate lobbies. **It’s an easy sell to think that a number of police officers will “fix” the crises of housing or violence created by powerful interests, but, in reality, that serves to cover up the crisis that we’re all suffering from.**
Crime and homelessness have many complex and contributing factors. The fact is by the time the rate of crime and homelessness surges, **a web of policies and decisions have already driven that result – housing costs, community disinvestment, real estate lobbying, etc.**
Luckily, there is still a lot we can do and it begins at the local level. Local elections are extremely relevant to the housing crisis – especially when it comes to the rules on zoning. **That is why Alexandria and her PAC, Courage to Change, are working to help identify and support local, pro-housing candidates across the country.**
**With your help, we can leverage our movement to build and elect a slate of local, pro-housing candidates who are committed to making housing permanently affordable, inclusive, and widely available.** [If you’re able to, you can support this effort by splitting a contribution between Change to Courage and our campaign today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220311?refcode=em20220311-2858-P_FND_ANO_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2858_2526796__pzVEQ&akid=2858%2E2526796%2E_pzVEQ)
**[Chip in to elect pro-housing candidates →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220311?refcode=em20220311-2858-P_FND_ANO_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2858_2526796__pzVEQ&akid=2858%2E2526796%2E_pzVEQ)**
Across the country, candidates who want to take on the real estate industry and other special interests face systematic disadvantages in our electoral system. The Courage to Change PAC is our answer to that broken system. We reward challengers and incumbents who display political courage. In order to receive our support, candidates have to commit to turning down any donations from corporate PACs, including real estate PACs or donations from executives of real estate companies.
Courage to Change has already identified 37 local candidates from across the country who are running in this election and are ready to fight for bold progressive housing reform. [You can check them out here.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10440?t=22&akid=2858%2E2526796%2E_pzVEQ)
We know that local leaders have enormous power when it comes to housing – but that their elections rarely get the attention they deserve. We’re working to change that.
[Please split a donation of $3 – or whatever you can afford – today to help us support pro-housing candidates who will fight for the policy solutions our communities need. ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220311?refcode=em20220311-2858-P_FND_ANO_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=2858_2526796__pzVEQ&akid=2858%2E2526796%2E_pzVEQ)
In solidarity,
Team AOC
1 - [Center for NYC Affairs](http://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10452?t=24&akid=2858%2E2526796%2E_pzVEQ)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220311?refcode=em20220311-2858-P_FND_ANO_END&t=25&refcode2=2858_2526796__pzVEQ&akid=2858%2E2526796%2E_pzVEQ)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220311-2858-P_FND_ANO_END&t=26&akid=2858%2E2526796%2E_pzVEQ)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=27&akid=2858%2E2526796%2E_pzVEQ) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=28&akid=2858%2E2526796%2E_pzVEQ) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=29&akid=2858%2E2526796%2E_pzVEQ)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

body:
The Senate race is heating up in Pennsylvania. You may have heard of more from some of my opponents. They’re spending millions trying to distract from their decades of pandering to left wing interests and sordid history of associating with foreign governments.

|
---
Peter -- The Senate race is heating up in Pennsylvania. You may have heard of more from some of my opponents. They’re spending millions trying to distract from their decades of pandering to left wing interests and sordid history of associating with foreign governments. By contrast, I have spent decades fighting for Pennsylvanians. I have fought to defend our history and statues from the woke mob, supporting our law enforcement officers. name: =?utf-8?Q?Nathan=20Hochman=20for=20Attorney=20General=202022?=
subject: Los Angeles Sheriff Alex Villanueva Endorses Nathan Hochman for Attorney General
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nathan Hochman for Attorney General 2022
body:
| | |
---
| | If the Democrat Sheriff of Los Angeles, the Republican Sheriff of Orange County, the Democrat former District Attorney of Los Angeles, and the Republican former District Attorney of Los Angeles were all sitting at a table together, most would assume there is not a whole lot of common ground in the room.

Yet one thing that Sheriff Alex Villanueva, Sheriff Don Barnes, former LA DA Jackie Lacey, and former LA DA Steve Cooley all agree on is that Nathan Hochman is the best choice Californians have to serve as their next Attorney General. These Los Angeles and Orange County Sheriffs and DAs have represented over 13 million Californians, nearly one-third of the state.

Check out the video below from yesterday's press conference, when Sheriff Alex Villanueva joined the team and endorsed Nathan Hochman for Attorney General.
---
| [ ](https://strategyinsightshq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=5e0f919766&e=94837ebab3 "Los Angeles County Sheriff Alex Villanueva Endorses Nathan Hochman for Attorney General")
---
| As Nathan mentioned at the press conference, Sheriff Villanueva is fighting each and every day to keep California's largest county safe, in spite of the dangerous policies of appointed AG Rob Bonta and LA DA George Gascon that have led to explosions in violent and street crimes, homelessness, human trafficking, and fentanyl and opioid poisonings. Nathan looks forward to joining Sheriff Villanueva and all law enforcement in the fight to keep Californians safe and secure through common sense, pragmatic, safety-first solutions.

We need a new Attorney General who will be a partner with law enforcement, instead of vilifying them; someone who will work collaboratively to keep our communities safe. Sheriff Villanueva is the latest leader to recognize the best person to serve in that role is Nathan Hochman.

If you are ready to join our team and fight for the future of California, head over to [www.NathanHochman.com](https://strategyinsightshq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=4473e9e690&e=94837ebab3) today!

Best,

Team Hochman

The radical left's attempt to silence parents must be stopped. | | | [ ](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=2a2f8584c6&e=edf8a4d16d)

---
| ,

With mask mandates, Critical Race Theory and school board misconduct plaguing schools across America,**parents have taken a stand** to protect their children from left-wing propaganda in schools.

_**The Biden Administration called these parents "domestic terrorists"**_ for speaking out, __even _[_c_ alling for FBI surveillance of parents who believe families should have a say in their child's education.](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=80082e2091&e=edf8a4d16d)_

**Attorney General Todd Rokita and 13 other Republican Attorneys General are ****suing the Biden Administration **for [concealing documents related to their scheme to intimidate patriotic parents.](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=894c8677cf&e=edf8a4d16d)

Montana AG Austin Knudsen [had this to say](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=74804f6439&e=edf8a4d16d):** ****_“Parents concerned with what their kids are being taught in school are not domestic terrorists – and the White House’s attempt to label them as such is deeply troubling."_**

While Democrats continue to undermine parental rights, Republican Attorneys General understand that **_parents matter_** , and are committed to defending American families against the liberal elites and federal bureaucrats trying to take control of our kids' education.

This fight isn't over, and Republican AG's need your immediate support. [**Can you give $10, $25, or $50 today to hold Joe Biden and the Democrats accountable?**](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=ab42a33e05&e=edf8a4d16d)

name: Kildee for Congress
subject: Dan is taking on Big Pharma
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Did you see Dan’s message about addressing prescription drug prices? He is committed to fighting against price gouging by Big Pharma because no American should be forced to ration their care.

**[Will you sign on to our petition now to demand that we address this growing issue? We need to hear from you in the next 24 hours →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42870337/334659020/-1559411618?refcode=DK_EM_PT_3MO_20220311_1_2&utm_source=dk_em_pt_3mo_20220311_1_2&source=DK_EM_PT_3MO_20220311_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzA3NDE0YS03ZWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OL2Cvgo2lp8wrLNBb_rP7cnM9JuruQ3OdJHYFaXreNE=&emci=19205cd4-6ca1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=4c07414a-7ea1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=31479900)**
* * *
**_Dan’s Original Message:_**

We must address unfair price gouging by big pharmaceutical companies. For too long, families and seniors have been forced to pay up to 10 times more for drugs like insulin than patients in other countries. That’s not right. So in Congress, I’m working to lower the costs of prescription drugs.

**I’ve introduced new legislation to cap the price of insulin at $35 per month for every American, regardless of their insurer.** I’ve also supported efforts to let Medicare negotiate directly with pharmaceutical companies to lower costs.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42870351/334659031/-1559411618?refcode=DK_EM_PT_3MO_20220311_1_2&utm_source=dk_em_pt_3mo_20220311_1_2&source=DK_EM_PT_3MO_20220311_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzA3NDE0YS03ZWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OL2Cvgo2lp8wrLNBb_rP7cnM9JuruQ3OdJHYFaXreNE=&emci=19205cd4-6ca1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=4c07414a-7ea1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=31479900)
It's simple: As long as I am your representative, I will fight to make sure that every American can afford the life-saving medication that they need.

**[Do you agree that we must take action immediately to address the skyrocketing costs of prescription drugs so every Michigan family and senior can get the care they need? He is committed to fighting against price gouging by Big Pharma because no American should be forced to ration their care. Dan’s Original Message: We must address unfair price gouging by big pharmaceutical companies. For too long, families and seniors have been forced to pay up to 10 times more for drugs like insulin than patients in other countries. That’s not right. So in Congress, I’m working to lower the costs of prescription drugs. I’ve introduced new legislation to cap the price of insulin at $35 per month for every American, regardless of their insurer. I’ve also supported efforts to let Medicare negotiate directly with pharmaceutical companies to lower costs. It's simple: As long as I am your representative, I will fight to make sure that every American can afford the life-saving medication that they need. I am the father of a type-1 diabetic, and I’ve seen firsthand how expensive prescription drugs impact one’s budget. | | Friend: This is an especially important message about my 27 years of dedicated service as a police officer. As Marco Rubio launches desperate attacks on my law enforcement career, I hope you'll read this to the end.

I entered the police academy because I loved my community and wanted to protect it from harm. After graduating at the top of my class, I woke up and put on my uniform every day, ready to risk my life because _ _ I took an oath to protect and serve the people of Florida.
**While I was working the midnight shift, Marco Rubio was plotting his trajectory as a career politician. **I’ll put my record up against his any day – but the problem is, Rubio has the powerful influence of the GOP dark-money machine on his side.
As national Republicans spend millions of dollars on attack ads that question my loyalty to the men and women in law enforcement, I need your help today to set the record straight: [**Will you donate $5 or more to help me reach more voters and flip Florida blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42876694/334709708/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2604-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2E5OTczNi1hOGExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wwlWCQQsXGkKjLlKAbkoPJWmDfSYhP9qM0pqvXKjAjE=)

Back in 1983, **I was one of only three women in my police academy class**. But after years of hard work and dedication, I rose to the top of the department and became the first woman to serve as Orlando's chief of police.
My story doesn't stop there. When I was appointed chief of police, Orlando was in crisis. The murder rate was at an all-time high, but I brought the department together and built relationships within the community. Standing with the brave men and women of the Orlando Police Department, we reduced violent crime by 40%.
To protect the city of Orlando, it took long, sleepless nights. And if I'm elected to the Senate, I'm ready to spend long nights protecting our right to vote, reproductive rights, access to health care and so much more.
I'll never stop fighting to protect and serve. If you're with me, please donate $5 or whatever you can right now to flip Florida blue.

Here's the best link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42876696/334709710/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2604-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2E5OTczNi1hOGExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wwlWCQQsXGkKjLlKAbkoPJWmDfSYhP9qM0pqvXKjAjE=)**
From the bottom of my heart, thank you for joining this grassroots movement.

Chief Val Demings

| | Dear Friends,

**First, we wanted to take a moment to thank all of my generous supporters for their past and continued support. Your donations and continued hard work getting our message out there have been invaluable.** However, the work is not done and we now have entered a critical campaign stage where your financial contributions will really make a difference.

**This is an opportunity to elect a governor who tackles the problems Oregonians care about -- a governor who fully understands the struggles faced by citizens throughout the state. _I am that __governor_. **But** ** we can't get there without your financial support today.

[Whatever you are able to chip in will be essential to our success moving forward.](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=d887052c22&e=7e91be8cad)

I can't do this without you. Thanks again for your support

Jessica Gomez
Republican for Governor

body:
We have two options.
#
The latest polls in the Texas Governor’s race show Beto on the rise — narrowing Greg Abbott’s lead.
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53909?refcode=ema20220311-179967&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=179967%2E444211%2EcATBs4)
The bad news about this is that Greg Abbott and his corporate mega-donors are about to double down on their efforts to buy another four years in office.
**This is a make or break point for our campaign.** And we have two options:
1. Sit back while Abbott spends as much as $100 million on attack ads as he misleads Texans about his catastrophic failures as Governor.

OR
2. Dig deep as a grassroots team to compete with Abbott’s fundraising so Beto has the resources to fight back against imminent attacks, further close the gap with Abbott in the polls, and ultimately win.

Beto has what it takes to defeat Greg Abbott, and how supporters like you show up today will have a major impact on what happens next in this race to determine the future of health care, education, jobs, democracy, and so much more in Texas. | I'm running for Congress because I want to create change for my community here in Texas. Where we're from, we work together to help each other through hard times. Now, there's no question that our country is going through hard times _right now_. If my opponent were committed to working through the problems with his colleagues in Congress, maybe I wouldn't feel like he needed to go!

Unfortunately, that's not how Ronny Jackson operates. For Ronny, every hour that passes is another hour to sing Trump's praises, question the vaccine, and spread racist vitriol. How can we solve our problems if our Representative can't focus on anything but his next loony tweet?

I'm running as a problem-solver, a collaborator, and a pragmatist. I'm running to make sure my community has a champion in Congress.

[Will you donate to give Ronny Jackson the boot and send some SOLUTIONS to Congress?](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=4971d2efa9&e=4712f71bea)

Thanks so much,

Kathleen Brown
Democrat
TX-13

We all know the truth that the reason they are backpedaling on the mask issue now is that they are heading for a catastrophic loss in the midterm elections coming up. No American should ever be forced to do something against their free will. If people still want to wear a mask, then by all means wear one, but we should not be forcing others to because a small portion of the country doesn’t want to follow the real science. God Bless, Yesli Vega Conservative Republican for Congress Virginia's 7th District | Military Wife. Mother. Law Enforcement Officer. * | Paid for by Yesli Vega for Virginia Copyright © 2022 Yesli Vega for Virginia, All rights reserved.

name: Cade, Campaign Manager
subject: [Add your name] Calling on Tim Ryan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Tim Ryan has only committed to participating in ONE Democratic debate — and he’s holding us back.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220311-778-footer-ak&t=2&akid=778%2E90090%2EWV02rh)
Hey, it’s Cade, Morgan Harper’s campaign manager!
**I wanted to reach out to you to talk about Democratic debates in Ohio.** Republicans have already held MULTIPLE rounds of debates before the primary elections. And the Democratic primary candidates have yet to participate in _even one debate_. Here’s where we are with Democratic debates in Ohio:
**FIRST:** Morgan wrote a letter to the Ohio Democratic Party Chair Elizabeth Walters calling for a series of debates between her and her opponent Tim Ryan. **Tim Ryan refused to debate Morgan and talked down on our campaign for U.S. Senate. 🚩🚩🚩 **
**THEN:** Morgan participated in two debates with Josh Mandel – because she’s willing to debate anyone, anytime, to make sure that Ohioans know about her vision for Ohio.
**NOW:** We’re less than 55 days away from the primary election and Tim Ryan _just_ agreed to have **one** Ohio Debate Commission-sponsored Democratic debate. Meanwhile, Republicans have already had 15 public debates and forums.
[](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/add-your-name-tell-tim-ryan-participate-more-democratic-debates?refcode=em20220311-1&t=3&akid=778%2E90090%2EWV02rh)
**It’s pretty clear: Tim Ryan has been afraid to get onstage and debate in front of Ohio voters.** Tim Ryan’s refusal to participate in debates has robbed Ohioans of choice. Voters deserve to see their candidates in an open and unbiased forum — more than just once.
[**Can you add your name right now to call on Tim Ryan to participate in more debates before the primary on May 3rd? With all our voices together, we can show Tim Ryan that we won’t accept anything less.**](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/add-your-name-tell-tim-ryan-participate-more-democratic-debates?refcode=em20220311-1&t=4&akid=778%2E90090%2EWV02rh)
**[Add your name →](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/add-your-name-tell-tim-ryan-participate-more-democratic-debates?refcode=em20220311-1&t=5&akid=778%2E90090%2EWV02rh)**
Morgan has been READY to speak for herself and let the voters decide. Even if Tim Ryan wants to deny voters the chance to hear from their Democratic candidates more than once, it’s up to us to keep our foot on the gas and up the pressure.
[**Please****, it’ll take less than a minute to add your name and call on Tim Ryan to participate in more Democratic Debates.**](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/add-your-name-tell-tim-ryan-participate-more-democratic-debates?refcode=em20220311-1&t=6&akid=778%2E90090%2EWV02rh)
**[Add your name →](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/add-your-name-tell-tim-ryan-participate-more-democratic-debates?refcode=em20220311-1&t=7&akid=778%2E90090%2EWV02rh)**
Together,
Cade
Campaign Manager
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate in Ohio
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220311-778-footer&t=8&refcode2=778_90090_WV02rh&akid=778%2E90090%2EWV02rh)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=778%2E90090%2EWV02rh)

name: Team Booker
subject: We’re going to block him from returning to the Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Earlier this week, the Senate passed the Emmett Till Antilynching Act,
which is now headed to President Biden’s desk for his signature.

This is an important step in our nations healing, one that has taken 122
years for us to achieve.

For decades, lawmakers and advocates have been pushing for this crucial
legislation, only to be blocked by Jim Crow senators. The last time this
legislation was blocked was just two years ago by none other than Rand
Paul.

Yet now — as the historic bill finally passed with unanimous consent —
Rand has the gall to applaud himself for not blocking it again.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16998?refcode=em20220311-1644&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1644%2E346206%2EQ_eBk2 ]Tweet from Rand Paul

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16998?refcode=em20220311-1644&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1644%2E346206%2EQ_eBk2 ]Peter,
we’re going to block him from returning
to the Senate next year — and replace him with Charles Booker. Will you
please chip in $5 to make this happen?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16998?refcode=em20220311-1644&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1644%2E346206%2EQ_eBk2 ]Contribute $5

Politicians like Rand would rather block anti-lynching legislation, spread
lies about the 2020 election, and harm our LGBT children than make sure
everyone has the opportunity to live a healthy, gainful life.

Our purpose — our work — is bigger than putting one man in one office or
replacing one shameful politician.

Our work — and the work that Charles has led so many in — is to continue
the work for justice, until everyone has the ability to safely jog in
their neighborhood, peacefully sleep in their beds, lift their voices in
pursuit of healing, and pursue their dreams in every corner of our
country.

Our work is about coming together, from the Hood to the Holler. It’s about
love, justice, community, and healing. And we would be honored if you’d
join us, Peter.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16998?refcode=em20220311-1644&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1644%2E346206%2EQ_eBk2 ]So, please chip in $5 or whatever you can today to our
campaign to support Charles' leadership as he runs to represent Kentucky
in the U.S. Senate. Our entire campaign is fueled by individual supporters
like you, and our movement is powered by the grassroots.

Thank you,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220311-1644-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1644_346206_Q_eBk2&akid=1644%2E346206%2EQ_eBk2

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1644%2E346206%2EQ_eBk2

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
