name: Doug White
subject: Masks are coming off in Washington
body:
Tomorrow is a big day for Washingtonians – the indoor mask mandate is (hopefully) gone for good beginning Saturday. Gov. Inslee announ
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/f5NzwlnUU/c?w=NqrlAeMouP_q_P8SUItFvo_VFQiPWRhk7MVZtvDf-PI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvL2Y1Tnp3bG5VVT9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjA0OTZmZmUwLWMwYmEtNDYwNi05OTg2LWMyODAzN2U4ZDE1NSJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| | Masks are coming off in Washington
---
| |
---
| | Tomorrow is a big day for Washingtonians – the indoor mask mandate is (hopefully) gone for good beginning Saturday. Gov. Inslee announced masks will be optional in most places starting tomorrow, with a few exceptions for places like healthcare facilities. I think I speak for many in our state in saying I am hugely relieved our community’s health is now considered sufficient to take this step. Additionally, I’m sure I’m not alone in saying I am happy to see people’s faces again and maybe see a movie at a theater for the first time in forever. But as we wade into the uncertain waters of the pandemic’s next phase, there’s cause for both celebration and trepidation. On one hand, it is important we recognize our state’s relative successes in handling Covid-19. Washington had one of the lowest deaths-per-100k rates of any state and our economy has remained comparatively resilient during this global crisis. Washingtonians have been smart – we followed health protocols, we protected our loved ones, we avoided big crowds, we got vaccinated, we got boosted – the list goes on. More than anything, we sacrificed for a greater cause. On the other hand, the virus has devastated the lives of so many in so many ways across our state. People lost jobs, businesses shuttered, kids couldn’t go to school and more than 12,000 of our fellow Washingtonians have perished. Furthermore, I can’t be the only one having flashbacks to July of last year, when our country celebrated the “end” of masking, only to have the Delta variant emerge soon after. I hope this time is different. We have made immense progress in combating Covid, but the pandemic is not over. Our state’s economy is on the mend, but many are feeling the impacts of inflation, the rising cost of housing and lost wages due to the pandemic. Right now it is crucial District 4 has quality representation in Congress. One of the main reasons I began the [Doug White 4 Congress campaign](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/f5NzwlnUU/c?w=J7EvxpeOwQDs_KFa9_rv66PCmoht7J-JfbTgSzm4lSI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZG91Z3doaXRlNGNvbmdyZXNzLnVzLyIsInIiOiJhMDUwMDU5ZC1jOWM3LTQyYzUtOTllOS0zZTBmYTE3NTVkMTYiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIwNDk2ZmZlMC1jMGJhLTQ2MDYtOTk4Ni1jMjgwMzdlOGQxNTUifQ) is the precarious nature of the situation our state is in. If this seat falls to one of my opponents, CD4 will have an anti-vaxxer speaking for us in Congress. We risk losing the progress Washingtonians have fought so hard for the past two-plus years. We need a serious Representative who will follow the data in returning to normal life, make sure our kids are safe in school and repair our hurting economy. Despite the many uncertainties, I think we all deserve to take a deep, un-masked breath and pat ourselves on the back for mobilizing against the virus. We have all had to adapt our lives to the reality of life in a pandemic. For my campaign, this meant few in-person gatherings and more small, outdoor chats and virtual Town Halls. I am grateful we’ve been able to leverage technology to connect with voters safely, but I cannot express my excitement for more face-to-face conversations and less Zoom calls. In light of tomorrow’s momentous un-masking, I hope you’ll join me in the coming weeks for your County’s Town Hall event. These events will be in-person whenever possible and can be attended virtually. [Click here to learn more and RSVP for a Town Hall](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/f5NzwlnUU/c?w=yMPG6WtCNnT4XxGCnQme54y9gf4fP2ylT0ZWl5VCk3g.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZG91Z3doaXRlNGNvbmdyZXNzLnVzL2V2ZW50IiwiciI6ImEwNTAwNTlkLWM5YzctNDJjNS05OWU5LTNlMGZhMTc1NWQxNiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjA0OTZmZmUwLWMwYmEtNDYwNi05OTg2LWMyODAzN2U4ZDE1NSJ9) in your county and stay tuned for more Doug White 4 Congress events in your neck of the woods. In closing, I hope we can all take stock of the progress our state has made against Covid-19. There’s much to be hopeful for, but we can’t let off the gas just yet. I hope we can keep the masks relegated to our gloveboxes and not on our faces. With your help, we can keep winning this fight against the pandemic with Doug White in Congress.
---
| |
---
| | | [**Donate**](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/f5NzwlnUU/c?w=oY6bUyx7ApwFi-NlBOWkZJivfUvZhSKp1z2N87DbDVE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2RvdWd3aGl0ZTRjb25ncmVzc3dlYnNpdGUiLCJyIjoiYzhjOTI2YmEtMDA3Yy00NmVlLWJiZjQtYzZjMDc5MmE0ZTI0IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMDQ5NmZmZTAtYzBiYS00NjA2LTk5ODYtYzI4MDM3ZThkMTU1In0)
---
|
---
| | Out and About I spent last weekend exploring the beautiful Methow Valley and meeting voters at the Winthrop Balloon Roundup. A big thanks goes out to Chris Z, the owner of the Red Apple Inn in Tonasket for his support.
---
| |
---
| | I had the fortune of sitting down with John McReynolds, CEO of North Valley Hospital while in Tonasket. John shared with me the many challenges rural hospitals like his have faced, especially during the pandemic. Our rural healthcare centers are crucial life-lines for so many in District 4, and yet they often lack adequate staffing and funding to stay afloat.
---
| |
---
| | Finally, I had a blast at our meet-and-greet at Old Schoolhouse Brewery in Twisp. Thank you to everyone who came out and I look forward to more face-to-face conversations as Washingtonians unmask!
---
| |
---
| | | [**Donate**](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/f5NzwlnUU/c?w=daXJ6M3Mj6m8coopB3KLe012QlxM1z-x6OgwRCY8FF0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2RvdWd3aGl0ZTRjb25ncmVzc3dlYnNpdGUiLCJyIjoiYjY2N2FlNmMtNTQzYi00ZGJhLTU4ZDUtNWRhMjg5NTE3YjRmIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMDQ5NmZmZTAtYzBiYS00NjA2LTk5ODYtYzI4MDM3ZThkMTU1In0)

name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: Jim Acosta needs to see this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
body:
Help us run our new ad during Jim Acosta’s show on CNN. [](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=e5c93bee1b8443f7b341279c735097a2&_e=zVk-OMRo8ad-RgZGCcNDENAAu611Plmle9Z4APQRoZ3ZtMvNQn1Kv2CzZdY5iRSQiUtS0QUdVQ1Zj71OYYL2TUkyHu6qOOZ3QwtK-P2I9adhoMQnoIUDeCMvaXZAbAROP9cH_jvoGunA1_TU1NHuDjyfvAQjmVVINTJOHVjdgEM0B8RGls3tBsxD2ucrAjJGXnewNRK4yHEb1HZ9X8uqMccEIJ4eBHAsH7_dYeTLGEdVSbzUj2in4TZDQsZddElnYqYGqjSCp5Q3c48jigJpUOwY_ge0RzNr3_xhnIsYeA4sr_DniClimQfKAzw48ALdXFWGZir7nmgyk_gBSaxsif6ZjT5WqsFrlT6RuhyyUnHRad1gaa9T53EBcgeX1jDrMOrmmDtk4JZxv2N8a6vphTQwGoZuxyx0qQlnAjf0730%3D) | |
---
Peter,

Being a mom to young kids was great preparation to be White House press secretary. I had to say no – A LOT – and answer the same question over and over and over again.

And trust me, there was no one in the White House briefing room more inclined to childish outbursts than CNN's Jim Acosta.

So, I think it’s only appropriate that Jim Acosta should watch my new TV ad “No!” and see why I may have to put parental controls on CNN...

name: Senate Republicans
subject: Donald Trump enjoys HUGE lead over Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| Fellow patriot,

We’ve seen some new polling which indicates that President Trump is in good shape in the swing state Georgia should he decide to challenge Joe Biden for a rematch in 2024.

According to a survey by Blueprint Polling, **President Trump leads Joe Biden 51% to 36%** among voters likely to vote in the next presidential election.

That’s a HUGE lead considering that Georgia was home to one of the closest races in the country in 2020.

We’re pretty sure we know the answer to our next question, but we’re curious as to the level of support President Trump enjoys vs. Joe Biden at this moment in time. **[So please oblige us and let us know who you’d vote for if the election were held today: Donald Trump or Joe Biden](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=00f0147f079e48679791a699feefcc97&_e=TgsB4MtBacriS8THtrYmtkYcfj403cafe0ekqIGZPkRDMxGoO46Bk0j34ZsfNsHPFLfEn4PLup9I90j4YbeQBf6f1tF3AweyEHx8iHPNWahsJDfAJTmXsxlmhnQGgj4j_uzuroqApQm5WnXsqTJusjhnzqeP-snoBToQ1lBo6XtYIGHKqYa8dcxcm5RL613uSTTG0qVlQKTuUlfyGh2_FZiXtrC3s5oMtq-gotE86NDzEX5XV2j9_fP15ToXXP-ooIJiBduT4owed03ADN_9VmOoT4GeKp1F2I0kCdk9LFk_R_hMLN-npcDduI62mfbpQzTvZShMlKwD4rjZlCW4vsh89ay5bGRnHijnqpCJO2ix2_ZMxWOBzlFoGvvT1HthyDbnTLvSyNC3evBQcSCvM6Hh14xe-1ZjOy02hNMjX14DshJuvUHar8p_XoGByS4ogLim11oEQ6i_Ui4BdFwOuQ%3D%3D)**.

[** WHO WOULD YOU VOTE FOR?
LET US KNOW ASAP->**](../January Schumer/ https///secure.winred.com/nrsc/trump-biden-poll-cs?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs_nrsc_GAP&utm_campaign=20220311_na_trumpbidenpollcs-v1_GAP_nrsc_nrsc&utm_content=donate&amount=na)

| | Dear Friend,

Under the Biden Administration's weak leadership and our current Senator's excessive spending, it's become more challenging to pursue the American Dream. That's why our team is out in full force sharing our message of how we plan to preserve the American Dream for generations to come.

| Republicans have the opportunity to take back control of the U.S. Senate and put an end to the Democrats' efforts to destroy the American Dream. As a graduate of the United States Air Force Academy, a proud veteran, and the owner of a successful construction company - I believe I am the best candidate to defeat Warnock in November and ensure Georgia has a Senator who represents our conservative values in Washington.

I look forward to continuing my travels around the state to earn your support - one vote at a time.

Very Respectfully,

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeff?=
subject: Voters Are Being Reached!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Jeff Warner For Congress
body:
Come & Be Part Of A GREAT Team! | | | |
---
|
# **Newsletter-March 11 Vol. 2, #6**
---
| | |
##
11 March 22

**Thank You! The outpouring of support is overwhelming. **

**Gerrymandering Court Case**
The gerrymandering court case is being heard this week and a decision is expected by early April. Let’s pray the Maryland Constitution is honored and the Rule of Law is restored. Remember, voters should choose their representatives. Representatives should not choose their voters!

**Phone Calling**
Fourteen people were trained this week and began calling voters. The campaign will impact over 1000 voters every week...and we’re just getting started! Come and be a part of making a BIG difference!

The next wave of phone call training is this week. If you enjoy talking with strangers, you’ll love this. If you don’t like talking to strangers, you’ll love this. Why? Most people don’t answer their phones. If the call goes to voicemail, you can simply click a button that leaves a pre-recorded personal message from Jeff Warner to the voter. In our beta test, under 5% voters answer your call. This means 95 times out of a hundred, you will leave Jeff Warner’s voicemail on their phone. Please email the campaign at [info@JeffWarnerForCongress.com](mailto:info@JeffWarnerForCongress.com) if you’re in interested in getting trained. It's easy.

**Phone Call Training Date Options -_Only One_ Training Session Is Needed**
(All training is by zoom-contact the campaign for zoom login info):
* Sunday, March 13, 4-4:30p
* Tuesday, March 15, 7-7:30p
* Wednesday, March 16, 7:30-8p
* Thursday, March 17, 7p-7:30p

**Details:**
Phone calls are audio only, no video.
A sample script is provided.
The system is all online. Anyone in the USA can assist.
Serve from home (or anyplace you'd like). There is no call center.
Your phone and phone number are not used and are therefore protected.

**Sign Waiving**
If you have a sign...it’s time to start waving! You should soon be seeing people “popping up” waiving and holding Jeff Warner For Congress signs. We are targeting busy intersections especially during rush and lunch hours, schools (during drop off & pickup), shopping centers, sporting events high traffic areas, etc. We need get Jeff Warner’s name out. One person puts her sign in her windshield when she parks for voters to see! If you need a sign, contact the campaign.

**The Economy**
Make no mistake, the disruptions in the economy are planned and predictable. Don’t forget, when Joe Biden took office, gas prices were under $2 per gallon, inflation was under 2%, we were energy independent, and the economy was rip-roaring. This could all happen and happen quickly if the new administration’s policies that were implemented were simply reversed. We are in a war, a war on energy. It is estimated that gas prices could rise another 50% or more from present levels in the near future.

About half of all Americans live paycheck to paycheck. These economic spikes are harming the average family. Jeff Warner is running for Congress to restore common sense policies. These are not Democrat or Republican issues. These are American issues!

Thank You for your support. The campaign continues to make and break records. Come and be a part of this amazing team. Imagine how good it will be to say you were part of this team in November as we celebrate our historic victory!

[**Donate Here**](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=3908493669&e=12a37459a2)

Remember, Jeff Warner is standing with you and for you. Enough is Enough! Together, "We The People" can make a real difference. Now is our time to act. There is hope.

Standing with you,

Jeff
---
| [Jeff Warner For Congress Website](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=996f91adf7&e=12a37459a2 "Jeff Warner For Congress Website")
---
|
---
| | | _© 2021 Jeff Warner For Congress, All rights reserved._
Paid For By Jeff Warner For Congress

**Our mailing address is:**
P.O. Box 634 Greenbelt, MD 20768

[info@jeffwarnerforcongress.com](mailto: info@jeffwarnerforcongress.com)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=e50c016c4c&e=12a37459a2&c=9ccd665c89) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=e50c016c4c&e=12a37459a2&c=9ccd665c89).

name: Brian Burley
subject: 11 Years Ago, Today
body:
She displayed what it meant to ‘Never Give Up’. She taught me the values of hope, perseverance and that hardship solidified my faith in God.
| | | |
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nt20DVqvH2MdA7KFoOWohKDcv_Jpcm953Kw8jx2bbolNz6R6Cgnv7tOOQHyxaqSXgXUHKNzc5W4-W4tdq52eutSb-wBIEBJSoP-r1JqzM-Mmp7Ajj1WJTidY7wv39u8llztKDLImaSQ3voEWL87rQqKXxZge2rkZx-_C7CSyjs1i84byeXFaI7cJQsvZgmYWaGSqecvq_HGONhPuAnFsQA==&c=JQpPuFal17Tuzj9KX3QSbhhOm3I7KiPplZjCps8p_g5FmuhuVkG9Mg==&ch=iifgAbpKa50c4jivy684N0B271TMrT0ET4Wki1aWuczYyLH669xQXg==)
---
---
| Dear Peter Willis,
I have taken the oath and I am officially on the ballot for this upcoming June Primary. I ran in this district two years ago, my team of volunteers and I have built the momentum and name recognition necessary to win as part of the incoming red wave this November.
I am the fighter we need in Congress. I will fight for our faith, families and freedoms. I am our endorsed Republican that will defeat Katie Porter in November. The OC Congress of Republicans, which is chartered by the California Republican Party endorsed my campaign within 24 hours of the new district lines.
This fight won't be easy but I am no stranger to tough fights.
---
| | [SUPPORT MY FIGHT](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nt20DVqvH2MdA7KFoOWohKDcv_Jpcm953Kw8jx2bbolNz6R6Cgnv7tOOQHyxaqSXgXUHKNzc5W4-W4tdq52eutSb-wBIEBJSoP-r1JqzM-Mmp7Ajj1WJTidY7wv39u8llztKDLImaSQ3voEWL87rQqKXxZge2rkZx-_C7CSyjs1i84byeXFaI7cJQsvZgmYWaGSqecvq_HGONhPuAnFsQA==&c=JQpPuFal17Tuzj9KX3QSbhhOm3I7KiPplZjCps8p_g5FmuhuVkG9Mg==&ch=iifgAbpKa50c4jivy684N0B271TMrT0ET4Wki1aWuczYyLH669xQXg==)
---
| I was raised in a small town in Michigan during the Great Recession. My father worked as a forklift operator and my mother as a waitress and an accountant.
I saw firsthand the struggles of the Great Recession. Many lost their jobs, families lost their homes, and those close to retirement lost their life savings.
The difficult times we currently live in are similar. The loss of life due to COVID impacts many families. The ridiculous government mandates have left hardworking Americans without jobs and unable to provide for their families. The lack of leadership in DC has led to an unsustainable amount of inflation and an unsafe world internationally.
But worst of all, our children are growing up in uncertainty. Their whole world has been put on pause the last two years. Our children are the future and they just want to have fun and for things to be normal.
I first came out west in 2007 so that my mother could receive cancer treatment at the City of Hope. This was a rare cancer with less than 25 cases worldwide. My mother did everything she could to be with her family. I have never seen someone work so hard in my life just to survive and spend the final moments with her family.
On this day, 11 years ago my mother passed away after that tough battle with cancer. Tomorrow is also her birthday.
She displayed what it meant to 'Never Give Up'. She taught me the values of hope, perseverance and that hardship solidified my faith in God.
After this hardship, I pulled myself out from below the poverty line as I pursued the American Dream.
Many voters feel elected officials are out of touch. That they don't understand the struggles of everyday people. I share this frustration.
I will be a voice for everyone in our district as I relate to the struggles of everyday people. I will always fight on behalf of you and on behalf of what is right.
I am the ONLY true constitutional conservative running for Congress in our district. I have a higher NRA rating than any current candidate or elected official in Orange County. I am also the only candidate who has pledged to join the House Freedom Caucus.
I am the ONLY candidate that is self-funded. While other candidates are fueled by the swamp, my campaign is not funded by even a penny of special interests.
I am the only candidate that can defeat Katie Porter in November. Porter begins with a huge fundraising advantage. The last thing, Republicans should do is pick a candidate with baggage or scandals. I am the only candidate that has a clean record.
I don't even have a speeding ticket!
I am a humble business owner, not a career politician. As an elected member to the OCGOP Central Committee, I have taken on the party establishment as I have worked tirelessly to help rebuild the Republican party here in Orange County.
I am also running to be one of our youngest Congressional leaders in the country and our first Filipino Republican Representative
As your Congressman, I will advocate for tax relief, fully support law enforcement and military, and oppose unnecessary mandates that hinder prosperity and freedom.
I graciously ask for your vote so that we can defend this conservative seat. We will then use this seat as a building block to Start A New Conservative Movement in California!
A conservative movement that we all can rally behind.
My campaign is majority self-funded as I have loaned my campaigns over $300k to date. But our efforts also rely on loyal supporters such as yourself.
[Chip in best gift of $25, $50, $100, $250, $1000 or even the federal maximum $8,600 per individual/$17,200 per couple that my campaign can receive today!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nt20DVqvH2MdA7KFoOWohKDcv_Jpcm953Kw8jx2bbolNz6R6Cgnv7tOOQHyxaqSXgXUHKNzc5W4-W4tdq52eutSb-wBIEBJSoP-r1JqzM-Mmp7Ajj1WJTidY7wv39u8llztKDLImaSQ3voEWL87rQqKXxZge2rkZx-_C7CSyjs1i84byeXFaI7cJQsvZgmYWaGSqecvq_HGONhPuAnFsQA==&c=JQpPuFal17Tuzj9KX3QSbhhOm3I7KiPplZjCps8p_g5FmuhuVkG9Mg==&ch=iifgAbpKa50c4jivy684N0B271TMrT0ET4Wki1aWuczYyLH669xQXg==)
Help us defend this seat today by rushing your best gift!
---
| | [GIVE TODAY](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nt20DVqvH2MdA7KFoOWohKDcv_Jpcm953Kw8jx2bbolNz6R6Cgnv7tOOQHyxaqSXgXUHKNzc5W4-W4tdq52eutSb-wBIEBJSoP-r1JqzM-Mmp7Ajj1WJTidY7wv39u8llztKDLImaSQ3voEWL87rQqKXxZge2rkZx-_C7CSyjs1i84byeXFaI7cJQsvZgmYWaGSqecvq_HGONhPuAnFsQA==&c=JQpPuFal17Tuzj9KX3QSbhhOm3I7KiPplZjCps8p_g5FmuhuVkG9Mg==&ch=iifgAbpKa50c4jivy684N0B271TMrT0ET4Wki1aWuczYyLH669xQXg==)
---
For contributions made via check, please make your check payable out to 'Brian Burley for Congress' and mail your check to: Brian Burley for Congress 92 Corporate Park Suite C-80 Irvine, CA 92606
Thank you and God Bless, Brian Burley

name: Max Steiner
subject: Resiliency measures to stop wildfires in California.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42872387/334667641/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2E1NzRhYy04NmExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qJGzE1iXP-UtVs9ZaLnJlVaarWS0Xk3G7mkmhQVeGrY=)
Our forests in the North State are in trouble.

We’ve had years of drought and years of terrible fires: the Carr and Camp Fires in 2018, the North Complex Fires in 2019, and the Dixie Fire in 2021. It’s looking like this year is going to continue this terrible trend. The paltry amount of precipitation since the December storms means our forests are already a tinderbox -- and it’s only March.

This is the climate crisis in action, and while there is no “quick fix” for climate change, there are resiliency measures we can start applying right now to our vulnerable forests. **» The first is reintroducing “prescribed fire.” **Low-intensity fires clear out small trees and underbrush that, if left unattended, build up over time into feet of literal kindling. Native American communities conducted small-scale prescribed fires. It’s time to massively scale that practice up.

**» The second is thinning forests.** Cutting down small-diameter trees makes larger, older trees more resistant to fires. A big log won’t burn in your fireplace until there is enough kindling and sticks to get the fire started. It’s similar with forest fires: cutting down small trees deprives fire of the readily accessible fuel that creates mega-fires. (The science, for you pyro-nerds out there, is that fire susceptibility is largely a function of surface area – and smaller trees have much higher surface area/volume ratios than larger trees.) **Doug LaMalfa likes to complain about fires and claims that the answer is to reintroduce clear-cutting. If he was serious about addressing fire risks he would have done so already.**

My brother lost his house to the Carr Fire in 2018. We need to manage our forests better. That is going to cost money, and it means reimposing taxes on rich Americans who bought a tax cut from Donald Trump.

**[I'm ready to protect vulnerable communities from fire, and prevent 39.5 million inhabitants of California from another summer of deadly smoke. If you're with me, chip in a donation to send me to Congress and I will fight for funding to make our forests fire safe again.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42872389/334667643/360059203?refcode=em-3.11.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2E1NzRhYy04NmExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qJGzE1iXP-UtVs9ZaLnJlVaarWS0Xk3G7mkmhQVeGrY=)**

Thanks for your support,

Max
Democrat and Combat Veteran for Congres | **[Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42872392/334667645/360059203?refcode=em-3.11.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2E1NzRhYy04NmExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qJGzE1iXP-UtVs9ZaLnJlVaarWS0Xk3G7mkmhQVeGrY=)**

Max Steiner is a combat veteran, foreign service officer, and Democrat running to flip California's 1st District from red to blue. Consider supporting Max's campaign by [making a grassroots contribution here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42872396/334667670/390307162?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2E1NzRhYy04NmExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qJGzE1iXP-UtVs9ZaLnJlVaarWS0Xk3G7mkmhQVeGrY=)

subject: The truth about Mark Green
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ODESSA FOR CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542

Now that Odessa is officially running for U.S. Congress in Tennessee’s 7th district, we thought you should know who she’s running to unseat. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xQsZ_uHW9ME9h2VPudEgVBlT0rAEcoX_uBPlqDgEOfEQIhz_Vu9SFmd68KrwuQ3aJegxlzx0WErTIW4hjJyWkR3J90f6KLMbnzRCJwbZ8APoNXc1Fnu1bI6YqEmlCS0-YY9ik6y3g-tcmfVBAWwqqNT7JDa4LDocWctDcPck1sjM4UVoXvj2Gej8iMkoEu_gfKvhicFrVMJygLWvmb-h6qDMQeGXPcu71hPUkW9De1yAkYjv7R5sCXD9hs6_uLd6bfIuHI7MsbHUy7Srtk9n6wDOPTe_h2b5Yo3PLQJih9qgwur0dMx2qLSZgW4zkI3uE/3k9/RriYaHBmS9ujuttBH0JmhQ/h0/Osfkm71CDxrlAe_QoVPXM4ubMQem2tp7A1CQMSypR2U) Peter, Now that Odessa is officially running for U.S. Congress in Tennessee’s 7th district, we thought you should know who she’s running to unseat — far-right Congressman Mark Green. [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEibWOe7bYHi4x8R2Skgydw0D7igN0UygRud4fKSI_JcvmGNnm-c1yzaYsfdyjCJ6jDYuVBhfjnOeRLFslTWWvaaTadgjcDgzj_Ofk4AOQvliKg91cYt58BBA6o90_4GVzTdWygyvb4z51T_ZBlqBXrEmKtQnqPqu83EhF7AXiv0DqTrKwPX-LY0hUWEf9t1Z-CBOgA-uOHKzaaxlMRwPFpTKgE8rXRXtbvdJG0RfQijH8EQkVdILRgpKTeV5RF9SichK9bZH5Z9WtPTykIzZtcNagM_B2y5kQAarXOOoMOjMhC-TNcFdCkZz9jb0iAzA0i/3k9/RriYaHBmS9ujuttBH0JmhQ/h1/oCQOuJNxJkbLjnLoOxzX7XfoyoTXbm4r7RO2TAoNCeg) Mark Green styles himself as a war hero, a compassionate physician, and a savvy businessman.**But here’s the truth about Mark Green you absolutely must know:** ❌ Mark Green is a Republican multi-millionaire who got rich off the for-profit health care system — and he’s 100% ready to self-fund this race with unlimited cash. ❌ He’s used a Bible verse to call transgender people "evil" — and that’s only the start of his anti-LGBTQ+ statements. ❌ He was too extreme even for the Trump Administration — a tsunami of criticism over his hateful, backwards beliefs caused him to withdraw from his Cabinet nomination in 2017. ❌ He denies that President Joe Biden won the election and supported a lawsuit attempting to overturn the 2020 election results. It’s past time we kicked Mark Green out of office, and flipping this seat could be the difference in keeping control of the House. **That’s why it’s critical we raise as much money as possible right now to defeat Mark Green and fight back against his far-right agenda.**
[**_Will you rush a donation of $5 to ensure our campaign has what it takes to win this election? With your help, we can hold Mark Green accountable for his actions and elect a progressive to Congress in Tennessee._**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEibWOe7bYHi4x8R2Skgydw0D7igN0UygRud4fKSI_JcvkOSCBSoz3_y7dd02pGF4SGEAgernaAC341xwaupX7Eyn1ACtFdWP4B9A8HYOpLyPdD5ne9hqBm7SuGx6o0gVJQhyzDxY1JME47zEcHZJZmQsl_Qu7CNxhL_z8wB5_0kGvUE-pId4VmDSmxzyjHnGczh8_h-kgka_jkE-XlgYcw0TPLgV5gOC7O3RR4sqXCLf4e9h2JEt6xPLmpvjWfa2DmsHQisPevWFm-CFMD2m0eTItKjqCgbbxwh_cAp6vtxj5Uw0b7xFO5s1nO_Cm4oeyN/3k9/RriYaHBmS9ujuttBH0JmhQ/h2/mj4QXZiPFApOJV1qLKofDtruu1dXgN2us4NgtFns0Iw) [**__**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEiCVoM6G4P-CZBKzA_oDkwXn2oeAR5_ZDubpsg_uH2Fd97xvI_xYs2UFACf1TSFhlAkhA8jnPcHEnvPwbO7kqMJzUTBuLEBhrcdjEPRATymiW75VyO2UgkMciIqdS8Rf29D-owipMwodYXEnhCmu8VcD09ILMT162zLqfwCNfcq6wnCiMZHZs6OvfoXa-H1Rx8M_-SD447GFwZOvCPfDpeQfLO8OeGVwOuiJa1Z-u3n5_K2Dmw5jmxvudzv3a4eMzvcfRo8l96kXLmPum5oNGK7A9glgNz-4BJnGgKqAWR2D3rcO26NqOKJDysvMIAi7MI/3k9/RriYaHBmS9ujuttBH0JmhQ/h3/WkFj8uFi3BRhaY_qMifMTzPBH75R-iKZxfdKCNzvIHw) [Contribute »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEibWOe7bYHi4x8R2Skgydw0D7igN0UygRud4fKSI_JcvnLSLZs3eXSrk9SnL1YZOXq4UVmyGjzyKU_5rY59MyDXg0Dv5EWPmUOcJVP6jI8Y0WtZWNFYUfoxFE137Hd2xRIFU1jR_ejTPvERJghJluegzmJTHsGv6GtYQ6YD5nOB_KzvftKackE5lIv1s2LBJAjjdzP7EqsVrFZC9DKTb-MHQc-P193zf-nHfwKRFAyOeT_rj3BuJOYnYcNgikkACwy-_hSzjMN1GIG7NDNyTxlh1Rphlw2N2Lu8IAGpJIRPLw3ebyIcqL6vGXDEJlXxo-E/3k9/RriYaHBmS9ujuttBH0JmhQ/h4/R5uxgsfceMYLThOKOPjYzpNqRQXQNarGQfY_EAeRDac) Thanks, Odessa Kelly HQ

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, Jane had another busy week as we march towards the May 3rd Primary for U.S. Senate. She continues to work hard each day to earn the vote of Ohio Republicans, listening to the issues they care most about, and sharing her vision for how to help all Ohioans. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Right Person, Right Time** This morning the campaign launched its latest digital ad highlighting Senator Rob Portman’s endorsement of Jane. Last week, Jane and Senator Portman traveled the state to talk about her candidacy and why Senator Portman knows Jane is the right person at the right time to serve Ohio in the U.S. Senate. [ | | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=cdc9a4facf034ad3b7b33b50205b5f53&_e=zIhU2wines_qi5IjeemVT7ZBkpbEYTQyAj2_CWwBbxQk4eZDXybR84tWgnW8e8p0NbmZYoI2aaAjQqL4kVslfPGPkK1ZZ5Sma7QMXUyxD_torTZ87WvcmrxSCTiAmA1RAmIii_mwWPTQx_S9blsLzGGZFIvpS44P1bCYKqse0SVEY-u5mex4qdK9DctROIO3ikCQmQ3wFyEVFCX9sfDVgUXRvEa2ntAn3ykWW4vPOKiRbBU5hF_rmSkNz1ZotpfB-rIlX26b4YPAMdrCrpHZMp63t6xfaZxR6PDU4vwsv4E%3D)
**From the Trail**
On Tuesday night, Jane gathered with supporters in Marion County to talk about her America First campaign for U.S. Senate. It was great to see so many supporters!
[](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=cdc9a4facf034ad3b7b33b50205b5f53&_e=zIhU2wines_qi5IjeemVTwZkuamMtYuuN6GM7-CCpk3LI8Y9miOF7DawMeNw-ByaQlK9kkayL4cA6zzPUDgK0bbVXDVYMmFB-xzuHIWy8lqusa_8mTroL8ASaJwv03kr2BObuzP91fAWxNPt1-5n_dqRSP5PjFe5MBvxAfbEemJoT86wLjTVPd9Imuym_HNMA-PY5-tqiRZdlJUNDHKkrUfI7PaRGSITNaw9Wn2BAxq0Ht8qSoXMtbI495lpjNn64HXxMUTpwWziZKmwi9am95WMZdLqBlzppWONnGH-8-4bt3VLrogDISLsPaLBUkzX7dMNLR2TVH7GKFw2fqhagQ%3D%3D)
On Thursday night, Jane visited Hamilton County to meet with new and old supporters. Jane shared her vision for the U.S. Senate and had great discussion and questions about the issues most important to them.
[](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=cdc9a4facf034ad3b7b33b50205b5f53&_e=zIhU2wines_qi5IjeemVTzktvnO7q4vVaqEZ2oUOaHQkEo4M558UXd6BVN86y_oUGb0USqEJJSQb_xag3MInlh0lzeS2qznS5NKV6W9yvrfKl-_yIHUeNTbgjRulyxp4qnC0aIk8CmqGTXB7ZIMgna05sfgeoybXW4K6GVR8fTZ52wGNUuBnu0fRHM7t8Z4r7ZQ9sYwQ5SrB-3ydQ6BpvBPpUNr5w2X-gDLqjJam2R8uFk17DLG6qgIFLOWOmWZTYWHMeDUj87-h7Wqf9iedpQ%3D%3D)
**Latest Endorsements**
This week the campaign was thrilled to announce support from Ohio Law Enforcement Officials from across the state. Adding to the over 180 conservative endorsements for her campaign, Jane secured the support of Ashtabula County Sheriff William Niemi and Washington County Sheriff Larry Mincks. The Franklin County Chiefs Association also sent a Letter of Support affirming Jane's dedication to the Blue.
"No candidate in the race for U.S. Senate has championed Ohio's incredible men and women in law enforcement like Jane Timken. Today, I am excited to endorse her because I know that she will be a fierce defender of police officers who are on the front lines every day. Jane understands what it means to be 'back the blue,' and has taken the time to listen to officers all over Ohio to determine how she can best serve them once elected. I look forward to having an advocate like her in the U.S. Senate." - **Ashtabula County Sheriff William Niemi**
**Moms Have Had Enough of Democrat Policies**
To commemorate the start of Women’s History month, Jane penned an op-ed for the [Akron Beacon Journal](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=cdc9a4facf034ad3b7b33b50205b5f53&_e=zIhU2wines_qi5IjeemVT1Kk--ZM1lg4bdnqzCXSFMVDYNO2PDkNcHAKXYkDijJRmLjIU9iH3tvmcjoSyq3P2gdytifd_JO3vT-FydBSOv8HJCx3-3W5IjSHl2v1rD_S_NBVsKTmVN_72YxnBo8942lFjrZ_5jhkhqFcGj_9I6RPDb-rshJPhdy3wSm5r9Bm3ZWHYkZQwUZzymhya__u7Os4-hdV8FteOAZA_EKoLgQilgScZehx4rs6oNRkIlZtREWf7vAZeN6qjdS4taNX4u2OMHFSVbpDEmwygjYQDCEfxmVD3IjuX4XPmNmODOKLNO_o5Ux5M0X95F-WQTpIlyjMQdBn3ixeW2W0Vn1XbrA5DMs5h1TUybYeXChqCsEt5oyxhv9XfOkDfRprUp8smCmz2WK1c2Nrw61v40C0YaQTy0EPRly-my_-zlTNzgGqS4zPr7nJkFTd_b8KmniQDw%3D%3D)

"March commemorates Women’s History Month where we celebrate the contributions of women. Throughout history, women have been trailblazers in voting rights, civil rights, and political rights — often ushering in large scale movements that have impacted our communities in incredible ways.

We are on the precipice of yet another movement. This Women’s History Month, we celebrate women, specifically the mama bears, who are leading a political awakening in this country. While we see and honor all those papa bears too, this year is the year of the mom.

The mom fighting back against her children’s lost education when schools were shut down and held hostage by teachers unions. The mom standing up for personal medical freedom and the right to determine her family’s healthcare decisions. The mom outraged with Democrat politicians who want to mask her 2-year-old, but won't hold illegal immigrants at the southern border to the same standard. The mom who has had to leave the workforce because of asinine COVID policies forcing disruptive school and daycare schedules. The mom who has just had enough.

Count me in as one of those angry mama bears.”

You can read the full piece [here](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=cdc9a4facf034ad3b7b33b50205b5f53&_e=zIhU2wines_qi5IjeemVT1Kk--ZM1lg4bdnqzCXSFMVDYNO2PDkNcHAKXYkDijJRmLjIU9iH3tvmcjoSyq3P2gdytifd_JO3vT-FydBSOv8HJCx3-3W5IjSHl2v1rD_S_NBVsKTmVN_72YxnBo8942lFjrZ_5jhkhqFcGj_9I6RPDb-rshJPhdy3wSm5r9Bm3ZWHYkZQwUZzymhya__u7Os4-hdV8FteOAZA_EKoLgQilgScZehx4rs6oNRkIlZtdVK_ihozIFKpWf2pGmaaeKaleBRQU8lVC0ajRx2sgKG0lYGzkzwYFjaIWd1vIpFLzjY_cI3vzHLGekROBmKz1-b4AKLzSNVH5thV6ocuwebMGxLW7sxodf2Sya1GQPBO2rJtQ8cyqAia-APAu5MO-wUwnR_5Ok4MyygDTXB7diUbmL5eO8SV7MO6OmAeWToJcL8lPAYOFsxkhw7o85FFJw%3D%3D).

I hope everyone has a great weekend.
Sincerely,

Rob Secaur
Campaign Manager
Jane Timken for Ohio
Don't want to receive our emails anymore? | [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=cdc9a4facf034ad3b7b33b50205b5f53&_e=zIhU2wines_qi5IjeemVTwf9ijlj5Eo97BoLx4N5JrmQNWOFKdSgv8J1SFpk3wh_tVi3jInryC-MvusvNXpkXoeWSyapi_aDC4evcxs23q58obdsJ6Smniw-gKOQuJvZ1kOSNbXpqm-UHv9QINegLyP7ElYntUfwtUYtI_QHDGjnWOYh81nNDdPfKIV42Y8EtymxavfsOyCCuXwqT82tzdVe2CCw7obt1OWK7BO-PgEw1V0pw978TTVB7_4rqmpc14HGOGaljPWSHjsWmKl4KDGBfAeIxwA07OZ58d2sRAM%3D) | [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=cdc9a4facf034ad3b7b33b50205b5f53&_e=Av5Gbl3eiriZcau_kpyXN7PCHXrxL7Suf6vbYKXCGoxj9zdS5QgV9F8RjgBJh7_v4aGhv03HSDOfoKg6frOlzSTxLWMyi_khqp9xmKJXJ8VCQNHdzzCwxctz6QnrLMITDq0fWyDT6TYpJ7D_74wYSdUGnf6X9ek03yq5fQsnPjVg6HnXvNiuaSxBrx-V_JTwLxCkpKIQ94zcrO8trHkZ_MEqgOKR_dAQNWRg8nSD8qY8SmEeja1pVpp1mD-YlSmyiWV35A2zdCl1i5npbo12qQ%3D%3D)

Adding to the over 180 conservative endorsements for her campaign, Jane secured the support of Ashtabula County Sheriff William Niemi and Washington County Sheriff Larry Mincks. The Franklin County Chiefs Association also sent a Letter of Support affirming Jane's dedication to the Blue. "No candidate in the race for U.S. Senate has championed Ohio's incredible men and women in law enforcement like Jane Timken. Today, I am excited to endorse her because I know that she will be a fierce defender of police officers who are on the front lines every day. Jane understands what it means to be 'back the blue,' and has taken the time to listen to officers all over Ohio to determine how she can best serve them once elected. I look forward to having an advocate like her in the U.S. Senate." - Ashtabula County Sheriff William Niemi Moms Have Had Enough of Democrat Policies To commemorate the start of Women’s History month, Jane penned an op-ed for the "March commemorates Women’s History Month where we celebrate the contributions of women. Throughout history, women have been trailblazers in voting rights, civil rights, and political rights — often ushering in large scale movements that have impacted our communities in incredible ways. We are on the precipice of yet another movement. This Women’s History Month, we celebrate women, specifically the mama bears, who are leading a political awakening in this country. While we see and honor all those papa bears too, this year is the year of the mom. The mom fighting back against her children’s lost education when schools were shut down and held hostage by teachers unions. The mom standing up for personal medical freedom and the right to determine her family’s healthcare decisions. The mom outraged with Democrat politicians who want to mask her 2-year-old, but won't hold illegal immigrants at the southern border to the same standard. The mom who has had to leave the workforce because of asinine COVID policies forcing disruptive school and daycare schedules. The mom who has just had enough. Count me in as one of those angry mama bears.” You can read the full piece . I hope everyone has a great weekend. Sincerely, Rob Secaur Campaign Manager Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? | | ---|---

clean_body: We deserve better. | | | | | Peter, The stakes couldn’t be higher for our race to win the new Eleventh District. Take a look: First, Congressional redistricting in Michigan forced a primary between Andy and his opponent, competing for the Democratic seat in the new Eleventh. Then, independent poll numbers revealed Andy and his opponent in a dead heat tie for this race, calling on our team to ramp up our efforts and lay the groundwork for our primary. Now, our opponent is funded by the same special interest group that has committed to supporting the campaigns of Republicans who spout Trump’s Big Lie. Peter, we deserve better. **We need to protect progressive voices like Andy’s in Congress in order to save our climate, achieve racial and economic justice, and preserve our democracy. = We’re powered by dedicated grassroots supporters like you, Peter — our campaign’s most common contribution is $10. The progressive future we believe in is worth fighting for, but we can’t do any of it without your help. = Let’s go! name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Add your name to urge President Biden to enact his clean energy plan now >>
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE
body:
I know families in Maryland, and across the country, are worried about how higher fuel costs will impact their family budgets.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42872776/334669350/396464211?refcode=em-logo&source=em220311-1-b&refcode2=8a559e44-88a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&contactdata=bbp7g8CI9J7Wxwse69tiLOdoFAmcyT1UXzB1llD1/F2WV77U7koKUVT4lhcjPZP1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTU1OWU0NC04OGExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qw8tvc1MeKsuBmhrYRMJadqKkp3FcydoYks-i4Kq7wo=)
Friends,
As Putin’s illegal invasion of Ukraine causes gas prices to rise, I know families in Maryland, and across the country, are worried about how higher fuel costs will impact their family budgets.
It’s still too early to tell how the global oil market will adjust to the disruptions of Putin’s war and the measures we can take to ease the price squeeze. Here in Maryland, the budget cushion from the American Rescue Plan funds is enabling our state to suspend its .36 cent per gallon gas tax to lower prices at the pump.
But the truth is that as exceptional as the current situation is, we’ve been here before. For decades, our dependence on big oil has left us vulnerable to external factors that cause extreme price fluctuations.
So if one thing is clear, it's that now is the time for us to use every tool at our disposal to insulate Americans from rising gasoline prices — and take critical steps to end our dependence on fossil fuels for good.
That's why I am calling on President Biden to enact his clean energy plan now. It's what we need to lower energy costs for Americans over the long term. And it's what we need to tackle the climate crisis and save our livable planet.
[**If you agree, will you stand with me today and show your support for enacting President Biden's clean energy plan? This is important.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42872777/334669351/-1579325500?source=em220311-1-b&refcode2=8a559e44-88a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&contactdata=bbp7g8CI9J7Wxwse69tiLOdoFAmcyT1UXzB1llD1/F2WV77U7koKUVT4lhcjPZP1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTU1OWU0NC04OGExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qw8tvc1MeKsuBmhrYRMJadqKkp3FcydoYks-i4Kq7wo=&emci=87559e44-88a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=8a559e44-88a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=2216363)

In the long-term, eliminating our dependence on fossil fuels and creating affordable clean energy options will provide the stability we need to keep energy costs low for American households — as well as shield us from autocrats like Putin whose actions can cause us pain at the gas pump.
That's why I was proud to support President Biden's infrastructure plan, which invests in improving public transit systems, building out a national network of electric vehicle chargers, and more.
Overwhelming evidence points to the fact that the impacts of climate change are already here and time is running out for us to take meaningful action. And now, Putin’s war should be another wake-up call.
That's why I'm speaking up to urge President Biden to enact his clean energy plan as soon as possible. And I hope you will join me:

clean_body: I know families in Maryland, and across the country, are worried about how higher fuel costs will impact their family budgets. = Friends, As Putin’s illegal invasion of Ukraine causes gas prices to rise, I know families in Maryland, and across the country, are worried about how higher fuel costs will impact their family budgets. It’s still too early to tell how the global oil market will adjust to the disruptions of Putin’s war and the measures we can take to ease the price squeeze. Here in Maryland, the budget cushion from the American Rescue Plan funds is enabling our state to suspend its .36 cent per gallon gas tax to lower prices at the pump. But the truth is that as exceptional as the current situation is, we’ve been here before. For decades, our dependence on big oil has left us vulnerable to external factors that cause extreme price fluctuations. So if one thing is clear, it's that now is the time for us to use every tool at our disposal to insulate Americans from rising gasoline prices — and take critical steps to end our dependence on fossil fuels for good. That's why I am calling on President Biden to enact his clean energy plan now. It's what we need to lower energy costs for Americans over the long term. And it's what we need to tackle the climate crisis and save our livable planet. In the long-term, eliminating our dependence on fossil fuels and creating affordable clean energy options will provide the stability we need to keep energy costs low for American households — as well as shield us from autocrats like Putin whose actions can cause us pain at the gas pump. That's why I was proud to support President Biden's infrastructure plan, which invests in improving public transit systems, building out a national network of electric vehicle chargers, and more. Overwhelming evidence points to the fact that the impacts of climate change are already here and time is running out for us to take meaningful action. And now, Putin’s war should be another wake-up call. That's why I'm speaking up to urge President Biden to enact his clean energy plan as soon as possible. And I hope you will join me: Thank you in advance for taking action today. Onwards, Chris PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, you can , but we'd be very sorry to see you go.

name: Juliana Stratton
subject: An unforgettable day for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JB for Governor
body:
|
---
Friend — As I watched President Biden introduce the brilliant Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson as the first Black woman nominee for the Supreme Court, I couldn't help but recall how I felt when I was inaugurated as the first Black woman to serve as Illinois' Lt. Governor:

That I was standing on the shoulders of trailblazers, that the joy and determination filling my heart would _never_ diminish.

The historic nature of that day wasn't lost on me then, and it isn't lost on me this Women's History Month either. **[Watch our full video story about my inauguration — and stay up to date with all my campaign updates on Instagram:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42872857/334669827/-505183943?utm_content=big_link&utm_source=email&utm_campaign=20220311_js_whm_instagram&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGE5MDk2My04OWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i_Zgadkmc81t8tpR32lljBdQoVQpZCcrtWnIw7uTNTE=&emci=091be45c-89a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=dda90963-89a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=13891383)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42872858/334669828/-505183943?utm_content=gif&utm_source=email&utm_campaign=20220311_js_whm_instagram&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGE5MDk2My04OWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i_Zgadkmc81t8tpR32lljBdQoVQpZCcrtWnIw7uTNTE=&emci=091be45c-89a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=dda90963-89a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=13891383)
Like it did then, my memory turns to those extraordinary women who shattered glass ceilings so I could serve my state with pride.

**I know we must honor their legacy by building a better future for Illinoisans.**

I'm talking about a future in which health care is widely accessible _and_ affordable, a future in which our government does not restrict the right to choose, a future in which equal work is awarded equal pay and children in every zip code have a way to achieve their full potential.

That's what JB and I are continuing to fight for, friend, and it means so much to us to have you as a partner in this mission. **[Keep track of me on the campaign trail by following my new Instagram page:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42872859/334669829/-1842117230?utm_content=link&utm_source=email&utm_campaign=20220311_js_whm_instagram&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGE5MDk2My04OWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i_Zgadkmc81t8tpR32lljBdQoVQpZCcrtWnIw7uTNTE=&emci=091be45c-89a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=dda90963-89a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=13891383)**
| | | [Follow Juliana](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42872860/334669830/-1842117230?utm_content=button&utm_source=email&utm_campaign=20220311_js_whm_instagram&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGE5MDk2My04OWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i_Zgadkmc81t8tpR32lljBdQoVQpZCcrtWnIw7uTNTE=&emci=091be45c-89a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=dda90963-89a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=13891383)

Humbled to work for you,

Juliana

name: Andy Beshear for Governor
subject: Kentucky's economy is on fire
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Andy ran for governor on the promise that he would focus on increasing economic opportunity for all Kentucky families. He had a plan to build an economy that works for all of us by creating good-paying jobs across the Commonwealth, investing in infrastructure and workforce training, and more. Peter,

Andy ran for governor on the promise that he would focus on increasing economic opportunity for _all_ Kentucky families. He had a plan to build an economy that works for all of us by creating good-paying jobs across the Commonwealth, investing in infrastructure and workforce training, and more.

**Since taking office, he's kept his promise. Here are just a few of Andy's accomplishments so far as governor:**

✅ Led Kentucky's economy through its best year on record,
✅ Helped bring nearly 400 projects creating more than 15,700 full-time jobs for Kentuckians,
✅ Saw a record-breaking $11.2 billion of private sector investments in 2021,
✅ Protected small businesses and helped recover jobs lost throughout the COVID-19 pandemic,
✅ Implemented a vehicle tax relief to help families struggling with inflation.

It's clear: under Andy's leadership, Kentucky's economy is on fire.

Andy's already accomplished so much to help grow our economy, and he's just getting started. He will continue to work every day to create good-paying jobs and build a better Kentucky.

Thanks,

Team Beshear | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign?** [DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-q1-2022?refcode=em22_220311_accomp_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220311_accomp_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email)

name: Doug White
subject: En Washington ya no se requieren mascarillas
body:
Mañana es un gran día para los habitantes de Washington: el mandato de mascarilla para los espacios cerrados desaparecer&aacut
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/37Nzx6Vkd/c?w=UDebeOErUCJYEx4FQVkqIwjUzSyr2CpMLMOmjVSKwPA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvLzM3Tnp4NlZrZD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjA0OTZmZmUwLWMwYmEtNDYwNi05OTg2LWMyODAzN2U4ZDE1NSJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| | En Washington ya no se requieren mascarillas
---
| |
---
| | Mañana es un gran día para los habitantes de Washington: el mandato de mascarilla para los espacios cerrados desaparecerá (esperemos) para bien a partir del sábado. El gobernador Inslee anunció que las mascarillas serán opcionales en la mayoría de los lugares a partir de mañana, con algunas excepciones para lugares como los centros de salud. Creo que hablo en nombre de muchos en nuestro estado al decir que me siento enormemente aliviado de que la salud de nuestra comunidad se considere ahora suficiente para dar este paso. Además, estoy seguro de que no soy el único que expresa su alegría por volver a ver las caras de la gente y quizás ver una película en un cine por primera vez en mucho tiempo. Pero a medida que nos sumergimos en las inciertas aguas de la siguiente fase de la pandemia, hay motivos tanto para la celebración como para la inquietud.
Por un lado, es importante que reconozcamos los éxitos relativos de nuestro estado en el manejo del Covid-19. Washington tuvo una de las tasas más bajas de muertes por cada 100 mil habitantes que cualquier otro estado y nuestra economía se ha mantenido comparativamente
resistente durante esta crisis global. Los washingtonianos han sido inteligentes: hemos seguido los protocolos sanitarios, hemos protegido a nuestros seres queridos, hemos evitado las grandes multitudes, nos hemos vacunado, nos hemos reforzado, y la lista continúa. Más que
nada, nos sacrificamos por una causa mayor.
Por otro lado, el virus ha devastado las vidas de muchas personas de muchas maneras en nuestro estado. La gente perdió sus empleos, los negocios cerraron, los estudiantes no pudieron ir a la escuela y más de 12.000 de nuestros compañeros de Washington han perecido. Además, no puedo ser el único que tiene recuerdos de julio del año pasado, cuando nuestro país celebró el del enmascaramiento, sólo para que la variante Delta surgiera poco después.
Espero que esta vez sea diferente. Hemos hecho inmensos adelantos en la lucha contra el Covid, pero la pandemia no ha terminado. La economía de nuestro estado se está recuperando, pero muchos están sintiendo los impactos de la inflación, el aumento del coste de la vivienda y la pérdida de salarios debido a la pandemia. Ahora mismo es crucial que el 4to distrito (CD4) tenga una representación de calidad en el Congreso. Una de las principales razones por las que comencé la campaña Doug White 4 Congress es la naturaleza de la situación precaria en la que se encuentra nuestro estado. Si este puesto cae en manos de uno de nuestros oponentes, el CD4 tendrá una persona anti-vacunas que hablará por nosotros en el Congreso. Nos arriesgamos a perder el progreso por el que nos hemos esforzado los washingtonianos en los últimos dos años. Necesitamos un representante serio que siga los
datos para volver a la vida normal, se asegure de que nuestros hijos estén seguros en la escuela y repare nuestra debilitada economía. A pesar de las muchas incertidumbres, creo que todos merecemos respirar hondo y darnos una palmadita en la espalda por habernos movilizado contra el virus. Todos hemos tenido que adaptar nuestras vidas a la realidad de la vida en una pandemia. Para mi campaña, estosignificó pocas reuniones en persona y más pequeñas charlas al aire libre y ayuntamientos virtuales. Agradezco que hayamos podido aprovechar la tecnología para conectar con los votantes de forma segura, pero no puedo expresar mi emoción por tener más conversaciones cara a cara y menos llamadas de Zoom.
A la vista del significativo desenmascaramiento de mañana, e[spero que se unan a mí en las próximas semanas para asistir a un evento del Ayuntamiento en su condado.](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/37Nzx6Vkd/c?w=5bie4JJs8Ov8MTkP9zURVKq0OJl0O7l0xT_DbLQxfSM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZG91Z3doaXRlNGNvbmdyZXNzLnVzL2V2ZW50IiwiciI6ImEwNTAwNTlkLWM5YzctNDJjNS05OWU5LTNlMGZhMTc1NWQxNiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjA0OTZmZmUwLWMwYmEtNDYwNi05OTg2LWMyODAzN2U4ZDE1NSJ9) Estos eventos serán en persona siempre que sea posible y se puede asistir virtualmente.
Para terminar, espero que todos podamos hacer un balance de los progresos que ha hecho nuestro estado contra el Covid-19. Hay mucho que esperar, pero no podemos dejar de pisar el acelerador todavía. Espero que podamos mantener las máscaras relegadas en nuestras
guanteras y no en nuestras caras. Con su ayuda, podemos seguir ganando esta lucha contra la pandemia con [Doug White para el Congreso.](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/37Nzx6Vkd/c?w=TZnVuHbjZ9ar_18WZdLMHAfKZJkaaELl_CI1INEjQ4g.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZG91Z3doaXRlNGNvbmdyZXNzLnVzLyIsInIiOiJhMDUwMDU5ZC1jOWM3LTQyYzUtOTllOS0zZTBmYTE3NTVkMTYiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIwNDk2ZmZlMC1jMGJhLTQ2MDYtOTk4Ni1jMjgwMzdlOGQxNTUifQ)
---
| |
---
| | | [**Donate**](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/37Nzx6Vkd/c?w=aTSHQnPFQre3vVKLVqe35vWV6mUlMxMAcL9EzFyxzYw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2RvdWd3aGl0ZTRjb25ncmVzc3dlYnNpdGUiLCJyIjoiYzhjOTI2YmEtMDA3Yy00NmVlLWJiZjQtYzZjMDc5MmE0ZTI0IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMDQ5NmZmZTAtYzBiYS00NjA2LTk5ODYtYzI4MDM3ZThkMTU1In0)
---
|
---
| | Out and About Pasé el fin de semana pasado explorando el hermoso valle de Methow y conociendo a los votantes en el Winthrop Balloon Roundup. Un gran agradecimiento a Chris Z, el propietario del Red Apple Inn en Tonasket por su apoyo.
---
| |
---
| | Tuve la suerte de sentarme con John McReynolds, director general del North Valley Hospital, mientras estaba en Tonasket. John compartió conmigo los numerosos retos a los que se han enfrentado los hospitales rurales como el suyo, especialmente durante la pandemia. Nuestros centros de salud rurales son líneas de vida cruciales para muchos en el 4to. Distrito, y sin embargo, a menudo carecen de personal y fondos adecuados para mantenerse a flote.
---
| |
---
| | Por último, me lo pasé en grande en nuestro encuentro en la cervecería Old Schoolhouse de Twisp. Gracias a todos los que vinieron y espero tener más conversaciones cara a cara mientras los Washingtonianos se vayan desenmascarando.

clean_body: Mañana es un gran día para los habitantes de Washington: el mandato de mascarilla para los espacios cerrados desaparecer&aacut | | Can't see this message? | | | | | En Washington ya no se requieren mascarillas | | | | Mañana es un gran día para los habitantes de Washington: el mandato de mascarilla para los espacios cerrados desaparecerá (esperemos) para bien a partir del sábado. El gobernador Inslee anunció que las mascarillas serán opcionales en la mayoría de los lugares a partir de mañana, con algunas excepciones para lugares como los centros de salud. Creo que hablo en nombre de muchos en nuestro estado al decir que me siento enormemente aliviado de que la salud de nuestra comunidad se considere ahora suficiente para dar este paso. Además, estoy seguro de que no soy el único que expresa su alegría por volver a ver las caras de la gente y quizás ver una película en un cine por primera vez en mucho tiempo. Pero a medida que nos sumergimos en las inciertas aguas de la siguiente fase de la pandemia, hay motivos tanto para la celebración como para la inquietud. Por un lado, es importante que reconozcamos los éxitos relativos de nuestro estado en el manejo del Covid-19. Washington tuvo una de las tasas más bajas de muertes por cada 100 mil habitantes que cualquier otro estado y nuestra economía se ha mantenido comparativamente resistente durante esta crisis global. Los washingtonianos han sido inteligentes: hemos seguido los protocolos sanitarios, hemos protegido a nuestros seres queridos, hemos evitado las grandes multitudes, nos hemos vacunado, nos hemos reforzado, y la lista continúa. Más que nada, nos sacrificamos por una causa mayor. Por otro lado, el virus ha devastado las vidas de muchas personas de muchas maneras en nuestro estado. La gente perdió sus empleos, los negocios cerraron, los estudiantes no pudieron ir a la escuela y más de 12.000 de nuestros compañeros de Washington han perecido. Además, no puedo ser el único que tiene recuerdos de julio del año pasado, cuando nuestro país celebró el del enmascaramiento, sólo para que la variante Delta surgiera poco después. Espero que esta vez sea diferente. Hemos hecho inmensos adelantos en la lucha contra el Covid, pero la pandemia no ha terminado. La economía de nuestro estado se está recuperando, pero muchos están sintiendo los impactos de la inflación, el aumento del coste de la vivienda y la pérdida de salarios debido a la pandemia. Ahora mismo es crucial que el 4to distrito (CD4) tenga una representación de calidad en el Congreso. Una de las principales razones por las que comencé la campaña Doug White 4 Congress es la naturaleza de la situación precaria en la que se encuentra nuestro estado. Si este puesto cae en manos de uno de nuestros oponentes, el CD4 tendrá una persona anti-vacunas que hablará por nosotros en el Congreso. Nos arriesgamos a perder el progreso por el que nos hemos esforzado los washingtonianos en los últimos dos años. Necesitamos un representante serio que siga los datos para volver a la vida normal, se asegure de que nuestros hijos estén seguros en la escuela y repare nuestra debilitada economía. A pesar de las muchas incertidumbres, creo que todos merecemos respirar hondo y darnos una palmadita en la espalda por habernos movilizado contra el virus. Todos hemos tenido que adaptar nuestras vidas a la realidad de la vida en una pandemia. Para mi campaña, estosignificó pocas reuniones en persona y más pequeñas charlas al aire libre y ayuntamientos virtuales. Agradezco que hayamos podido aprovechar la tecnología para conectar con los votantes de forma segura, pero no puedo expresar mi emoción por tener más conversaciones cara a cara y menos llamadas de Zoom. A la vista del significativo desenmascaramiento de mañana, e Estos eventos serán en persona siempre que sea posible y se puede asistir virtualmente. Para terminar, espero que todos podamos hacer un balance de los progresos que ha hecho nuestro estado contra el Covid-19. Hay mucho que esperar, pero no podemos dejar de pisar el acelerador todavía. Espero que podamos mantener las máscaras relegadas en nuestras guanteras y no en nuestras caras. Con su ayuda, podemos seguir ganando esta lucha contra la pandemia con | | | | | | | | Out and About Pasé el fin de semana pasado explorando el hermoso valle de Methow y conociendo a los votantes en el Winthrop Balloon Roundup. Un gran agradecimiento a Chris Z, el propietario del Red Apple Inn en Tonasket por su apoyo. | | | | Tuve la suerte de sentarme con John McReynolds, director general del North Valley Hospital, mientras estaba en Tonasket. John compartió conmigo los numerosos retos a los que se han enfrentado los hospitales rurales como el suyo, especialmente durante la pandemia. Nuestros centros de salud rurales son líneas de vida cruciales para muchos en el 4to. Distrito, y sin embargo, a menudo carecen de personal y fondos adecuados para mantenerse a flote. | | | | Por último, me lo pasé en grande en nuestro encuentro en la cervecería Old Schoolhouse de Twisp. Gracias a todos los que vinieron y espero tener más conversaciones cara a cara mientras los Washingtonianos se vayan desenmascarando. | | | | | | | Get our latest updates | | | | | | | | Share on social | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . name: Ben Samuels
subject: We always knew…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BEN SAMUELS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Most people have known for a long time that Donald Trump is a dangerous con man who was never fit for office. Thanks to the House’s investigation into the events of January 6th, it turns out he might also be a criminal President who tried to break the law to remain in power. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42873714/334673082/754402510?refcode=220311-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDc5MTc1YS04ZWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6SccYf6OZ5fhLyDX1ddNmBrYC4u87qcZzwYETiFzONo=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42873716/334673085/754402510?refcode=220311-email target=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDc5MTc1YS04ZWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6SccYf6OZ5fhLyDX1ddNmBrYC4u87qcZzwYETiFzONo=) Dear friend, Most people have known for a long time that Donald Trump is a dangerous con man who was **never** fit for office. clean_body: Friend, “I will not lie, cheat, steal, or tolerate those who do.” That’s the honor code at West Point, and if we applied it to DC, a lot of politicians would be out of a job. The people of our great country deserve better. Our citizens deserve leaders with experience and integrity. We need leaders who put the American people first and themselves last. I’m Pat Harrigan. I’m a West Point graduate, U.S. Army Green Beret, and Bronze Star Afghanistan combat veteran. All my life, I’ve put service to America over myself. Our country needs a leader who will get our economy back on track, keep our citizens safe, and put your needs first. I’m ready to be that leader, and I’d be honored for a hardworking American like you to join me in our fight for the future. I’m not done fighting for our country - In service, Pat Harrigan Special Forces Green Beret Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee Pat Harrigan is a former member of the U.S. Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by The Pat Harrigan Committee

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Bright future ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
I'm fighting to make America's basic bargain accessible to every family across this country
#

Friends,
Whether or not we raise wages for folks and give families the relief they need in this treacherous economy is at stake this year.
Whether or not we protect the right for working people to organize on the job is at stake this year.
Whether or not we protect a woman's right to choose what to do with her body is at stake this year.
Whether or not we make sure all our kids go to a good school and have a bright future ahead of them is at stake this year.
I'm fighting to make America's basic bargain accessible to every family across this country because I know in my bones what it means when our government leaves working families behind.
But I can't do it alone. I need your support if we're going to win this May primary and take our fight to the United States Senate. That's why I have to ask:
[Can you make a $3 donation to our campaign today? We are facing our last FEC deadline of the primary election, so every contribution sends a big message this month.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42873974/334674431/-358086307?refcode2=880fee10-8fa1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&refcode=em220311-30d&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODBmZWUxMC04ZmExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8IjsnLvLAWiViHTsqWC5D48zQa_u3C4UXNhwMN04wKQ=)
