name: INDEMS
subject: Fast Facts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
###
**\- INDems Have Plan to Solve High Gas Prices, Achieve Energy Independence - What is the Indiana GOP’s Plan? Nothing. - ** President Joe Biden and Indiana Democrats understand that overall prices are higher and Hoosiers are struggling to make ends meet. That’s why Democrats have a plan to solve issues like high gas prices by helping the nation achieve energy independence. This plan includes continuing [record-level production of oil and natural gas](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42874327/334675939/328088525?s=20&t=_KjnztQYbCo_8DJEubAurA&refcode=idp-em-220225-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDhhYjEyNS05MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HkrqyEqqfx3IfibZa8fwMq48cVD_pEiTPpzUZU-oQqQ=&emci=93dced04-8da1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=348ab125-91a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535), investing in renewable energy resources (like solar), and [accelerating electric auto production](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42874328/334675940/-236485357?refcode=idp-em-220225-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDhhYjEyNS05MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HkrqyEqqfx3IfibZa8fwMq48cVD_pEiTPpzUZU-oQqQ=&emci=93dced04-8da1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=348ab125-91a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535). Thanks to President Biden and policies in the American Rescue Plan and [The Jobs Act](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42874329/334675941/1107218545?refcode=idp-em-220225-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDhhYjEyNS05MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HkrqyEqqfx3IfibZa8fwMq48cVD_pEiTPpzUZU-oQqQ=&emci=93dced04-8da1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=348ab125-91a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535), the opportunity for energy independence has never been closer. But Indiana Democrats took it a step further. To lower the state’s high gas prices right now, [State Senator Tim Lanane](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42874330/334675942/-107621105?refcode=idp-em-220225-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDhhYjEyNS05MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HkrqyEqqfx3IfibZa8fwMq48cVD_pEiTPpzUZU-oQqQ=&emci=93dced04-8da1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=348ab125-91a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535) called on the Indiana General Assembly to temporarily halt the gas tax during the 2022 legislative session. Indiana Democrats support Senator Lanane’s call for the state to temporarily halt the gas tax, because the state has an existing [$900 million budgeted for future infrastructure projects](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42874331/334675943/994746276?refcode=idp-em-220225-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDhhYjEyNS05MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HkrqyEqqfx3IfibZa8fwMq48cVD_pEiTPpzUZU-oQqQ=&emci=93dced04-8da1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=348ab125-91a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535) to make up any shortfall - all thanks to the [American Rescue Plan](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42874332/334675944/2075701864?refcode=idp-em-220225-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDhhYjEyNS05MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HkrqyEqqfx3IfibZa8fwMq48cVD_pEiTPpzUZU-oQqQ=&emci=93dced04-8da1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=348ab125-91a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535). Unfortunately, the Indiana Republican Party said “NO” to lowering the state gas tax. And while politicians like Todd Young and Jackie Walorski [use lies to attack President Biden](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42874333/334675945/-1199469487?refcode=idp-em-220225-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDhhYjEyNS05MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HkrqyEqqfx3IfibZa8fwMq48cVD_pEiTPpzUZU-oQqQ=&emci=93dced04-8da1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=348ab125-91a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535) – it’s worth remembering: Republicans have no legitimate plan to combat inflation or lower gas prices. They’re only relying on culture wars.
**\- Todd Young Calls to Dismantle Union Work on Projects for The Jobs Act - Despite Voting “NO” on Infrastructure Law - ** This week, Indiana Democrats criticized U.S. Senator Todd Young for [leading an effort to dismantle organized labor’s contracts with the federal government](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42874334/334675946/107481735?refcode=idp-em-220225-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDhhYjEyNS05MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HkrqyEqqfx3IfibZa8fwMq48cVD_pEiTPpzUZU-oQqQ=&emci=93dced04-8da1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=348ab125-91a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535). In a letter with more than 40 other Republican U.S. Senators, Young claimed prioritizing union jobs would harm implementation of The Jobs Act – the same law the [Senator delivered a last minute flip-flop](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42874335/334675947/1697189899?refcode=idp-em-220225-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDhhYjEyNS05MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HkrqyEqqfx3IfibZa8fwMq48cVD_pEiTPpzUZU-oQqQ=&emci=93dced04-8da1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=348ab125-91a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535) prior to its passage in the U.S. Senate last fall. This is also the same law Todd Young is [trying to take credit for behind the scenes](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42874336/334675948/2003224299?refcode=idp-em-220225-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDhhYjEyNS05MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HkrqyEqqfx3IfibZa8fwMq48cVD_pEiTPpzUZU-oQqQ=&emci=93dced04-8da1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=348ab125-91a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535) despite putting the Indiana GOP’s partisanship ahead of a brighter future for Hoosier families. Simply put: Todd Young and Indiana Republicans are putting their culture wars on organized labor ahead of the state’s bright future. This partisan agenda is exactly why Indiana has a [F-rated workforce](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42874337/334675949/1944698831?refcode=idp-em-220225-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDhhYjEyNS05MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HkrqyEqqfx3IfibZa8fwMq48cVD_pEiTPpzUZU-oQqQ=&emci=93dced04-8da1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=348ab125-91a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535) and a [D+ rated education system](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42874338/334675950/1944698831?refcode=idp-em-220225-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDhhYjEyNS05MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HkrqyEqqfx3IfibZa8fwMq48cVD_pEiTPpzUZU-oQqQ=&emci=93dced04-8da1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=348ab125-91a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535). Good-paying jobs are leaving the state, and Hoosier workers now must clock in more hours for far less cash. Luckily, Indiana Democrats delivered for Hoosier workers and organized labor by passing the American Rescue Plan and The Jobs Act, two laws that put workers ahead of partisanship. Democrats have made it pretty clear: We will *always* stand on the side of organized labor and the Hoosier worker.
**\- The 2022 Election: INDems’ Economic Agenda vs. INGOP’s Culture Wars - ** As the 2022 Culture War legislative session reached sine die, Indiana Democrats wanted to share what will be the two competing visions for the 2022 state and federal elections: Indiana Democrats’ economic agenda vs. Indiana GOP’s culture wars. The 2022 legislative session cemented the Indiana Republican Party as the Culture War Party – willing to set aside facts, expert opinions, and the will of voters to pursue a nationalized agenda that has nothing to do with Indiana’s future. In a shortened session, Indiana Republicans were able to:
1. **Disrespect Indiana’s law enforcement (after voting to defund them twice in 2021)**

2. **Politicize classrooms and educators **

3. **Attack innocent minors for playing school sports**

4. **Discredit the life-saving COVID-19 vaccine**

5. **Question the integrity of Indiana’s elections **

In contrast, Indiana Democrats have delivered the kitchen-table issues that matter most to voters, including creating 70,000 jobs, expanding broadband, revitalizing infrastructure, and funded public schools at levels not seen since 2008. The Indiana Democratic Party will crisscross the state to share how leaders like André Carson, Frank Mrvan, and statehouse elected officials delivered a brighter future for our families. Hoosiers will also learn how Republicans like Todd Young and the statehouse supermajority put their national culture wars ahead of the kitchen-table issues that matter most with voters.
**\- Voice Your Opinion, INDems Platform Process Continues -** It’s an election year across the state, and the Indiana Democratic Party is ready to travel to all 92 counties to help elect community leaders who will deliver on an economic agenda that includes creating jobs, supplying investments in broadband, improving roads/bridges, water, and other infrastructure needs, and securing a better future for the communities we call home. To do that, Indiana Democrats is continuing its biennial tradition of approving a party platform that includes all voices across the state. Hearing dates and locations are available below. Please take a look at a draft of the Indiana Democratic Party’s 2022 Platform, “[The Hoosier Promise](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42874339/334675951/-1920848487?refcode=idp-em-220225-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDhhYjEyNS05MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HkrqyEqqfx3IfibZa8fwMq48cVD_pEiTPpzUZU-oQqQ=&emci=93dced04-8da1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=348ab125-91a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535)” and consider submitting your suggestions online. Your ideas are valued and important and we’d like to craft a strong platform – with your help – and spread the news across the state during this critical election year.
**\- Indiana Democratic Party is Hiring -** _War Room Director_ The Indiana Democratic Party seeks a War Room Director to build an innovative program to hold the Indiana Republican Party accountable and inform and educate Hoosier voters year in and year out. A mix between rapid response and lead researcher, the director will work with the IDP team to push back against misinformation, disinformation, and conspiracy theories so all Hoosiers have the freedom to make better and informed decisions on the issues facing our state and country. _Voter File Administrator_ The Indiana Democratic Party seeks a Voter File Administrator (VFA) to work on our data team to better serve candidates, committees, and local parties as we seek to build a stronger Democratic Party in the Hoosier State. The role is ideal for someone looking to be more involved in politics and party building and who wants to dedicate themselves to learning more about the inner workings of campaigns, strategy, technology, and voter targeting and contact. IDP is making strides on this front and we want to add to our team with this important role. _Regional Organizing Directors_ The Indiana Democratic Party is hiring Regional Organizing Directors to to build a stronger party in the field throughout the Hoosier State. The role is ideal for someone looking to be more involved in politics and party building and who wants to dedicate themselves to learning more about the inner workings of campaigns, strategic planning, and voter targeting and contact. These are important roles to building back a fair and equitable two party system of government in Indiana. For full job descriptions and how to apply visit our website at [https://www.indems.org/jobs/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42874340/334675952/1076440731?refcode=idp-em-220225-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDhhYjEyNS05MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HkrqyEqqfx3IfibZa8fwMq48cVD_pEiTPpzUZU-oQqQ=&emci=93dced04-8da1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=348ab125-91a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535) _Spring and Summer Interns_ The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals interested in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates.
#### Benefits
* Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process
* Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials
* Enhanced communication and organizational skills
* Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development
* This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field.
* We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school.

#### _Intern Duties_
Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include:
* campaign research
* voter outreach
* data entry
* assistance with local campaign events
* special projects

####
_Qualifications_
Applicants must be:
* passionate about Democratic politics
* trustworthy and responsible
* able to communicate effectively with others
* flexible and willing to help when needed
* able to work on multiple tasks at once

#### _How to Apply_
Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at [lauren@indems.org](mailto:lauren@indems.org). **\- Opportunities -** **\- INDems: "The Hoosier Promise" Platform Hearing - Statewide Virtual #2 -** [Monday, March 21](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42874341/334675953/-1986106239?refcode=idp-em-220225-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDhhYjEyNS05MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HkrqyEqqfx3IfibZa8fwMq48cVD_pEiTPpzUZU-oQqQ=&emci=93dced04-8da1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=348ab125-91a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535), 6 - 7:30 PM EST **\- INDems: “The 2022 Crossroads Summit” for county parties and candidates -**
**Join INDems for our[2022 Crossroads Summit on Saturday, April 2](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42874342/334675954/884541636?refcode=idp-em-220225-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDhhYjEyNS05MWExLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HkrqyEqqfx3IfibZa8fwMq48cVD_pEiTPpzUZU-oQqQ=&emci=93dced04-8da1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=348ab125-91a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535) in Indianapolis for a day-long training for party leaders and candidate campaigns. ** ###

name: Paul Gazelka
subject: Parents DO have rights in the classroom!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Provided by
body:
It's the law, but they don't want you to know [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=707c1360849d4d9bb6189135b26dcf32&_e=WS7g3QynyJZN0mXas4P5jF-URGmQnL44IP3fzEEMx2vElqscK4EB-uLZYf28ZlZfFtq59096vPlQ3sNsGsXVs0f2fsFmjbSMRCIilFqgkBNl7go1ovJNAoVHqKHaL0Ol6CKoLq7Uv3vCKMkarycGkUli0nWFAXv3K6LF3fbnlpjb3pS2NqjxFfhejF3wy30D9q0TL4OqCfAgcb0np2FtwpBxEdR_pn0QuDOH7jtggfW4Uu-Zr9iZo6vg13JqgIw521i9lARNF-Yo7YRAKu_8UCwPKFNZr-bYo1-8QCr8tpR4hDaHCCKlfFm_zi9STEV3PFo_lWyYQtUmOGJqs-whhrXs74ZyQ4xOQo9Ijyz6GQY%3D) My friend, For many parents, the pandemic was an eye-opening experience. As their children learned virtually from home, for the first time ever, parents had a front-row seat to their children's education - and many didn't like what they were seeing. **[Now that students are back in school, we must rebuild the trust between parents and educators, because a child's education is about building a partnership for optimal learning.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=707c1360849d4d9bb6189135b26dcf32&_e=WS7g3QynyJZN0mXas4P5jF-URGmQnL44IP3fzEEMx2vElqscK4EB-uLZYf28ZlZfFtq59096vPlQ3sNsGsXVs0f2fsFmjbSMRCIilFqgkBNl7go1ovJNAoVHqKHaL0Ol6CKoLq7Uv3vCKMkarycGkV6-U0PU1cZsylCoqRaLXvEi93SdfBlG3lGT18Wx-K1BIsENHV2NyAk2hoVZfem0qa84rxoTo4rUxnllRFelWjUSSoPid3IbuRnX28lylNgvPJmprGHrqJy-izq--4WKQzLpV473zx-qMeJTaZ9jgGe9OdhHZ4XU-nRQiXcXgGQvULbLK_oYc7dGCWFPOrPI7VICANU2tsGUnqBPLe1T2QI%3D)** Many parents weren't aware that curriculum transparency is required by law, so we added language to the law to make sure that parents aren't ever left in the dark again. Now the end of this statute reads, _"school districts must notify and inform parents of this policy at the beginning of each school year by United States mail, e-mail, or another direct form of communication, and must include the policy in the official school handbook or an official school policy guide."_ [**Stand Up for Parents >> Chip In!
**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=707c1360849d4d9bb6189135b26dcf32&_e=WS7g3QynyJZN0mXas4P5jF-URGmQnL44IP3fzEEMx2vElqscK4EB-uLZYf28ZlZfFtq59096vPlQ3sNsGsXVs0f2fsFmjbSMRCIilFqgkBNl7go1ovJNAoVHqKHaL0Ol6CKoLq7Uv3vCKMkarycGkY5xacBVo38e6RbJSdbo5eMmEmcwbE18-53DPfpPjZX_yHgjs-RefPd9JgJR1iAmh25ILAtQ06sZUFho_xgwKPT-8IYB2xUHzAy8_fmr85FEjTQC7VVEdAX70b1lEnaJon6TlAzUK8nvQr6XoPRAhwZ5G2sxfSilG_8ZWtWj0GXwO5w1acwRFATs2MFQXJHIlx7sM6tbzC0pNETCvpVZb5Y%3D) This all seems like common sense, right? So I can't for the life of me understand why we are getting so much pushback from the Democrats - after all, they approved the original legislation for curriculum transparency. As your Senate Majority Leader, I have been a fierce advocate for parents and students. Just imagine what I can do as your Governor! Together we can ensure that all parents are informed about what their children are learning in school. Thank you, clean_body: It's the law, but they don't want you to know My friend, For many parents, the pandemic was an eye-opening experience. As their children learned virtually from home, for the first time ever, parents had a front-row seat to their children's education - and many didn't like what they were seeing. Many parents weren't aware that curriculum transparency is required by law, so we added language to the law to make sure that parents aren't ever left in the dark again. Now the end of this statute reads, "school districts must notify and inform parents of this policy at the beginning of each school year by United States mail, e-mail, or another direct form of communication, and must include the policy in the official school handbook or an official school policy guide." This all seems like common sense, right? So I can't for the life of me understand why we are getting so much pushback from the Democrats - after all, they approved the original legislation for curriculum transparency. As your Senate Majority Leader, I have been a fierce advocate for parents and students. Just imagine what I can do as your Governor! Together we can ensure that all parents are informed about what their children are learning in school. Thank you, Senator Paul Gazelka Candidate for Governor | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for and Provided by Gazelka for Governor P.O. Box 175 Little Falls, MN 56345

name: Tim Burchett
subject: Take The Russians’ Money And Run! 🏃
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=2ff3a9c08464485a85553d121fa6b7c6&_e=9bpQY104l910MjdTe2tuF4uo9fa_o36QnNXoPPNZNGx3Cls0NR2S2MIVl5u8jWDEoNGWjirvTa-fqs8tdl-G107D2VW8svrHckwheY7B7FC3lgIdWqfAcIaaZyrrhw_PfvsyJ9m3jWbsJ-KUT9Dc8Lutn2SXGhMsQWuPGBADqivMoNdFrayy-sFOt0oMcdShMoZVjdTLCmxnKaNzQsts0CsOyxGrfkANokzrCEZtCrYRm5_W_J4JIA-cGWYZN9zEOOw6GeI-hr-KN7SGzRZgDYcUCOdA2y1YdykKmVOFI2ACTpmB-LjDrdeALkgmO0BhVi4ckh5ovZocx8vBkQE9xqup0FORHkofQO834hZmAu6AHhLuLhzhIAxwITMH8CBO0yRmKSy5XHh0X2IBNwDwfQ%3D%3D) | |
---
**Take The Russians’ Money And Run! 🏃
**
I want the Ukrainians to have the supplies they need to beat the Russian bastards to a pulp and take care of their people in this time of war, but I know America is also dealing with unprecedented debt and a president who likes to spend and spend and spend...

That’s why I [introduced](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=2ff3a9c08464485a85553d121fa6b7c6&_e=9bpQY104l910MjdTe2tuF0Ob07zpl7ZJokFBUxS0ndXnIcjSnQ-WBoWOpSTvz_Y26bwIkbLyrU_2E76RJ-xuYrwQ_dikwNquvwujO6iqoapgVb3E-Umvwu0fPRQ3Y2hxBfe2RGMTaYnm37vuC-DbWsbjqI7whs2QQJpTgVU9wA8QU-YJ7f4tzYsnCuNZe0kUpghxtjKhXO83uAvlze2N06eU3Os9k4go3phLCYInlm5Tge2gJ1su1Wjj5wBeHXoM9lo0CHnFaTy0xWLKR3VB7whKQJO7_CoQPlsrgWnq4SSoFx3iwZ9t2lBdeZ-gLYfQ6JQ2KQVkxHjgp5Bk36vLNSCI4E-vLYKTDtKd9Hz2z1TWSE0EqNQTYGEOHL3i_GpD) a bill that would seize the assets of Russian and Belarusian oligarchs and use those funds for U.S. humanitarian aid to Ukraine.

That’s what I call killing two birds with one stone.

We need to target and penalize the wealthy elites who are not only aiding Putin but _profiting_ off Putin’s war machine. Then we can redirect the funds to the very people who are suffering as a result of Russia’s vile war crimes.

Just this week, Russia [targeted](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=2ff3a9c08464485a85553d121fa6b7c6&_e=9bpQY104l910MjdTe2tuFxymfr1MVybcNBX8kPbStqOTTobDFWfAucRptOQfnTdk-QTuEcLP1e-iAb6BTqwDZypbWmnRdTSrKSkxYvsxqaVUg5iBWnaxD-JFJ7XQQS4kbEbYSrkcr3cgWYUOfAKe-qeNtEXWt2z_FiOHyiO1rq00cM1UkpUGCpaw_K8TGu9WVevIGmowJM66yJk-xP-nOJo-L2wzaVjw1wRrDTZ44Zr-XQx0FFyMaWoPBN2t3WJ-h4g8kCMpW9PAY0elZferv1YK1JBKnbv3M2KoySYeBV0IYOOQJl8awa668itmlb8JI1VBsElMz8FAW5k3hakssBYIX8pFjpdPX6CHINPUjIA%3D) numerous evacuation convoys, hospitals, and apartment buildings. President Biden is taking his sweet time to act. It took him 12 days to [ban](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=2ff3a9c08464485a85553d121fa6b7c6&_e=9bpQY104l910MjdTe2tuF8qEnTdpIx5ePx7hJyyulmPFkEGsTjnkwx2hm5NRc5cdnLw0NETYZYwqG-xyySyQ-ltuBX7OUYzjxaE1VIb8-RR5ZtbjF6CUSF0YCNFtKjGlq9EHnADZRVNZydc4OSeANg2bgNWwQt0uSMjhUDeNvp4diF5JnZxCtlLdCk5E3FTHhmwox9KQS0_TlMtSIZkLJ2idSD6SDlwShZRHHNujpj53NcZrg_3zWyNZGOsRYhGpsQf6cfGuiY-mpuqHDx5LbQmPrF3BFOiQYaUbuoA5ep__toDWdO9pDJJKJUKvsLc0UhQSZK5UurBSVPGAoYleXQ%3D%3D) Russian oil imports, and when Poland offered to help transfer MiG-29 planes to Ukraine, Biden [declined](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=2ff3a9c08464485a85553d121fa6b7c6&_e=9bpQY104l910MjdTe2tuF2wCr0uwl2FgSUDHNqS-ml4R2211yORuJD-ucCviZZPclAO0jiPG-XrGSiLbFacYuKsWE1lfoyyFykb01jdya1WMedhLujL2Z7EpphpQnfkeM-TdHCwp_RL6vxtiX9C7DoM3ikGSxA5MRnEoOFvYHs8e1gNSsZ1LK8e6oOcTudxZ6zbI2AuLffKbFJ214TgVTsQpYB7lnoL4o7tpBrACyHnzkkhtzAOM3_KOD3fBzgaqMN8YFLj5YypElCs095IEsXUVsoFhqvkqpIq3Y5P73LnbW-vVKnq6yUIyCO_5lu2JtojuC02in9tFqGPjbc8Qq2tU_kt7fpT4weDoud15Da8%3D).

Putin started this war. He and his cronies should have to pay—literally. There’s a way to do what’s right on a world stage, while also looking out for our people here at home. This bill does just that. Now, let’s get to work!

**→ Read more** : Congress wants to seize money from Russian elites, send it to Ukraine ([Washington Free Beacon](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=2ff3a9c08464485a85553d121fa6b7c6&_e=9bpQY104l910MjdTe2tuF0Ob07zpl7ZJokFBUxS0ndXnIcjSnQ-WBoWOpSTvz_Y26bwIkbLyrU_2E76RJ-xuYrwQ_dikwNquvwujO6iqoapgVb3E-Umvwu0fPRQ3Y2hxBfe2RGMTaYnm37vuC-DbWsbjqI7whs2QQJpTgVU9wA_2BX5GkiDBGilv3L_jCqd-1Lh4v_EI_snn_hn8EVIFMJzSmH-5aROPWBsZx6AujrFQZpY8qrpC6wEXpINyyaw5BbQ_byHXO1C23E0AUh5_chzUktvHERH9Rn9hfX7cpeNGhRymsNECBaRqS_BPIctyy6qA7VXSAFFLyFgAa1mAGB_eYJ_REuFwqH8Re9HbHqJ5NC2jlc5wX3pelHqm_O4U))
|

clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. | | Take The Russians’ Money And Run! 🏃 I want the Ukrainians to have the supplies they need to beat the Russian bastards to a pulp and take care of their people in this time of war, but I know America is also dealing with unprecedented debt and a president who likes to spend and spend and spend... That’s why I a bill that would seize the assets of Russian and Belarusian oligarchs and use those funds for U.S. humanitarian aid to Ukraine. That’s what I call killing two birds with one stone. We need to target and penalize the wealthy elites who are not only aiding Putin but profiting off Putin’s war machine. Then we can redirect the funds to the very people who are suffering as a result of Russia’s vile war crimes. Just this week, Russia numerous evacuation convoys, hospitals, and apartment buildings. President Biden is taking his sweet time to act. It took him 12 days to Russian oil imports, and when Poland offered to help transfer MiG-29 planes to Ukraine, Biden . Putin started this war. He and his cronies should have to pay—literally. There’s a way to do what’s right on a world stage, while also looking out for our people here at home. This bill does just that. name: Sen. Tom Cotton
subject: Quintessentially American
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
body:
When I come across promising candidates for office, I make a concerted effort to do everything I personally can to help them succeed. |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=e13c17adfc8e41dca9cd83e0df0ab5ff&_t=ePWH662M_3zzUWg-axS_TD9RqkNN-NlOr3wgL_PSHrWfiS2dtBBnDKZXRt8KTS-unGWC_fY3ltLkFdCVKIgNbI1jHC3UkLCoZGkQh4_c1W-na9oPuG-8IH1PfJAFcIlyptyE7ty4xoJmHNxHyUKmAM0wIMp8E060zW5rKQ2iwY0%3D).

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e13c17adfc8e41dca9cd83e0df0ab5ff&_e=f0ZJf84YaK7nBnY6DhponTuQgUAqr9cjJxxOuW79lduhcYSkwqwHqaZ9ibmVfODEPem_Dnku1JF3LXIC7nvNkN1vlWSN0lbgas2enSwmqNBMhx13sr5E-prvrx8_GQ9SoCX8Obb6ffdA6COM2c0p9GDKVXnxQxHwrNMde1py4ol58UJjmvb3u4BdQZpj_Er2Xp6Ba64cZ7y9uFDGJe5_Zf19a6-1ZYNsS-kiDJhdXOTbjiwoCSaFxXMqJ-6vg9b_aglIFBHYc45KRE5wO1fbFSLqWHfjGtJLUERreGFt5yDAThNsIJQZe7_l5paCgWFpzPPm1TIhZ1lXWFJAL0K3Pyh6ZlzEOGE0HAkGrhL4C3NDWSeeKF0eenfNH2Rus3s-gONMslDAEvRzorh1gvFzevayeWTE_B2cfm_ZVhATvOjfuRpKQBl8okG_DhRxt8IXG5TrgfNiOWio1d0dGyVhMnm9BBzz5G_Rzl2dNJUveb0%3D)

---

Peter,

While I’m not myself up for reelection for a number of years, I’m absolutely dedicated to helping Republicans win back both the Senate majority and the majority in the U.S. House.

When I come across promising candidates for office, I make a concerted effort to do everything I personally can to help them succeed. That’s why today I’m excited to endorse Mr. Rod Dorilás for Congress.

**Rod’s Dorilás’ story is quintessentially American.** His Haitian immigrant parents came to the United States without a penny to their name; to make a living they picked crops in South Florida. With hard work and a lot of perseverance, they found their own American Dream and became small business owners. And less than forty years after first arriving in the United States, their son – Rod – had the distinct honor of serving the president of the United States.

I’m proud to support the son of entrepreneurial immigrants who built their own American Dream without the help of the government, or socialist-style handouts. **Perhaps with more dedicated public servants such as Rod Dorilás in Congress, grit, determination and personal responsibility may finally win out over the left’s mantra of “give me give me give me.”**

I know it’s a lot to ask, particularly with inflation so high at the moment, **[but if there were ever a candidate worth of a $2 or $3 donation, Rod would be that candidate.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e13c17adfc8e41dca9cd83e0df0ab5ff&_e=f0ZJf84YaK7nBnY6DhponTuQgUAqr9cjJxxOuW79lduhcYSkwqwHqaZ9ibmVfODEPem_Dnku1JF3LXIC7nvNkN1vlWSN0lbgas2enSwmqNBMhx13sr5E-prvrx8_GQ9SoCX8Obb6ffdA6COM2c0p9GDKVXnxQxHwrNMde1py4ol58UJjmvb3u4BdQZpj_Er2Xp6Ba64cZ7y9uFDGJe5_Zf19a6-1ZYNsS-kiDJhdXOTbjiwoCSaFxXMqJ-6vg9b_aglIFBHYc45KRE5wO1fbFTV5j6gDQ_5nTPBdAzyuE4Iy0-Uni4tlnZUOvaOsuln1iSiEtPq9CFndy35Wn2ZzwtJdI_EESlwSAQgFG9rRALo6_qpa5pXJQkNDPlRFz5LcYMxOX8t3mktxcBrx55wXG0mJ6dgWukHPGr3WahtWEO1jM8SOzj1RJoQQbw2eLf_i7csYy2p7Uwul1firkS5g7VveJpZe5OzkeuJ3cM5n6tY%3D)**

[**Send an American Patriot to Congress
Chip in $2>> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e13c17adfc8e41dca9cd83e0df0ab5ff&_e=f0ZJf84YaK7nBnY6DhponTuQgUAqr9cjJxxOuW79lduhcYSkwqwHqaZ9ibmVfODEPem_Dnku1JF3LXIC7nvNkN1vlWSN0lbgas2enSwmqNBMhx13sr5E-prvrx8_GQ9SoCX8Obb6ffdA6COM2c0p9GDKVXnxQxHwrNMde1py4ol58UJjmvb3u4BdQZpj_Er2Xp6Ba64cZ7y9uFDGJe5_Zf19a6-1ZYNsS-kiDJhdXOTbjiwoCSaFxXMqJ-6vg9b_aglIFBHYc45KRE5wO1fbFYkoVFssfSZUss77-9REaqpEi4OWalDiYFkTD-Mdl16_DbypKD4T3TwGS5MG5dofpGY6fxgX_IwAbR89VarOuZVUGDChdmadt5-5ArXqrIEuMDqq99c_LQiONYFlJRPqkqNaKor4yHPe4d72zF_UI5AUo24VuOlqNmw9Wxja6kWDRAYfg4VgXuZ6tODBQY_lZCT5D-FGKj4S2ZLd26QsIbA%3D)
Rod is exactly the kind of representative that the American people need. As a veteran, first generation American, small business owner, and former counsel in the Department of Commerce, Rod brings the experience and energy to make real change in Washington D.C.

Rod is a fighter and the Republican candidate who can win in the South Florida district where he’s running. **[Rod Dorilás has my full backing and I’m asking you to join me in supporting his campaign today.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e13c17adfc8e41dca9cd83e0df0ab5ff&_e=f0ZJf84YaK7nBnY6DhponTuQgUAqr9cjJxxOuW79lduhcYSkwqwHqaZ9ibmVfODEPem_Dnku1JF3LXIC7nvNkN1vlWSN0lbgas2enSwmqNBMhx13sr5E-prvrx8_GQ9SoCX8Obb6ffdA6COM2c0p9GDKVXnxQxHwrNMde1py4ol58UJjmvb3u4BdQZpj_Er2Xp6Ba64cZ7y9uFDGJe5_Zf19a6-1ZYNsS-kiDJhdXOTbjiwoCSaFxXMqJ-6vg9b_aglIFBHYc45KRE5wO1fbFXNw3bw8LTtXCumfGlQ75QBokjK8phxg7j8r-CJwWTQBnbkScIc8xuKdBoWpQHbUgcRlMSspC74t-JrybritrNcISuEcXWd9aV88MlS7HoqXFNPpe6ulotwYTJLDjqa1eREaQhWwkR_n_o1_PU05vcgS0f-XNwgxinFbX8SPyjE3ArbFV522EK_xoWrfWZ2VP0qze4cSeH9SSy9IWRIEC18%3D)**

[**Send an American Patriot to Congress
Chip in $2>> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e13c17adfc8e41dca9cd83e0df0ab5ff&_e=f0ZJf84YaK7nBnY6DhponTuQgUAqr9cjJxxOuW79lduhcYSkwqwHqaZ9ibmVfODEPem_Dnku1JF3LXIC7nvNkN1vlWSN0lbgas2enSwmqNBMhx13sr5E-prvrx8_GQ9SoCX8Obb6ffdA6COM2c0p9GDKVXnxQxHwrNMde1py4ol58UJjmvb3u4BdQZpj_Er2Xp6Ba64cZ7y9uFDGJe5_Zf19a6-1ZYNsS-kiDJhdXOTbjiwoCSaFxXMqJ-6vg9b_aglIFBHYc45KRE5wO1fbFb76NFLtB8sRGr5qAZQof2hiuXxEnHTB6bqe7lSaW7xlYvStLDUz0hCkrIVi9wmFYXvJ0Dz3k3N0rfI4YnzIZNANK03qAtqbRl5C3CWBncSUg-b8FfPYT1zR8bKysvM8ZECrLMoEEPPmkJKjrnNgS1xnHCel9dBXh1Mqq4C_-EPnNDlOvH8YiBGE1PZwCLBa9XYTayYbVthP-xiLdwR_Uqg%3D)
In solidarity,
Sen. Tom Cotton

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e13c17adfc8e41dca9cd83e0df0ab5ff&_e=f0ZJf84YaK7nBnY6DhponTuQgUAqr9cjJxxOuW79lduhcYSkwqwHqaZ9ibmVfODEPem_Dnku1JF3LXIC7nvNkN1vlWSN0lbgas2enSwmqNBMhx13sr5E-prvrx8_GQ9SoCX8Obb6ffdA6COM2c0p9GDKVXnxQxHwrNMde1py4ol58UJjmvb3u4BdQZpj_Er2Xp6Ba64cZ7y9uFDGJe5_Zf19a6-1ZYNsS-kiDJhdXOTbjiwoCSaFxXMqJ-6vg9b_aglIFBHYc45KRE5wO1fbFQka2NsdbKr5_UXYIkVlE2sog9bCXhU4pSVGgBKOTOYdAcS7LpBTRLYVbqh8ycoJUhZgszQWuFT2BPCARYsRo7EvvfCegcul9F9cTJPcJXp0P4OGJ7Cv2pW6XwgWUvoQar2UEzqJ_yQBjbvenVXkBAepYn-xMuEo-PFQXS6sZjMWOAVFbaA1wjP4YbHCA6lqQGvSW2s3E7kam6EcUJFbbOQ%3D)
---

| Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
---

This message was sent to your email address ending in @gmail.com because it was listed as the best way to contact you.

However, if this is no longer the best way to reach you or you no longer want to receive any more of our emails...

We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=e13c17adfc8e41dca9cd83e0df0ab5ff&_t=ePWH662M_3zzUWg-axS_TD9RqkNN-NlOr3wgL_PSHrWfiS2dtBBnDKZXRt8KTS-unGWC_fY3ltLkFdCVKIgNbI1jHC3UkLCoZGkQh4_c1W-na9oPuG-8IH1PfJAFcIlyptyE7ty4xoJmHNxHyUKmAM0wIMp8E060zW5rKQ2iwY0%3D).
